authors_text: Yingchen Yu,Fangneng Zhan,Rongliang Wu,Jianxiong Pan,Kaiwen Cui,Shijian Lu,Feiying Ma,Xuansong Xie,Chunyan Miao
title: Diverse Image Inpainting with Bidirectional and Autoregressive Transformers
title_zh: 使用双向和自回归变压器进行多样化图像修复
abstract: Image inpainting is an underdetermined inverse problem, which naturally allows diverse contents to fill up the missing or corrupted regions realistically. Prevalent approaches using convolutional neural networks (CNNs) can synthesize visually pleasant contents, but CNNs suffer from limited perception fields for capturing global features. With image-level attention, transformers enable to model long-range dependencies and generate diverse contents with autoregressive modeling of pixel-sequence distributions. However, the unidirectional attention in autoregressive transformers is suboptimal as corrupted image regions may have arbitrary shapes with contexts from any direction. We propose BAT-Fill, an innovative image inpainting framework that introduces a novel bidirectional autoregressive transformer (BAT) for image inpainting. BAT utilizes the transformers to learn autoregressive distributions, which naturally allows the diverse generation of missing contents. In addition, it incorporates the masked language model like BERT, which enables bidirectionally modeling of contextual information of missing regions for better image completion. Extensive experiments over multiple datasets show that BAT-Fill achieves superior diversity and fidelity in image inpainting qualitatively and quantitatively.
summary: Image inpainting is an underdetermined inverse problem, which naturally allows diverse contents to fill up the missing or corrupted regions realistically. Prevalent approaches using convolutional neural networks (CNNs) can synthesize visually pleasant contents, but CNNs suffer from limited perception fields for capturing global features. With image-level attention, transformers enable to model long-range dependencies and generate diverse contents with autoregressive modeling of pixel-sequence distributions. However, the unidirectional attention in autoregressive transformers is suboptimal as corrupted image regions may have arbitrary shapes with contexts from any direction. We propose BAT-Fill, an innovative image inpainting framework that introduces a novel bidirectional autoregressive transformer (BAT) for image inpainting. BAT utilizes the transformers to learn autoregressive distributions, which naturally allows the diverse generation of missing contents. In addition, it incorporates the masked language model like BERT, which enables bidirectionally modeling of contextual information of missing regions for better image completion. Extensive experiments over multiple datasets show that BAT-Fill achieves superior diversity and fidelity in image inpainting qualitatively and quantitatively.
abstract_zh: 图像修复是一个欠定的逆问题，它自然地允许不同的内容真实地填充缺失或损坏的区域。使用卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的流行方法可以合成视觉上令人愉悦的内容，但 CNN 捕捉全局特征的感知范围有限。通过图像级注意力，变压器能够对远程依赖性进行建模，并通过像素序列分布的自回归建模生成不同的内容。然而，自回归变压器中的单向注意力并不是最理想的，因为损坏的图像区域可能具有任意形状，并且上下文来自任何方向。我们提出了 BAT-Fill，这是一种创新的图像修复框架，它引入了一种用于图像修复的新型双向自回归变压器（BAT）。 BAT 利用 Transformer 来学习自回归分布，这自然允许缺失内容的多样化生成。此外，它还结合了 BERT 等屏蔽语言模型，可以对缺失区域的上下文信息进行双向建模，以实现更好的图像补全。对多个数据集的大量实验表明，BAT-Fill 在定性和定量的图像修复中实现了卓越的多样性和保真度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于双向和自回归变换器的图像修复框架BAT-Fill，以生成更多样且逼真的缺失区域内容。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积神经网络（CNN）在捕捉全局特征时存在感知域限制，而单向自回归变换器难以处理任意形状的缺失区域上下文信息，导致修复结果多样性不足。
AI.method: 设计双向自回归变换器（BAT），结合类似BERT的掩码语言模型，通过双向上下文建模和像素序列的自回归分布学习，实现缺失区域的多样化生成。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的实验表明，BAT-Fill在图像修复的质量和多样性方面均优于现有方法，定性和定量指标均表现优异。
AI.conclusion: BAT-Fill通过融合双向与自回归建模机制，有效提升了图像修复任务中缺失内容的生成质量与多样性，为相关研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Tao Ni,Qing Wang,Gabriela Ferraro
title: Explore BiLSTM-CRF-Based Models for Open Relation Extraction
title_zh: 探索基于 BiLSTM-CRF 的开放关系提取模型
abstract: Extracting multiple relations from text sentences is still a challenge for current Open Relation Extraction (Open RE) tasks. In this paper, we develop several Open RE models based on the bidirectional LSTM-CRF (BiLSTM-CRF) neural network and different contextualized word embedding methods. We also propose a new tagging scheme to solve overlapping problems and enhance models' performance. From the evaluation results and comparisons between models, we select the best combination of tagging scheme, word embedder, and BiLSTM-CRF network to achieve an Open RE model with a remarkable extracting ability on multiple-relation sentences.
summary: Extracting multiple relations from text sentences is still a challenge for current Open Relation Extraction (Open RE) tasks. In this paper, we develop several Open RE models based on the bidirectional LSTM-CRF (BiLSTM-CRF) neural network and different contextualized word embedding methods. We also propose a new tagging scheme to solve overlapping problems and enhance models' performance. From the evaluation results and comparisons between models, we select the best combination of tagging scheme, word embedder, and BiLSTM-CRF network to achieve an Open RE model with a remarkable extracting ability on multiple-relation sentences.
abstract_zh: 从文本句子中提取多种关系仍然是当前开放关系提取（Open RE）任务的一个挑战。在本文中，我们开发了几种基于双向 LSTM-CRF (BiLSTM-CRF) 神经网络和不同上下文词嵌入方法的 Open RE 模型。我们还提出了一种新的标记方案来解决重叠问题并提高模型的性能。根据评估结果和模型之间的比较，我们选择了标记方案、词嵌入器和 BiLSTM-CRF 网络的最佳组合，以实现对多重关系句子具有显着提取能力的 Open RE 模型。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发基于BiLSTM-CRF的开放关系抽取模型，以解决多关系句子中关系提取的挑战。
AI.motivation: 当前开放关系抽取任务在处理多关系句子时存在性能瓶颈，需探索更有效的模型结构和标注方法。
AI.method: 结合BiLSTM-CRF网络与上下文词嵌入技术，设计新的标注方案以解决重叠问题并优化模型组合。
AI.result: 通过实验比较，确定了最佳标注方案与模型参数组合，显著提升了多关系抽取的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 提出的模型架构和标注策略有效增强了开放关系抽取系统在复杂句子中的表现。

authors_text: Zexuan Yin,Paolo Barucca
title: Stochastic Recurrent Neural Network for Multistep Time Series Forecasting
title_zh: 用于多步时间序列预测的随机循环神经网络
abstract: Time series forecasting based on deep architectures has been gaining popularity in recent years due to their ability to model complex non-linear temporal dynamics. The recurrent neural network is one such model capable of handling variable-length input and output. In this paper, we leverage recent advances in deep generative models and the concept of state space models to propose a stochastic adaptation of the recurrent neural network for multistep-ahead time series forecasting, which is trained with stochastic gradient variational Bayes. In our model design, the transition function of the recurrent neural network, which determines the evolution of the hidden states, is stochastic rather than deterministic as in a regular recurrent neural network; this is achieved by incorporating a latent random variable into the transition process which captures the stochasticity of the temporal dynamics. Our model preserves the architectural workings of a recurrent neural network for which all relevant information is encapsulated in its hidden states, and this flexibility allows our model to be easily integrated into any deep architecture for sequential modelling. We test our model on a wide range of datasets from finance to healthcare; results show that the stochastic recurrent neural network consistently outperforms its deterministic counterpart.
summary: Time series forecasting based on deep architectures has been gaining popularity in recent years due to their ability to model complex non-linear temporal dynamics. The recurrent neural network is one such model capable of handling variable-length input and output. In this paper, we leverage recent advances in deep generative models and the concept of state space models to propose a stochastic adaptation of the recurrent neural network for multistep-ahead time series forecasting, which is trained with stochastic gradient variational Bayes. In our model design, the transition function of the recurrent neural network, which determines the evolution of the hidden states, is stochastic rather than deterministic as in a regular recurrent neural network; this is achieved by incorporating a latent random variable into the transition process which captures the stochasticity of the temporal dynamics. Our model preserves the architectural workings of a recurrent neural network for which all relevant information is encapsulated in its hidden states, and this flexibility allows our model to be easily integrated into any deep architecture for sequential modelling. We test our model on a wide range of datasets from finance to healthcare; results show that the stochastic recurrent neural network consistently outperforms its deterministic counterpart.
abstract_zh: 近年来，基于深度架构的时间序列预测由于能够对复杂的非线性时间动态进行建模而越来越受欢迎。循环神经网络就是一种能够处理可变长度输入和输出的模型。在本文中，我们利用深度生成模型的最新进展和状态空间模型的概念，提出了一种用于多步超前时间序列预测的循环神经网络的随机适应方法，并使用随机梯度变分贝叶斯进行训练。在我们的模型设计中，决定隐藏状态演化的循环神经网络的转换函数是随机的，而不是像常规循环神经网络那样是确定性的；这是通过将潜在随机变量纳入转换过程来实现的，该过程捕获时间动态的随机性。我们的模型保留了循环神经网络的架构工作原理，所有相关信息都封装在其隐藏状态中，这种灵活性使我们的模型可以轻松集成到任何深层架构中以进行顺序建模。我们在从金融到医疗保健的广泛数据集上测试我们的模型；结果表明，随机循环神经网络始终优于确定性神经网络。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于随机递归神经网络（SRNN）的多步时间序列预测方法，通过引入潜在随机变量增强模型对时序动态不确定性的建模能力。
AI.motivation: 传统递归神经网络（RNN）在处理多步预测时存在确定性不足的问题，难以捕捉时间序列中的不确定性。作者希望通过结合深度生成模型和状态空间模型的思想，提升预测性能。
AI.method: 设计具有随机转移函数的SRNN，将潜在随机变量嵌入隐藏状态演化过程，并采用随机梯度变分贝叶斯方法进行训练，同时保持RNN架构的可扩展性。
AI.result: 在金融、医疗等多领域数据集上，SRNN相比确定性RNN在多步预测任务中表现出持续性能优势。
AI.conclusion: 引入随机性机制的SRNN能更有效地建模时间序列的不确定性，为复杂时序预测提供了灵活且高效的解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于随机递归神经网络（SRNN）的多步时间序列预测方法，通过引入潜在随机变量增强模型对时序动态不确定性的建模能力。
motivation: 传统递归神经网络（RNN）在处理多步预测时存在确定性不足的问题，难以捕捉时间序列中的不确定性。作者希望通过结合深度生成模型和状态空间模型的思想，提升预测性能。
method: 设计具有随机转移函数的SRNN，将潜在随机变量嵌入隐藏状态演化过程，并采用随机梯度变分贝叶斯方法进行训练，同时保持RNN架构的可扩展性。
result: 在金融、医疗等多领域数据集上，SRNN相比确定性RNN在多步预测任务中表现出持续性能优势。
conclusion: 引入随机性机制的SRNN能更有效地建模时间序列的不确定性，为复杂时序预测提供了灵活且高效的解决方案。
search_text: Stochastic Recurrent Neural Network for Multistep Time Series Forecasting 用于多步时间序列预测的随机循环神经网络 Time series forecasting based on deep architectures has been gaining popularity in recent years due to their ability to model complex non-linear temporal dynamics. The recurrent neural network is one such model capable of handling variable-length input and output. In this paper, we leverage recent advances in deep generative models and the concept of state space models to propose a stochastic adaptation of the recurrent neural network for multistep-ahead time series forecasting, which is trained with stochastic gradient variational Bayes. In our model design, the transition function of the recurrent neural network, which determines the evolution of the hidden states, is stochastic rather than deterministic as in a regular recurrent neural network; this is achieved by incorporating a latent random variable into the transition process which captures the stochasticity of the temporal dynamics. Our model preserves the architectural workings of a recurrent neural network for which all relevant information is encapsulated in its hidden states, and this flexibility allows our model to be easily integrated into any deep architecture for sequential modelling. We test our model on a wide range of datasets from finance to healthcare; results show that the stochastic recurrent neural network consistently outperforms its deterministic counterpart. 近年来，基于深度架构的时间序列预测由于能够对复杂的非线性时间动态进行建模而越来越受欢迎。循环神经网络就是一种能够处理可变长度输入和输出的模型。在本文中，我们利用深度生成模型的最新进展和状态空间模型的概念，提出了一种用于多步超前时间序列预测的循环神经网络的随机适应方法，并使用随机梯度变分贝叶斯进行训练。在我们的模型设计中，决定隐藏状态演化的循环神经网络的转换函数是随机的，而不是像常规循环神经网络那样是确定性的；这是通过将潜在随机变量纳入转换过程来实现的，该过程捕获时间动态的随机性。我们的模型保留了循环神经网络的架构工作原理，所有相关信息都封装在其隐藏状态中，这种灵活性使我们的模型可以轻松集成到任何深层架构中以进行顺序建模。我们在从金融到医疗保健的广泛数据集上测试我们的模型；结果表明，随机循环神经网络始终优于确定性神经网络。 本文提出了一种基于随机递归神经网络（SRNN）的多步时间序列预测方法，通过引入潜在随机变量增强模型对时序动态不确定性的建模能力。 Zexuan Yin,Paolo Barucca cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Ricky Ma
title: ODDObjects: A Framework for Multiclass Unsupervised Anomaly Detection on Masked Objects
title_zh: ODDObjects：屏蔽对象的多类无监督异常检测框架
abstract: This paper presents a novel framework for unsupervised anomaly detection on masked objects called ODDObjects, which stands for Out-of-Distribution Detection on Objects. ODDObjects is designed to detect anomalies of various categories using unsupervised autoencoders trained on COCO-style datasets. The method utilizes autoencoder-based image reconstruction, where high reconstruction error indicates the possibility of an anomaly. The framework extends previous work on anomaly detection with autoencoders, comparing state-of-the-art models trained on object recognition datasets. Various model architectures were compared, and experimental results show that memory-augmented deep convolutional autoencoders perform the best at detecting out-of-distribution objects.
summary: This paper presents a novel framework for unsupervised anomaly detection on masked objects called ODDObjects, which stands for Out-of-Distribution Detection on Objects. ODDObjects is designed to detect anomalies of various categories using unsupervised autoencoders trained on COCO-style datasets. The method utilizes autoencoder-based image reconstruction, where high reconstruction error indicates the possibility of an anomaly. The framework extends previous work on anomaly detection with autoencoders, comparing state-of-the-art models trained on object recognition datasets. Various model architectures were compared, and experimental results show that memory-augmented deep convolutional autoencoders perform the best at detecting out-of-distribution objects.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新的框架，用于对被屏蔽的对象进行无监督异常检测，称为 ODDObjects，它代表对象的分布外检测。 ODDObjects 旨在使用在 COCO 风格数据集上训练的无监督自动编码器来检测各种类别的异常。该方法利用基于自动编码器的图像重建，其中高重建误差表明存在异常的可能性。该框架扩展了之前使用自动编码器进行异常检测的工作，比较了在对象识别数据集上训练的最先进模型。比较了各种模型架构，实验结果表明，内存增强深度卷积自动编码器在检测分布外对象方面表现最佳。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为ODDObjects的无监督异常检测框架，用于检测遮罩物体中的多类别异常，基于自编码器的图像重建误差进行判断。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在无监督多类别异常检测中存在性能不足，需更有效的框架来利用自编码器检测遮罩物体的异常。
AI.method: 采用自编码器进行图像重建，通过高重建误差识别异常，并比较多种模型架构，最终选择记忆增强的深度卷积自编码器。
AI.result: 实验表明，记忆增强的深度卷积自编码器在检测分布外物体方面表现最优，优于其他对比模型。
AI.conclusion: ODDObjects框架有效实现了多类别无监督异常检测，证明了记忆增强自编码器在该任务中的优越性。

authors_text: Zhengyu Huang,Yichen Peng,Tomohiro Hibino,Chunqi Zhao,Haoran Xie,Tsukasa Fukusato,Kazunori Miyata
title: dualFace:Two-Stage Drawing Guidance for Freehand Portrait Sketching
title_zh: DualFace：徒手肖像素描的两阶段绘画指南
comment: Accepted in the Journal of Computational Visual Media Conference 2021. 13 pages, 12 figures
comments: Accepted in the Journal of Computational Visual Media Conference 2021. 13 pages, 12 figures
abstract: In this paper, we propose dualFace, a portrait drawing interface to assist users with different levels of drawing skills to complete recognizable and authentic face sketches. dualFace consists of two-stage drawing assistance to provide global and local visual guidance: global guidance, which helps users draw contour lines of portraits (i.e., geometric structure), and local guidance, which helps users draws details of facial parts (which conform to user-drawn contour lines), inspired by traditional artist workflows in portrait drawing. In the stage of global guidance, the user draws several contour lines, and dualFace then searches several relevant images from an internal database and displays the suggested face contour lines over the background of the canvas. In the stage of local guidance, we synthesize detailed portrait images with a deep generative model from user-drawn contour lines, but use the synthesized results as detailed drawing guidance. We conducted a user study to verify the effectiveness of dualFace, and we confirmed that dualFace significantly helps achieve a detailed portrait sketch. see http://www.jaist.ac.jp/~xie/dualface.html
summary: In this paper, we propose dualFace, a portrait drawing interface to assist users with different levels of drawing skills to complete recognizable and authentic face sketches. dualFace consists of two-stage drawing assistance to provide global and local visual guidance: global guidance, which helps users draw contour lines of portraits (i.e., geometric structure), and local guidance, which helps users draws details of facial parts (which conform to user-drawn contour lines), inspired by traditional artist workflows in portrait drawing. In the stage of global guidance, the user draws several contour lines, and dualFace then searches several relevant images from an internal database and displays the suggested face contour lines over the background of the canvas. In the stage of local guidance, we synthesize detailed portrait images with a deep generative model from user-drawn contour lines, but use the synthesized results as detailed drawing guidance. We conducted a user study to verify the effectiveness of dualFace, and we confirmed that dualFace significantly helps achieve a detailed portrait sketch. see http://www.jaist.ac.jp/~xie/dualface.html
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了dualFace，一个肖像绘画界面，以帮助不同绘画水平的用户完成可识别且真实的脸部素描。 DualFace由两阶段绘图辅助组成，提供全局和局部视觉引导：全局引导，帮助用户绘制肖像的轮廓线（即几何结构），局部引导，帮助用户绘制面部部位的细节（符合用户绘制的轮廓线），其灵感来自于传统的肖像绘画艺术家工作流程。在全局指导阶段，用户绘制几条轮廓线，然后dualFace从内部数据库中搜索几条相关图像，并将建议的面部轮廓线显示在画布背景上。在局部指导阶段，我们利用深度生成模型从用户绘制的轮廓线合成详细的肖像图像，但使用合成结果作为详细的绘图指导。我们进行了一项用户研究来验证dualFace的有效性，并证实dualFace可以显着帮助实现详细的肖像素描。请参阅http://www.jaist.ac.jp/~xie/dualface.html

AI.tldr: 本文提出dualFace系统，通过两阶段绘图指导帮助用户完成可识别的人像素描。
AI.motivation: 传统绘图工具难以满足不同技能水平用户对人像轮廓与细节的精准绘制需求，需提供分阶段视觉引导。
AI.method: 采用两阶段指导：全局阶段通过数据库匹配显示轮廓参考，局部阶段利用深度生成模型合成细节作为绘画引导。
AI.result: 用户研究验证dualFace显著提升用户绘制出详细且真实的人像素描能力。
AI.conclusion: dualFace通过结合全局与局部指导有效辅助用户完成高质量人像素描，验证了分阶段引导策略的有效性。

authors_text: Mohammad Rahimzadeh,AmirAli Askari,Soroush Parvin,Elnaz Safi,Mohammad Reza Mohammadi
title: Wise-SrNet: A Novel Architecture for Enhancing Image Classification by Learning Spatial Resolution of Feature Maps
title_zh: Wise-SrNet：一种通过学习特征图的空间分辨率来增强图像分类的新颖架构
abstract: One of the main challenges since the advancement of convolutional neural networks is how to connect the extracted feature map to the final classification layer. VGG models used two sets of fully connected layers for the classification part of their architectures, which significantly increased the number of models' weights. ResNet and the next deep convolutional models used the Global Average Pooling (GAP) layer to compress the feature map and feed it to the classification layer. Although using the GAP layer reduces the computational cost, but also causes losing spatial resolution of the feature map, which results in decreasing learning efficiency. In this paper, we aim to tackle this problem by replacing the GAP layer with a new architecture called Wise-SrNet. It is inspired by the depthwise convolutional idea and is designed for processing spatial resolution while not increasing computational cost. We have evaluated our method using three different datasets: Intel Image Classification Challenge, MIT Indoors Scenes, and a part of the ImageNet dataset. We investigated the implementation of our architecture on several models of the Inception, ResNet, and DenseNet families. Applying our architecture has revealed a significant effect on increasing convergence speed and accuracy. Our Experiments on images with 224*224 resolution increased the Top-1 accuracy between 2% to 8% on different datasets and models. Running our models on 512*512 resolution images of the MIT Indoors Scenes dataset showed a notable result of improving the Top-1 accuracy within 3% to 26%. We will also demonstrate the GAP layer's disadvantage when the input images are large and the number of classes is not few. In this circumstance, our proposed architecture can do a great help in enhancing classification results. The code is shared at https://github.com/mr7495/image-classification-spatial.
summary: One of the main challenges since the advancement of convolutional neural networks is how to connect the extracted feature map to the final classification layer. VGG models used two sets of fully connected layers for the classification part of their architectures, which significantly increased the number of models' weights. ResNet and the next deep convolutional models used the Global Average Pooling (GAP) layer to compress the feature map and feed it to the classification layer. Although using the GAP layer reduces the computational cost, but also causes losing spatial resolution of the feature map, which results in decreasing learning efficiency. In this paper, we aim to tackle this problem by replacing the GAP layer with a new architecture called Wise-SrNet. It is inspired by the depthwise convolutional idea and is designed for processing spatial resolution while not increasing computational cost. We have evaluated our method using three different datasets: Intel Image Classification Challenge, MIT Indoors Scenes, and a part of the ImageNet dataset. We investigated the implementation of our architecture on several models of the Inception, ResNet, and DenseNet families. Applying our architecture has revealed a significant effect on increasing convergence speed and accuracy. Our Experiments on images with 224*224 resolution increased the Top-1 accuracy between 2% to 8% on different datasets and models. Running our models on 512*512 resolution images of the MIT Indoors Scenes dataset showed a notable result of improving the Top-1 accuracy within 3% to 26%. We will also demonstrate the GAP layer's disadvantage when the input images are large and the number of classes is not few. In this circumstance, our proposed architecture can do a great help in enhancing classification results. The code is shared at https://github.com/mr7495/image-classification-spatial.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络进步以来的主要挑战之一是如何将提取的特征图连接到最终的分类层。 VGG模型使用两组全连接层作为其架构的分类部分，这显着增加了模型的权重数量。 ResNet 和下一个深度卷积模型使用全局平均池 (GAP) 层来压缩特征图并将其馈送到分类层。虽然使用GAP层降低了计算成本，但也会导致特征图空间分辨率的损失，从而导致学习效率下降。在本文中，我们的目标是通过使用名为 Wise-SrNet 的新架构替换 GAP 层来解决这个问题。它受到深度卷积思想的启发，旨在处理空间分辨率，同时不增加计算成本。我们使用三个不同的数据集评估了我们的方法：英特尔图像分类挑战赛、麻省理工学院室内场景和 ImageNet 数据集的一部分。我们研究了我们的架构在 Inception、ResNet 和 DenseNet 系列的多个模型上的实现。应用我们的架构已经显示出对提高收敛速度和准确性的显着效果。我们对 224*224 分辨率图像进行的实验将不同数据集和模型的 Top-1 准确率提高了 2% 到 8%。在 MIT 室内场景数据集的 512*512 分辨率图像上运行我们的模型，结果显着，将 Top-1 准确率提高了 3% 到 26%。我们还将演示当输入图像很大且类别数量不少时 GAP 层的缺点。在这种情况下，我们提出的架构可以为增强分类结果提供很大帮助。该代码在 https://github.com/mr7495/image-classification-spatial 共享。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型架构Wise-SrNet，通过学习特征图空间分辨率来增强图像分类效果，解决传统全局平均池化层（GAP）导致的空间信息丢失问题。
AI.motivation: 传统GAP层虽降低计算成本，但丢失特征图空间分辨率，导致分类效率下降。现有模型（如ResNet）在处理高分辨率图像或多类别任务时存在性能瓶颈。
AI.method: 设计Wise-SrNet架构替代GAP层，基于深度可分离卷积思想，通过特定模块保留特征图空间分辨率，同时控制计算成本。
AI.result: 在Intel、MIT和ImageNet数据集上，224*224分辨率图像Top-1准确率提升2%-8%，512*512分辨率MIT数据集提升3%-26%，收敛速度显著加快。
AI.conclusion: Wise-SrNet有效解决了GAP层的空间信息丢失问题，在多种模型和数据集上均能提升分类性能，尤其适用于高分辨率图像和多类别场景。

search_text: Wise-SrNet: A Novel Architecture for Enhancing Image Classification by Learning Spatial Resolution of Feature Maps Wise-SrNet：一种通过学习特征图的空间分辨率来增强图像分类的新颖架构 One of the main challenges since the advancement of convolutional neural networks is how to connect the extracted feature map to the final classification layer. VGG models used two sets of fully connected layers for the classification part of their architectures, which significantly increased the number of models' weights. ResNet and the next deep convolutional models used the Global Average Pooling (GAP) layer to compress the feature map and feed it to the classification layer. Although using the GAP layer reduces the computational cost, but also causes losing spatial resolution of the feature map, which results in decreasing learning efficiency. In this paper, we aim to tackle this problem by replacing the GAP layer with a new architecture called Wise-SrNet. It is inspired by the depthwise convolutional idea and is designed for processing spatial resolution while not increasing computational cost. We have evaluated our method using three different datasets: Intel Image Classification Challenge, MIT Indoors Scenes, and a part of the ImageNet dataset. We investigated the implementation of our architecture on several models of the Inception, ResNet, and DenseNet families. Applying our architecture has revealed a significant effect on increasing convergence speed and accuracy. Our Experiments on images with 224*224 resolution increased the Top-1 accuracy between 2% to 8% on different datasets and models. Running our models on 512*512 resolution images of the MIT Indoors Scenes dataset showed a notable result of improving the Top-1 accuracy within 3% to 26%. We will also demonstrate the GAP layer's disadvantage when the input images are large and the number of classes is not few. In this circumstance, our proposed architecture can do a great help in enhancing classification results. The code is shared at https://github.com/mr7495/image-classification-spatial. 卷积神经网络进步以来的主要挑战之一是如何将提取的特征图连接到最终的分类层。 VGG模型使用两组全连接层作为其架构的分类部分，这显着增加了模型的权重数量。 ResNet 和下一个深度卷积模型使用全局平均池 (GAP) 层来压缩特征图并将其馈送到分类层。虽然使用GAP层降低了计算成本，但也会导致特征图空间分辨率的损失，从而导致学习效率下降。在本文中，我们的目标是通过使用名为 Wise-SrNet 的新架构替换 GAP 层来解决这个问题。它受到深度卷积思想的启发，旨在处理空间分辨率，同时不增加计算成本。我们使用三个不同的数据集评估了我们的方法：英特尔图像分类挑战赛、麻省理工学院室内场景和 ImageNet 数据集的一部分。我们研究了我们的架构在 Inception、ResNet 和 DenseNet 系列的多个模型上的实现。应用我们的架构已经显示出对提高收敛速度和准确性的显着效果。我们对 224*224 分辨率图像进行的实验将不同数据集和模型的 Top-1 准确率提高了 2% 到 8%。在 MIT 室内场景数据集的 512*512 分辨率图像上运行我们的模型，结果显着，将 Top-1 准确率提高了 3% 到 26%。我们还将演示当输入图像很大且类别数量不少时 GAP 层的缺点。在这种情况下，我们提出的架构可以为增强分类结果提供很大帮助。该代码在 https://github.com/mr7495/image-classification-spatial 共享。 本文提出一种新型架构Wise-SrNet，通过学习特征图空间分辨率来增强图像分类效果，解决传统全局平均池化层（GAP）导致的空间信息丢失问题。 Mohammad Rahimzadeh,AmirAli Askari,Soroush Parvin,Elnaz Safi,Mohammad Reza Mohammadi cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Erica Cooper,Xin Wang,Junichi Yamagishi
title: Text-to-Speech Synthesis Techniques for MIDI-to-Audio Synthesis
title_zh: 用于 MIDI 到音频合成的文本到语音合成技术
comment: In the proceedings of ISCA Speech Synthesis Workshop 2021
comments: In the proceedings of ISCA Speech Synthesis Workshop 2021
abstract: Speech synthesis and music audio generation from symbolic input differ in many aspects but share some similarities. In this study, we investigate how text-to-speech synthesis techniques can be used for piano MIDI-to-audio synthesis tasks. Our investigation includes Tacotron and neural source-filter waveform models as the basic components, with which we build MIDI-to-audio synthesis systems in similar ways to TTS frameworks. We also include reference systems using conventional sound modeling techniques such as sample-based and physical-modeling-based methods. The subjective experimental results demonstrate that the investigated TTS components can be applied to piano MIDI-to-audio synthesis with minor modifications. The results also reveal the performance bottleneck -- while the waveform model can synthesize high quality piano sound given natural acoustic features, the conversion from MIDI to acoustic features is challenging. The full MIDI-to-audio synthesis system is still inferior to the sample-based or physical-modeling-based approaches, but we encourage TTS researchers to test their TTS models for this new task and improve the performance.
summary: Speech synthesis and music audio generation from symbolic input differ in many aspects but share some similarities. In this study, we investigate how text-to-speech synthesis techniques can be used for piano MIDI-to-audio synthesis tasks. Our investigation includes Tacotron and neural source-filter waveform models as the basic components, with which we build MIDI-to-audio synthesis systems in similar ways to TTS frameworks. We also include reference systems using conventional sound modeling techniques such as sample-based and physical-modeling-based methods. The subjective experimental results demonstrate that the investigated TTS components can be applied to piano MIDI-to-audio synthesis with minor modifications. The results also reveal the performance bottleneck -- while the waveform model can synthesize high quality piano sound given natural acoustic features, the conversion from MIDI to acoustic features is challenging. The full MIDI-to-audio synthesis system is still inferior to the sample-based or physical-modeling-based approaches, but we encourage TTS researchers to test their TTS models for this new task and improve the performance.
abstract_zh: 语音合成和从符号输入生成音乐音频在许多方面都有所不同，但也有一些相似之处。在本研究中，我们研究了如何将文本到语音合成技术用于钢琴 MIDI 到音频合成任务。我们的研究包括 Tacotron 和神经源滤波器波形模型作为基本组件，我们用它们以与 TTS 框架类似的方式构建 MIDI 到音频合成系统。我们还包括使用传统声音建模技术的参考系统，例如基于样本和基于物理建模的方法。主观实验结果表明，所研究的 TTS 组件只需稍加修改即可应用于钢琴 MIDI 到音频的合成。结果还揭示了性能瓶颈——虽然波形模型可以在给定自然声学特征的情况下合成高质量的钢琴声音，但从 MIDI 到声学特征的转换具有挑战性。完整的 MIDI 到音频合成系统仍然不如基于样本或基于物理建模的方法，但我们鼓励 TTS 研究人员针对这项新任务测试他们的 TTS 模型并提高性能。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨如何将文本到语音合成技术应用于钢琴MIDI到音频的合成任务。
AI.motivation: 尽管语音合成与音乐音频生成存在差异，但两者在处理符号输入时具有相似性，因此尝试借鉴TTS技术解决MIDI到音频合成问题。
AI.method: 采用Tacotron和神经源滤波器波形模型构建类似TTS框架的MIDI到音频合成系统，并与传统样本基和物理建模方法进行对比。
AI.result: TTS组件在小幅修改后可生成高质量钢琴音色，但MIDI到声学特征的转换存在瓶颈，整体系统性能仍弱于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 鼓励TTS研究者将模型应用于该任务，通过优化MIDI到声学特征的转换环节提升合成效果。

authors_text: Gokhan Egri,Todd Zickler
title: StegaPos: Preventing Unwanted Crops and Replacements with Imperceptible Positional Embeddings
title_zh: StegaPos：通过难以察觉的位置嵌入来防止不需要的作物和替换
abstract: We present a learned, spatially-varying steganography system that allows detecting when and how images have been altered by cropping, splicing or inpainting after publication. The system comprises a learned encoder that imperceptibly hides distinct positional signatures in every local image region before publication, and an accompanying learned decoder that extracts the steganographic signatures to determine, for each local image region, its 2D positional coordinates within the originally-published image. Crop and replacement edits become detectable by the inconsistencies they cause in the hidden positional signatures. Using a prototype system for small $(400 \times 400)$ images, we show experimentally that simple CNN encoder and decoder architectures can be trained jointly to achieve detection that is reliable and robust, without introducing perceptible distortion. This approach could help individuals and image-sharing platforms certify that an image was published by a trusted source, and also know which parts of such an image, if any, have been substantially altered since publication.
summary: We present a learned, spatially-varying steganography system that allows detecting when and how images have been altered by cropping, splicing or inpainting after publication. The system comprises a learned encoder that imperceptibly hides distinct positional signatures in every local image region before publication, and an accompanying learned decoder that extracts the steganographic signatures to determine, for each local image region, its 2D positional coordinates within the originally-published image. Crop and replacement edits become detectable by the inconsistencies they cause in the hidden positional signatures. Using a prototype system for small $(400 \times 400)$ images, we show experimentally that simple CNN encoder and decoder architectures can be trained jointly to achieve detection that is reliable and robust, without introducing perceptible distortion. This approach could help individuals and image-sharing platforms certify that an image was published by a trusted source, and also know which parts of such an image, if any, have been substantially altered since publication.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种学习的、空间变化的隐写系统，可以检测图像在出版后何时以及如何通过裁剪、拼接或修复而改变。该系统包括一个学习编码器，在发布之前不知不觉地隐藏每个局部图像区域中的不同位置签名，以及一个附带的学习解码器，用于提取隐写签名以确定每个局部图像区域在原始发布图像内的 2D 位置坐标。裁剪和替换编辑可以通过它们在隐藏位置签名中引起的不一致来检测。使用小型 $(400 × 400)$ 图像的原型系统，我们通过实验证明，可以联合训练简单的 CNN 编码器和解码器架构，以实现可靠且鲁棒的检测，而不会引入可察觉的失真。这种方法可以帮助个人和图像共享平台证明图像是由可信来源发布的，并且还可以知道该图像的哪些部分（如果有）自发布以来已被大幅更改。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于不可感知位置嵌入的隐写系统StegaPos，用于检测图像发布后是否被裁剪、拼接或修复等操作篡改。
AI.motivation: 现有图像篡改检测方法难以准确识别微小或复杂的编辑痕迹，且无法验证图像是否来自可信来源，亟需一种鲁棒且不可见的图像完整性验证方案。
AI.method: 设计包含编码器和解码器的深度学习框架：编码器在发布前将图像每个局部区域的2D坐标隐写为不可感知的特征，解码器通过提取这些特征比对当前图像区域与原始位置的一致性，利用CNN联合训练实现端到端检测。
AI.result: 在400×400小尺寸图像实验中，简单CNN架构达到可靠且鲁棒的检测效果，未引入可感知失真，可有效识别裁剪/替换篡改区域。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为图像来源认证和篡改检测提供了新思路，未来可扩展至大尺寸图像并结合区块链等技术增强可信度验证。

search_text: StegaPos: Preventing Unwanted Crops and Replacements with Imperceptible Positional Embeddings StegaPos：通过难以察觉的位置嵌入来防止不需要的作物和替换 We present a learned, spatially-varying steganography system that allows detecting when and how images have been altered by cropping, splicing or inpainting after publication. The system comprises a learned encoder that imperceptibly hides distinct positional signatures in every local image region before publication, and an accompanying learned decoder that extracts the steganographic signatures to determine, for each local image region, its 2D positional coordinates within the originally-published image. Crop and replacement edits become detectable by the inconsistencies they cause in the hidden positional signatures. Using a prototype system for small $(400 \times 400)$ images, we show experimentally that simple CNN encoder and decoder architectures can be trained jointly to achieve detection that is reliable and robust, without introducing perceptible distortion. This approach could help individuals and image-sharing platforms certify that an image was published by a trusted source, and also know which parts of such an image, if any, have been substantially altered since publication. 我们提出了一种学习的、空间变化的隐写系统，可以检测图像在出版后何时以及如何通过裁剪、拼接或修复而改变。该系统包括一个学习编码器，在发布之前不知不觉地隐藏每个局部图像区域中的不同位置签名，以及一个附带的学习解码器，用于提取隐写签名以确定每个局部图像区域在原始发布图像内的 2D 位置坐标。裁剪和替换编辑可以通过它们在隐藏位置签名中引起的不一致来检测。使用小型 $(400 × 400)$ 图像的原型系统，我们通过实验证明，可以联合训练简单的 CNN 编码器和解码器架构，以实现可靠且鲁棒的检测，而不会引入可察觉的失真。这种方法可以帮助个人和图像共享平台证明图像是由可信来源发布的，并且还可以知道该图像的哪些部分（如果有）自发布以来已被大幅更改。 本文提出了一种基于不可感知位置嵌入的隐写系统StegaPos，用于检测图像发布后是否被裁剪、拼接或修复等操作篡改。 Gokhan Egri,Todd Zickler cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Saheb Chhabra,Puspita Majumdar,Mayank Vatsa,Richa Singh
title: Class Equilibrium using Coulomb's Law
title_zh: 使用库仑定律的类平衡
abstract: Projection algorithms learn a transformation function to project the data from input space to the feature space, with the objective of increasing the inter-class distance. However, increasing the inter-class distance can affect the intra-class distance. Maintaining an optimal inter-class separation among the classes without affecting the intra-class distance of the data distribution is a challenging task. In this paper, inspired by the Coulomb's law of Electrostatics, we propose a new algorithm to compute the equilibrium space of any data distribution where the separation among the classes is optimal. The algorithm further learns the transformation between the input space and equilibrium space to perform classification in the equilibrium space. The performance of the proposed algorithm is evaluated on four publicly available datasets at three different resolutions. It is observed that the proposed algorithm performs well for low-resolution images.
summary: Projection algorithms learn a transformation function to project the data from input space to the feature space, with the objective of increasing the inter-class distance. However, increasing the inter-class distance can affect the intra-class distance. Maintaining an optimal inter-class separation among the classes without affecting the intra-class distance of the data distribution is a challenging task. In this paper, inspired by the Coulomb's law of Electrostatics, we propose a new algorithm to compute the equilibrium space of any data distribution where the separation among the classes is optimal. The algorithm further learns the transformation between the input space and equilibrium space to perform classification in the equilibrium space. The performance of the proposed algorithm is evaluated on four publicly available datasets at three different resolutions. It is observed that the proposed algorithm performs well for low-resolution images.
abstract_zh: 投影算法学习一个变换函数，将数据从输入空间投影到特征空间，目的是增加类间距离。然而，增加类间距离会影响类内距离。在不影响数据分布的类内距离的情况下保持类之间的最佳类间分离是一项具有挑战性的任务。在本文中，受库仑静电定律的启发，我们提出了一种新算法来计算任何数据分布的平衡空间，其中类之间的分离是最佳的。该算法进一步学习输入空间和平衡空间之间的变换，以在平衡空间中进行分类。所提出算法的性能在三个不同分辨率的四个公开数据集上进行评估。据观察，所提出的算法对于低分辨率图像表现良好。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于库仑定律的算法，通过计算数据分布的平衡空间来优化类间分离，同时保持类内距离不变，用于分类任务。
AI.motivation: 传统投影算法在增加类间距离时可能破坏类内距离，如何在保持类内分布不变的情况下优化类间分离是分类任务的挑战。
AI.method: 受库仑定律启发，提出计算数据分布平衡空间的算法，使类间分离最优，并学习输入空间到平衡空间的转换以实现分类。
AI.result: 在四个公开数据集上评估，算法在低分辨率图像分类中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 该算法有效实现类间最优分离与类内保持，尤其适合低分辨率图像分类，未来可扩展到其他领域。

authors_text: Sam Barr,Therese Biedl
title: Efficiently Partitioning the Edges of a 1-Planar Graph into a Planar Graph and a Forest
title_zh: 有效地将 1 平面图的边划分为平面图和森林
abstract: 1-planar graphs are graphs that can be drawn in the plane such that any edge intersects with at most one other edge. Ackerman showed that the edges of a 1-planar graph can be partitioned into a planar graph and a forest, and claims that the proof leads to a linear time algorithm. However, it is not clear how one would obtain such an algorithm from his proof. In this paper, we first reprove Ackerman's result (in fact, we prove a slightly more general statement) and then show that the split can be found in linear time by using an edge-contraction data structure by Holm et al.
summary: 1-planar graphs are graphs that can be drawn in the plane such that any edge intersects with at most one other edge. Ackerman showed that the edges of a 1-planar graph can be partitioned into a planar graph and a forest, and claims that the proof leads to a linear time algorithm. However, it is not clear how one would obtain such an algorithm from his proof. In this paper, we first reprove Ackerman's result (in fact, we prove a slightly more general statement) and then show that the split can be found in linear time by using an edge-contraction data structure by Holm et al.
abstract_zh: 1-平面图是可以在平面上绘制的图，使得任何边至多与另一边相交。阿克曼证明了 1-平面图的边可以划分为平面图和森林，并声称该证明导致了线性时间算法。然而，目前尚不清楚如何从他的证明中获得这样一种算法。在本文中，我们首先反驳了阿克曼的结果（事实上，我们证明了一个稍微更一般的陈述），然后证明通过使用 Holm 等人的边缘收缩数据结构可以在线性时间内找到分裂。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何将1-平面图的边高效划分为平面图和森林，并提出线性时间算法。
AI.motivation: Ackerman证明了1-平面图的边可划分为平面图和森林，但未明确算法实现方式，需进一步研究高效算法。
AI.method: 重新证明Ackerman结论并利用Holm等人的边收缩数据结构实现线性时间划分。
AI.result: 提出线性时间算法，将1-平面图边划分为平面图和森林，并扩展了原结论的适用范围。
AI.conclusion: 解决了Ackerman证明中算法实现的模糊性，提供了可实际应用的高效划分方法。

authors_text: Yuyu Zhang,Heng Chi,Binghong Chen,Tsz Ling Elaine Tang,Lucia Mirabella,Le Song,Glaucio H. Paulino
title: Speeding up Computational Morphogenesis with Online Neural Synthetic Gradients
title_zh: 利用在线神经合成梯度加速计算形态发生
abstract: A wide range of modern science and engineering applications are formulated as optimization problems with a system of partial differential equations (PDEs) as constraints. These PDE-constrained optimization problems are typically solved in a standard discretize-then-optimize approach. In many industry applications that require high-resolution solutions, the discretized constraints can easily have millions or even billions of variables, making it very slow for the standard iterative optimizer to solve the exact gradients. In this work, we propose a general framework to speed up PDE-constrained optimization using online neural synthetic gradients (ONSG) with a novel two-scale optimization scheme. We successfully apply our ONSG framework to computational morphogenesis, a representative and challenging class of PDE-constrained optimization problems. Extensive experiments have demonstrated that our method can significantly speed up computational morphogenesis (also known as topology optimization), and meanwhile maintain the quality of final solution compared to the standard optimizer. On a large-scale 3D optimal design problem with around 1,400,000 design variables, our method achieves up to 7.5x speedup while producing optimized designs with comparable objectives.
summary: A wide range of modern science and engineering applications are formulated as optimization problems with a system of partial differential equations (PDEs) as constraints. These PDE-constrained optimization problems are typically solved in a standard discretize-then-optimize approach. In many industry applications that require high-resolution solutions, the discretized constraints can easily have millions or even billions of variables, making it very slow for the standard iterative optimizer to solve the exact gradients. In this work, we propose a general framework to speed up PDE-constrained optimization using online neural synthetic gradients (ONSG) with a novel two-scale optimization scheme. We successfully apply our ONSG framework to computational morphogenesis, a representative and challenging class of PDE-constrained optimization problems. Extensive experiments have demonstrated that our method can significantly speed up computational morphogenesis (also known as topology optimization), and meanwhile maintain the quality of final solution compared to the standard optimizer. On a large-scale 3D optimal design problem with around 1,400,000 design variables, our method achieves up to 7.5x speedup while producing optimized designs with comparable objectives.
abstract_zh: 许多现代科学和工程应用都被表述为以偏微分方程组 (PDE) 作为约束的优化问题。这些偏微分方程约束的优化问题通常采用标准的离散然后优化方法来解决。在许多需要高分辨率解决方案的行业应用中，离散约束很容易具有数百万甚至数十亿个变量，使得标准迭代优化器求解精确梯度的速度非常慢。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个通用框架，使用在线神经合成梯度（ONSG）和新颖的两尺度优化方案来加速 PDE 约束优化。我们成功地将 ONSG 框架应用于计算形态发生，这是一类具有代表性且具有挑战性的偏微分方程约束优化问题。大量的实验表明，与标准优化器相比，我们的方法可以显着加快计算形态发生（也称为拓扑优化），同时保持最终解决方案的质量。在具有约 1,400,000 个设计变量的大规模 3D 优化设计问题上，我们的方法实现了高达 7.5 倍的加速，同时生成具有可比目标的优化设计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于在线神经合成梯度（ONSG）的框架，用于加速偏微分方程约束优化问题中的计算形态发生过程。
AI.motivation: 传统离散化后再优化的方法在处理高分辨率、大规模变量的PDE约束优化问题时计算效率低下，难以满足工业应用需求。
AI.method: 设计了一种两尺度优化方案，通过在线神经网络生成合成梯度替代精确梯度计算，从而加速优化过程。
AI.result: 在包含约140万个设计变量的三维优化问题中，该方法实现最高7.5倍加速，同时保持与标准优化器相当的优化目标值。
AI.conclusion: ONSG框架有效解决了大规模PDE约束优化的计算瓶颈，在保证解质量的前提下显著提升计算效率。

search_text: Speeding up Computational Morphogenesis with Online Neural Synthetic Gradients 利用在线神经合成梯度加速计算形态发生 A wide range of modern science and engineering applications are formulated as optimization problems with a system of partial differential equations (PDEs) as constraints. These PDE-constrained optimization problems are typically solved in a standard discretize-then-optimize approach. In many industry applications that require high-resolution solutions, the discretized constraints can easily have millions or even billions of variables, making it very slow for the standard iterative optimizer to solve the exact gradients. In this work, we propose a general framework to speed up PDE-constrained optimization using online neural synthetic gradients (ONSG) with a novel two-scale optimization scheme. We successfully apply our ONSG framework to computational morphogenesis, a representative and challenging class of PDE-constrained optimization problems. Extensive experiments have demonstrated that our method can significantly speed up computational morphogenesis (also known as topology optimization), and meanwhile maintain the quality of final solution compared to the standard optimizer. On a large-scale 3D optimal design problem with around 1,400,000 design variables, our method achieves up to 7.5x speedup while producing optimized designs with comparable objectives. 许多现代科学和工程应用都被表述为以偏微分方程组 (PDE) 作为约束的优化问题。这些偏微分方程约束的优化问题通常采用标准的离散然后优化方法来解决。在许多需要高分辨率解决方案的行业应用中，离散约束很容易具有数百万甚至数十亿个变量，使得标准迭代优化器求解精确梯度的速度非常慢。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个通用框架，使用在线神经合成梯度（ONSG）和新颖的两尺度优化方案来加速 PDE 约束优化。我们成功地将 ONSG 框架应用于计算形态发生，这是一类具有代表性且具有挑战性的偏微分方程约束优化问题。大量的实验表明，与标准优化器相比，我们的方法可以显着加快计算形态发生（也称为拓扑优化），同时保持最终解决方案的质量。在具有约 1,400,000 个设计变量的大规模 3D 优化设计问题上，我们的方法实现了高达 7.5 倍的加速，同时生成具有可比目标的优化设计。 本文提出了一种基于在线神经合成梯度（ONSG）的框架，用于加速偏微分方程约束优化问题中的计算形态发生过程。 Yuyu Zhang,Heng Chi,Binghong Chen,Tsz Ling Elaine Tang,Lucia Mirabella,Le Song,Glaucio H. Paulino cs.AI,math.OC

authors_text: Subodh Mishra,Gaurav Pandey,Srikanth Saripalli
title: Target-free Extrinsic Calibration of a 3D-Lidar and an IMU
title_zh: 3D 激光雷达和 IMU 的无目标外部校准
comment: Published at 2021 IEEE International Conference on Multisensor Fusion and Integration (MFI 2021)
comments: Published at 2021 IEEE International Conference on Multisensor Fusion and Integration (MFI 2021)
abstract: This work presents a novel target-free extrinsic calibration algorithm for a 3D Lidar and an IMU pair using an Extended Kalman Filter (EKF) which exploits the \textit{motion based calibration constraint} for state update. The steps include, data collection by motion excitation of the Lidar Inertial Sensor suite along all degrees of freedom, determination of the inter sensor rotation by using rotational component of the aforementioned \textit{motion based calibration constraint} in a least squares optimization framework, and finally, the determination of inter sensor translation using the \textit{motion based calibration constraint} for state update in an Extended Kalman Filter (EKF) framework. We experimentally validate our method using data collected in our lab and open-source (https://github.com/unmannedlab/imu_lidar_calibration) our contribution for the robotics research community.
summary: This work presents a novel target-free extrinsic calibration algorithm for a 3D Lidar and an IMU pair using an Extended Kalman Filter (EKF) which exploits the \textit{motion based calibration constraint} for state update. The steps include, data collection by motion excitation of the Lidar Inertial Sensor suite along all degrees of freedom, determination of the inter sensor rotation by using rotational component of the aforementioned \textit{motion based calibration constraint} in a least squares optimization framework, and finally, the determination of inter sensor translation using the \textit{motion based calibration constraint} for state update in an Extended Kalman Filter (EKF) framework. We experimentally validate our method using data collected in our lab and open-source (https://github.com/unmannedlab/imu_lidar_calibration) our contribution for the robotics research community.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了一种新颖的无目标外部校准算法，用于 3D 激光雷达和 IMU 对，使用扩展卡尔曼滤波器（EKF），该算法利用 \textit{基于运动的校准约束}进行状态更新。这些步骤包括，通过激光雷达惯性传感器套件沿所有自由度的运动激励收集数据，通过在最小二乘优化框架中使用上述基于运动的校准约束的旋转分量来确定传感器间旋转，最后，在扩展卡尔曼滤波器（EKF）框架中使用用于状态更新的textit{基于运动的校准约束}来确定传感器间平移。我们使用实验室收集的数据和开源（https://github.com/unmannedlab/imu_lidar_calibration）我们对机器人研究社区的贡献来实验验证我们的方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需目标的3D激光雷达与IMU外参标定方法，利用运动基校准约束和EKF实现参数估计。
AI.motivation: 传统标定方法依赖人工目标，限制了应用场景，本文旨在开发无需目标的校准方法以提高灵活性和适用性。
AI.method: 采用扩展卡尔曼滤波器（EKF），结合运动基校准约束，通过数据收集、最小二乘优化旋转参数、EKF更新平移参数，实现无需目标的标定。
AI.result: 实验验证了方法的有效性，并开源代码供社区使用。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法无需人工目标，提高了标定的灵活性和精度，适用于动态环境下的传感器融合。

authors_text: Lu Cheng,Ahmadreza Mosallanezhad,Paras Sheth,Huan Liu
title: Causal Learning for Socially Responsible AI
title_zh: 具有社会责任感的人工智能的因果学习
comment: 8 pages, 3 figures, accepted at IJCAI21 survey track
comments: 8 pages, 3 figures, accepted at IJCAI21 survey track
abstract: There have been increasing concerns about Artificial Intelligence (AI) due to its unfathomable potential power. To make AI address ethical challenges and shun undesirable outcomes, researchers proposed to develop socially responsible AI (SRAI). One of these approaches is causal learning (CL). We survey state-of-the-art methods of CL for SRAI. We begin by examining the seven CL tools to enhance the social responsibility of AI, then review how existing works have succeeded using these tools to tackle issues in developing SRAI such as fairness. The goal of this survey is to bring forefront the potentials and promises of CL for SRAI.
summary: There have been increasing concerns about Artificial Intelligence (AI) due to its unfathomable potential power. To make AI address ethical challenges and shun undesirable outcomes, researchers proposed to develop socially responsible AI (SRAI). One of these approaches is causal learning (CL). We survey state-of-the-art methods of CL for SRAI. We begin by examining the seven CL tools to enhance the social responsibility of AI, then review how existing works have succeeded using these tools to tackle issues in developing SRAI such as fairness. The goal of this survey is to bring forefront the potentials and promises of CL for SRAI.
abstract_zh: 人工智能（AI）因其不可估量的潜在力量而受到越来越多的关注。为了让人工智能解决伦理挑战并避免不良结果，研究人员提议开发对社会负责的人工智能（SRAI）。其中一种方法是因果学习（CL）。我们调查了 SRAI 的最先进的 CL 方法。我们首先检查七个 CL 工具来增强 AI 的社会责任，然后回顾现有的工作如何成功地使用这些工具来解决开发 SRAI 中的问题（例如公平性）。本次调查的目的是为 SRAI 展示 CL 的潜力和前景。

AI.tldr: 综述因果学习在社会负责任AI中的应用及潜力
AI.motivation: 解决AI伦理问题，推动社会负责任AI发展，利用因果学习应对公平性等挑战
AI.method: 审查七种因果学习工具，分析其在SRAI中的应用案例和效果
AI.result: 展示了因果学习在提升AI公平性等方面的有效性，明确了其在SRAI中的潜力
AI.conclusion: 因果学习为SRAI提供有效方法，未来需进一步探索其应用和挑战

authors_text: Yuming Du,Yang Xiao,Vincent Lepetit
title: Learning to Better Segment Objects from Unseen Classes with Unlabeled Videos
title_zh: 学习使用未标记的视频更好地从未见过的类中分割对象
comment: ICCV2021 Camera Ready. See project page https://dulucas.github.io/Homepage/gbopt/
comments: ICCV2021 Camera Ready. See project page https://dulucas.github.io/Homepage/gbopt/
abstract: The ability to localize and segment objects from unseen classes would open the door to new applications, such as autonomous object learning in active vision. Nonetheless, improving the performance on unseen classes requires additional training data, while manually annotating the objects of the unseen classes can be labor-extensive and expensive. In this paper, we explore the use of unlabeled video sequences to automatically generate training data for objects of unseen classes. It is in principle possible to apply existing video segmentation methods to unlabeled videos and automatically obtain object masks, which can then be used as a training set even for classes with no manual labels available. However, our experiments show that these methods do not perform well enough for this purpose. We therefore introduce a Bayesian method that is specifically designed to automatically create such a training set: Our method starts from a set of object proposals and relies on (non-realistic) analysis-by-synthesis to select the correct ones by performing an efficient optimization over all the frames simultaneously. Through extensive experiments, we show that our method can generate a high-quality training set which significantly boosts the performance of segmenting objects of unseen classes. We thus believe that our method could open the door for open-world instance segmentation using abundant Internet videos.
summary: The ability to localize and segment objects from unseen classes would open the door to new applications, such as autonomous object learning in active vision. Nonetheless, improving the performance on unseen classes requires additional training data, while manually annotating the objects of the unseen classes can be labor-extensive and expensive. In this paper, we explore the use of unlabeled video sequences to automatically generate training data for objects of unseen classes. It is in principle possible to apply existing video segmentation methods to unlabeled videos and automatically obtain object masks, which can then be used as a training set even for classes with no manual labels available. However, our experiments show that these methods do not perform well enough for this purpose. We therefore introduce a Bayesian method that is specifically designed to automatically create such a training set: Our method starts from a set of object proposals and relies on (non-realistic) analysis-by-synthesis to select the correct ones by performing an efficient optimization over all the frames simultaneously. Through extensive experiments, we show that our method can generate a high-quality training set which significantly boosts the performance of segmenting objects of unseen classes. We thus believe that our method could open the door for open-world instance segmentation using abundant Internet videos.
abstract_zh: 从看不见的类中定位和分割对象的能力将为新应用打开大门，例如主动视觉中的自主对象学习。尽管如此，提高未见类的性能需要额外的训练数据，而手动注释未见类的对象可能会耗费大量人力且成本高昂。在本文中，我们探索使用未标记的视频序列来自动生成未见过类别的对象的训练数据。原则上可以将现有的视频分割方法应用于未标记的视频并自动获取对象掩模，然后即使对于没有可用手动标签的类，也可以将其用作训练集。然而，我们的实验表明这些方法对于此目的表现不够好。因此，我们引入了一种专门设计用于自动创建此类训练集的贝叶斯方法：我们的方法从一组对象建议开始，并依靠（非现实的）综合分析，通过同时对所有帧执行有效优化来选择正确的建议。通过大量的实验，我们表明我们的方法可以生成高质量的训练集，从而显着提高分割未见过的类的对象的性能。因此，我们相信我们的方法可以为使用丰富的互联网视频进行开放世界实例分割打开大门。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用未标注视频自动生成训练数据，以提升对未见类别物体的分割性能。
AI.motivation: 手动标注未见类别物体数据成本高昂且耗时，现有视频分割方法在生成训练数据时效果不足。
AI.method: 设计一种贝叶斯方法，通过对象提案与非现实分析-合成策略，结合多帧联合优化筛选有效分割结果。
AI.result: 生成的训练集显著提升未见类别物体分割性能，实验验证其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为基于互联网视频的开放世界实例分割提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Danny Brahman,Pooran S. Negi,Mohammad Mahoor
title: A Bi-Encoder LSTM Model For Learning Unstructured Dialogs
title_zh: 用于学习非结构化对话的双编码器 LSTM 模型
abstract: Creating a data-driven model that is trained on a large dataset of unstructured dialogs is a crucial step in developing Retrieval-based Chatbot systems. This paper presents a Long Short Term Memory (LSTM) based architecture that learns unstructured multi-turn dialogs and provides results on the task of selecting the best response from a collection of given responses. Ubuntu Dialog Corpus Version 2 was used as the corpus for training. We show that our model achieves 0.8%, 1.0% and 0.3% higher accuracy for Recall@1, Recall@2 and Recall@5 respectively than the benchmark model. We also show results on experiments performed by using several similarity functions, model hyper-parameters and word embeddings on the proposed architecture
summary: Creating a data-driven model that is trained on a large dataset of unstructured dialogs is a crucial step in developing Retrieval-based Chatbot systems. This paper presents a Long Short Term Memory (LSTM) based architecture that learns unstructured multi-turn dialogs and provides results on the task of selecting the best response from a collection of given responses. Ubuntu Dialog Corpus Version 2 was used as the corpus for training. We show that our model achieves 0.8%, 1.0% and 0.3% higher accuracy for Recall@1, Recall@2 and Recall@5 respectively than the benchmark model. We also show results on experiments performed by using several similarity functions, model hyper-parameters and word embeddings on the proposed architecture
abstract_zh: 创建在非结构化对话的大型数据集上进行训练的数据驱动模型是开发基于检索的聊天机器人系统的关键步骤。本文提出了一种基于长短期记忆 (LSTM) 的架构，该架构可以学习非结构化多轮对话，并提供从给定响应集合中选择最佳响应的任务结果。使用 Ubuntu Dialog Corpus Version 2 作为训练语料库。我们表明，我们的模型在 Recall@1、Recall@2 和 Recall@5 方面的准确率分别比基准模型高 0.8%、1.0% 和 0.3%。我们还展示了在所提出的架构上使用多个相似函数、模型超参数和词嵌入进行的实验的结果

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于双向编码器的LSTM模型，用于学习非结构化多轮对话，并在选择最佳响应任务中取得优于基准模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 构建基于数据驱动的模型以处理非结构化对话是开发检索式聊天机器人的关键步骤，现有方法在对话理解和响应选择上仍有改进空间。
AI.method: 采用双向编码器LSTM架构，结合多种相似度函数、超参数和词嵌入技术，在Ubuntu Dialog Corpus V2数据集上训练模型。
AI.result: 模型在Recall@1、Recall@2、Recall@5指标上分别比基准模型提升0.8%、1.0%和0.3%，验证了不同相似度函数和参数设置的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 双向编码器LSTM模型能有效学习非结构化对话特征，实验表明相似度函数和超参数对模型性能有显著影响。

authors_text: Hong-Gyu Yoon,Pilwon Kim
title: A STDP-based Encoding Algorithm for Associative and Composite Data
title_zh: 基于 STDP 的关联和复合数据编码算法
comment: 12 pages of main text. Source for simplified MATLAB programs performing two numerical tests presented in this article can be found in the following link: https://github.com/hkyoon94/NRSTDP.git
comments: 12 pages of main text. Source for simplified MATLAB programs performing two numerical tests presented in this article can be found in the following link: https://github.com/hkyoon94/NRSTDP.git
abstract: Spike-timing-dependent plasticity(STDP) is a biological process of synaptic modification caused by the difference of firing order and timing between neurons. One of the neurodynamical roles of STDP is to form a macroscopic geometrical structure in the neuronal state space in response to a periodic input. This work proposes a practical memory model based on STDP that can store and retrieve high-dimensional associative data. The model combines STDP dynamics with an encoding scheme for distributed representations and can handle multiple composite data in a continuous manner. In the auto-associative memory task where a group of images is continuously streamed to the model, the images are successfully retrieved from an oscillating neural state whenever a proper cue is given. In the second task that deals with semantic memories embedded from sentences, the results show that words can recall multiple sentences simultaneously or one exclusively, depending on their grammatical relations.
summary: Spike-timing-dependent plasticity(STDP) is a biological process of synaptic modification caused by the difference of firing order and timing between neurons. One of the neurodynamical roles of STDP is to form a macroscopic geometrical structure in the neuronal state space in response to a periodic input. This work proposes a practical memory model based on STDP that can store and retrieve high-dimensional associative data. The model combines STDP dynamics with an encoding scheme for distributed representations and can handle multiple composite data in a continuous manner. In the auto-associative memory task where a group of images is continuously streamed to the model, the images are successfully retrieved from an oscillating neural state whenever a proper cue is given. In the second task that deals with semantic memories embedded from sentences, the results show that words can recall multiple sentences simultaneously or one exclusively, depending on their grammatical relations.
abstract_zh: 尖峰时序依赖性可塑性（STDP）是由神经元之间的放电顺序和时序差异引起的突触修饰的生物学过程。 STDP 的神经动力学作用之一是响应周期性输入在神经元状态空间中形成宏观几何结构。这项工作提出了一种基于 STDP 的实用内存模型，可以存储和检索高维关联数据。该模型将 STDP 动力学与分布式表示的编码方案相结合，可以连续处理多个复合数据。在自动联想记忆任务中，一组图像连续传输到模型，只要给出适当的提示，图像就会从振荡的神经状态中成功检索。在处理从句子中嵌入的语义记忆的第二项任务中，结果表明单词可以同时回忆多个句子或仅回忆一个句子，具体取决于它们的语法关系。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于STDP（脉冲时间依赖可塑性）的编码算法，用于存储和检索高维关联数据及复合数据。
AI.motivation: 传统记忆模型难以高效处理高维关联数据和语义复合信息，而STDP作为生物神经可塑性机制，具有构建神经状态空间几何结构的潜力。
AI.method: 结合STDP动态与分布式表示编码方案，通过振荡神经状态实现连续数据流的存储与检索，并针对图像和语义记忆设计了两种任务验证方法。
AI.result: 在连续图像流任务中，模型能通过有效提示成功检索目标图像；在语义记忆任务中，可依据语法关系同时或独立试召回多个句子。
AI.conclusion: STDP机制为高维关联数据的存储与检索提供了生物启发式解决方案，展示了在神经形态计算中的应用潜力。

The model combines STDP dynamics with an encoding scheme for distributed representations and can handle multiple composite data in a continuous manner. In the auto-associative memory task where a group of images is continuously streamed to the model, the images are successfully retrieved from an oscillating neural state whenever a proper cue is given. In the second task that deals with semantic memories embedded from sentences, the results show that words can recall multiple sentences simultaneously or one exclusively, depending on their grammatical relations. 尖峰时序依赖性可塑性（STDP）是由神经元之间的放电顺序和时序差异引起的突触修饰的生物学过程。 STDP 的神经动力学作用之一是响应周期性输入在神经元状态空间中形成宏观几何结构。这项工作提出了一种基于 STDP 的实用内存模型，可以存储和检索高维关联数据。该模型将 STDP 动力学与分布式表示的编码方案相结合，可以连续处理多个复合数据。在自动联想记忆任务中，一组图像连续传输到模型，只要给出适当的提示，图像就会从振荡的神经状态中成功检索。在处理从句子中嵌入的语义记忆的第二项任务中，结果表明单词可以同时回忆多个句子或仅回忆一个句子，具体取决于它们的语法关系。 本文提出了一种基于STDP（脉冲时间依赖可塑性）的编码算法，用于存储和检索高维关联数据及复合数据。 Hong-Gyu Yoon,Pilwon Kim q-bio.NC,cs.NE,math.DS,nlin.AO

authors_text: Chuong H. Nguyen,Thuy C. Nguyen,Anh H. Vo,Yamazaki Masayuki
title: Single Stage Class Agnostic Common Object Detection: A Simple Baseline
title_zh: 单阶段类不可知的常见对象检测：简单的基线
comment: This paper is accepted to International Conference on Pattern Recognition Applications and Methods (ICPRAM) 2021
comments: This paper is accepted to International Conference on Pattern Recognition Applications and Methods (ICPRAM) 2021
abstract: This paper addresses the problem of common object detection, which aims to detect objects of similar categories from a set of images. Although it shares some similarities with the standard object detection and co-segmentation, common object detection, recently promoted by \cite{Jiang2019a}, has some unique advantages and challenges. First, it is designed to work on both closed-set and open-set conditions, a.k.a. known and unknown objects. Second, it must be able to match objects of the same category but not restricted to the same instance, texture, or posture. Third, it can distinguish multiple objects. In this work, we introduce the Single Stage Common Object Detection (SSCOD) to detect class-agnostic common objects from an image set. The proposed method is built upon the standard single-stage object detector. Furthermore, an embedded branch is introduced to generate the object's representation feature, and their similarity is measured by cosine distance. Experiments are conducted on PASCAL VOC 2007 and COCO 2014 datasets. While being simple and flexible, our proposed SSCOD built upon ATSSNet performs significantly better than the baseline of the standard object detection, while still be able to match objects of unknown categories. Our source code can be found at \href{https://github.com/cybercore-co-ltd/Single-Stage-Common-Object-Detection}{(URL)}

Second, it must be able to match objects of the same category but not restricted to the same instance, texture, or posture. Third, it can distinguish multiple objects. In this work, we introduce the Single Stage Common Object Detection (SSCOD) to detect class-agnostic common objects from an image set. The proposed method is built upon the standard single-stage object detector. Furthermore, an embedded branch is introduced to generate the object's representation feature, and their similarity is measured by cosine distance. Experiments are conducted on PASCAL VOC 2007 and COCO 2014 datasets. While being simple and flexible, our proposed SSCOD built upon ATSSNet performs significantly better than the baseline of the standard object detection, while still be able to match objects of unknown categories. Our source code can be found at \href{https://github.com/cybercore-co-ltd/Single-Stage-Common-Object-Detection}{(URL)}
abstract_zh: 本文解决了常见对象检测问题，旨在从一组图像中检测相似类别的对象。尽管它与标准对象检测和联合分割有一些相似之处，但最近由 \cite{Jiang2019a} 推广的常见对象检测具有一些独特的优势和挑战。首先，它被设计为适用于闭集和开集条件，即已知和未知对象。其次，它必须能够匹配相同类别的对象，但不限于相同的实例、纹理或姿势。第三，它可以区分多个对象。在这项工作中，我们引入了单阶段常见对象检测（SSCOD）来从图像集中检测与类无关的常见对象。所提出的方法建立在标准单级物体检测器的基础上。此外，引入嵌入分支来生成对象的表示特征，并通过余弦距离来衡量它们的相似度。实验在 PASCAL VOC 2007 和 COCO 2014 数据集上进行。虽然简单灵活，但我们提出的基于 ATSSNet 的 SSCOD 性能明显优于标准目标检测的基线，同时仍然能够匹配未知类别的目标。我们的源代码可以在 \href{https://github.com/cybercore-co-ltd/Single-Stage-Common-Object-Detection}{(URL)} 找到

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种单阶段无类别感知的通用目标检测方法（SSCOD），旨在从图像集中检测相似类别的目标，适用于已知和未知对象的检测。
AI.motivation: 通用目标检测需应对开放集条件下的未知对象检测、跨实例匹配及多目标区分等挑战，现有方法在灵活性和性能上存在不足，需设计简单且高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于标准单阶段检测器（ATSSNet），引入嵌入分支生成目标表示特征，并通过余弦距离度量相似性，实现无类别信息的通用目标匹配。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC 2007和COCO 2014数据集上，SSCOD在保持简单性的同时显著优于标准检测基线，且能有效匹配未知类别目标。
AI.conclusion: SSCOD为通用目标检测提供了有效的单阶段基线方法，尤其在开放集场景下表现优异，代码已开源供进一步研究。

authors_text: Bastian Rieck
title: Basic Analysis of Bin-Packing Heuristics
title_zh: 装箱启发法的基本分析
abstract: The bin-packing problem continues to remain relevant in numerous application areas. This technical report discusses the empirical performance of different bin-packing heuristics for certain test problems.
summary: The bin-packing problem continues to remain relevant in numerous application areas. This technical report discusses the empirical performance of different bin-packing heuristics for certain test problems.
abstract_zh: 装箱问题在许多应用领域仍然存在相关性。本技术报告讨论了针对某些测试问题的不同装箱启发式的经验性能。

AI.tldr: 分析不同装箱启发式算法在特定测试问题中的实证表现
AI.motivation: 装箱问题在多个领域有广泛应用，比较不同启发式方法的性能有助于指导实际应用中的算法选择
AI.method: 通过实验测试多种装箱启发式算法在特定测试案例中的表现，比较其效率和效果
AI.result: 实验结果展示了不同启发式算法在解决测试问题时的性能差异，为选择合适算法提供了依据
AI.conclusion: 实证分析表明，不同启发式算法在特定测试问题上表现各异，需根据具体场景选择合适方法

authors_text: Milind Naphade,Shuo Wang,David C. Anastasiu,Zheng Tang,Ming-Ching Chang,Xiaodong Yang,Yue Yao,Liang Zheng,Pranamesh Chakraborty,Christian E. Lopez,Anuj Sharma,Qi Feng,Vitaly Ablavsky,Stan Sclaroff
title: The 5th AI City Challenge
title_zh: 第五届人工智能城市挑战赛
comment: Summary of the 5th AI City Challenge Workshop in conjunction with CVPR 2021
comments: Summary of the 5th AI City Challenge Workshop in conjunction with CVPR 2021
abstract: The AI City Challenge was created with two goals in mind: (1) pushing the boundaries of research and development in intelligent video analysis for smarter cities use cases, and (2) assessing tasks where the level of performance is enough to cause real-world adoption. Transportation is a segment ripe for such adoption. The fifth AI City Challenge attracted 305 participating teams across 38 countries, who leveraged city-scale real traffic data and high-quality synthetic data to compete in five challenge tracks. Track 1 addressed video-based automatic vehicle counting, where the evaluation being conducted on both algorithmic effectiveness and computational efficiency. Track 2 addressed city-scale vehicle re-identification with augmented synthetic data to substantially increase the training set for the task. Track 3 addressed city-scale multi-target multi-camera vehicle tracking. Track 4 addressed traffic anomaly detection. Track 5 was a new track addressing vehicle retrieval using natural language descriptions. The evaluation system shows a general leader board of all submitted results, and a public leader board of results limited to the contest participation rules, where teams are not allowed to use external data in their work. The public leader board shows results more close to real-world situations where annotated data is limited. Results show the promise of AI in Smarter Transportation. State-of-the-art performance for some tasks shows that these technologies are ready for adoption in real-world systems.

abstract_zh: 人工智能城市挑战赛的创建有两个目标：(1) 突破智慧城市用例的智能视频分析的研发界限，(2) 评估性能水平足以引起现实世界采用的任务。交通运输是采用这种技术的成熟领域。第五届AI城市挑战赛吸引了来自38个国家的305支参赛队伍，利用城市规模的真实交通数据和高质量的合成数据，在五个挑战赛道上进行角逐。第 1 轨道涉及基于视频的自动车辆计数，其中对算法有效性和计算效率进行评估。第 2 轨道利用增强的合成数据解决城市规模的车辆重新识别问题，以大幅增加该任务的训练集。 Track 3 解决城市规模的多目标多摄像头车辆跟踪。 Track 4 解决了流量异常检测问题。 Track 5 是一个使用自然语言描述进行车辆检索的新赛道。评估系统显示了所有提交结果的通用排行榜，以及仅限于竞赛参与规则的公共结果排行榜，其中团队不允许在工作中使用外部数据。公共排行榜显示的结果更接近注释数据有限的现实世界情况。结果显示了人工智能在智慧交通领域的前景。某些任务的最先进性能表明这些技术已准备好在现实系统中采用。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了第五屆AI City Challenge競賽，涵蓋五個交通相關的智能視頻分析任務，包括車輛計數、重識別、跟蹤、異常檢測及自然語言車輛檢索。
AI.motivation: 推動智能視頻分析技術在智慧城市民用場景的應用，並評估技術是否具備足夠性能實現實際落地。
AI.method: 通過城市規模真實交通數據與高品質合成數據，設計五個競賽軌道，結合算法效能與計算效率評估，並設置公開排行榜限制外部數據使用以模擬現實場景。
AI.result: 結果顯示AI技術在交通領域具備應用潛力，部分任務達到了可落地的先進水平（SOTA）。
AI.conclusion: AI技術在智慧交通中展現出實際應用價值，需進一步研究與產業合作推進技術落地。

search_text: The 5th AI City Challenge 第五届人工智能城市挑战赛 The AI City Challenge was created with two goals in mind: (1) pushing the boundaries of research and development in intelligent video analysis for smarter cities use cases, and (2) assessing tasks where the level of performance is enough to cause real-world adoption. Transportation is a segment ripe for such adoption. The fifth AI City Challenge attracted 305 participating teams across 38 countries, who leveraged city-scale real traffic data and high-quality synthetic data to compete in five challenge tracks. Track 1 addressed video-based automatic vehicle counting, where the evaluation being conducted on both algorithmic effectiveness and computational efficiency. Track 2 addressed city-scale vehicle re-identification with augmented synthetic data to substantially increase the training set for the task. Track 3 addressed city-scale multi-target multi-camera vehicle tracking. Track 4 addressed traffic anomaly detection. Track 5 was a new track addressing vehicle retrieval using natural language descriptions. The evaluation system shows a general leader board of all submitted results, and a public leader board of results limited to the contest participation rules, where teams are not allowed to use external data in their work. The public leader board shows results more close to real-world situations where annotated data is limited. Results show the promise of AI in Smarter Transportation. State-of-the-art performance for some tasks shows that these technologies are ready for adoption in real-world systems. 人工智能城市挑战赛的创建有两个目标：(1) 突破智慧城市用例的智能视频分析的研发界限，(2) 评估性能水平足以引起现实世界采用的任务。交通运输是采用这种技术的成熟领域。第五届AI城市挑战赛吸引了来自38个国家的305支参赛队伍，利用城市规模的真实交通数据和高质量的合成数据，在五个挑战赛道上进行角逐。第 1 轨道涉及基于视频的自动车辆计数，其中对算法有效性和计算效率进行评估。第 2 轨道利用增强的合成数据解决城市规模的车辆重新识别问题，以大幅增加该任务的训练集。 Track 3 解决城市规模的多目标多摄像头车辆跟踪。 Track 4 解决了流量异常检测问题。 Track 5 是一个使用自然语言描述进行车辆检索的新赛道。评估系统显示了所有提交结果的通用排行榜，以及仅限于竞赛参与规则的公共结果排行榜，其中团队不允许在工作中使用外部数据。公共排行榜显示的结果更接近注释数据有限的现实世界情况。结果显示了人工智能在智慧交通领域的前景。某些任务的最先进性能表明这些技术已准备好在现实系统中采用。 本文介绍了第五屆AI City Challenge競賽，涵蓋五個交通相關的智能視頻分析任務，包括車輛計數、重識別、跟蹤、異常檢測及自然語言車輛檢索。 Milind Naphade,Shuo Wang,David C. Anastasiu,Zheng Tang,Ming-Ching Chang,Xiaodong Yang,Yue Yao,Liang Zheng,Pranamesh Chakraborty,Christian E. Lopez,Anuj Sharma,Qi Feng,Vitaly Ablavsky,Stan Sclaroff cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Congyue Deng,Or Litany,Yueqi Duan,Adrien Poulenard,Andrea Tagliasacchi,Leonidas Guibas
title: Vector Neurons: A General Framework for SO(3)-Equivariant Networks
title_zh: 矢量神经元：SO(3) 等变网络的通用框架
abstract: Invariance and equivariance to the rotation group have been widely discussed in the 3D deep learning community for pointclouds. Yet most proposed methods either use complex mathematical tools that may limit their accessibility, or are tied to specific input data types and network architectures. In this paper, we introduce a general framework built on top of what we call Vector Neuron representations for creating SO(3)-equivariant neural networks for pointcloud processing. Extending neurons from 1D scalars to 3D vectors, our vector neurons enable a simple mapping of SO(3) actions to latent spaces thereby providing a framework for building equivariance in common neural operations -- including linear layers, non-linearities, pooling, and normalizations. Due to their simplicity, vector neurons are versatile and, as we demonstrate, can be incorporated into diverse network architecture backbones, allowing them to process geometry inputs in arbitrary poses. Despite its simplicity, our method performs comparably well in accuracy and generalization with other more complex and specialized state-of-the-art methods on classification and segmentation tasks. We also show for the first time a rotation equivariant reconstruction network.
summary: Invariance and equivariance to the rotation group have been widely discussed in the 3D deep learning community for pointclouds. Yet most proposed methods either use complex mathematical tools that may limit their accessibility, or are tied to specific input data types and network architectures. In this paper, we introduce a general framework built on top of what we call Vector Neuron representations for creating SO(3)-equivariant neural networks for pointcloud processing. Extending neurons from 1D scalars to 3D vectors, our vector neurons enable a simple mapping of SO(3) actions to latent spaces thereby providing a framework for building equivariance in common neural operations -- including linear layers, non-linearities, pooling, and normalizations. Due to their simplicity, vector neurons are versatile and, as we demonstrate, can be incorporated into diverse network architecture backbones, allowing them to process geometry inputs in arbitrary poses. Despite its simplicity, our method performs comparably well in accuracy and generalization with other more complex and specialized state-of-the-art methods on classification and segmentation tasks. We also show for the first time a rotation equivariant reconstruction network.
abstract_zh: 旋转群的不变性和等变性已在点云的 3D 深度学习社区中得到广泛讨论。然而，大多数提出的方法要么使用复杂的数学工具，这可能会限制其可访问性，要么与特定的输入数据类型和网络架构相关联。在本文中，我们介绍了一个建立在向量神经元表示之上的通用框架，用于创建用于点云处理的 SO(3) 等变神经网络。将神经元从 1D 标量扩展到 3D 向量，我们的向量神经元能够将 SO(3) 动作简单映射到潜在空间，从而提供了在常见神经操作中构建等变性的框架 - 包括线性层、非线性、池化和归一化。由于其简单性，矢量神经元具有多种用途，正如我们所演示的，可以将其合并到不同的网络架构主干中，从而使它们能够处理任意姿势的几何输入。尽管它很简单，但我们的方法在准确性和泛化方面与其他更复杂和专业的分类和分割任务的最先进方法表现得相当好。我们还首次展示了旋转等变重建网络。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于向量神经元的通用框架，用于构建对三维旋转群SO(3)具有等变性的神经网络，以处理点云数据。
AI.motivation: 现有方法或依赖复杂数学工具限制可及性，或局限于特定数据类型和网络结构，缺乏通用性和灵活性。
AI.method: 将神经元从1D标量扩展为3D向量，通过简单映射SO(3)操作到潜在空间，实现线性层、非线性激活、池化等常见操作的等变性。
AI.result: 在分类和分割任务中，方法性能与复杂方法相当，且首次实现了旋转等变重建网络，可处理任意姿态的几何输入。
AI.conclusion: 向量神经元提供了一种简洁有效的通用框架，为三维点云处理中的旋转等变性建模提供了新思路。

Yet most proposed methods either use complex mathematical tools that may limit their accessibility, or are tied to specific input data types and network architectures. In this paper, we introduce a general framework built on top of what we call Vector Neuron representations for creating SO(3)-equivariant neural networks for pointcloud processing. Extending neurons from 1D scalars to 3D vectors, our vector neurons enable a simple mapping of SO(3) actions to latent spaces thereby providing a framework for building equivariance in common neural operations -- including linear layers, non-linearities, pooling, and normalizations. Due to their simplicity, vector neurons are versatile and, as we demonstrate, can be incorporated into diverse network architecture backbones, allowing them to process geometry inputs in arbitrary poses. Despite its simplicity, our method performs comparably well in accuracy and generalization with other more complex and specialized state-of-the-art methods on classification and segmentation tasks. authors_text: Sina Famouri,Lia Morra,Leonardo Mangia,Fabrizio Lamberti
title: Breast Mass Detection with Faster R-CNN: On the Feasibility of Learning from Noisy Annotations
title_zh: 使用 Faster R-CNN 进行乳房肿块检测：关于从噪声注释中学习的可行性
abstract: In this work we study the impact of noise on the training of object detection networks for the medical domain, and how it can be mitigated by improving the training procedure. Annotating large medical datasets for training data-hungry deep learning models is expensive and time consuming. Leveraging information that is already collected in clinical practice, in the form of text reports, bookmarks or lesion measurements would substantially reduce this cost. Obtaining precise lesion bounding boxes through automatic mining procedures, however, is difficult. We provide here a quantitative evaluation of the effect of bounding box coordinate noise on the performance of Faster R-CNN object detection networks for breast mass detection. Varying degrees of noise are simulated by randomly modifying the bounding boxes: in our experiments, bounding boxes could be enlarged up to six times the original size. The noise is injected in the CBIS-DDSM collection, a well curated public mammography dataset for which accurate lesion location is available. We show how, due to an imperfect matching between the ground truth and the network bounding box proposals, the noise is propagated during training and reduces the ability of the network to correctly classify lesions from background. When using the standard Intersection over Union criterion, the area under the FROC curve decreases by up to 9%. A novel matching criterion is proposed to improve tolerance to noise.
summary: In this work we study the impact of noise on the training of object detection networks for the medical domain, and how it can be mitigated by improving the training procedure. Annotating large medical datasets for training data-hungry deep learning models is expensive and time consuming. Leveraging information that is already collected in clinical practice, in the form of text reports, bookmarks or lesion measurements would substantially reduce this cost. Obtaining precise lesion bounding boxes through automatic mining procedures, however, is difficult. We provide here a quantitative evaluation of the effect of bounding box coordinate noise on the performance of Faster R-CNN object detection networks for breast mass detection. Varying degrees of noise are simulated by randomly modifying the bounding boxes: in our experiments, bounding boxes could be enlarged up to six times the original size. The noise is injected in the CBIS-DDSM collection, a well curated public mammography dataset for which accurate lesion location is available. We show how, due to an imperfect matching between the ground truth and the network bounding box proposals, the noise is propagated during training and reduces the ability of the network to correctly classify lesions from background. When using the standard Intersection over Union criterion, the area under the FROC curve decreases by up to 9%. A novel matching criterion is proposed to improve tolerance to noise.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们研究了噪声对医学领域目标检测网络训练的影响，以及如何通过改进训练过程来减轻影响。注释大型医疗数据集以训练需要大量数据的深度学习模型既昂贵又耗时。利用在临床实践中以文本报告、书签或病变测量的形式收集的信息将大大降低这一成本。然而，通过自动挖掘程序获得精确的病变边界框是很困难的。我们在此提供了边界框坐标噪声对用于乳腺肿块检测的 Faster R-CNN 对象检测网络性能影响的定量评估。通过随机修改边界框来模拟不同程度的噪声：在我们的实验中，边界框可以放大到原始大小的六倍。噪声被注入 CBIS-DDSM 集合中，这是一个精心策划的公共乳房 X 线摄影数据集，可提供准确的病变位置。我们展示了由于地面实况和网络边界框建议之间的不完美匹配，噪声如何在训练期间传播并降低网络从背景中正确分类病变的能力。当使用标准交集标准时，FROC 曲线下的面积减少最多 9%。提出了一种新颖的匹配标准来提高对噪声的容忍度。

AI.tldr: 本文研究噪声标注对乳腺肿块检测模型Faster R-CNN的影响，并提出改进方法以提高模型鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 医疗图像标注成本高昂且难以获取精确边界框，但现有临床数据中的文本报告等信息可辅助降低标注成本，需解决噪声标注带来的性能下降问题。
AI.method: 在CBIS-DDSM数据集上模拟不同噪声水平（边界框放大至原尺寸6倍），分析噪声对模型训练的影响，并提出新型匹配准则以提升噪声容忍度。
AI.result: 噪声导致FROC曲线下面积最大下降9%，新型匹配准则有效缓解了噪声干扰带来的性能损失。
AI.conclusion: 噪声标注会显著降低检测性能，但通过改进匹配策略可增强模型对噪声的鲁棒性，为利用临床数据辅助标注提供可行方案。
