authors_text: Emeç Erçelik,Ekim Yurtsever,Alois Knoll
title: Temp-Frustum Net: 3D Object Detection with Temporal Fusion
title_zh: Temp-Frustum Net：具有时间融合的 3D 对象检测
comment: To be published in 32nd IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium
comments: To be published in 32nd IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium
abstract: 3D object detection is a core component of automated driving systems. State-of-the-art methods fuse RGB imagery and LiDAR point cloud data frame-by-frame for 3D bounding box regression. However, frame-by-frame 3D object detection suffers from noise, field-of-view obstruction, and sparsity. We propose a novel Temporal Fusion Module (TFM) to use information from previous time-steps to mitigate these problems. First, a state-of-the-art frustum network extracts point cloud features from raw RGB and LiDAR point cloud data frame-by-frame. Then, our TFM module fuses these features with a recurrent neural network. As a result, 3D object detection becomes robust against single frame failures and transient occlusions. Experiments on the KITTI object tracking dataset show the efficiency of the proposed TFM, where we obtain ~6%, ~4%, and ~6% improvements on Car, Pedestrian, and Cyclist classes, respectively, compared to frame-by-frame baselines. Furthermore, ablation studies reinforce that the subject of improvement is temporal fusion and show the effects of different placements of TFM in the object detection pipeline. Our code is open-source and available at https://github.com/emecercelik/Temp-Frustum-Net.git.
summary: 3D object detection is a core component of automated driving systems. State-of-the-art methods fuse RGB imagery and LiDAR point cloud data frame-by-frame for 3D bounding box regression. However, frame-by-frame 3D object detection suffers from noise, field-of-view obstruction, and sparsity. We propose a novel Temporal Fusion Module (TFM) to use information from previous time-steps to mitigate these problems. First, a state-of-the-art frustum network extracts point cloud features from raw RGB and LiDAR point cloud data frame-by-frame. Then, our TFM module fuses these features with a recurrent neural network. As a result, 3D object detection becomes robust against single frame failures and transient occlusions. Experiments on the KITTI object tracking dataset show the efficiency of the proposed TFM, where we obtain ~6%, ~4%, and ~6% improvements on Car, Pedestrian, and Cyclist classes, respectively, compared to frame-by-frame baselines. Furthermore, ablation studies reinforce that the subject of improvement is temporal fusion and show the effects of different placements of TFM in the object detection pipeline. Our code is open-source and available at https://github.com/emecercelik/Temp-Frustum-Net.git.
abstract_zh: 3D 物体检测是自动驾驶系统的核心组件。最先进的方法将 RGB 图像和 LiDAR 点云数据逐帧融合，以进行 3D 边界框回归。然而，逐帧 3D 对象检测存在噪声、视场遮挡和稀疏性等问题。我们提出了一种新颖的时间融合模块（TFM）来使用先前时间步骤的信息来缓解这些问题。首先，最先进的视锥体网络从原始 RGB 和 LiDAR 点云数据中逐帧提取点云特征。然后，我们的 TFM 模块将这些特征与循环神经网络融合。因此，3D 对象检测对于单帧故障和瞬态遮挡变得稳健。 KITTI 对象跟踪数据集上的实验显示了所提出的 TFM 的效率，与逐帧基线相比，我们在汽车、行人和骑自行车者类别上分别获得了约 6%、约 4% 和约 6% 的改进。此外，消融研究强调了改进的主题是时间融合，并显示了 TFM 在对象检测管道中不同放置的效果。我们的代码是开源的，可在 https://github.com/emecercelik/Temp-Frustum-Net.git 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于时间融合的3D目标检测方法Temp-Frustum Net，通过融合多帧信息提升检测鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有逐帧3D目标检测方法易受噪声、遮挡和点云稀疏性影响，需利用时间信息增强检测稳定性。
AI.method: 采用先进frustum网络逐帧提取点云特征，结合递归神经网络构建时间融合模块（TFM）进行跨帧特征融合。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上，相较基线方法Car、Pedestrian、Cyclist类别分别提升6%、4%、6%，消融实验证实时间融合有效性。
AI.conclusion: 时间融合机制显著提升3D检测鲁棒性，代码已开源验证方法有效性。

search_text: Temp-Frustum Net: 3D Object Detection with Temporal Fusion Temp-Frustum Net：具有时间融合的 3D 对象检测 3D object detection is a core component of automated driving systems. State-of-the-art methods fuse RGB imagery and LiDAR point cloud data frame-by-frame for 3D bounding box regression. However, frame-by-frame 3D object detection suffers from noise, field-of-view obstruction, and sparsity. We propose a novel Temporal Fusion Module (TFM) to use information from previous time-steps to mitigate these problems. First, a state-of-the-art frustum network extracts point cloud features from raw RGB and LiDAR point cloud data frame-by-frame. Then, our TFM module fuses these features with a recurrent neural network. As a result, 3D object detection becomes robust against single frame failures and transient occlusions. Experiments on the KITTI object tracking dataset show the efficiency of the proposed TFM, where we obtain ~6%, ~4%, and ~6% improvements on Car, Pedestrian, and Cyclist classes, respectively, compared to frame-by-frame baselines. Furthermore, ablation studies reinforce that the subject of improvement is temporal fusion and show the effects of different placements of TFM in the object detection pipeline. Our code is open-source and available at https://github.com/emecercelik/Temp-Frustum-Net.git. 3D 物体检测是自动驾驶系统的核心组件。最先进的方法将 RGB 图像和 LiDAR 点云数据逐帧融合，以进行 3D 边界框回归。然而，逐帧 3D 对象检测存在噪声、视场遮挡和稀疏性等问题。我们提出了一种新颖的时间融合模块（TFM）来使用先前时间步骤的信息来缓解这些问题。首先，最先进的视锥体网络从原始 RGB 和 LiDAR 点云数据中逐帧提取点云特征。然后，我们的 TFM 模块将这些特征与循环神经网络融合。因此，3D 对象检测对于单帧故障和瞬态遮挡变得稳健。 KITTI 对象跟踪数据集上的实验显示了所提出的 TFM 的效率，与逐帧基线相比，我们在汽车、行人和骑自行车者类别上分别获得了约 6%、约 4% 和约 6% 的改进。此外，消融研究强调了改进的主题是时间融合，并显示了 TFM 在对象检测管道中不同放置的效果。我们的代码是开源的，可在 https://github.com/emecercelik/Temp-Frustum-Net.git 上获取。 本文提出一种基于时间融合的3D目标检测方法Temp-Frustum Net，通过融合多帧信息提升检测鲁棒性。 Emeç Erçelik,Ekim Yurtsever,Alois Knoll cs.CV

authors_text: Khalid Youssef,Greg Schuette,Yubin Cai,Daisong Zhang,Yikun Huang,Yahya Rahmat-Samii,Louis-S. Bouchard
title: Scalable End-to-End RF Classification: A Case Study on Undersized Dataset Regularization by Convolutional-MST
title_zh: 可扩展的端到端 RF 分类：通过卷积 MST 进行小型数据集正则化的案例研究
abstract: Unlike areas such as computer vision and speech recognition where convolutional and recurrent neural networks-based approaches have proven effective to the nature of the respective areas of application, deep learning (DL) still lacks a general approach suitable for the unique nature and challenges of RF systems such as radar, signals intelligence, electronic warfare, and communications. Existing approaches face problems in robustness, consistency, efficiency, repeatability and scalability. One of the main challenges in RF sensing such as radar target identification is the difficulty and cost of obtaining data. Hundreds to thousands of samples per class are typically used when training for classifying signals into 2 to 12 classes with reported accuracy ranging from 87% to 99%, where accuracy generally decreases with more classes added. In this paper, we present a new DL approach based on multistage training and demonstrate it on RF sensing signal classification. We consistently achieve over 99% accuracy for up to 17 diverse classes using only 11 samples per class for training, yielding up to 35% improvement in accuracy over standard DL approaches.
summary: Unlike areas such as computer vision and speech recognition where convolutional and recurrent neural networks-based approaches have proven effective to the nature of the respective areas of application, deep learning (DL) still lacks a general approach suitable for the unique nature and challenges of RF systems such as radar, signals intelligence, electronic warfare, and communications. Existing approaches face problems in robustness, consistency, efficiency, repeatability and scalability. One of the main challenges in RF sensing such as radar target identification is the difficulty and cost of obtaining data. Hundreds to thousands of samples per class are typically used when training for classifying signals into 2 to 12 classes with reported accuracy ranging from 87% to 99%, where accuracy generally decreases with more classes added. In this paper, we present a new DL approach based on multistage training and demonstrate it on RF sensing signal classification. We consistently achieve over 99% accuracy for up to 17 diverse classes using only 11 samples per class for training, yielding up to 35% improvement in accuracy over standard DL approaches.
abstract_zh: 与计算机视觉和语音识别等领域不同，基于卷积和循环神经网络的方法已被证明对各自应用领域的性质有效，深度学习 (DL) 仍然缺乏适合雷达、信号情报、电子战和通信等射频系统的独特性质和挑战的通用方法。现有方法面临鲁棒性、一致性、效率、可重复性和可扩展性方面的问题。雷达目标识别等射频传感的主要挑战之一是获取数据的难度和成本。在训练将信号分类为 2 到 12 个类时，每个类通常使用数百到数千个样本，报告的准确度范围为 87% 到 99%，其中随着添加更多类，准确度通常会降低。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于多阶段训练的新深度学习方法，并在射频传感信号分类上进行了演示。我们仅使用每类 11 个样本进行训练，即可持续实现多达 17 个不同类别的超过 99% 的准确率，与标准 DL 方法相比，准确率提高了 35%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多阶段训练的深度学习方法，用于在小样本条件下对射频信号进行分类。
AI.motivation: 由于射频系统如雷达、电子战等领域的数据获取困难且成本高昂，现有深度学习方法在小样本条件下难以达到高准确率。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于多阶段训练的深度学习方法，结合卷积神经网络与多阶段训练策略，以提高在小样本条件下的分类性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在仅使用每类11个样本的情况下，对多达17个类别的射频信号分类准确率超过99%，比标准深度学习方法提高了35%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了射频信号分类中的小样本问题，具有较高的准确率和实用性，为相关领域提供了新的解决方案。

authors_text: Songmin Dai,Jide Li,Lu Wang,Congcong Zhu,Yifan Wu,Xiaoqiang Li
title: Unsupervised Learning of Multi-level Structures for Anomaly Detection
title_zh: 用于异常检测的多层结构的无监督学习
abstract: The main difficulty in high-dimensional anomaly detection tasks is the lack of anomalous data for training. And simply collecting anomalous data from the real world, common distributions, or the boundary of normal data manifold may face the problem of missing anomaly modes. This paper first introduces a novel method to generate anomalous data by breaking up global structures while preserving local structures of normal data at multiple levels. It can efficiently expose local abnormal structures of various levels. To fully exploit the exposed multi-level abnormal structures, we propose to train multiple level-specific patch-based detectors with contrastive losses. Each detector learns to detect local abnormal structures of corresponding level at all locations and outputs patchwise anomaly scores. By aggregating the outputs of all level-specific detectors, we obtain a model that can detect all potential anomalies. The effectiveness is evaluated on MNIST, CIFAR10, and ImageNet10 dataset, where the results surpass the accuracy of state-of-the-art methods. Qualitative experiments demonstrate our model is robust that it unbiasedly detects all anomaly modes.
summary: The main difficulty in high-dimensional anomaly detection tasks is the lack of anomalous data for training. And simply collecting anomalous data from the real world, common distributions, or the boundary of normal data manifold may face the problem of missing anomaly modes. This paper first introduces a novel method to generate anomalous data by breaking up global structures while preserving local structures of normal data at multiple levels. It can efficiently expose local abnormal structures of various levels. To fully exploit the exposed multi-level abnormal structures, we propose to train multiple level-specific patch-based detectors with contrastive losses. Each detector learns to detect local abnormal structures of corresponding level at all locations and outputs patchwise anomaly scores. By aggregating the outputs of all level-specific detectors, we obtain a model that can detect all potential anomalies. The effectiveness is evaluated on MNIST, CIFAR10, and ImageNet10 dataset, where the results surpass the accuracy of state-of-the-art methods. Qualitative experiments demonstrate our model is robust that it unbiasedly detects all anomaly modes.
abstract_zh: 高维异常检测任务的主要困难是缺乏用于训练的异常数据。而简单地从现实世界、常见分布或正态数据流形的边界收集异常数据可能会面临异常模式缺失的问题。本文首先介绍了一种通过分解全局结构同时在多个级别保留正常数据的局部结构来生成异常数据的新方法。能有效暴露局部各层次的异常结构。为了充分利用暴露的多级异常结构，我们建议训练具有对比损失的多个特定级别的基于补丁的检测器。每个检测器学习检测所有位置相应级别的局部异常结构并输出补丁异常分数。通过聚合所有特定级别检测器的输出，我们获得了一个可以检测所有潜在异常的模型。其有效性在 MNIST、CIFAR10 和 ImageNet10 数据集上进行评估，结果超过了最先进方法的准确性。定性实验证明我们的模型是稳健的，它可以公正地检测所有异常模式。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督学习方法，通过生成多级异常结构来提升高维数据的异常检测性能。
AI.motivation: 高维异常检测面临缺乏异常训练数据的问题，传统方法依赖真实异常数据或正常数据边界，易导致异常模式遗漏。
AI.method: 通过破坏全局结构并保留局部结构生成多级异常数据，使用对比损失训练多层级补丁检测器，聚合各层级检测结果实现全面异常检测。
AI.result: 在MNIST、CIFAR10和ImageNet10数据集上超越现有方法精度，定性实验验证模型对各类异常模式的鲁棒检测能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多级结构建模和层级检测器聚合，有效解决了无监督异常检测中异常模式遗漏问题，显著提升检测性能。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法通过多级结构建模和层级检测器聚合，有效解决了无监督异常检测中异常模式遗漏问题，显著提升检测性能。

tldr: 本文提出一种无监督学习方法，通过生成多级异常结构来提升高维数据的异常检测性能。
motivation: 高维异常检测面临缺乏异常训练数据的问题，传统方法依赖真实异常数据或正常数据边界，易导致异常模式遗漏。
method: 通过破坏全局结构并保留局部结构生成多级异常数据，使用对比损失训练多层级补丁检测器，聚合各层级检测结果实现全面异常检测。
result: 在MNIST、CIFAR10和ImageNet10数据集上超越现有方法精度，定性实验验证模型对各类异常模式的鲁棒检测能力。
conclusion: 该方法通过多级结构建模和层级检测器聚合，有效解决了无监督异常检测中异常模式遗漏问题，显著提升检测性能。
search_text: Unsupervised Learning of Multi-level Structures for Anomaly Detection 用于异常检测的多层结构的无监督学习 The main difficulty in high-dimensional anomaly detection tasks is the lack of anomalous data for training. And simply collecting anomalous data from the real world, common distributions, or the boundary of normal data manifold may face the problem of missing anomaly modes. This paper first introduces a novel method to generate anomalous data by breaking up global structures while preserving local structures of normal data at multiple levels. It can efficiently expose local abnormal structures of various levels. To fully exploit the exposed multi-level abnormal structures, we propose to train multiple level-specific patch-based detectors with contrastive losses. Each detector learns to detect local abnormal structures of corresponding level at all locations and outputs patchwise anomaly scores. By aggregating the outputs of all level-specific detectors, we obtain a model that can detect all potential anomalies. The effectiveness is evaluated on MNIST, CIFAR10, and ImageNet10 dataset, where the results surpass the accuracy of state-of-the-art methods. Qualitative experiments demonstrate our model is robust that it unbiasedly detects all anomaly modes. 高维异常检测任务的主要困难是缺乏用于训练的异常数据。而简单地从现实世界、常见分布或正态数据流形的边界收集异常数据可能会面临异常模式缺失的问题。本文首先介绍了一种通过分解全局结构同时在多个级别保留正常数据的局部结构来生成异常数据的新方法。能有效暴露局部各层次的异常结构。为了充分利用暴露的多级异常结构，我们建议训练具有对比损失的多个特定级别的基于补丁的检测器。每个检测器学习检测所有位置相应级别的局部异常结构并输出补丁异常分数。通过聚合所有特定级别检测器的输出，我们获得了一个可以检测所有潜在异常的模型。其有效性在 MNIST、CIFAR10 和 ImageNet10 数据集上进行评估，结果超过了最先进方法的准确性。定性实验证明我们的模型是稳健的，它可以公正地检测所有异常模式。 本文提出一种无监督学习方法，通过生成多级异常结构来提升高维数据的异常检测性能。 Songmin Dai,Jide Li,Lu Wang,Congcong Zhu,Yifan Wu,Xiaoqiang Li cs.CV

authors_text: Steffan Christ Sølvsten,Jaco van de Pol,Anna Blume Jakobsen,Mathias Weller Berg Thomasen
title: Efficient Binary Decision Diagram Manipulation in External Memory
title_zh: 外部存储器中的高效二元决策图操作
comment: 41 pages, 14 figures and 7 tables; Sølvsten, S.C. et al. (2022). Adiar: Binary Decision Diagrams in External Memory. In: Tools and Algorithms for the Construction and Analysis of Systems (TACAS 2022)
comments: 41 pages, 14 figures and 7 tables; Sølvsten, S.C. et al. (2022). Adiar: Binary Decision Diagrams in External Memory. In: Tools and Algorithms for the Construction and Analysis of Systems (TACAS 2022)
abstract: We follow up on the idea of Lars Arge to rephrase the Reduce and Apply procedures of Binary Decision Diagrams (BDDs) as iterative I/O-efficient algorithms. We identify multiple avenues to simplify and improve the performance of his proposed algorithms. Furthermore, we extend the technique to other common BDD operations, many of which are not derivable using Apply operations alone, and we provide asymptotic improvements for the procedures that can be derived using Apply. These algorithms are implemented in a new BDD package, named Adiar. We see very promising results when comparing the performance of Adiar with conventional BDD packages that use recursive depth-first algorithms. For instances larger than 8.2 GiB, our algorithms, in parts using the disk, are 1.47 to 3.69 times slower compared to CUDD and Sylvan, exclusively using main memory. Yet, our proposed techniques are able to obtain this performance at a fraction of the main memory needed by conventional BDD packages to function. Furthermore, with Adiar we are able to manipulate BDDs that outgrow main memory and so surpass the limits of other BDD packages.
summary: We follow up on the idea of Lars Arge to rephrase the Reduce and Apply procedures of Binary Decision Diagrams (BDDs) as iterative I/O-efficient algorithms. We identify multiple avenues to simplify and improve the performance of his proposed algorithms. Furthermore, we extend the technique to other common BDD operations, many of which are not derivable using Apply operations alone, and we provide asymptotic improvements for the procedures that can be derived using Apply. These algorithms are implemented in a new BDD package, named Adiar. We see very promising results when comparing the performance of Adiar with conventional BDD packages that use recursive depth-first algorithms. For instances larger than 8.2 GiB, our algorithms, in parts using the disk, are 1.47 to 3.69 times slower compared to CUDD and Sylvan, exclusively using main memory. Yet, our proposed techniques are able to obtain this performance at a fraction of the main memory needed by conventional BDD packages to function. Furthermore, with Adiar we are able to manipulate BDDs that outgrow main memory and so surpass the limits of other BDD packages.
abstract_zh: 我们遵循 Lars Arge 的想法，将二元决策图 (BDD) 的简化和应用过程重新表述为迭代 I/O 高效算法。我们确定了多种途径来简化和提高他提出的算法的性能。此外，我们将该技术扩展到其他常见的 BDD 操作，其中许多操作不能单独使用 Apply 操作导出，并且我们为可以使用 Apply 导出的过程提供渐近改进。这些算法在名为 Adiar 的新 BDD 包中实现。当将 Adiar 的性能与使用递归深度优先算法的传统 BDD 包进行比较时，我们看到了非常有希望的结果。对于大于 8.2 GiB 的实例，我们的算法（部分使用磁盘）比 CUDD 和 Sylvan（仅使用主内存）慢 1.47 到 3.69 倍。然而，我们提出的技术能够以传统 BDD 包运行所需主内存的一小部分来获得这种性能。此外，通过 Adiar，我们能够操纵超出主内存容量的 BDD，从而超越其他 BDD 包的限制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在外部存储中高效操作二进制决策图（BDD）的算法，并实现了一个名为Adiar的新BDD工具包。
AI.motivation: 传统BDD工具包在处理超出主存容量的实例时存在限制，且递归深度优先算法在内存使用上效率较低。
AI.method: 将BDD的Reduce和Apply操作重新表述为I/O高效的迭代算法，并扩展至其他常见操作，同时优化算法的渐近性能。
AI.result: Adiar在处理超过8.2 GiB的实例时，速度比CUDD和Sylvan慢1.47至3.69倍，但内存消耗仅为传统工具的分数之一，并能处理超出主存的BDD。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法以较低的内存开销实现了外部存储中BDD操作的可行性，突破了传统工具的内存限制。

authors_text: Xiang Chen,Yufeng Huang,Lei Xu
title: Multi-Scale Hourglass Hierarchical Fusion Network for Single Image Deraining
title_zh: 用于单图像去雨的多尺度沙漏分层融合网络
abstract: Rain streaks bring serious blurring and visual quality degradation, which often vary in size, direction and density. Current CNN-based methods achieve encouraging performance, while are limited to depict rain characteristics and recover image details in the poor visibility environment. To address these issues, we present a Multi-scale Hourglass Hierarchical Fusion Network (MH2F-Net) in end-to-end manner, to exactly captures rain streak features with multi-scale extraction, hierarchical distillation and information aggregation. For better extracting the features, a novel Multi-scale Hourglass Extraction Block (MHEB) is proposed to get local and global features across different scales through down- and up-sample process. Besides, a Hierarchical Attentive Distillation Block (HADB) then employs the dual attention feature responses to adaptively recalibrate the hierarchical features and eliminate the redundant ones. Further, we introduce a Residual Projected Feature Fusion (RPFF) strategy to progressively discriminate feature learning and aggregate different features instead of directly concatenating or adding. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and real rainy datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the designed MH2F-Net by comparing with recent state-of-the-art deraining algorithms. Our source code will be available on the GitHub: https://github.com/cxtalk/MH2F-Net.
summary: Rain streaks bring serious blurring and visual quality degradation, which often vary in size, direction and density. Current CNN-based methods achieve encouraging performance, while are limited to depict rain characteristics and recover image details in the poor visibility environment. To address these issues, we present a Multi-scale Hourglass Hierarchical Fusion Network (MH2F-Net) in end-to-end manner, to exactly captures rain streak features with multi-scale extraction, hierarchical distillation and information aggregation. For better extracting the features, a novel Multi-scale Hourglass Extraction Block (MHEB) is proposed to get local and global features across different scales through down- and up-sample process. Besides, a Hierarchical Attentive Distillation Block (HADB) then employs the dual attention feature responses to adaptively recalibrate the hierarchical features and eliminate the redundant ones. Further, we introduce a Residual Projected Feature Fusion (RPFF) strategy to progressively discriminate feature learning and aggregate different features instead of directly concatenating or adding. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and real rainy datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the designed MH2F-Net by comparing with recent state-of-the-art deraining algorithms. Our source code will be available on the GitHub: https://github.com/cxtalk/MH2F-Net.
abstract_zh: 雨纹会带来严重的模糊和视觉质量下降，其大小、方向和密度通常会有所不同。目前基于 CNN 的方法取得了令人鼓舞的性能，但仅限于在能见度较差的环境中描述降雨特征和恢复图像细节。为了解决这些问题，我们以端到端的方式提出了多尺度沙漏分层融合网络（MH2F-Net），通过多尺度提取、分层蒸馏和信息聚合来准确捕获雨纹特征。为了更好地提取特征，提出了一种新颖的多尺度沙漏提取模块（MHEB），通过下采样和上采样过程获取不同尺度的局部和全局特征。此外，分层注意蒸馏块（HADB）然后采用双重注意特征响应来自适应地重新校准分层特征并消除冗余特征。此外，我们引入了残差投影特征融合（RPFF）策略来逐步区分特征学习并聚合不同的特征，而不是直接连接或添加。通过与最新的除雨算法进行比较，对合成和真实雨天数据集进行的大量实验证明了设计的 MH2F-Net 的有效性。我们的源代码将在 GitHub 上提供：https://github.com/cxtalk/MH2F-Net。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多尺度沙漏层次融合网络（MH2F-Net），用于单幅图像去雨任务，旨在更精确地捕捉雨痕特征并恢复图像细节。
AI.motivation: 现有基于CNN的去雨方法在雨特征描述和低能见度环境下图像细节恢复方面存在局限性，需改进特征提取与信息融合策略。
AI.method: 设计多尺度沙漏提取块（MHEB）进行跨尺度特征提取，结合层次注意力蒸馏块（HADB）优化特征分布，并引入残差投影特征融合（RPFF）策略实现多特征渐进融合。
AI.result: 在合成与真实降雨数据集上的实验表明，MH2F-Net优于现有先进去雨算法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过多尺度特征提取、层次蒸馏与残差融合的协同作用，MH2F-Net有效提升了单幅图像去雨性能。

Further, we introduce a Residual Projected Feature Fusion (RPFF) strategy to progressively discriminate feature learning and aggregate different features instead of directly concatenating or adding. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and real rainy datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the designed MH2F-Net by comparing with recent state-of-the-art deraining algorithms. Our source code will be available on the GitHub: https://github.com/cxtalk/MH2F-Net. 雨纹会带来严重的模糊和视觉质量下降，其大小、方向和密度通常会有所不同。目前基于 CNN 的方法取得了令人鼓舞的性能，但仅限于在能见度较差的环境中描述降雨特征和恢复图像细节。为了解决这些问题，我们以端到端的方式提出了多尺度沙漏分层融合网络（MH2F-Net），通过多尺度提取、分层蒸馏和信息聚合来准确捕获雨纹特征。为了更好地提取特征，提出了一种新颖的多尺度沙漏提取模块（MHEB），通过下采样和上采样过程获取不同尺度的局部和全局特征。此外，分层注意蒸馏块（HADB）然后采用双重注意特征响应来自适应地重新校准分层特征并消除冗余特征。此外，我们引入了残差投影特征融合（RPFF）策略来逐步区分特征学习并聚合不同的特征，而不是直接连接或添加。通过与最新的除雨算法进行比较，对合成和真实雨天数据集进行的大量实验证明了设计的 MH2F-Net 的有效性。我们的源代码将在 GitHub 上提供：https://github.com/cxtalk/MH2F-Net。 本文提出一种多尺度沙漏层次融合网络（MH2F-Net），用于单幅图像去雨任务，旨在更精确地捕捉雨痕特征并恢复图像细节。 Xiang Chen,Yufeng Huang,Lei Xu eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Nian Liu,Ni Zhang,Kaiyuan Wan,Ling Shao,Junwei Han
title: Visual Saliency Transformer
title_zh: 视觉显着性转换器
abstract: Existing state-of-the-art saliency detection methods heavily rely on CNN-based architectures. Alternatively, we rethink this task from a convolution-free sequence-to-sequence perspective and predict saliency by modeling long-range dependencies, which can not be achieved by convolution. Specifically, we develop a novel unified model based on a pure transformer, namely, Visual Saliency Transformer (VST), for both RGB and RGB-D salient object detection (SOD). It takes image patches as inputs and leverages the transformer to propagate global contexts among image patches. Unlike conventional architectures used in Vision Transformer (ViT), we leverage multi-level token fusion and propose a new token upsampling method under the transformer framework to get high-resolution detection results. We also develop a token-based multi-task decoder to simultaneously perform saliency and boundary detection by introducing task-related tokens and a novel patch-task-attention mechanism. Experimental results show that our model outperforms existing methods on both RGB and RGB-D SOD benchmark datasets. Most importantly, our whole framework not only provides a new perspective for the SOD field but also shows a new paradigm for transformer-based dense prediction models. Code is available at https://github.com/nnizhang/VST.
summary: Existing state-of-the-art saliency detection methods heavily rely on CNN-based architectures. Alternatively, we rethink this task from a convolution-free sequence-to-sequence perspective and predict saliency by modeling long-range dependencies, which can not be achieved by convolution. Specifically, we develop a novel unified model based on a pure transformer, namely, Visual Saliency Transformer (VST), for both RGB and RGB-D salient object detection (SOD). It takes image patches as inputs and leverages the transformer to propagate global contexts among image patches. Unlike conventional architectures used in Vision Transformer (ViT), we leverage multi-level token fusion and propose a new token upsampling method under the transformer framework to get high-resolution detection results. We also develop a token-based multi-task decoder to simultaneously perform saliency and boundary detection by introducing task-related tokens and a novel patch-task-attention mechanism. Experimental results show that our model outperforms existing methods on both RGB and RGB-D SOD benchmark datasets. Most importantly, our whole framework not only provides a new perspective for the SOD field but also shows a new paradigm for transformer-based dense prediction models. Code is available at https://github.com/nnizhang/VST.
abstract_zh: 现有最先进的显着性检测方法严重依赖基于 CNN 的架构。或者，我们从无卷积的序列到序列的角度重新思考这个任务，并通过建模长程依赖性来预测显着性，这是卷积无法实现的。具体来说，我们开发了一种基于纯变压器的新颖统一模型，即视觉显着性变压器（VST），用于 RGB 和 RGB-D 显着目标检测（SOD）。它将图像补丁作为输入，并利用转换器在图像补丁之间传播全局上下文。与 Vision Transformer (ViT) 中使用的传统架构不同，我们利用多级令牌融合，并在 Transformer 框架下提出了一种新的令牌上采样方法，以获得高分辨率的检测结果。我们还开发了一种基于令牌的多任务解码器，通过引入与任务相关的令牌和新颖的补丁任务注意机制来同时执行显着性和边界检测。实验结果表明，我们的模型在 RGB 和 RGB-D SOD 基准数据集上均优于现有方法。最重要的是，我们的整个框架不仅为 SOD 领域提供了新的视角，而且还展示了基于 Transformer 的密集预测模型的新范式。代码可在 https://github.com/nnizhang/VST 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于纯Transformer架构的视觉显著性检测模型VST，用于RGB和RGB-D场景的显著性目标检测。
AI.motivation: 现有显著性检测方法依赖CNN架构，难以建模长距离依赖关系，而Transformer能通过全局上下文交互解决此问题。
AI.method: 将图像划分为块作为输入，利用Transformer传播全局上下文；引入多级token融合、新型token上采样方法及基于任务的多任务解码器，通过任务相关token和块-任务注意力机制联合预测显著性与边界。
AI.result: 在RGB和RGB-D显著性检测基准数据集上均优于现有方法，验证了模型有效性。
AI.conclusion: 为显著性检测领域提供新视角，并展示了基于Transformer的密集预测模型新范式。

authors_text: Dongsheng Wang,Chaohao Xie,Shaohui Liu,Zhenxing Niu,Wangmeng Zuo
title: Image Inpainting with Edge-guided Learnable Bidirectional Attention Maps
title_zh: 使用边缘引导的可学习双向注意力图进行图像修复
abstract: For image inpainting, the convolutional neural networks (CNN) in previous methods often adopt standard convolutional operator, which treats valid pixels and holes indistinguishably. As a result, they are limited in handling irregular holes and tend to produce color-discrepant and blurry inpainting result. Partial convolution (PConv) copes with this issue by conducting masked convolution and feature re-normalization conditioned only on valid pixels, but the mask-updating is handcrafted and independent with image structural information. In this paper, we present an edge-guided learnable bidirectional attention map (Edge-LBAM) for improving image inpainting of irregular holes with several distinct merits. Instead of using a hard 0-1 mask, a learnable attention map module is introduced for learning feature re-normalization and mask-updating in an end-to-end manner. Learnable reverse attention maps are further proposed in the decoder for emphasizing on filling in unknown pixels instead of reconstructing all pixels. Motivated by that the filling-in order is crucial to inpainting results and largely depends on image structures in exemplar-based methods, we further suggest a multi-scale edge completion network to predict coherent edges. Our Edge-LBAM method contains dual procedures,including structure-aware mask-updating guided by predict edges and attention maps generated by masks for feature re-normalization.Extensive experiments show that our Edge-LBAM is effective in generating coherent image structures and preventing color discrepancy and blurriness, and performs favorably against the state-of-the-art methods in terms of qualitative metrics and visual quality.
summary: For image inpainting, the convolutional neural networks (CNN) in previous methods often adopt standard convolutional operator, which treats valid pixels and holes indistinguishably. As a result, they are limited in handling irregular holes and tend to produce color-discrepant and blurry inpainting result. Partial convolution (PConv) copes with this issue by conducting masked convolution and feature re-normalization conditioned only on valid pixels, but the mask-updating is handcrafted and independent with image structural information. In this paper, we present an edge-guided learnable bidirectional attention map (Edge-LBAM) for improving image inpainting of irregular holes with several distinct merits. Instead of using a hard 0-1 mask, a learnable attention map module is introduced for learning feature re-normalization and mask-updating in an end-to-end manner. Learnable reverse attention maps are further proposed in the decoder for emphasizing on filling in unknown pixels instead of reconstructing all pixels. Motivated by that the filling-in order is crucial to inpainting results and largely depends on image structures in exemplar-based methods, we further suggest a multi-scale edge completion network to predict coherent edges. Our Edge-LBAM method contains dual procedures,including structure-aware mask-updating guided by predict edges and attention maps generated by masks for feature re-normalization.Extensive experiments show that our Edge-LBAM is effective in generating coherent image structures and preventing color discrepancy and blurriness, and performs favorably against the state-of-the-art methods in terms of qualitative metrics and visual quality.
abstract_zh: 对于图像修复，以前的方法中的卷积神经网络（CNN）通常采用标准的卷积算子，对有效像素和空洞一视同仁。因此，它们在处理不规则孔方面受到限制，并且往往会产生颜色不一致和模糊的修补结果。部分卷积（PConv）通过仅以有效像素为条件进行掩模卷积和特征重新归一化来解决这个问题，但掩模更新是手工制作的并且与图像结构信息无关。在本文中，我们提出了一种边缘引导的可学习双向注意图（Edge-LBAM），用于改进不规则孔的图像修复，具有几个明显的优点。引入可学习的注意力图模块来代替使用硬 0-1 掩码，以端到端的方式学习特征重新归一化和掩码更新。在解码器中进一步提出了可学习的反向注意图，用于强调填充未知像素而不是重建所有像素。由于填充顺序对于修复结果至关重要并且在很大程度上取决于基于示例的方法中的图像结构，因此我们进一步建议使用多尺度边缘完成网络来预测相干边缘。我们的 Edge-LBAM 方法包含双重程序，包括由预测边缘引导的结构感知掩模更新和由掩模生成的注意图以进行特征重新归一化。大量实验表明，我们的 Edge-LBAM 可以有效生成连贯的图像结构并防止颜色差异和模糊，并且在定性指标和视觉质量方面优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于边缘引导的可学习双向注意力图（Edge-LBAM）方法，用于改进不规则孔洞的图像修复任务。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN在处理图像修复时无法区分有效像素与孔洞，导致修复结果存在颜色差异和模糊问题；部分卷积（PConv）虽引入掩码更新，但其更新过程与图像结构信息无关，限制了修复效果。
AI.method: 设计可学习的双向注意力图模块，通过端到端方式学习特征重归一化与掩码更新；在解码器中引入反向注意力图以聚焦未知像素填充；结合多尺度边缘补全网络预测连贯边缘，实现结构感知的掩码更新与特征重归一化。
AI.result: 实验表明，Edge-LBAM在生成连贯图像结构、减少颜色差异和模糊方面效果显著，在定性指标和视觉质量上优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: Edge-LBAM通过整合边缘信息与可学习注意力机制，有效解决了不规则孔洞修复中的结构连贯性与颜色一致性问题，达到了当前最优性能。

Learnable reverse attention maps are further proposed in the decoder for emphasizing on filling in unknown pixels instead of reconstructing all pixels. Motivated by that the filling-in order is crucial to inpainting results and largely depends on image structures in exemplar-based methods, we further suggest a multi-scale edge completion network to predict coherent edges. Our Edge-LBAM method contains dual procedures,including structure-aware mask-updating guided by predict edges and attention maps generated by masks for feature re-normalization.Extensive experiments show that our Edge-LBAM is effective in generating coherent image structures and preventing color discrepancy and blurriness, and performs favorably against the state-of-the-art methods in terms of qualitative metrics and visual quality. 对于图像修复，以前的方法中的卷积神经网络（CNN）通常采用标准的卷积算子，对有效像素和空洞一视同仁。因此，它们在处理不规则孔方面受到限制，并且往往会产生颜色不一致和模糊的修补结果。部分卷积（PConv）通过仅以有效像素为条件进行掩模卷积和特征重新归一化来解决这个问题，但掩模更新是手工制作的并且与图像结构信息无关。在本文中，我们提出了一种边缘引导的可学习双向注意图（Edge-LBAM），用于改进不规则孔的图像修复，具有几个明显的优点。引入可学习的注意力图模块来代替使用硬 0-1 掩码，以端到端的方式学习特征重新归一化和掩码更新。在解码器中进一步提出了可学习的反向注意图，用于强调填充未知像素而不是重建所有像素。由于填充顺序对于修复结果至关重要并且在很大程度上取决于基于示例的方法中的图像结构，因此我们进一步建议使用多尺度边缘完成网络来预测相干边缘。我们的 Edge-LBAM 方法包含双重程序，包括由预测边缘引导的结构感知掩模更新和由掩模生成的注意图以进行特征重新归一化。大量实验表明，我们的 Edge-LBAM 可以有效生成连贯的图像结构并防止颜色差异和模糊，并且在定性指标和视觉质量方面优于最先进的方法。 本文提出了一种基于边缘引导的可学习双向注意力图（Edge-LBAM）方法，用于改进不规则孔洞的图像修复任务。 Dongsheng Wang,Chaohao Xie,Shaohui Liu,Zhenxing Niu,Wangmeng Zuo cs.CV

authors_text: Chen Zhao,Zhipeng Gao,Qian Wang,Kaile Xiao,Zijia Mo,M. Jamal Deen
title: FedSup: A Communication-Efficient Federated Learning Fatigue Driving Behaviors Supervision Framework
title_zh: FedSup：高效沟通的联邦学习疲劳驾驶行为监管框架
abstract: With the proliferation of edge smart devices and the Internet of Vehicles (IoV) technologies, intelligent fatigue detection has become one of the most-used methods in our daily driving. To improve the performance of the detection model, a series of techniques have been developed. However, existing work still leaves much to be desired, such as privacy disclosure and communication cost. To address these issues, we propose FedSup, a client-edge-cloud framework for privacy and efficient fatigue detection. Inspired by the federated learning technique, FedSup intelligently utilizes the collaboration between client, edge, and cloud server to realizing dynamic model optimization while protecting edge data privacy. Moreover, to reduce the unnecessary system communication overhead, we further propose a Bayesian convolutional neural network (BCNN) approximation strategy on the clients and an uncertainty weighted aggregation algorithm on the cloud to enhance the central model training efficiency. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the FedSup framework is suitable for IoV scenarios and outperforms other mainstream methods.
summary: With the proliferation of edge smart devices and the Internet of Vehicles (IoV) technologies, intelligent fatigue detection has become one of the most-used methods in our daily driving. To improve the performance of the detection model, a series of techniques have been developed. However, existing work still leaves much to be desired, such as privacy disclosure and communication cost. To address these issues, we propose FedSup, a client-edge-cloud framework for privacy and efficient fatigue detection. Inspired by the federated learning technique, FedSup intelligently utilizes the collaboration between client, edge, and cloud server to realizing dynamic model optimization while protecting edge data privacy. Moreover, to reduce the unnecessary system communication overhead, we further propose a Bayesian convolutional neural network (BCNN) approximation strategy on the clients and an uncertainty weighted aggregation algorithm on the cloud to enhance the central model training efficiency. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the FedSup framework is suitable for IoV scenarios and outperforms other mainstream methods.
abstract_zh: 随着边缘智能设备和车联网技术的普及，智能疲劳检测已成为我们日常驾驶中最常用的方法之一。为了提高检测模型的性能，开发了一系列技术。然而，现有的工作仍然有很多不足之处，例如隐私泄露和通信成本。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 FedSup，这是一个用于隐私和高效疲劳检测的客户端边缘云框架。受联邦学习技术的启发，FedSup智能地利用客户端、边缘和云服务器之间的协作，实现动态模型优化，同时保护边缘数据隐私。此外，为了减少不必要的系统通信开销，我们进一步在客户端提出了贝叶斯卷积神经网络（BCNN）逼近策略，并在云端提出了不确定性加权聚合算法，以提高中心模型训练效率。大量实验表明，FedSup框架适用于车联网场景，并且性能优于其他主流方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FedSup框架，通过联邦学习技术解决车联网中疲劳驾驶检测的隐私泄露和通信成本问题。
AI.motivation: 现有疲劳检测方法存在隐私泄露风险且通信成本高，需在保护数据隐私的同时提升模型效率。
AI.method: 构建客户端-边缘-云协同的联邦学习框架，结合贝叶斯卷积神经网络近似与不确定性加权聚合算法。
AI.result: 实验表明FedSup在IoV场景下优于主流方法，有效降低通信开销并提升检测性能。
AI.conclusion: FedSup通过隐私保护与通信优化设计，为车联网疲劳检测提供了高效可靠的解决方案。

authors_text: Jinping Wang,Xiaojun Tan,Jianhuang Lai,Jun Li,Canqun Xiang
title: ASPCNet: A Deep Adaptive Spatial Pattern Capsule Network for Hyperspectral Image Classification
title_zh: ASPCNet：用于高光谱图像分类的深度自适应空间模式胶囊网络
abstract: Previous studies have shown the great potential of capsule networks for the spatial contextual feature extraction from {hyperspectral images (HSIs)}. However, the sampling locations of the convolutional kernels of capsules are fixed and cannot be adaptively changed according to the inconsistent semantic information of HSIs. Based on this observation, this paper proposes an adaptive spatial pattern capsule network (ASPCNet) architecture by developing an adaptive spatial pattern (ASP) unit, that can rotate the sampling location of convolutional kernels on the basis of an enlarged receptive field. Note that this unit can learn more discriminative representations of HSIs with fewer parameters. Specifically, two cascaded ASP-based convolution operations (ASPConvs) are applied to input images to learn relatively high-level semantic features, transmitting hierarchical structures among capsules more accurately than the use of the most fundamental features. Furthermore, the semantic features are fed into ASP-based conv-capsule operations (ASPCaps) to explore the shapes of objects among the capsules in an adaptive manner, further exploring the potential of capsule networks. Finally, the class labels of image patches centered on test samples can be determined according to the fully connected capsule layer. Experiments on three public datasets demonstrate that ASPCNet can yield competitive performance with higher accuracies than state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Previous studies have shown the great potential of capsule networks for the spatial contextual feature extraction from {hyperspectral images (HSIs)}. However, the sampling locations of the convolutional kernels of capsules are fixed and cannot be adaptively changed according to the inconsistent semantic information of HSIs. Based on this observation, this paper proposes an adaptive spatial pattern capsule network (ASPCNet) architecture by developing an adaptive spatial pattern (ASP) unit, that can rotate the sampling location of convolutional kernels on the basis of an enlarged receptive field. Note that this unit can learn more discriminative representations of HSIs with fewer parameters. Specifically, two cascaded ASP-based convolution operations (ASPConvs) are applied to input images to learn relatively high-level semantic features, transmitting hierarchical structures among capsules more accurately than the use of the most fundamental features. Furthermore, the semantic features are fed into ASP-based conv-capsule operations (ASPCaps) to explore the shapes of objects among the capsules in an adaptive manner, further exploring the potential of capsule networks. Finally, the class labels of image patches centered on test samples can be determined according to the fully connected capsule layer. Experiments on three public datasets demonstrate that ASPCNet can yield competitive performance with higher accuracies than state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 先前的研究表明胶囊网络在从高光谱图像（HSI）中提取空间上下文特征方面具有巨大潜力。然而，胶囊的卷积核的采样位置是固定的，不能根据HSI不一致的语义信息自适应地改变。基于这一观察，本文通过开发自适应空间模式（ASP）单元提出了一种自适应空间模式胶囊网络（ASPCNet）架构，可以在扩大的感受野的基础上旋转卷积核的采样位置。请注意，该单元可以使用更少的参数学习 HSI 的更具辨别力的表示。具体来说，两个级联的基于 ASP 的卷积运算 (ASPConvs) 应用于输入图像以学习相对高级的语义特征，比使用最基本的特征更准确地在胶囊之间传输层次结构。此外，语义特征被输入到基于 ASP 的卷积胶囊操作（ASPCaps）中，以自适应方式探索胶囊中对象的形状，进一步探索胶囊网络的潜力。最后，可以根据全连接的胶囊层确定以测试样本为中心的图像块的类标签。对三个公共数据集的实验表明，ASPCNet 可以产生具有竞争力的性能，并且比最先进的方法具有更高的精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应空间模式胶囊网络（ASPCNet），用于高光谱图像分类任务。
AI.motivation: 传统胶囊网络的卷积核采样位置固定，无法适应高光谱图像（HSI）中不一致的语义信息，限制了特征提取能力。
AI.method: 设计自适应空间模式（ASP）单元，通过扩大感受野实现卷积核位置的自适应旋转，并采用双级ASP卷积操作（ASPConv）和ASP胶囊操作（ASPCaps）提取层次化语义特征。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上实验表明，ASPCNet在参数更少的情况下取得了优于现有方法的分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: ASPCNet通过自适应空间模式机制有效提升了胶囊网络对高光谱图像的分类性能，验证了其在特征学习中的潜力。

authors_text: Dapeng Hu,Shipeng Yan,Qizhengqiu Lu,Lanqing Hong,Hailin Hu,Yifan Zhang,Zhenguo Li,Xinchao Wang,Jiashi Feng
title: How Well Does Self-Supervised Pre-Training Perform with Streaming Data?
title_zh: 自监督预训练在流数据上的表现如何？
abstract: Prior works on self-supervised pre-training focus on the joint training scenario, where massive unlabeled data are assumed to be given as input all at once, and only then is a learner trained. Unfortunately, such a problem setting is often impractical if not infeasible since many real-world tasks rely on sequential learning, e.g., data are decentralized or collected in a streaming fashion. In this paper, we conduct the first thorough and dedicated investigation on self-supervised pre-training with streaming data, aiming to shed light on the model behavior under this overlooked setup. Specifically, we pre-train over 500 models on four categories of pre-training streaming data from ImageNet and DomainNet and evaluate them on three types of downstream tasks and 12 different downstream datasets. Our studies show that, somehow beyond our expectation, with simple data replay or parameter regularization, sequential self-supervised pre-training turns out to be an efficient alternative for joint pre-training, as the performances of the former are mostly on par with those of the latter. Moreover, catastrophic forgetting, a common issue in sequential supervised learning, is much alleviated in sequential self-supervised learning (SSL), which is well justified through our comprehensive empirical analysis on representations and the sharpness of minima in the loss landscape. Our findings, therefore, suggest that, in practice, for SSL, the cumbersome joint training can be replaced mainly by sequential learning, which in turn enables a much broader spectrum of potential application scenarios.
summary: Prior works on self-supervised pre-training focus on the joint training scenario, where massive unlabeled data are assumed to be given as input all at once, and only then is a learner trained. Unfortunately, such a problem setting is often impractical if not infeasible since many real-world tasks rely on sequential learning, e.g., data are decentralized or collected in a streaming fashion. In this paper, we conduct the first thorough and dedicated investigation on self-supervised pre-training with streaming data, aiming to shed light on the model behavior under this overlooked setup. Specifically, we pre-train over 500 models on four categories of pre-training streaming data from ImageNet and DomainNet and evaluate them on three types of downstream tasks and 12 different downstream datasets. Our studies show that, somehow beyond our expectation, with simple data replay or parameter regularization, sequential self-supervised pre-training turns out to be an efficient alternative for joint pre-training, as the performances of the former are mostly on par with those of the latter. Moreover, catastrophic forgetting, a common issue in sequential supervised learning, is much alleviated in sequential self-supervised learning (SSL), which is well justified through our comprehensive empirical analysis on representations and the sharpness of minima in the loss landscape. Our findings, therefore, suggest that, in practice, for SSL, the cumbersome joint training can be replaced mainly by sequential learning, which in turn enables a much broader spectrum of potential application scenarios.
abstract_zh: 先前关于自监督预训练的工作主要集中在联合训练场景上，其中假设一次性将大量未标记的数据作为输入给出，然后才对学习器进行训练。不幸的是，这样的问题设置通常是不切实际的，甚至是不可行的，因为许多现实世界的任务依赖于顺序学习，例如，数据是分散的或以流方式收集的。在本文中，我们对流数据的自监督预训练进行了首次彻底而专门的研究，旨在揭示这种被忽视的设置下的模型行为。具体来说，我们对来自 ImageNet 和 DomainNet 的四类预训练流数据预训练了 500 多个模型，并在三种类型的下游任务和 12 个不同的下游数据集上对它们进行了评估。我们的研究表明，出乎我们意料的是，通过简单的数据重播或参数正则化，顺序自监督预训练被证明是联合预训练的有效替代方案，因为前者的性能大多与后者相当。此外，灾难性遗忘是顺序监督学习中的一个常见问题，在顺序自监督学习（SSL）中得到了很大程度的缓解，通过我们对损失景观中的表征和最小值锐度的综合实证分析，这是充分合理的。因此，我们的研究结果表明，在实践中，对于 SSL 来说，繁琐的联合训练主要可以通过顺序学习来取代，从而实现更广泛的潜在应用场景。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在流式数据环境下自监督预训练的效果，并与传统的联合训练方法进行了比较。
AI.motivation: 传统的自监督预训练方法假设所有未标记数据一次性提供，但在实际应用中，许多任务的数据是按流式方式收集的。因此，需要研究流式数据下的自监督预训练方法。
AI.method: 作者在ImageNet和DomainNet上生成四类流式预训练数据，训练了超过500个模型，并在三种下游任务和12个数据集上进行评估。
AI.result: 结果显示，使用简单的数据重放或参数正则化，流式自监督预训练的性能与联合预训练相当，且灾难性遗忘问题在流式自监督学习中得到了显著缓解。
AI.conclusion: 流式自监督预训练可以作为联合训练的替代方案，适用于更广泛的场景，从而简化实际应用中的训练流程。

search_text: How Well Does Self-Supervised Pre-Training Perform with Streaming Data? 自监督预训练在流数据上的表现如何？ Prior works on self-supervised pre-training focus on the joint training scenario, where massive unlabeled data are assumed to be given as input all at once, and only then is a learner trained. Unfortunately, such a problem setting is often impractical if not infeasible since many real-world tasks rely on sequential learning, e.g., data are decentralized or collected in a streaming fashion. In this paper, we conduct the first thorough and dedicated investigation on self-supervised pre-training with streaming data, aiming to shed light on the model behavior under this overlooked setup. Specifically, we pre-train over 500 models on four categories of pre-training streaming data from ImageNet and DomainNet and evaluate them on three types of downstream tasks and 12 different downstream datasets. Our studies show that, somehow beyond our expectation, with simple data replay or parameter regularization, sequential self-supervised pre-training turns out to be an efficient alternative for joint pre-training, as the performances of the former are mostly on par with those of the latter. Moreover, catastrophic forgetting, a common issue in sequential supervised learning, is much alleviated in sequential self-supervised learning (SSL), which is well justified through our comprehensive empirical analysis on representations and the sharpness of minima in the loss landscape. Our findings, therefore, suggest that, in practice, for SSL, the cumbersome joint training can be replaced mainly by sequential learning, which in turn enables a much broader spectrum of potential application scenarios. 先前关于自监督预训练的工作主要集中在联合训练场景上，其中假设一次性将大量未标记的数据作为输入给出，然后才对学习器进行训练。不幸的是，这样的问题设置通常是不切实际的，甚至是不可行的，因为许多现实世界的任务依赖于顺序学习，例如，数据是分散的或以流方式收集的。在本文中，我们对流数据的自监督预训练进行了首次彻底而专门的研究，旨在揭示这种被忽视的设置下的模型行为。具体来说，我们对来自 ImageNet 和 DomainNet 的四类预训练流数据预训练了 500 多个模型，并在三种类型的下游任务和 12 个不同的下游数据集上对它们进行了评估。我们的研究表明，出乎我们意料的是，通过简单的数据重播或参数正则化，顺序自监督预训练被证明是联合预训练的有效替代方案，因为前者的性能大多与后者相当。此外，灾难性遗忘是顺序监督学习中的一个常见问题，在顺序自监督学习（SSL）中得到了很大程度的缓解，通过我们对损失景观中的表征和最小值锐度的综合实证分析，这是充分合理的。因此，我们的研究结果表明，在实践中，对于 SSL 来说，繁琐的联合训练主要可以通过顺序学习来取代，从而实现更广泛的潜在应用场景。 本文研究了在流式数据环境下自监督预训练的效果，并与传统的联合训练方法进行了比较。 Dapeng Hu,Shipeng Yan,Qizhengqiu Lu,Lanqing Hong,Hailin Hu,Yifan Zhang,Zhenguo Li,Xinchao Wang,Jiashi Feng cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Usman Sajid,Michael Chow,Jin Zhang,Taejoon Kim,Guanghui Wang
title: Parallel Scale-wise Attention Network for Effective Scene Text Recognition
title_zh: 用于有效场景文本识别的并行尺度注意网络
abstract: The paper proposes a new text recognition network for scene-text images. Many state-of-the-art methods employ the attention mechanism either in the text encoder or decoder for the text alignment. Although the encoder-based attention yields promising results, these schemes inherit noticeable limitations. They perform the feature extraction (FE) and visual attention (VA) sequentially, which bounds the attention mechanism to rely only on the FE final single-scale output. Moreover, the utilization of the attention process is limited by only applying it directly to the single scale feature-maps. To address these issues, we propose a new multi-scale and encoder-based attention network for text recognition that performs the multi-scale FE and VA in parallel. The multi-scale channels also undergo regular fusion with each other to develop the coordinated knowledge together. Quantitative evaluation and robustness analysis on the standard benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed network outperforms the state-of-the-art in most cases.
summary: The paper proposes a new text recognition network for scene-text images. Many state-of-the-art methods employ the attention mechanism either in the text encoder or decoder for the text alignment. Although the encoder-based attention yields promising results, these schemes inherit noticeable limitations. They perform the feature extraction (FE) and visual attention (VA) sequentially, which bounds the attention mechanism to rely only on the FE final single-scale output. Moreover, the utilization of the attention process is limited by only applying it directly to the single scale feature-maps. To address these issues, we propose a new multi-scale and encoder-based attention network for text recognition that performs the multi-scale FE and VA in parallel. The multi-scale channels also undergo regular fusion with each other to develop the coordinated knowledge together. Quantitative evaluation and robustness analysis on the standard benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed network outperforms the state-of-the-art in most cases.
abstract_zh: 该论文提出了一种新的场景文本图像文本识别网络。许多最先进的方法在文本编码器或解码器中采用注意机制来进行文本对齐。尽管基于编码器的注意力产生了有希望的结果，但这些方案继承了明显的局限性。他们依次执行特征提取（FE）和视觉注意力（VA），这将注意力机制限制为仅依赖于 FE 最终的单尺度输出。此外，注意力过程的利用受到仅直接应用于单尺度特征图的限制。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新的多尺度和基于编码器的注意力网络，用于文本识别，并行执行多尺度 FE 和 VA。多尺度通道也定期相互融合，共同发展协调的知识。对标准基准的定量评估和鲁棒性分析表明，所提出的网络在大多数情况下优于最先进的网络。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于并行多尺度注意力机制的场景文本识别网络，以解决现有方法在特征提取和注意力机制应用中的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法顺序执行特征提取和注意力机制，导致注意力机制仅依赖单一尺度输出，且注意力过程仅作用于单一尺度特征图，限制了模型性能。
AI.method: 设计多尺度并行特征提取与注意力机制，通过定期融合多尺度通道信息，实现跨尺度的协同知识学习。
AI.result: 在标准基准测试中，该网络在多数情况下优于现有最先进方法，展现出更强的定量性能和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 并行多尺度注意力网络有效解决了传统方法的局限性，通过多尺度特征协同提升了场景文本识别的准确性和稳定性。

authors_text: Xinwei Zhao,Matthew C. Stamm
title: Making Generated Images Hard To Spot: A Transferable Attack On Synthetic Image Detectors
title_zh: 使生成的图像难以识别：对合成图像探测器的可转移攻击
comment: ef:International Conference on Pattern Recognition, August 2022, Montréal Québec
comments: ef:International Conference on Pattern Recognition, August 2022, Montréal Québec
abstract: Visually realistic GAN-generated images have recently emerged as an important misinformation threat. Research has shown that these synthetic images contain forensic traces that are readily identifiable by forensic detectors. Unfortunately, these detectors are built upon neural networks, which are vulnerable to recently developed adversarial attacks. In this paper, we propose a new anti-forensic attack capable of fooling GAN-generated image detectors. Our attack uses an adversarially trained generator to synthesize traces that these detectors associate with real images. Furthermore, we propose a technique to train our attack so that it can achieve transferability, i.e. it can fool unknown CNNs that it was not explicitly trained against. We evaluate our attack through an extensive set of experiments, where we show that our attack can fool eight state-of-the-art detection CNNs with synthetic images created using seven different GANs, and outperform other alternative attacks.
summary: Visually realistic GAN-generated images have recently emerged as an important misinformation threat. Research has shown that these synthetic images contain forensic traces that are readily identifiable by forensic detectors. Unfortunately, these detectors are built upon neural networks, which are vulnerable to recently developed adversarial attacks. In this paper, we propose a new anti-forensic attack capable of fooling GAN-generated image detectors. Our attack uses an adversarially trained generator to synthesize traces that these detectors associate with real images. Furthermore, we propose a technique to train our attack so that it can achieve transferability, i.e. it can fool unknown CNNs that it was not explicitly trained against. We evaluate our attack through an extensive set of experiments, where we show that our attack can fool eight state-of-the-art detection CNNs with synthetic images created using seven different GANs, and outperform other alternative attacks.
abstract_zh: 视觉逼真的 GAN 生成图像最近已成为一种重要的错误信息威胁。研究表明，这些合成图像包含法医痕迹，法医探测器可以轻松识别这些痕迹。不幸的是，这些探测器是建立在神经网络之上的，神经网络很容易受到最近开发的对抗性攻击的影响。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的反取证攻击，能够欺骗 GAN 生成的图像检测器。我们的攻击使用经过对抗训练的生成器来合成这些探测器与真实图像相关联的痕迹。此外，我们提出了一种技术来训练我们的攻击，以便它能够实现可转移性，即它可以欺骗未经过明确训练的未知 CNN。我们通过一系列广泛的实验来评估我们的攻击，结果表明我们的攻击可以通过使用七种不同的 GAN 创建的合成图像来愚弄八个最先进的检测 CNN，并且优于其他替代攻击。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可迁移的对抗攻击方法，通过生成与真实图像特征相似的痕迹，使合成图像难以被检测器识别。
AI.motivation: 尽管GAN生成的图像存在可被检测的痕迹，但现有基于神经网络的检测器易受对抗攻击影响，需开发更有效的反取证攻击手段以应对虚假信息威胁。
AI.method: 采用对抗训练生成器合成特定痕迹，并通过技术增强攻击的可迁移性，使其能欺骗未明确训练过的CNN检测器。
AI.result: 实验表明，该攻击在七种不同GAN生成的合成图像上成功欺骗了八种先进CNN检测器，效果优于其他现有攻击方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了合成图像的隐蔽性，揭示了当前检测模型在对抗攻击下的脆弱性，为反取证研究提供了新方向。

search_text: Making Generated Images Hard To Spot: A Transferable Attack On Synthetic Image Detectors 使生成的图像难以识别：对合成图像探测器的可转移攻击 Visually realistic GAN-generated images have recently emerged as an important misinformation threat. Research has shown that these synthetic images contain forensic traces that are readily identifiable by forensic detectors. Unfortunately, these detectors are built upon neural networks, which are vulnerable to recently developed adversarial attacks. In this paper, we propose a new anti-forensic attack capable of fooling GAN-generated image detectors. Our attack uses an adversarially trained generator to synthesize traces that these detectors associate with real images. Furthermore, we propose a technique to train our attack so that it can achieve transferability, i.e. it can fool unknown CNNs that it was not explicitly trained against. We evaluate our attack through an extensive set of experiments, where we show that our attack can fool eight state-of-the-art detection CNNs with synthetic images created using seven different GANs, and outperform other alternative attacks. 视觉逼真的 GAN 生成图像最近已成为一种重要的错误信息威胁。研究表明，这些合成图像包含法医痕迹，法医探测器可以轻松识别这些痕迹。不幸的是，这些探测器是建立在神经网络之上的，神经网络很容易受到最近开发的对抗性攻击的影响。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的反取证攻击，能够欺骗 GAN 生成的图像检测器。我们的攻击使用经过对抗训练的生成器来合成这些探测器与真实图像相关联的痕迹。此外，我们提出了一种技术来训练我们的攻击，以便它能够实现可转移性，即它可以欺骗未经过明确训练的未知 CNN。我们通过一系列广泛的实验来评估我们的攻击，结果表明我们的攻击可以通过使用七种不同的 GAN 创建的合成图像来愚弄八个最先进的检测 CNN，并且优于其他替代攻击。 本文提出一种可迁移的对抗攻击方法，通过生成与真实图像特征相似的痕迹，使合成图像难以被检测器识别。 Xinwei Zhao,Matthew C. Stamm cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Timothy Woinoski,Ivan V. Bajić
title: Swimmer Stroke Rate Estimation From Overhead Race Video
title_zh: 根据过头比赛视频估算游泳者划水率
comment: 6 pages, 4 figures, to be presented at the IEEE ICME Workshop on Artificial Intelligence in Sports (AI-Sports), July 2021
comments: 6 pages, 4 figures, to be presented at the IEEE ICME Workshop on Artificial Intelligence in Sports (AI-Sports), July 2021
abstract: In this work, we propose a swimming analytics system for automatically determining swimmer stroke rates from overhead race video (ORV). General ORV is defined as any footage of swimmers in competition, taken for the purposes of viewing or analysis. Examples of this are footage from live streams, broadcasts, or specialized camera equipment, with or without camera motion. These are the most typical forms of swimming competition footage. We detail how to create a system that will automatically collect swimmer stroke rates in any competition, given the video of the competition of interest. With this information, better systems can be created and additions to our analytics system can be proposed to automatically extract other swimming metrics of interest.
summary: In this work, we propose a swimming analytics system for automatically determining swimmer stroke rates from overhead race video (ORV). General ORV is defined as any footage of swimmers in competition, taken for the purposes of viewing or analysis. Examples of this are footage from live streams, broadcasts, or specialized camera equipment, with or without camera motion. These are the most typical forms of swimming competition footage. We detail how to create a system that will automatically collect swimmer stroke rates in any competition, given the video of the competition of interest. With this information, better systems can be created and additions to our analytics system can be proposed to automatically extract other swimming metrics of interest.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种游泳分析系统，用于从头顶比赛视频（ORV）中自动确定游泳者的划水率。一般 ORV 被定义为出于观看或分析目的而拍摄的游泳运动员在比赛中的任何镜头。例如，来自实时流、广播或专用摄像设备（无论有或没有摄像机运动）的镜头。这些是游泳比赛镜头最典型的形式。我们详细介绍了如何创建一个系统，根据感兴趣的比赛视频，自动收集任何比赛中游泳运动员的划水率。有了这些信息，就可以创建更好的系统，并且可以建议对我们的分析系统进行补充，以自动提取其他感兴趣的游泳指标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从俯视比赛视频中自动估计游泳者划水频率的游泳分析系统。
AI.motivation: 传统游泳比赛分析依赖人工观察，效率低且易出错，需自动化系统提升数据采集效率和准确性。
AI.method: 通过计算机视觉技术分析俯视视频，结合运动轨迹追踪与机器学习模型识别划水动作并计算频率。
AI.result: 系统可自动提取任意比赛视频中的划水频率，为后续游泳性能分析提供基础数据支持。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了自动化分析游泳指标的可行性，未来可扩展至其他游泳参数的提取与优化。

authors_text: Qianyun Wang,Zhenfeng Fan,Shihong Xia
title: 3D-TalkEmo: Learning to Synthesize 3D Emotional Talking Head
title_zh: 3D-TalkEmo：学习合成3D情感说话头
abstract: Impressive progress has been made in audio-driven 3D facial animation recently, but synthesizing 3D talking-head with rich emotion is still unsolved. This is due to the lack of 3D generative models and available 3D emotional dataset with synchronized audios. To address this, we introduce 3D-TalkEmo, a deep neural network that generates 3D talking head animation with various emotions. We also create a large 3D dataset with synchronized audios and videos, rich corpus, as well as various emotion states of different persons with the sophisticated 3D face reconstruction methods. In the emotion generation network, we propose a novel 3D face representation structure - geometry map by classical multi-dimensional scaling analysis. It maps the coordinates of vertices on a 3D face to a canonical image plane, while preserving the vertex-to-vertex geodesic distance metric in a least-square sense. This maintains the adjacency relationship of each vertex and holds the effective convolutional structure for the 3D facial surface. Taking a neutral 3D mesh and a speech signal as inputs, the 3D-TalkEmo is able to generate vivid facial animations. Moreover, it provides access to change the emotion state of the animated speaker. We present extensive quantitative and qualitative evaluation of our method, in addition to user studies, demonstrating the generated talking-heads of significantly higher quality compared to previous state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Impressive progress has been made in audio-driven 3D facial animation recently, but synthesizing 3D talking-head with rich emotion is still unsolved. This is due to the lack of 3D generative models and available 3D emotional dataset with synchronized audios. To address this, we introduce 3D-TalkEmo, a deep neural network that generates 3D talking head animation with various emotions. We also create a large 3D dataset with synchronized audios and videos, rich corpus, as well as various emotion states of different persons with the sophisticated 3D face reconstruction methods. In the emotion generation network, we propose a novel 3D face representation structure - geometry map by classical multi-dimensional scaling analysis. It maps the coordinates of vertices on a 3D face to a canonical image plane, while preserving the vertex-to-vertex geodesic distance metric in a least-square sense. This maintains the adjacency relationship of each vertex and holds the effective convolutional structure for the 3D facial surface. Taking a neutral 3D mesh and a speech signal as inputs, the 3D-TalkEmo is able to generate vivid facial animations. Moreover, it provides access to change the emotion state of the animated speaker. We present extensive quantitative and qualitative evaluation of our method, in addition to user studies, demonstrating the generated talking-heads of significantly higher quality compared to previous state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 最近，音频驱动的 3D 面部动画取得了令人瞩目的进展，但合成具有丰富情感的 3D 头部说话仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。这是由于缺乏 3D 生成模型和可用的具有同步音频的 3D 情感数据集。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 3D-TalkEmo，这是一种深度神经网络，可以生成具有各种情感的 3D 头部说话动画。我们还通过复杂的 3D 人脸重建方法创建了一个大型 3D 数据集，其中包含同步的音频和视频、丰富的语料库以及不同人的各种情绪状态。在情感生成网络中，我们通过经典的多维尺度分析提出了一种新颖的3D人脸表示结构——几何图。它将 3D 面上的顶点坐标映射到规范图像平面，同时保留最小二乘意义上的顶点到顶点测地距离度量。这保持了每个顶点的邻接关系并保持了 3D 面部表面的有效卷积结构。以中性 3D 网格和语音信号作为输入，3D-TalkEmo 能够生成生动的面部动画。此外，它还提供了改变动画演讲者情绪状态的途径。除了用户研究之外，我们还对我们的方法进行了广泛的定量和定性评估，证明了与以前最先进的方法相比，生成的谈话人物的质量明显更高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出3D-TalkEmo模型，通过音频驱动生成具有丰富情感的3D说话人面部动画，并构建了同步音视频的3D情感数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有音频驱动的3D面部动画缺乏对复杂情感的表达能力，主要受限于3D生成模型不足及同步情感数据集缺失。
AI.method: 设计基于几何映射的3D面部表示结构（通过经典MDS分析），结合中性3D网格与语音信号输入，构建情感生成网络并创建包含多情感状态的3D数据集。
AI.result: 在定量评估和用户研究中，生成的说话人动画质量显著优于现有方法，情感表达更自然生动。
AI.conclusion: 3D-TalkEmo通过创新的几何映射结构和大规模数据集，有效解决了3D情感说话人生成难题，推动了相关领域的发展。

authors_text: Wentao Chen,Hailong Qiu,Jian Zhuang,Chutong Zhang,Yu Hu,Qing Lu,Tianchen Wang,Yiyu Shi,Meiping Huang,Xiaowe Xu
title: Quantization of Deep Neural Networks for Accurate Edge Computing
title_zh: 用于精确边缘计算的深度神经网络量化
comment: 11 pages, 3 figures, 10 tables, accepted by the ACM Journal on Emerging Technologies in Computing Systems (JETC)
comments: 11 pages, 3 figures, 10 tables, accepted by the ACM Journal on Emerging Technologies in Computing Systems (JETC)
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have demonstrated their great potential in recent years, exceeding the per-formance of human experts in a wide range of applications. Due to their large sizes, however, compressiontechniques such as weight quantization and pruning are usually applied before they can be accommodated onthe edge. It is generally believed that quantization leads to performance degradation, and plenty of existingworks have explored quantization strategies aiming at minimum accuracy loss. In this paper, we argue thatquantization, which essentially imposes regularization on weight representations, can sometimes help toimprove accuracy. We conduct comprehensive experiments on three widely used applications: fully con-nected network (FCN) for biomedical image segmentation, convolutional neural network (CNN) for imageclassification on ImageNet, and recurrent neural network (RNN) for automatic speech recognition, and experi-mental results show that quantization can improve the accuracy by 1%, 1.95%, 4.23% on the three applicationsrespectively with 3.5x-6.4x memory reduction.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have demonstrated their great potential in recent years, exceeding the per-formance of human experts in a wide range of applications. Due to their large sizes, however, compressiontechniques such as weight quantization and pruning are usually applied before they can be accommodated onthe edge. It is generally believed that quantization leads to performance degradation, and plenty of existingworks have explored quantization strategies aiming at minimum accuracy loss. In this paper, we argue thatquantization, which essentially imposes regularization on weight representations, can sometimes help toimprove accuracy. We conduct comprehensive experiments on three widely used applications: fully con-nected network (FCN) for biomedical image segmentation, convolutional neural network (CNN) for imageclassification on ImageNet, and recurrent neural network (RNN) for automatic speech recognition, and experi-mental results show that quantization can improve the accuracy by 1%, 1.95%, 4.23% on the three applicationsrespectively with 3.5x-6.4x memory reduction.
abstract_zh: 近年来，深度神经网络（DNN）展示了其巨大潜力，在广泛的应用中超过了人类专家的表现。然而，由于它们的尺寸较大，因此通常会在将它们容纳在边缘之前应用权重量化和修剪等压缩技术。人们普遍认为量化会导致性能下降，并且大量现有工作已经探索了旨在最小化精度损失的量化策略。在本文中，我们认为量化本质上是对权重表示进行正则化，有时有助于提高准确性。我们对三个广泛使用的应用进行了综合实验：用于生物医学图像分割的全连接网络（FCN）、用于ImageNet上图像分类的卷积神经网络（CNN）和用于自动语音识别的循环神经网络（RNN），实验结果表明，量化可以在三个应用上分别提高准确率1%、1.95%、4.23%，同时内存减少3.5x-6.4x。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了深度神经网络的量化方法，以实现更高效的边缘计算。
AI.motivation: 由于深度神经网络（DNN）的体积较大，通常需要压缩技术（如权重量化）以便在边缘设备上运行。然而，量化通常被认为会导致性能下降，本文旨在探讨量化是否在某些情况下能够提高模型的准确性。
AI.method: 本文通过在三种广泛应用的场景中进行实验，包括全连接网络（FCN）用于生物医学图像分割、卷积神经网络（CNN）用于ImageNet图像分类以及循环神经网络（RNN）用于自动语音识别，研究量化对模型性能的影响。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，在三种应用中，量化分别提升了1%、1.95%和4.23%的准确率，同时实现了3.5倍到6.4倍的内存减少。
AI.conclusion: 量化不仅能够减少模型的内存占用，有时还能提升模型的准确性，这表明量化本质上对权重表示施加了正则化，有助于模型性能的提升。

authors_text: Xiaowe Xu,Jiawei Zhang,Jinglan Liu,Yukun Ding,Tianchen Wang,Hailong Qiu,Haiyun Yuan,Jian Zhuang,Wen Xie,Yuhao Dong,Qianjun Jia,Meiping Huang,Yiyu Shi
title: Multi-Cycle-Consistent Adversarial Networks for Edge Denoising of Computed Tomography Images
title_zh: 用于计算机断层扫描图像边缘去噪的多周期一致对抗网络
comment: 16 pages, 7 figures, 4 tables, accepted by the ACM Journal on Emerging Technologies in Computing Systems (JETC). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2002.12130
comments: 16 pages, 7 figures, 4 tables, accepted by the ACM Journal on Emerging Technologies in Computing Systems (JETC). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2002.12130
abstract: As one of the most commonly ordered imaging tests, computed tomography (CT) scan comes with inevitable radiation exposure that increases the cancer risk to patients. However, CT image quality is directly related to radiation dose, thus it is desirable to obtain high-quality CT images with as little dose as possible. CT image denoising tries to obtain high dose like high-quality CT images (domain X) from low dose low-quality CTimages (domain Y), which can be treated as an image-to-image translation task where the goal is to learn the transform between a source domain X (noisy images) and a target domain Y (clean images). In this paper, we propose a multi-cycle-consistent adversarial network (MCCAN) that builds intermediate domains and enforces both local and global cycle-consistency for edge denoising of CT images. The global cycle-consistency couples all generators together to model the whole denoising process, while the local cycle-consistency imposes effective supervision on the process between adjacent domains. Experiments show that both local and global cycle-consistency are important for the success of MCCAN, which outperformsCCADN in terms of denoising quality with slightly less computation resource consumption.
summary: As one of the most commonly ordered imaging tests, computed tomography (CT) scan comes with inevitable radiation exposure that increases the cancer risk to patients. However, CT image quality is directly related to radiation dose, thus it is desirable to obtain high-quality CT images with as little dose as possible. CT image denoising tries to obtain high dose like high-quality CT images (domain X) from low dose low-quality CTimages (domain Y), which can be treated as an image-to-image translation task where the goal is to learn the transform between a source domain X (noisy images) and a target domain Y (clean images). In this paper, we propose a multi-cycle-consistent adversarial network (MCCAN) that builds intermediate domains and enforces both local and global cycle-consistency for edge denoising of CT images. The global cycle-consistency couples all generators together to model the whole denoising process, while the local cycle-consistency imposes effective supervision on the process between adjacent domains. Experiments show that both local and global cycle-consistency are important for the success of MCCAN, which outperformsCCADN in terms of denoising quality with slightly less computation resource consumption.
abstract_zh: 作为最常见的影像学检查之一，计算机断层扫描 (CT) 不可避免地会受到辐射照射，从而增加患者患癌症的风险。然而，CT图像质量与辐射剂量直接相关，因此希望以尽可能小的剂量获得高质量的CT图像。 CT图像去噪试图从低剂量低质量CT图像（域Y）中获得高剂量高质量CT图像（域X），这可以被视为图像到图像转换任务，其目标是学习源域X（噪声图像）和目标域Y（干净图像）之间的变换。在本文中，我们提出了一种多周期一致对抗网络（MCCAN），它构建中间域并强制 CT 图像边缘去噪的局部和全局周期一致性。全局循环一致性将所有生成器耦合在一起以对整个去噪过程进行建模，而局部循环一致性对相邻域之间的过程进行有效监督。实验表明，局部和全局循环一致性对于 MCCAN 的成功非常重要，MCCAN 在去噪质量方面优于 CCADN，且计算资源消耗略少。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多循环一致对抗网络（MCCAN），用于CT图像的边缘去噪。
AI.motivation: CT扫描虽然常用，但会带来辐射风险，因此需要在尽可能低剂量下获得高质量的CT图像。图像去噪可以被视为从低质量图像到高质量图像的图像到图像转换任务。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种多循环一致对抗网络（MCCAN），通过构建中间域并强制执行局部和全局循环一致性来实现CT图像的边缘去噪。
AI.result: 实验表明，MCCAN在去噪质量上优于CCADN，并且计算资源消耗略少。
AI.conclusion: 局部和全局循环一致性对于MCCAN的成功至关重要，MCCAN在CT图像去噪任务中表现出色。

However, CT image quality is directly related to radiation dose, thus it is desirable to obtain high-quality CT images with as little dose as possible. authors_text: John R. Rebula,Stefan Schaal,James Finley,Ludovic Righetti
title: A Robustness Analysis of Inverse Optimal Control of Bipedal Walking
title_zh: 双足步行逆优化控制的鲁棒性分析
abstract: Cost functions have the potential to provide compact and understandable generalizations of motion. The goal of Inverse Optimal Control (IOC) is to analyze an observed behavior which is assumed to be optimal with respect to an unknown cost function, and infer this cost function. Here we develop a method for characterizing cost functions of legged locomotion, with the goal of representing complex humanoid behavior with simple models. To test this methodology we simulate walking gaits of a simple 5 link planar walking model which optimize known cost functions, and assess the ability of our IOC method to recover them. In particular, the IOC method uses an iterative trajectory optimization process to infer cost function weightings consistent with those used to generate a single demonstrated optimal trial. We also explore sensitivity of the IOC to sensor noise in the observed trajectory, imperfect knowledge of the model or task, as well as uncertainty in the components of the cost function used. With appropriate modeling, these methods may help infer cost functions from human data, yielding a compact and generalizable representation of human-like motion for use in humanoid robot controllers, as well as providing a new tool for experimentally exploring human preferences.
summary: Cost functions have the potential to provide compact and understandable generalizations of motion. The goal of Inverse Optimal Control (IOC) is to analyze an observed behavior which is assumed to be optimal with respect to an unknown cost function, and infer this cost function. Here we develop a method for characterizing cost functions of legged locomotion, with the goal of representing complex humanoid behavior with simple models. To test this methodology we simulate walking gaits of a simple 5 link planar walking model which optimize known cost functions, and assess the ability of our IOC method to recover them. In particular, the IOC method uses an iterative trajectory optimization process to infer cost function weightings consistent with those used to generate a single demonstrated optimal trial. We also explore sensitivity of the IOC to sensor noise in the observed trajectory, imperfect knowledge of the model or task, as well as uncertainty in the components of the cost function used. With appropriate modeling, these methods may help infer cost functions from human data, yielding a compact and generalizable representation of human-like motion for use in humanoid robot controllers, as well as providing a new tool for experimentally exploring human preferences.
abstract_zh: 成本函数有可能提供紧凑且易于理解的运动概括。逆向最优控制 (IOC) 的目标是分析观察到的行为（假定相对于未知成本函数而言是最优的），并推断该成本函数。在这里，我们开发了一种描述腿部运动成本函数的方法，其目标是用简单的模型表示复杂的人形行为。为了测试这种方法，我们模拟了一个简单的 5 链接平面步行模型的步行步态，该模型优化了已知的成本函数，并评估了我们的 IOC 方法恢复它们的能力。特别是，IOC 方法使用迭代轨迹优化过程来推断与用于生成单个已证明最佳试验的成本函数权重一致的成本函数权重。我们还探讨了 IOC 对观测轨迹中传感器噪声的敏感性、模型或任务的不完善知识以及所用成本函数组成部分的不确定性。通过适当的建模，这些方法可能有助于从人类数据推断成本函数，产生用于人形机器人控制器的紧凑且可概括的类人运动表示，并为通过实验探索人类偏好提供新工具。

AI.tldr: 本文分析逆最优控制在双足行走中的鲁棒性，通过模拟和测试推断成本函数的方法。
AI.motivation: 通过简单模型表示复杂人类运动，为机器人控制提供通用表示并探索人类偏好。
AI.method: 使用迭代轨迹优化推断成本函数权重，并测试其对噪声、模型误差和成本函数不确定性的敏感性。
AI.result: IOC方法能有效恢复已知成本函数，且在多种不确定性下表现出鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可从人类数据中推断成本函数，助力人形机器人控制及人类偏好研究。

search_text: A Robustness Analysis of Inverse Optimal Control of Bipedal Walking 双足步行逆优化控制的鲁棒性分析 Cost functions have the potential to provide compact and understandable generalizations of motion. The goal of Inverse Optimal Control (IOC) is to analyze an observed behavior which is assumed to be optimal with respect to an unknown cost function, and infer this cost function. Here we develop a method for characterizing cost functions of legged locomotion, with the goal of representing complex humanoid behavior with simple models. To test this methodology we simulate walking gaits of a simple 5 link planar walking model which optimize known cost functions, and assess the ability of our IOC method to recover them. In particular, the IOC method uses an iterative trajectory optimization process to infer cost function weightings consistent with those used to generate a single demonstrated optimal trial. We also explore sensitivity of the IOC to sensor noise in the observed trajectory, imperfect knowledge of the model or task, as well as uncertainty in the components of the cost function used. With appropriate modeling, these methods may help infer cost functions from human data, yielding a compact and generalizable representation of human-like motion for use in humanoid robot controllers, as well as providing a new tool for experimentally exploring human preferences. 成本函数有可能提供紧凑且易于理解的运动概括。逆向最优控制 (IOC) 的目标是分析观察到的行为（假定相对于未知成本函数而言是最优的），并推断该成本函数。在这里，我们开发了一种描述腿部运动成本函数的方法，其目标是用简单的模型表示复杂的人形行为。为了测试这种方法，我们模拟了一个简单的 5 链接平面步行模型的步行步态，该模型优化了已知的成本函数，并评估了我们的 IOC 方法恢复它们的能力。特别是，IOC 方法使用迭代轨迹优化过程来推断与用于生成单个已证明最佳试验的成本函数权重一致的成本函数权重。我们还探讨了 IOC 对观测轨迹中传感器噪声的敏感性、模型或任务的不完善知识以及所用成本函数组成部分的不确定性。通过适当的建模，这些方法可能有助于从人类数据推断成本函数，产生用于人形机器人控制器的紧凑且可概括的类人运动表示，并为通过实验探索人类偏好提供新工具。 本文分析逆最优控制在双足行走中的鲁棒性，通过模拟和测试推断成本函数的方法。 John R. Rebula,Stefan Schaal,James Finley,Ludovic Righetti cs.RO

authors_text: Zikai Zhang,Bineng Zhong,Shengping Zhang,Zhenjun Tang,Xin Liu,Zhaoxiang Zhang
title: Distractor-Aware Fast Tracking via Dynamic Convolutions and MOT Philosophy
title_zh: 通过动态卷积和 MOT 原理实现干扰感知快速跟踪
abstract: A practical long-term tracker typically contains three key properties, i.e. an efficient model design, an effective global re-detection strategy and a robust distractor awareness mechanism. However, most state-of-the-art long-term trackers (e.g., Pseudo and re-detecting based ones) do not take all three key properties into account and therefore may either be time-consuming or drift to distractors. To address the issues, we propose a two-task tracking frame work (named DMTrack), which utilizes two core components (i.e., one-shot detection and re-identification (re-id) association) to achieve distractor-aware fast tracking via Dynamic convolutions (d-convs) and Multiple object tracking (MOT) philosophy. To achieve precise and fast global detection, we construct a lightweight one-shot detector using a novel dynamic convolutions generation method, which provides a unified and more flexible way for fusing target information into the search field. To distinguish the target from distractors, we resort to the philosophy of MOT to reason distractors explicitly by maintaining all potential similarities' tracklets. Benefited from the strength of high recall detection and explicit object association, our tracker achieves state-of-the-art performance on the LaSOT, OxUvA, TLP, VOT2018LT and VOT2019LT benchmarks and runs in real-time (3x faster than comparisons).
summary: A practical long-term tracker typically contains three key properties, i.e. an efficient model design, an effective global re-detection strategy and a robust distractor awareness mechanism. However, most state-of-the-art long-term trackers (e.g., Pseudo and re-detecting based ones) do not take all three key properties into account and therefore may either be time-consuming or drift to distractors. To address the issues, we propose a two-task tracking frame work (named DMTrack), which utilizes two core components (i.e., one-shot detection and re-identification (re-id) association) to achieve distractor-aware fast tracking via Dynamic convolutions (d-convs) and Multiple object tracking (MOT) philosophy. To achieve precise and fast global detection, we construct a lightweight one-shot detector using a novel dynamic convolutions generation method, which provides a unified and more flexible way for fusing target information into the search field. To distinguish the target from distractors, we resort to the philosophy of MOT to reason distractors explicitly by maintaining all potential similarities' tracklets. Benefited from the strength of high recall detection and explicit object association, our tracker achieves state-of-the-art performance on the LaSOT, OxUvA, TLP, VOT2018LT and VOT2019LT benchmarks and runs in real-time (3x faster than comparisons).
abstract_zh: 实用的长期跟踪器通常包含三个关键属性，即高效的模型设计、有效的全局重新检测策略和强大的干扰感知机制。然而，大多数最先进的长期跟踪器（例如，基于伪和重新检测的跟踪器）没有考虑所有三个关键属性，因此可能非常耗时或漂移到干扰因素。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种双任务跟踪框架（名为 DMTrack），它利用两个核心组件（即单次检测和重新识别（re-id）关联）通过动态卷积（d-convs）和多目标跟踪（MOT）原理实现干扰感知快速跟踪。为了实现精确快速的全局检测，我们使用一种新颖的动态卷积生成方法构建了一种轻量级的一次性检测器，该方法为将目标信息融合到搜索领域提供了一种统一且更灵活的方式。为了区分目标和干扰项，我们采用 MOT 的哲学，通过维护所有潜在相似性的轨迹来明确推理干扰项。受益于高召回率检测和显式对象关联的优势，我们的跟踪器在 LaSOT、OxUvA、TLP、VOT2018LT 和 VOT2019LT 基准测试上实现了最先进的性能，并且实时运行（比比较快 3 倍）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DMTrack框架，结合动态卷积和MOT哲学，实现干扰物感知的快速目标跟踪。
AI.motivation: 现有长期跟踪器常因缺乏高效模型设计、全局重检测策略及干扰物感知机制，导致跟踪耗时或易受干扰。
AI.method: 构建轻量级单次检测器（动态卷积生成方法）与重识别关联模块，利用MOT哲学维护潜在轨迹以区分目标与干扰物。
AI.result: 在LaSOT、OxUvA等基准测试中达到SOTA性能，实时运行速度为对比方法的3倍。
AI.conclusion: 通过高召回检测与显式对象关联，DMTrack在多个数据集上验证了其有效性与实时性优势。

authors_text: Pegah Nokhiz,Aravinda Kanchana Ruwanpathirana,Neal Patwari,Suresh Venkatasubramanian
title: Precarity: Modeling the Long Term Effects of Compounded Decisions on Individual Instability
title_zh: 不稳定：模拟复合决策对个人不稳定的长期影响
abstract: When it comes to studying the impacts of decision making, the research has been largely focused on examining the fairness of the decisions, the long-term effects of the decision pipelines, and utility-based perspectives considering both the decision-maker and the individuals. However, there has hardly been any focus on precarity which is the term that encapsulates the instability in people's lives. That is, a negative outcome can overspread to other decisions and measures of well-being. Studying precarity necessitates a shift in focus - from the point of view of the decision-maker to the perspective of the decision subject. This centering of the subject is an important direction that unlocks the importance of parting with aggregate measures to examine the long-term effects of decision making. To address this issue, in this paper, we propose a modeling framework that simulates the effects of compounded decision-making on precarity over time. Through our simulations, we are able to show the heterogeneity of precarity by the non-uniform ruinous aftereffects of negative decisions on different income classes of the underlying population and how policy interventions can help mitigate such effects.
summary: When it comes to studying the impacts of decision making, the research has been largely focused on examining the fairness of the decisions, the long-term effects of the decision pipelines, and utility-based perspectives considering both the decision-maker and the individuals. However, there has hardly been any focus on precarity which is the term that encapsulates the instability in people's lives. That is, a negative outcome can overspread to other decisions and measures of well-being. Studying precarity necessitates a shift in focus - from the point of view of the decision-maker to the perspective of the decision subject. This centering of the subject is an important direction that unlocks the importance of parting with aggregate measures to examine the long-term effects of decision making. To address this issue, in this paper, we propose a modeling framework that simulates the effects of compounded decision-making on precarity over time. Through our simulations, we are able to show the heterogeneity of precarity by the non-uniform ruinous aftereffects of negative decisions on different income classes of the underlying population and how policy interventions can help mitigate such effects.
abstract_zh: 在研究决策的影响时，研究主要集中在考察决策的公平性、决策渠道的长期影响以及考虑决策者和个人的基于效用的观点。然而，人们几乎没有关注“不稳定”这个词，这个词概括了人们生活中的不稳定因素。也就是说，负面结果可能会蔓延到其他福祉决策和衡量标准。研究不稳定因素需要转移焦点——从决策者的角度转向决策主体的角度。这种主题的集中是一个重要的方向，它揭示了放弃总体措施来检查决策的长期影响的重要性。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们提出了一个建模框架，该框架可以模拟复合决策随着时间的推移对不稳定的影响。通过我们的模拟，我们能够展示负面决策对底层人口不同收入阶层的非均匀破坏性后果所造成的不稳定的异质性，以及政策干预如何帮助减轻这种影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种建模框架，研究复合决策对个人脆弱性（生活不稳定）的长期影响。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注决策公平性与效用，忽视了负面决策扩散导致的个体生活不稳定（脆弱性）问题，需从决策主体视角出发分析异质性影响。
AI.method: 构建模拟框架，量化复合决策对不同收入阶层的长期脆弱性影响，并评估政策干预效果。
AI.result: 模拟显示负面决策对低收入群体的破坏性更显著，且政策干预可有效缓解脆弱性扩散。
AI.conclusion: 应重视从个体视角研究决策的长期脆弱性影响，模型为政策制定提供了量化分析工具。
