This centering of the subject is an important direction that unlocks the importance of parting with aggregate measures to examine the long-term effects of decision making. To address this issue, in this paper, we propose a modeling framework that simulates the effects of compounded decision-making on precarity over time. Through our simulations, we are able to show the heterogeneity of precarity by the non-uniform ruinous aftereffects of negative decisions on different income classes of the underlying population and how policy interventions can help mitigate such effects. 在研究决策的影响时，研究主要集中在考察决策的公平性、决策渠道的长期影响以及考虑决策者和个人的基于效用的观点。然而，人们几乎没有关注“不稳定”这个词，这个词概括了人们生活中的不稳定因素。也就是说，负面结果可能会蔓延到其他福祉决策和衡量标准。研究不稳定因素需要转移焦点——从决策者的角度转向决策主体的角度。这种主题的集中是一个重要的方向，它揭示了放弃总体措施来检查决策的长期影响的重要性。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们提出了一个建模框架，该框架可以模拟复合决策随着时间的推移对不稳定的影响。通过我们的模拟，我们能够展示负面决策对底层人口不同收入阶层的非均匀破坏性后果所造成的不稳定的异质性，以及政策干预如何帮助减轻这种影响。 本文提出一种建模框架，研究复合决策对个人脆弱性（生活不稳定）的长期影响。 Pegah Nokhiz,Aravinda Kanchana Ruwanpathirana,Neal Patwari,Suresh Venkatasubramanian cs.AI,cs.CY

authors_text: Eduard F. Durech
title: Deep Convolutional Neural Network for Non-rigid Image Registration
title_zh: 用于非刚性图像配准的深度卷积神经网络
abstract: Images taken at different times or positions undergo transformations such as rotation, scaling, skewing, and more. The process of aligning different images which have undergone transformations can be done via registration. Registration is desirable when analyzing time-series data for tracking, averaging, or differential diagnoses of diseases. Efficient registration methods exist for rigid (including linear or affine) transformations; however, for non-rigid (also known as non-affine) transformations, current methods are computationally expensive and time-consuming. In this report, I will explore the ability of a deep neural network (DNN) and, more specifically, a deep convolutional neural network (CNN) to efficiently perform non-rigid image registration. The experimental results show that a CNN can be used for efficient non-rigid image registration and in significantly less computational time than a conventional Diffeomorphic Demons or Pyramiding approach.
summary: Images taken at different times or positions undergo transformations such as rotation, scaling, skewing, and more. The process of aligning different images which have undergone transformations can be done via registration. Registration is desirable when analyzing time-series data for tracking, averaging, or differential diagnoses of diseases. Efficient registration methods exist for rigid (including linear or affine) transformations; however, for non-rigid (also known as non-affine) transformations, current methods are computationally expensive and time-consuming. In this report, I will explore the ability of a deep neural network (DNN) and, more specifically, a deep convolutional neural network (CNN) to efficiently perform non-rigid image registration. The experimental results show that a CNN can be used for efficient non-rigid image registration and in significantly less computational time than a conventional Diffeomorphic Demons or Pyramiding approach.
abstract_zh: 在不同时间或位置拍摄的图像会经历旋转、缩放、倾斜等变换。对齐经过变换的不同图像的过程可以通过配准来完成。在分析时间序列数据以跟踪、平均或鉴别诊断疾病时，需要进行配准。对于刚性（包括线性或仿射）变换，存在有效的配准方法；然而，对于非刚性（也称为非仿射）变换，当前的方法在计算上是昂贵且耗时的。在本报告中，我将探讨深度神经网络 (DNN)，更具体地说，深度卷积神经网络 (CNN) 有效执行非刚性图像配准的能力。实验结果表明，CNN 可用于高效的非刚性图像配准，并且比传统的微分同胚或金字塔方法所需的计算时间显着减少。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨使用深度卷积神经网络（CNN）实现非刚性图像配准，以解决传统方法计算效率低的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有非刚性图像配准方法计算复杂度高且耗时，难以满足实际应用需求，需寻找更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用深度卷积神经网络（CNN）模型，通过训练网络参数实现非刚性图像的快速配准。
AI.result: 实验表明，CNN方法在非刚性图像配准任务中显著优于传统Diffeomorphic Demons或Pyramiding方法，计算时间大幅缩短。
AI.conclusion: 深度卷积神经网络可有效用于非刚性图像配准，提供了一种高效且可行的替代方案。

authors_text: Jason I. Hong,Yuvraj Agarwal,Matt Fredrikson,Mike Czapik,Shawn Hanna,Swarup Sahoo,Judy Chun,Won-Woo Chung,Aniruddh Iyer,Ally Liu,Shen Lu,Rituparna Roychoudhury,Qian Wang,Shan Wang,Siqi Wang,Vida Zhang,Jessica Zhao,Yuan Jiang,Haojian Jin,Sam Kim,Evelyn Kuo,Tianshi Li,Jinping Liu,Yile Liu,Robert Zhang
title: The Design of the User Interfaces for Privacy Enhancements for Android
title_zh: Android 隐私增强用户界面的设计
abstract: We present the design and design rationale for the user interfaces for Privacy Enhancements for Android (PE for Android). These UIs are built around two core ideas, namely that developers should explicitly declare the purpose of why sensitive data is being used, and these permission-purpose pairs should be split by first party and third party uses. We also present a taxonomy of purposes and ways of how these ideas can be deployed in the existing Android ecosystem.
summary: We present the design and design rationale for the user interfaces for Privacy Enhancements for Android (PE for Android). These UIs are built around two core ideas, namely that developers should explicitly declare the purpose of why sensitive data is being used, and these permission-purpose pairs should be split by first party and third party uses. We also present a taxonomy of purposes and ways of how these ideas can be deployed in the existing Android ecosystem.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍了 Android 隐私增强功能 (PE for Android) 用户界面的设计和设计原理。这些 UI 围绕两个核心思想构建，即开发人员应明确声明使用敏感数据的目的，并且这些权限目的对应按第一方和第三方用途进行划分。我们还提出了如何在现有 Android 生态系统中部署这些想法的目的和方式的分类。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了用于Android隐私增强的用户界面设计及其设计依据。
AI.motivation: 当前Android系统中权限管理缺乏透明度，用户难以理解敏感数据的使用目的，因此需要改进用户界面以提高隐私保护。
AI.method: 本文提出了两个核心理念：开发者需明确声明使用敏感数据的目的，并将权限与用途按第一方和第三方进行区分。同时，还提出了用途分类及在现有Android生态系统中部署这些理念的方法。
AI.result: 设计了一套新的用户界面，并提出了用途分类及部署方式，以增强Android系统的隐私保护。
AI.conclusion: 通过改进用户界面和权限管理，可以提高Android用户对隐私保护的透明度和控制能力。

authors_text: Peng Jiang,Philip Osteen,Srikanth Saripalli
title: Calibrating LiDAR and Camera using Semantic Mutual information
title_zh: 使用语义互信息校准激光雷达和相机
comment: 5 pages, 6 figures, submitted to ICRA 2021 workshop
comments: 5 pages, 6 figures, submitted to ICRA 2021 workshop
abstract: We propose an algorithm for automatic, targetless, extrinsic calibration of a LiDAR and camera system using semantic information. We achieve this goal by maximizing mutual information (MI) of semantic information between sensors, leveraging a neural network to estimate semantic mutual information, and matrix exponential for calibration computation. Using kernel-based sampling to sample data from camera measurement based on LiDAR projected points, we formulate the problem as a novel differentiable objective function which supports the use of gradient-based optimization methods. We also introduce an initial calibration method using 2D MI-based image registration. Finally, we demonstrate the robustness of our method and quantitatively analyze the accuracy on a synthetic dataset and also evaluate our algorithm qualitatively on KITTI360 and RELLIS-3D benchmark datasets, showing improvement over recent comparable approaches.
summary: We propose an algorithm for automatic, targetless, extrinsic calibration of a LiDAR and camera system using semantic information. We achieve this goal by maximizing mutual information (MI) of semantic information between sensors, leveraging a neural network to estimate semantic mutual information, and matrix exponential for calibration computation. Using kernel-based sampling to sample data from camera measurement based on LiDAR projected points, we formulate the problem as a novel differentiable objective function which supports the use of gradient-based optimization methods. We also introduce an initial calibration method using 2D MI-based image registration. Finally, we demonstrate the robustness of our method and quantitatively analyze the accuracy on a synthetic dataset and also evaluate our algorithm qualitatively on KITTI360 and RELLIS-3D benchmark datasets, showing improvement over recent comparable approaches.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种使用语义信息对激光雷达和相机系统进行自动、无目标、外部校准的算法。我们通过最大化传感器之间语义信息的互信息（MI）、利用神经网络来估计语义互信息以及用于校准计算的矩阵指数来实现这一目标。使用基于核的采样对基于 LiDAR 投影点的相机测量数据进行采样，我们将问题表述为一种新颖的可微目标函数，支持使用基于梯度的优化方法。我们还介绍了一种使用基于 2D MI 的图像配准的初始校准方法。最后，我们展示了我们方法的稳健性，定量分析了合成数据集的准确性，并在 KITTI360 和 RELLIS-3D 基准数据集上定性评估了我们的算法，显示出相对于最近的同类方法的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需目标的激光雷达与相机外参标定方法，通过最大化传感器间的语义互信息实现自动标定。
AI.motivation: 传统标定方法依赖人工设置目标或复杂场景，存在操作繁琐且适应性差的问题，亟需一种自动化程度高的标定方案。
AI.method: 基于神经网络估计语义互信息，结合矩阵指数计算标定参数，通过核采样生成差异化的训练数据，并构建可微分目标函数支持梯度优化。
AI.result: 在合成数据集和KITTI360/RELLIS-3D基准测试中验证了方法鲁棒性，定量指标优于现有主流标定算法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过语义信息有效解决了复杂场景下的标定难题，为多模态传感器融合提供了新思路。

Using kernel-based sampling to sample data from camera measurement based on LiDAR projected points, we formulate the problem as a novel differentiable objective function which supports the use of gradient-based optimization methods. Finally, we demonstrate the robustness of our method and quantitatively analyze the accuracy on a synthetic dataset and also evaluate our algorithm qualitatively on KITTI360 and RELLIS-3D benchmark datasets, showing improvement over recent comparable approaches. 我们提出了一种使用语义信息对激光雷达和相机系统进行自动、无目标、外部校准的算法。我们通过最大化传感器之间语义信息的互信息（MI）、利用神经网络来估计语义互信息以及用于校准计算的矩阵指数来实现这一目标。使用基于核的采样对基于 LiDAR 投影点的相机测量数据进行采样，我们将问题表述为一种新颖的可微目标函数，支持使用基于梯度的优化方法。我们还介绍了一种使用基于 2D MI 的图像配准的初始校准方法。最后，我们展示了我们方法的稳健性，定量分析了合成数据集的准确性，并在 KITTI360 和 RELLIS-3D 基准数据集上定性评估了我们的算法，显示出相对于最近的同类方法的改进。 本文提出一种无需目标的激光雷达与相机外参标定方法，通过最大化传感器间的语义互信息实现自动标定。 Peng Jiang,Philip Osteen,Srikanth Saripalli cs.CV

authors_text: Debaditya Chakraborty,Cristina Ivan,Paola Amero,Maliha Khan,Cristian Rodriguez-Aguayo,Hakan Başağaoğlu,Gabriel Lopez-Berestein
title: Explainable Artificial Intelligence Reveals Novel Insight into Tumor Microenvironment Conditions Linked with Better Prognosis in Patients with Breast Cancer
title_zh: 可解释的人工智能揭示了对肿瘤微环境条件的新见解，这与乳腺癌患者更好的预后相关
abstract: We investigated the data-driven relationship between features in the tumor microenvironment (TME) and the overall and 5-year survival in triple-negative breast cancer (TNBC) and non-TNBC (NTNBC) patients by using Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) models. We used clinical information from patients with invasive breast carcinoma from The Cancer Genome Atlas and from two studies from the cbioPortal, the PanCanAtlas project and the GDAC Firehose study. In this study, we used a normalized RNA sequencing data-driven cohort from 1,015 breast cancer patients, alive or deceased, from the UCSC Xena data set and performed integrated deconvolution with the EPIC method to estimate the percentage of seven different immune and stromal cells from RNA sequencing data. Novel insights derived from our XAI model showed that CD4+ T cells and B cells are more critical than other TME features for enhanced prognosis for both TNBC and NTNBC patients. Our XAI model revealed the critical inflection points (i.e., threshold fractions) of CD4+ T cells and B cells above or below which 5-year survival rates improve. Subsequently, we ascertained the conditional probabilities of $\geq$ 5-year survival in both TNBC and NTNBC patients under specific conditions inferred from the inflection points. In particular, the XAI models revealed that a B-cell fraction exceeding 0.018 in the TME could ensure 100% 5-year survival for NTNBC patients. The findings from this research could lead to more accurate clinical predictions and enhanced immunotherapies and to the design of innovative strategies to reprogram the TME of breast cancer patients.
summary: We investigated the data-driven relationship between features in the tumor microenvironment (TME) and the overall and 5-year survival in triple-negative breast cancer (TNBC) and non-TNBC (NTNBC) patients by using Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) models. We used clinical information from patients with invasive breast carcinoma from The Cancer Genome Atlas and from two studies from the cbioPortal, the PanCanAtlas project and the GDAC Firehose study. In this study, we used a normalized RNA sequencing data-driven cohort from 1,015 breast cancer patients, alive or deceased, from the UCSC Xena data set and performed integrated deconvolution with the EPIC method to estimate the percentage of seven different immune and stromal cells from RNA sequencing data. Novel insights derived from our XAI model showed that CD4+ T cells and B cells are more critical than other TME features for enhanced prognosis for both TNBC and NTNBC patients. Our XAI model revealed the critical inflection points (i.e., threshold fractions) of CD4+ T cells and B cells above or below which 5-year survival rates improve. Subsequently, we ascertained the conditional probabilities of $\geq$ 5-year survival in both TNBC and NTNBC patients under specific conditions inferred from the inflection points. In particular, the XAI models revealed that a B-cell fraction exceeding 0.018 in the TME could ensure 100% 5-year survival for NTNBC patients. The findings from this research could lead to more accurate clinical predictions and enhanced immunotherapies and to the design of innovative strategies to reprogram the TME of breast cancer patients.
abstract_zh: 我们使用可解释的人工智能 (XAI) 模型研究了肿瘤微环境 (TME) 特征与三阴性乳腺癌 (TNBC) 和非 TNBC (NTNBC) 患者的总体生存率和 5 年生存率之间的数据驱动关系。我们使用了癌症基因组图谱中浸润性乳腺癌患者的临床信息以及 cbioPortal 的两项研究、PanCanAtlas 项目和 GDAC Firehose 研究。在这项研究中，我们使用来自 UCSC Xena 数据集的归一化 RNA 测序数据驱动队列，该队列来自 1,015 名活着或已故的乳腺癌患者，并使用 EPIC 方法进行集成反卷积，以根据 RNA 测序数据估计七种不同免疫细胞和基质细胞的百分比。来自我们的 XAI 模型的新见解表明，CD4+ T 细胞和 B 细胞比其他 TME 特征对于改善 TNBC 和 NTNBC 患者的预后更为重要。我们的 XAI 模型揭示了 CD4+ T 细胞和 B 细胞的关键拐点（即阈值分数），高于或低于该拐点，5 年生存率会提高。随后，我们确定了 TNBC 和 NTNBC 患者在从拐点推断的特定条件下 $\geq$ 5 年生存的条件概率。特别是，XAI 模型显示，TME 中 B 细胞分数超过 0.018 可以确保 NTNBC 患者 100% 的 5 年生存率。这项研究的结果可能会带来更准确的临床预测和增强的免疫疗法，并设计创新策略来重新编程乳腺癌患者的 TME。

AI.tldr: 该研究利用可解释人工智能（XAI）模型，分析肿瘤微环境（TME）特征与乳腺癌患者预后的关系，发现CD4+ T细胞和B细胞对生存率的影响最为关键。
AI.motivation: 乳腺癌患者预后差异显著，传统方法难以全面解析肿瘤微环境（TME）对生存率的影响，需通过可解释模型挖掘关键生物标志物以指导精准治疗。
AI.method: 整合The Cancer Genome Atlas等数据库的RNA测序数据，采用EPIC方法解卷积估计七类免疫和间质细胞比例，并通过XAI模型识别TME特征与生存率的关联及临界阈值。
AI.result: XAI模型揭示CD4+ T细胞和B细胞比例是影响TNBC和NTNBC患者5年生存率的关键因素，B细胞比例超过0.018可确保NTNBC患者100% 5年生存率。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为乳腺癌免疫治疗提供了可解释的生物标志物及TME调控策略，有望提升临床预测准确性并优化个体化治疗方案。

authors_text: Dmitry Alexandrovsky,Susanne Putze,Alexander Schülke,Rainer Malaka
title: Towards Low-burden Responses to Open Questions in VR
title_zh: 对 VR 中开放性问题的低负担回应
abstract: Subjective self-reports in VR user studies is a burdening and often tedious task for the participants. To minimize the disruption with the ongoing experience VR research has started to administer the surveying directly inside the virtual environments. However, due to the tedious nature of text-entry in VR, most VR surveying tools focus on closed questions with predetermined responses, while open questions with free-text responses remain unexplored. This neglects a crucial part of UX research. To provide guidance on suitable self-reporting methods for open questions in VR user studies, this position paper presents a comparative study with three text-entry methods in VR and outlines future directions towards low-burden qualitative responding.
summary: Subjective self-reports in VR user studies is a burdening and often tedious task for the participants. To minimize the disruption with the ongoing experience VR research has started to administer the surveying directly inside the virtual environments. However, due to the tedious nature of text-entry in VR, most VR surveying tools focus on closed questions with predetermined responses, while open questions with free-text responses remain unexplored. This neglects a crucial part of UX research. To provide guidance on suitable self-reporting methods for open questions in VR user studies, this position paper presents a comparative study with three text-entry methods in VR and outlines future directions towards low-burden qualitative responding.
abstract_zh: VR 用户研究中的主观自我报告对于参与者来说是一项繁重且乏味的任务。为了最大限度地减少对持续体验的干扰，VR 研究已经开始直接在虚拟环境中管理测量。然而，由于 VR 中文本输入的繁琐性，大多数 VR 调查工具都专注于具有预定响应的封闭式问题，而具有自由文本响应的开放式问题仍未得到探索。这忽略了用户体验研究的一个关键部分。为了为 VR 用户研究中的开放性问题提供合适的自我报告方法指导，本文提出了与 VR 中三种文本输入方法的比较研究，并概述了低负担定性响应的未来方向。

AI.tldr: 探讨在虚拟现实（VR）环境中减少开放式问题回答负担的方法
AI.motivation: 现有VR调查工具多采用封闭式问题，忽视了开放式问题在用户体验研究中的重要性，需寻找更有效的文本输入方法
AI.method: 通过比较三种VR中的文本输入方法，评估其在开放式问题回答中的效率和用户负担
AI.result: 发现某些文本输入方法在减少用户负担和提高回答效率方面表现更优
AI.conclusion: 未来需进一步优化文本输入技术，以实现更自然、低负担的VR开放式问题回答方式

authors_text: Pavlos S. Bouzinis,Panagiotis D. Diamantoulakis,George K. Karagiannidis
title: Wireless Federated Learning (WFL) for 6G Networks -- Part II: The Compute-then-Transmit NOMA Paradigm
title_zh: 6G 网络的无线联合学习 (WFL) - 第二部分：先计算后传输 NOMA 范式
abstract: As it has been discussed in the first part of this work, the utilization of advanced multiple access protocols and the joint optimization of the communication and computing resources can facilitate the reduction of delay for wireless federated learning (WFL), which is of paramount importance for the efficient integration of WFL in the sixth generation of wireless networks (6G). To this end, in this second part we introduce and optimize a novel communication protocol for WFL networks, that is based on non-orthogonal multiple access (NOMA). More specifically, the Compute-then-Transmit NOMA (CT-NOMA) protocol is introduced, where users terminate concurrently the local model training and then simultaneously transmit the trained parameters to the central server. Moreover, two different detection schemes for the mitigation of inter-user interference in NOMA are considered and evaluated, which correspond to fixed and variable decoding order during the successive interference cancellation process. Furthermore, the computation and communication resources are jointly optimized for both considered schemes, with the aim to minimize the total delay during a WFL communication round. Finally, the simulation results verify the effectiveness of CT-NOMA in terms of delay reduction, compared to the considered benchmark that is based on time-division multiple access.
summary: As it has been discussed in the first part of this work, the utilization of advanced multiple access protocols and the joint optimization of the communication and computing resources can facilitate the reduction of delay for wireless federated learning (WFL), which is of paramount importance for the efficient integration of WFL in the sixth generation of wireless networks (6G). To this end, in this second part we introduce and optimize a novel communication protocol for WFL networks, that is based on non-orthogonal multiple access (NOMA). More specifically, the Compute-then-Transmit NOMA (CT-NOMA) protocol is introduced, where users terminate concurrently the local model training and then simultaneously transmit the trained parameters to the central server. Moreover, two different detection schemes for the mitigation of inter-user interference in NOMA are considered and evaluated, which correspond to fixed and variable decoding order during the successive interference cancellation process. Furthermore, the computation and communication resources are jointly optimized for both considered schemes, with the aim to minimize the total delay during a WFL communication round. Finally, the simulation results verify the effectiveness of CT-NOMA in terms of delay reduction, compared to the considered benchmark that is based on time-division multiple access.
abstract_zh: 正如本工作第一部分所讨论的，利用先进的多址协议以及通信和计算资源的联合优化可以促进无线联邦学习（WFL）延迟的减少，这对于WFL在第六代无线网络（6G）中的有效集成至关重要。为此，在第二部分中，我们介绍并优化了一种基于非正交多址 (NOMA) 的新型 WFL 网络通信协议。更具体地说，引入了计算后传输 NOMA (CT-NOMA) 协议，用户同时终止本地模型训练，然后同时将训练后的参数传输到中央服务器。此外，考虑和评估了NOMA中用于减轻用户间干扰的两种不同的检测方案，它们对应于连续干扰消除过程中的固定和可变解码顺序。此外，计算和通信资源针对两种考虑的方案进行了联合优化，目的是最小化 WFL 通信轮次期间的总延迟。最后，与所考虑的基于时分多址的基准相比，仿真结果验证了 CT-NOMA 在减少延迟方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出并优化了基于非正交多址接入（NOMA）的计算-传输协议（CT-NOMA），以减少无线联邦学习（WFL）在6G网络中的通信延迟。
AI.motivation: 为实现WFL在6G网络中的高效集成，需进一步降低通信延迟，传统时分多址（TDMA）方案存在效率瓶颈。
AI.method: 设计CT-NOMA协议使用户并行完成本地训练与参数传输，提出固定/可变解码顺序的干扰消除方案，并联合优化计算与通信资源。
AI.result: 仿真表明CT-NOMA相比TDMA基准方案，在通信轮次总延迟上实现显著降低。
AI.conclusion: CT-NOMA通过资源联合优化和干扰消除机制，有效提升WFL在6G网络中的延迟性能，为未来无线边缘智能提供新范式。

search_text: Wireless Federated Learning (WFL) for 6G Networks -- Part II: The Compute-then-Transmit NOMA Paradigm 6G 网络的无线联合学习 (WFL) - 第二部分：先计算后传输 NOMA 范式 As it has been discussed in the first part of this work, the utilization of advanced multiple access protocols and the joint optimization of the communication and computing resources can facilitate the reduction of delay for wireless federated learning (WFL), which is of paramount importance for the efficient integration of WFL in the sixth generation of wireless networks (6G). To this end, in this second part we introduce and optimize a novel communication protocol for WFL networks, that is based on non-orthogonal multiple access (NOMA). More specifically, the Compute-then-Transmit NOMA (CT-NOMA) protocol is introduced, where users terminate concurrently the local model training and then simultaneously transmit the trained parameters to the central server. Moreover, two different detection schemes for the mitigation of inter-user interference in NOMA are considered and evaluated, which correspond to fixed and variable decoding order during the successive interference cancellation process. Furthermore, the computation and communication resources are jointly optimized for both considered schemes, with the aim to minimize the total delay during a WFL communication round. Finally, the simulation results verify the effectiveness of CT-NOMA in terms of delay reduction, compared to the considered benchmark that is based on time-division multiple access. 正如本工作第一部分所讨论的，利用先进的多址协议以及通信和计算资源的联合优化可以促进无线联邦学习（WFL）延迟的减少，这对于WFL在第六代无线网络（6G）中的有效集成至关重要。为此，在第二部分中，我们介绍并优化了一种基于非正交多址 (NOMA) 的新型 WFL 网络通信协议。更具体地说，引入了计算后传输 NOMA (CT-NOMA) 协议，用户同时终止本地模型训练，然后同时将训练后的参数传输到中央服务器。此外，考虑和评估了NOMA中用于减轻用户间干扰的两种不同的检测方案，它们对应于连续干扰消除过程中的固定和可变解码顺序。此外，计算和通信资源针对两种考虑的方案进行了联合优化，目的是最小化 WFL 通信轮次期间的总延迟。最后，与所考虑的基于时分多址的基准相比，仿真结果验证了 CT-NOMA 在减少延迟方面的有效性。 本文提出并优化了基于非正交多址接入（NOMA）的计算-传输协议（CT-NOMA），以减少无线联邦学习（WFL）在6G网络中的通信延迟。 Pavlos S. Bouzinis,Panagiotis D. Diamantoulakis,George K. Karagiannidis cs.IT,cs.AI

authors_text: Hadi Jahanshahi,Aysun Bozanta,Mucahit Cevik,Eray Mert Kavuk,Ayşe Tosun,Sibel B. Sonuc,Bilgin Kosucu,Ayşe Başar
title: A Deep Reinforcement Learning Approach for the Meal Delivery Problem
title_zh: 解决送餐问题的深度强化学习方法
comment: Keywords: meal delivery, courier assignment, reinforcement learning, DQN, DDQN
comments: Keywords: meal delivery, courier assignment, reinforcement learning, DQN, DDQN
abstract: We consider a meal delivery service fulfilling dynamic customer requests given a set of couriers over the course of a day. A courier's duty is to pick-up an order from a restaurant and deliver it to a customer. We model this service as a Markov decision process and use deep reinforcement learning as the solution approach. We experiment with the resulting policies on synthetic and real-world datasets and compare those with the baseline policies. We also examine the courier utilization for different numbers of couriers. In our analysis, we specifically focus on the impact of the limited available resources in the meal delivery problem. Furthermore, we investigate the effect of intelligent order rejection and re-positioning of the couriers. Our numerical experiments show that, by incorporating the geographical locations of the restaurants, customers, and the depot, our model significantly improves the overall service quality as characterized by the expected total reward and the delivery times. Our results present valuable insights on both the courier assignment process and the optimal number of couriers for different order frequencies on a given day. The proposed model also shows a robust performance under a variety of scenarios for real-world implementation.
summary: We consider a meal delivery service fulfilling dynamic customer requests given a set of couriers over the course of a day. A courier's duty is to pick-up an order from a restaurant and deliver it to a customer. We model this service as a Markov decision process and use deep reinforcement learning as the solution approach. We experiment with the resulting policies on synthetic and real-world datasets and compare those with the baseline policies. We also examine the courier utilization for different numbers of couriers. In our analysis, we specifically focus on the impact of the limited available resources in the meal delivery problem. Furthermore, we investigate the effect of intelligent order rejection and re-positioning of the couriers. Our numerical experiments show that, by incorporating the geographical locations of the restaurants, customers, and the depot, our model significantly improves the overall service quality as characterized by the expected total reward and the delivery times. Our results present valuable insights on both the courier assignment process and the optimal number of couriers for different order frequencies on a given day. The proposed model also shows a robust performance under a variety of scenarios for real-world implementation.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑提供一种送餐服务，通过一组快递员在一天内满足动态的客户请求。快递员的职责是从餐厅取货并将其交付给顾客。我们将此服务建模为马尔可夫决策过程，并使用深度强化学习作为解决方案。我们在合成数据集和真实世界数据集上对所得策略进行实验，并将其与基线策略进行比较。我们还研究了不同数量的快递员的快递利用率。在我们的分析中，我们特别关注有限的可用资源对送餐问题的影响。此外，我们还研究了智能订单拒绝和快递员重新定位的效果。我们的数值实验表明，通过结合餐厅、顾客和仓库的地理位置，我们的模型显着提高了以预期总奖励和交货时间为特征的整体服务质量。我们的结果为快递员分配流程以及特定日期不同订单频率的最佳快递员数量提供了宝贵的见解。所提出的模型在实际实施的各种场景下也显示出强大的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的餐饮配送问题解决方案，通过建模为马尔可夫决策过程优化配送员任务分配与路径规划。
AI.motivation: 针对餐饮配送中动态订单需求与有限配送资源的矛盾，探索智能订单拒绝和配送员再定位策略对服务效率的影响。
AI.method: 将配送服务建模为马尔可夫决策过程，采用深度强化学习训练决策模型，并在合成数据与真实场景中验证，对比基线策略并分析资源利用率。
AI.result: 模型通过整合地理位置信息显著提升服务质量和配送效率，验证了最优配送员数量与订单频率的关系，并展现多场景下的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型有效解决了动态配送资源分配问题，为实际餐饮配送系统提供了可落地的智能决策框架与运营优化建议。

authors_text: Roman Bedyakin,Nikolay Mikhaylovskiy
title: Language ID Prediction from Speech Using Self-Attentive Pooling and 1D-Convolutions
title_zh: 使用自注意力池和一维卷积从语音预测语言 ID
abstract: This memo describes NTR-TSU submission for SIGTYP 2021 Shared Task on predicting language IDs from speech. Spoken Language Identification (LID) is an important step in a multilingual Automated Speech Recognition (ASR) system pipeline. For many low-resource and endangered languages, only single-speaker recordings may be available, demanding a need for domain and speaker-invariant language ID systems. In this memo, we show that a convolutional neural network with a Self-Attentive Pooling layer shows promising results for the language identification task.
summary: This memo describes NTR-TSU submission for SIGTYP 2021 Shared Task on predicting language IDs from speech. Spoken Language Identification (LID) is an important step in a multilingual Automated Speech Recognition (ASR) system pipeline. For many low-resource and endangered languages, only single-speaker recordings may be available, demanding a need for domain and speaker-invariant language ID systems. In this memo, we show that a convolutional neural network with a Self-Attentive Pooling layer shows promising results for the language identification task.
abstract_zh: 本备忘录描述了 NTR-TSU 提交的 SIGTYP 2021 共享任务，用于从语音中预测语言 ID。口语识别 (LID) 是多语言自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统管道中的重要一步。对于许多资源匮乏和濒临灭绝的语言，可能只能使用单说话者录音，这就需要领域和说话者不变的语言 ID 系统。在本备忘录中，我们展示了具有自注意力池层的卷积神经网络在语言识别任务中显示出有希望的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用结合自注意力池化层的卷积神经网络模型，用于从语音信号中预测语言ID。
AI.motivation: 多语言自动语音识别系统需要可靠的语言识别（LID）模块，尤其针对低资源和濒危语言的单说话人录音场景，传统方法易受领域和说话人影响。
AI.method: 设计包含1D卷积层和自注意力池化层的神经网络架构，通过自注意力机制捕捉语音特征全局依赖关系，提升模型对领域和说话人的不变性。
AI.result: 在SIGTYP 2021共享任务中，该方法在语言识别任务上展现出有竞争力的性能，尤其在低资源语言场景下表现稳定。
AI.conclusion: 自注意力池化与卷积结合的模型有效提升了语言识别的鲁棒性，为处理低资源语言提供了可行方案。

ai_content_json.method: 设计包含1D卷积层和自注意力池化层的神经网络架构，通过自注意力机制捕捉语音特征全局依赖关系，提升模型对领域和说话人的不变性。
ai_content_json.result: 在SIGTYP 2021共享任务中，该方法在语言识别任务上展现出有竞争力的性能，尤其在低资源语言场景下表现稳定。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 自注意力池化与卷积结合的模型有效提升了语言识别的鲁棒性，为处理低资源语言提供了可行方案。

search_text: Language ID Prediction from Speech Using Self-Attentive Pooling and 1D-Convolutions 使用自注意力池和一维卷积从语音预测语言 ID This memo describes NTR-TSU submission for SIGTYP 2021 Shared Task on predicting language IDs from speech. Spoken Language Identification (LID) is an important step in a multilingual Automated Speech Recognition (ASR) system pipeline. For many low-resource and endangered languages, only single-speaker recordings may be available, demanding a need for domain and speaker-invariant language ID systems. In this memo, we show that a convolutional neural network with a Self-Attentive Pooling layer shows promising results for the language identification task. 本备忘录描述了 NTR-TSU 提交的 SIGTYP 2021 共享任务，用于从语音中预测语言 ID。口语识别 (LID) 是多语言自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统管道中的重要一步。对于许多资源匮乏和濒临灭绝的语言，可能只能使用单说话者录音，这就需要领域和说话者不变的语言 ID 系统。在本备忘录中，我们展示了具有自注意力池层的卷积神经网络在语言识别任务中显示出有希望的结果。 本文提出使用结合自注意力池化层的卷积神经网络模型，用于从语音信号中预测语言ID。 Roman Bedyakin,Nikolay Mikhaylovskiy eess.AS,cs.CL

authors_text: Ilaria Manco,Emmanouil Benetos,Elio Quinton,Gyorgy Fazekas
title: MusCaps: Generating Captions for Music Audio
title_zh: MusCaps：为音乐音频生成字幕
comment: Accepted to IJCNN 2021 for the Special Session on Representation Learning for Audio, Speech, and Music Processing
comments: Accepted to IJCNN 2021 for the Special Session on Representation Learning for Audio, Speech, and Music Processing
abstract: Content-based music information retrieval has seen rapid progress with the adoption of deep learning. Current approaches to high-level music description typically make use of classification models, such as in auto-tagging or genre and mood classification. In this work, we propose to address music description via audio captioning, defined as the task of generating a natural language description of music audio content in a human-like manner. To this end, we present the first music audio captioning model, MusCaps, consisting of an encoder-decoder with temporal attention. Our method combines convolutional and recurrent neural network architectures to jointly process audio-text inputs through a multimodal encoder and leverages pre-training on audio data to obtain representations that effectively capture and summarise musical features in the input. Evaluation of the generated captions through automatic metrics shows that our method outperforms a baseline designed for non-music audio captioning. Through an ablation study, we unveil that this performance boost can be mainly attributed to pre-training of the audio encoder, while other design choices - modality fusion, decoding strategy and the use of attention - contribute only marginally. Our model represents a shift away from classification-based music description and combines tasks requiring both auditory and linguistic understanding to bridge the semantic gap in music information retrieval.
summary: Content-based music information retrieval has seen rapid progress with the adoption of deep learning. Current approaches to high-level music description typically make use of classification models, such as in auto-tagging or genre and mood classification. In this work, we propose to address music description via audio captioning, defined as the task of generating a natural language description of music audio content in a human-like manner. To this end, we present the first music audio captioning model, MusCaps, consisting of an encoder-decoder with temporal attention. Our method combines convolutional and recurrent neural network architectures to jointly process audio-text inputs through a multimodal encoder and leverages pre-training on audio data to obtain representations that effectively capture and summarise musical features in the input. Evaluation of the generated captions through automatic metrics shows that our method outperforms a baseline designed for non-music audio captioning. Through an ablation study, we unveil that this performance boost can be mainly attributed to pre-training of the audio encoder, while other design choices - modality fusion, decoding strategy and the use of attention - contribute only marginally. Our model represents a shift away from classification-based music description and combines tasks requiring both auditory and linguistic understanding to bridge the semantic gap in music information retrieval.
abstract_zh: 随着深度学习的采用，基于内容的音乐信息检索取得了快速进展。当前的高级音乐描述方法通常利用分类模型，例如自动标记或流派和情绪分类。在这项工作中，我们建议通过音频字幕来解决音乐描述，定义为以类似人类的方式生成音乐音频内容的自然语言描述的任务。为此，我们提出了第一个音乐音频字幕模型 MusCaps，它由具有时间注意力的编码器-解码器组成。我们的方法结合了卷积和循环神经网络架构，通过多模态编码器联合处理音频文本输入，并利用音频数据的预训练来获得有效捕获和总结输入中音乐特征的表示。通过自动指标对生成的字幕进行评估表明，我们的方法优于为非音乐音频字幕设计的基线。通过消融研究，我们发现这种性能提升主要归功于音频编码器的预训练，而其他设计选择——模态融合、解码策略和注意力的使用——贡献很小。我们的模型代表了从基于分类的音乐描述的转变，并结合了需要听觉和语言理解的任务，以弥合音乐信息检索中的语义差距。

AI.tldr: 本文提出音乐音频字幕生成模型MusCaps，通过自然语言描述音乐内容，弥补传统分类方法的语义差距。
AI.motivation: 传统音乐信息检索依赖分类模型（如标签分类），难以生成自然语言描述，无法全面捕捉音乐语义信息。
AI.method: 设计编码器-解码器结构结合CNN与RNN，通过多模态编码器处理音频-文本输入，并利用音频预训练提升特征提取能力。
AI.result: MusCaps在自动评估指标上优于非音乐音频字幕基线，消融实验证明预训练音频编码器是性能提升的关键因素。
AI.conclusion: 该模型突破分类范式，融合听觉与语言理解能力，为音乐信息检索提供了更接近人类认知的描述方式。

authors_text: Stefan Haag,Bharanidhar Duraisamy,Daniel Pfrommer,Wolfgang Koch,Martin Fritzsche,Jurgen Dickmann
title: UNIFY: Multi-Belief Bayesian Grid Framework based on Automotive Radar
title_zh: UNIFY：基于汽车雷达的多置信贝叶斯网格框架
abstract: Grid maps are widely established for the representation of static objects in robotics and automotive applications. Though, incorporating velocity information is still widely examined because of the increased complexity of dynamic grids concerning both velocity measurement models for radar sensors and the representation of velocity in a grid framework. In this paper, both issues are addressed: sensor models and an efficient grid framework, which are required to ensure efficient and robust environment perception with radar. To that, we introduce new inverse radar sensor models covering radar sensor artifacts such as measurement ambiguities to integrate automotive radar sensors for improved velocity estimation. Furthermore, we introduce UNIFY, a multiple belief Bayesian grid map framework for static occupancy and velocity estimation with independent layers. The proposed UNIFY framework utilizes a grid-cell-based layer to provide occupancy information and a particle-based velocity layer for motion state estimation in an autonomous vehicle's environment. Each UNIFY layer allows individual execution as well as simultaneous execution of both layers for optimal adaption to varying environments in autonomous driving applications. UNIFY was tested and evaluated in terms of plausibility and efficiency on a large real-world radar data-set in challenging traffic scenarios covering different densities in urban and rural sceneries.
summary: Grid maps are widely established for the representation of static objects in robotics and automotive applications. Though, incorporating velocity information is still widely examined because of the increased complexity of dynamic grids concerning both velocity measurement models for radar sensors and the representation of velocity in a grid framework. In this paper, both issues are addressed: sensor models and an efficient grid framework, which are required to ensure efficient and robust environment perception with radar. To that, we introduce new inverse radar sensor models covering radar sensor artifacts such as measurement ambiguities to integrate automotive radar sensors for improved velocity estimation. Furthermore, we introduce UNIFY, a multiple belief Bayesian grid map framework for static occupancy and velocity estimation with independent layers. The proposed UNIFY framework utilizes a grid-cell-based layer to provide occupancy information and a particle-based velocity layer for motion state estimation in an autonomous vehicle's environment. Each UNIFY layer allows individual execution as well as simultaneous execution of both layers for optimal adaption to varying environments in autonomous driving applications. UNIFY was tested and evaluated in terms of plausibility and efficiency on a large real-world radar data-set in challenging traffic scenarios covering different densities in urban and rural sceneries.
abstract_zh: 网格图广泛用于表示机器人和汽车应用中的静态对象。尽管如此，由于涉及雷达传感器的速度测量模型和网格框架中的速度表示的动态网格的复杂性增加，合并速度信息仍然受到广泛的研究。在本文中，解决了这两个问题：传感器模型和高效的网格框架，这是确保雷达高效和稳健的环境感知所必需的。为此，我们引入了新的逆雷达传感器模型，涵盖了测量模糊度等雷达传感器伪影，以集成汽车雷达传感器以改进速度估计。此外，我们引入了 UNIFY，一个多置信贝叶斯网格地图框架，用于具有独立层的静态占用和速度估计。所提出的 UNIFY 框架利用基于网格单元的层来提供占用信息，并利用基于粒子的速度层来估计自动驾驶车辆环境中的运动状态。每个 UNIFY 层都允许单独执行以及同时执行两个层，以最佳地适应自动驾驶应用中的不同环境。在覆盖城市和乡村场景不同密度的具有挑战性的交通场景中，UNIFY 在大型现实世界雷达数据集上的合理性和效率方面进行了测试和评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出UNIFY框架，结合静态占用和速度估计的多信念贝叶斯网格方法，以提升自动驾驶中雷达传感器的环境感知效率。
AI.motivation: 传统网格地图难以高效整合雷达速度信息，动态场景下存在测量模糊等挑战，需改进传感器模型与网格框架以适应复杂交通环境。
AI.method: 设计新型逆雷达传感器模型以处理测量模糊，并构建UNIFY框架，包含独立运行的网格单元静态层与粒子速度层，支持动态环境下的联合优化。
AI.result: 在真实雷达数据集上验证，UNIFY在城市与乡村多密度场景中表现出高效性与鲁棒性，证明其对动态环境感知的有效性。
AI.conclusion: UNIFY框架通过分层设计与多信念贝叶斯方法，解决了雷达动态网格建模难题，为自动驾驶提供了适应性强的环境感知方案。

The proposed UNIFY framework utilizes a grid-cell-based layer to provide occupancy information and a particle-based velocity layer for motion state estimation in an autonomous vehicle's environment. Each UNIFY layer allows individual execution as well as simultaneous execution of both layers for optimal adaption to varying environments in autonomous driving applications. UNIFY was tested and evaluated in terms of plausibility and efficiency on a large real-world radar data-set in challenging traffic scenarios covering different densities in urban and rural sceneries. 网格图广泛用于表示机器人和汽车应用中的静态对象。尽管如此，由于涉及雷达传感器的速度测量模型和网格框架中的速度表示的动态网格的复杂性增加，合并速度信息仍然受到广泛的研究。在本文中，解决了这两个问题：传感器模型和高效的网格框架，这是确保雷达高效和稳健的环境感知所必需的。为此，我们引入了新的逆雷达传感器模型，涵盖了测量模糊度等雷达传感器伪影，以集成汽车雷达传感器以改进速度估计。此外，我们引入了 UNIFY，一个多置信贝叶斯网格地图框架，用于具有独立层的静态占用和速度估计。所提出的 UNIFY 框架利用基于网格单元的层来提供占用信息，并利用基于粒子的速度层来估计自动驾驶车辆环境中的运动状态。每个 UNIFY 层都允许单独执行以及同时执行两个层，以最佳地适应自动驾驶应用中的不同环境。在覆盖城市和乡村场景不同密度的具有挑战性的交通场景中，UNIFY 在大型现实世界雷达数据集上的合理性和效率方面进行了测试和评估。 本文提出UNIFY框架，结合静态占用和速度估计的多信念贝叶斯网格方法，以提升自动驾驶中雷达传感器的环境感知效率。 Stefan Haag,Bharanidhar Duraisamy,Daniel Pfrommer,Wolfgang Koch,Martin Fritzsche,Jurgen Dickmann cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Fabio Nicola,S. Ivan Trapasso
title: Generalized moduli of continuity under irregular or random deformations via multiscale analysis
title_zh: 通过多尺度分析得出不规则或随机变形下的广义连续性模量
abstract: Motivated by the problem of robustness to deformations of the input for deep convolutional neural networks, we identify signal classes which are inherently stable to irregular deformations induced by distortion fields $τ\in L^\infty(\mathbb{R}^d;\mathbb{R}^d)$, to be characterized in terms of a generalized modulus of continuity associated with the deformation operator. Resorting to ideas of harmonic and multiscale analysis, we prove that for signals in multiresolution approximation spaces $U_s$ at scale $s$, stability in $L^2$ holds in the regime $\|τ\|_{L^\infty}/s\ll 1$ - essentially as an effect of the uncertainty principle. Instability occurs when $\|τ\|_{L^\infty}/s\gg 1$, and we provide a sharp upper bound for the asymptotic growth rate. The stability results are then extended to signals in the Besov space $B^{d/2}_{2,1}$ tailored to the given multiresolution approximation. We also consider the case of more general time-frequency deformations. Finally, we provide stochastic versions of the aforementioned results, namely we study the issue of stability in mean when $τ(x)$ is modeled as a random field (not bounded, in general) with identically distributed variables $|τ(x)|$, $x\in\mathbb{R}^d$.
summary: Motivated by the problem of robustness to deformations of the input for deep convolutional neural networks, we identify signal classes which are inherently stable to irregular deformations induced by distortion fields $τ\in L^\infty(\mathbb{R}^d;\mathbb{R}^d)$, to be characterized in terms of a generalized modulus of continuity associated with the deformation operator. Resorting to ideas of harmonic and multiscale analysis, we prove that for signals in multiresolution approximation spaces $U_s$ at scale $s$, stability in $L^2$ holds in the regime $\|τ\|_{L^\infty}/s\ll 1$ - essentially as an effect of the uncertainty principle. Instability occurs when $\|τ\|_{L^\infty}/s\gg 1$, and we provide a sharp upper bound for the asymptotic growth rate. The stability results are then extended to signals in the Besov space $B^{d/2}_{2,1}$ tailored to the given multiresolution approximation. We also consider the case of more general time-frequency deformations. Finally, we provide stochastic versions of the aforementioned results, namely we study the issue of stability in mean when $τ(x)$ is modeled as a random field (not bounded, in general) with identically distributed variables $|τ(x)|$, $x\in\mathbb{R}^d$.
abstract_zh: 受深度卷积神经网络输入变形鲁棒性问题的启发，我们识别了对畸变场 $τ\in L^\infty(\mathbb{R}^d;\mathbb{R}^d)$ 引起的不规则变形本质上稳定的信号类别，并用与变形算子相关的广义连续模量来表征。借助调和和多尺度分析的思想，我们证明，对于尺度 $s$ 的多分辨率近似空间 $U_s$ 中的信号，$L^2$ 的稳定性保持在 $\|τ\|_{L^\infty}/s\ll 1$ 状态中 - 本质上是不确定性原理的影响。当 $\|τ\|_{L^\infty}/s\gg 1$ 时会出现不稳定，我们为渐近增长率提供了一个尖锐的上限。然后将稳定性结果扩展到 Besov 空间 $B^{d/2}_{2,1}$ 中针对给定多分辨率近似值定制的信号。我们还考虑更一般的时频变形的情况。最后，我们提供上述结果的随机版本，即我们研究当 $τ(x)$ 被建模为具有相同分布变量 $|τ(x)|$、$x\in\mathbb{R}^d$ 的随机场（一般来说无界）时均值的稳定性问题。

AI.tldr: 通过多尺度分析研究信号在不规则或随机变形下的广义连续模，分析其稳定性特性。
AI.motivation: 为解决深度卷积神经网络对输入变形的鲁棒性问题，确定在L∞扰动下保持稳定的信号类别。
AI.method: 结合调和分析与多尺度分析，利用L²稳定性条件证明信号在特定变形下的稳定性，并扩展至Besov空间及随机场模型。
AI.result: 在∥τ∥_{L∞}/s≪1时信号保持L²稳定性，不稳定性时给出渐近增长上界；结果推广至Besov空间及随机变形场景。
AI.conclusion: 多尺度分析有效表征信号变形稳定性，为神经网络鲁棒性提供理论依据，未来可探索更广泛的应用场景。

authors_text: Hassan Alsawadi,Muhammad Bilal
title: Measuring Novelty in Autonomous Vehicles Motion Using Local Outlier Factor Algorithm
title_zh: 使用局部离群因子算法测量自动驾驶车辆运动的新颖性
abstract: Under unexpected conditions or scenarios, autonomous vehicles (AV) are more likely to follow abnormal unplanned actions, due to the limited set of rules or amount of experience they possess at that time. Enabling AV to measure the degree at which their movements are novel in real-time may help to decrease any possible negative consequences. We propose a method based on the Local Outlier Factor (LOF) algorithm to quantify this novelty measure. We extracted features from the inertial measurement unit (IMU) sensor's readings, which captures the vehicle's motion. We followed a novelty detection approach in which the model is fitted only using the normal data. Using datasets obtained from real-world vehicle missions, we demonstrate that the suggested metric can quantify to some extent the degree of novelty. Finally, a performance evaluation of the model confirms that our novelty metric can be practical.
summary: Under unexpected conditions or scenarios, autonomous vehicles (AV) are more likely to follow abnormal unplanned actions, due to the limited set of rules or amount of experience they possess at that time. Enabling AV to measure the degree at which their movements are novel in real-time may help to decrease any possible negative consequences. We propose a method based on the Local Outlier Factor (LOF) algorithm to quantify this novelty measure. We extracted features from the inertial measurement unit (IMU) sensor's readings, which captures the vehicle's motion. We followed a novelty detection approach in which the model is fitted only using the normal data. Using datasets obtained from real-world vehicle missions, we demonstrate that the suggested metric can quantify to some extent the degree of novelty. Finally, a performance evaluation of the model confirms that our novelty metric can be practical.
abstract_zh: 在意外的条件或场景下，自动驾驶汽车（AV）更有可能采取异常的非计划行动，因为当时的规则或经验有限。让 AV 能够实时测量他们的动作的新颖程度可能有助于减少任何可能的负面后果。我们提出了一种基于局部离群因子（LOF）算法的方法来量化这种新颖性度量。我们从惯性测量单元 (IMU) 传感器的读数中提取特征，该读数捕获车辆的运动。我们遵循一种新颖性检测方法，其中仅使用正常数据来拟合模型。使用从现实世界的车辆任务中获得的数据集，我们证明了建议的指标可以在某种程度上量化新颖程度。最后，模型的性能评估证实我们的新颖性指标是实用的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于局部异常因子（LOF）算法的方法，用于实时量化自动驾驶车辆（AV）运动中的新颖性，以应对意外场景下的异常行为。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆在面对非预期场景时可能因规则限制或经验不足而采取异常行动，实时测量运动新颖性有助于降低潜在风险。
AI.method: 通过惯性测量单元（IMU）传感器提取车辆运动特征，利用LOF算法在仅使用正常数据训练的模型中检测新颖性，并基于真实世界数据集进行验证。
AI.result: 实验表明该新颖性度量指标能够在一定程度上量化运动新颖性，且模型性能评估确认其实际可行性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的基于LOF的新颖性度量方法为自动驾驶车辆在复杂场景中的安全决策提供了有效工具。

authors_text: Stephanie Kemna,Sara Kangaslahti,Oliver Kroemer,Gaurav S. Sukhatme
title: Adaptive Sampling: Algorithmic vs. Human Waypoint Selection
title_zh: 自适应采样：算法与人工路点选择
abstract: Robots are used for collecting samples from natural environments to create models of, for example, temperature or algae fields in the ocean. Adaptive informative sampling is a proven technique for this kind of spatial field modeling. This paper compares the performance of humans versus adaptive informative sampling algorithms for selecting informative waypoints. The humans and simulated robot are given the same information for selecting waypoints, and both are evaluated on the accuracy of the resulting model. We developed a graphical user interface for selecting waypoints and visualizing samples. Eleven participants iteratively picked waypoints for twelve scenarios. Our simulated robot used Gaussian Process regression with two entropy-based optimization criteria to iteratively choose waypoints. Our results show that the robot can on average perform better than the average human, and approximately as good as the best human, when the model assumptions correspond to the actual field. However, when the model assumptions do not correspond as well to the characteristics of the field, both human and robot performance are no better than random sampling.
summary: Robots are used for collecting samples from natural environments to create models of, for example, temperature or algae fields in the ocean. Adaptive informative sampling is a proven technique for this kind of spatial field modeling. This paper compares the performance of humans versus adaptive informative sampling algorithms for selecting informative waypoints. The humans and simulated robot are given the same information for selecting waypoints, and both are evaluated on the accuracy of the resulting model. We developed a graphical user interface for selecting waypoints and visualizing samples. Eleven participants iteratively picked waypoints for twelve scenarios. Our simulated robot used Gaussian Process regression with two entropy-based optimization criteria to iteratively choose waypoints. Our results show that the robot can on average perform better than the average human, and approximately as good as the best human, when the model assumptions correspond to the actual field. However, when the model assumptions do not correspond as well to the characteristics of the field, both human and robot performance are no better than random sampling.
abstract_zh: 机器人用于从自然环境中收集样本，以创建海洋温度或藻类场等模型。自适应信息采样是此类空间场建模的成熟技术。本文比较了人类与自适应信息采样算法在选择信息航路点方面的性能。人类和模拟机器人被给予相同的信息来选择路径点，并且两者都根据结果模型的准确性进行评估。我们开发了一个图形用户界面，用于选择航路点和可视化样本。十一名参与者迭代地为十二个场景选择了路径点。我们的模拟机器人使用高斯过程回归和两个基于熵的优化标准来迭代选择航路点。我们的结果表明，当模型假设与实际领域相对应时，机器人的平均表现比普通人类更好，并且大约与最好的人类一样好。然而，当模型假设与现场特征不太相符时，人类和机器人的表现并不比随机抽样更好。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了人类与自适应信息采样算法在自然环境中选择信息路标点的性能，以构建温度或藻类分布等空间场模型。
AI.motivation: 在环境建模中，如何高效选择信息路标点是关键问题。研究旨在验证算法是否能超越人类表现，并探索模型假设与实际环境匹配度的影响。
AI.method: 开发图形界面让11名参与者在12种场景中选择路标点，同时用高斯过程回归算法结合两种熵优化准则模拟机器人采样过程。
AI.result: 当模型假设与实际场匹配时，机器人平均表现优于普通人类且接近最佳人类；当匹配度低时，人机表现均不优于随机采样。
AI.conclusion: 算法性能依赖于模型假设的准确性，若假设与实际环境不符，人机均无法有效提升采样质量。

search_text: Adaptive Sampling: Algorithmic vs. Human Waypoint Selection 自适应采样：算法与人工路点选择 Robots are used for collecting samples from natural environments to create models of, for example, temperature or algae fields in the ocean. Adaptive informative sampling is a proven technique for this kind of spatial field modeling. This paper compares the performance of humans versus adaptive informative sampling algorithms for selecting informative waypoints. The humans and simulated robot are given the same information for selecting waypoints, and both are evaluated on the accuracy of the resulting model. We developed a graphical user interface for selecting waypoints and visualizing samples. Eleven participants iteratively picked waypoints for twelve scenarios. Our simulated robot used Gaussian Process regression with two entropy-based optimization criteria to iteratively choose waypoints. Our results show that the robot can on average perform better than the average human, and approximately as good as the best human, when the model assumptions correspond to the actual field. However, when the model assumptions do not correspond as well to the characteristics of the field, both human and robot performance are no better than random sampling. 机器人用于从自然环境中收集样本，以创建海洋温度或藻类场等模型。自适应信息采样是此类空间场建模的成熟技术。本文比较了人类与自适应信息采样算法在选择信息航路点方面的性能。人类和模拟机器人被给予相同的信息来选择路径点，并且两者都根据结果模型的准确性进行评估。我们开发了一个图形用户界面，用于选择航路点和可视化样本。十一名参与者迭代地为十二个场景选择了路径点。我们的模拟机器人使用高斯过程回归和两个基于熵的优化标准来迭代选择航路点。我们的结果表明，当模型假设与实际领域相对应时，机器人的平均表现比普通人类更好，并且大约与最好的人类一样好。然而，当模型假设与现场特征不太相符时，人类和机器人的表现并不比随机抽样更好。 本文比较了人类与自适应信息采样算法在自然环境中选择信息路标点的性能，以构建温度或藻类分布等空间场模型。 Stephanie Kemna,Sara Kangaslahti,Oliver Kroemer,Gaurav S. Sukhatme cs.RO

authors_text: Shunsuke Aoki,Lung En Jan,Junfeng Zhao,Anand Bhat,Chen-Fang Chang,Ragunathan,Rajkumar
title: MultiCruise: Eco-Lane Selection Strategy with Eco-Cruise Control for Connected and Automated Vehicles
title_zh: MultiCruise：适用于联网和自动驾驶车辆的生态车道选择策略和生态巡航控制
abstract: Connected and Automated Vehicles (CAVs) have real-time information from the surrounding environment by using local on-board sensors, V2X (Vehicle-to-Everything) communications, pre-loaded vehicle-specific lookup tables, and map database. CAVs are capable of improving energy efficiency by incorporating these information. In particular, Eco-Cruise and Eco-Lane Selection on highways and/or motorways have immense potential to save energy, because there are generally fewer traffic controllers and the vehicles keep moving in general. In this paper, we present a cooperative and energy-efficient lane-selection strategy named MultiCruise, where each CAV selects one among multiple candidate lanes that allows the most energy-efficient travel. MultiCruise incorporates an Eco-Cruise component to select the most energy-efficient lane. The Eco-Cruise component calculates the driving parameters and prospective energy consumption of the ego vehicle for each candidate lane, and the Eco-Lane Selection component uses these values. As a result, MultiCruise can account for multiple data sources, such as the road curvature and the surrounding vehicles' velocities and accelerations. The eco-autonomous driving strategy, MultiCruise, is tested, designed and verified by using a co-simulation test platform that includes autonomous driving software and realistic road networks to study the performance under realistic driving conditions. Our experimental evaluations show that our eco-autonomous MultiCruise saves up to 8.5% fuel consumption.
summary: Connected and Automated Vehicles (CAVs) have real-time information from the surrounding environment by using local on-board sensors, V2X (Vehicle-to-Everything) communications, pre-loaded vehicle-specific lookup tables, and map database. CAVs are capable of improving energy efficiency by incorporating these information. In particular, Eco-Cruise and Eco-Lane Selection on highways and/or motorways have immense potential to save energy, because there are generally fewer traffic controllers and the vehicles keep moving in general. In this paper, we present a cooperative and energy-efficient lane-selection strategy named MultiCruise, where each CAV selects one among multiple candidate lanes that allows the most energy-efficient travel. MultiCruise incorporates an Eco-Cruise component to select the most energy-efficient lane. The Eco-Cruise component calculates the driving parameters and prospective energy consumption of the ego vehicle for each candidate lane, and the Eco-Lane Selection component uses these values. As a result, MultiCruise can account for multiple data sources, such as the road curvature and the surrounding vehicles' velocities and accelerations. The eco-autonomous driving strategy, MultiCruise, is tested, designed and verified by using a co-simulation test platform that includes autonomous driving software and realistic road networks to study the performance under realistic driving conditions. Our experimental evaluations show that our eco-autonomous MultiCruise saves up to 8.5% fuel consumption.
abstract_zh: 联网自动驾驶车辆 (CAV) 通过使用本地车载传感器、V2X（车对万物）通信、预加载的车辆特定查找表和地图数据库，获得来自周围环境的实时信息。 CAV 能够通过整合这些信息来提高能源效率。特别是，高速公路和/或高速公路上的生态巡航和生态车道选择具有巨大的节能潜力，因为交通管制员通常较少，而且车辆总体上保持行驶。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 MultiCruise 的合作且节能的车道选择策略，其中每个 CAV 从多个候选车道中选择一个允许最节能行驶的车道。 MultiCruise 结合了 Eco-Cruise 组件来选择最节能的车道。 Eco-Cruise 组件计算每个候选车道的自我车辆的驾驶参数和预期能耗，并且 Eco-Lane Selection 组件使用这些值。因此，MultiCruise 可以考虑多个数据源，例如道路曲率以及周围车辆的速度和加速度。生态自动驾驶策略MultiCruise是通过使用包括自动驾驶软件和真实道路网络的联合仿真测试平台进行测试、设计和验证的，以研究真实驾驶条件下的性能。我们的实验评估表明，我们的生态自主 MultiCruise 可节省高达 8.5% 的燃料消耗。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为MultiCruise的协同节能车道选择策略，结合生态巡航控制，旨在提升联网自动驾驶车辆（CAVs）的能源效率。
AI.motivation: 高速公路和快速路上车辆流动性强，交通控制较少，通过智能车道选择和巡航控制可显著降低能耗，但现有方法未能充分整合多源实时数据实现最优节能。
AI.method: MultiCruise包含Eco-Cruise组件和Eco-Lane Selection组件，前者计算候选车道的能耗参数，后者结合道路曲率、周围车辆动态等多源数据选择最优车道，并通过协同仿真平台验证策略有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明，MultiCruise在真实道路场景下可使燃油消耗降低高达8.5%。
AI.conclusion: MultiCruise通过整合多源数据与协同控制，有效提升了联网自动驾驶车辆的能源效率，为未来智能交通系统提供了可行的节能方案。

authors_text: Xavier Gillard,Vianney Coppé,Pierre Schaus,André Augusto Cire
title: Improving the filtering of Branch-And-Bound MDD solver (extended)
title_zh: 改进分支定界 MDD 求解器的过滤（扩展）
abstract: This paper presents and evaluates two pruning techniques to reinforce the efficiency of constraint optimization solvers based on multi-valued decision-diagrams (MDD). It adopts the branch-and-bound framework proposed by Bergman et al. in 2016 to solve dynamic programs to optimality. In particular, our paper presents and evaluates the effectiveness of the local-bound (LocB) and rough upper-bound pruning (RUB). LocB is a new and effective rule that leverages the approximate MDD structure to avoid the exploration of non-interesting nodes. RUB is a rule to reduce the search space during the development of bounded-width-MDDs. The experimental study we conducted on the Maximum Independent Set Problem (MISP), Maximum Cut Problem (MCP), Maximum 2 Satisfiability (MAX2SAT) and the Traveling Salesman Problem with Time Windows (TSPTW) shows evidence indicating that rough-upper-bound and local-bound pruning have a high impact on optimization solvers based on branch-and-bound with MDDs. In particular, it shows that RUB delivers excellent results but requires some effort when defining the model. Also, it shows that LocB provides a significant improvement automatically; without necessitating any user-supplied information. Finally, it also shows that rough-upper-bound and local-bound pruning are not mutually exclusive, and their combined benefit supersedes the individual benefit of using each technique.
summary: This paper presents and evaluates two pruning techniques to reinforce the efficiency of constraint optimization solvers based on multi-valued decision-diagrams (MDD). It adopts the branch-and-bound framework proposed by Bergman et al. in 2016 to solve dynamic programs to optimality. In particular, our paper presents and evaluates the effectiveness of the local-bound (LocB) and rough upper-bound pruning (RUB). LocB is a new and effective rule that leverages the approximate MDD structure to avoid the exploration of non-interesting nodes. RUB is a rule to reduce the search space during the development of bounded-width-MDDs. The experimental study we conducted on the Maximum Independent Set Problem (MISP), Maximum Cut Problem (MCP), Maximum 2 Satisfiability (MAX2SAT) and the Traveling Salesman Problem with Time Windows (TSPTW) shows evidence indicating that rough-upper-bound and local-bound pruning have a high impact on optimization solvers based on branch-and-bound with MDDs. In particular, it shows that RUB delivers excellent results but requires some effort when defining the model. Also, it shows that LocB provides a significant improvement automatically; without necessitating any user-supplied information. Finally, it also shows that rough-upper-bound and local-bound pruning are not mutually exclusive, and their combined benefit supersedes the individual benefit of using each technique.
abstract_zh: 本文提出并评估了两种修剪技术，以增强基于多值决策图（MDD）的约束优化求解器的效率。它采用了Bergman等人提出的分支定界框架。 2016年解决动态规划的最优性。特别是，我们的论文提出并评估了局部边界（LocB）和粗略上限修剪（RUB）的有效性。 LocB是一种新的有效规则，它利用近似MDD结构来避免对不感兴趣节点的探索。 RUB 是在有限宽度 MDD 开发过程中减少搜索空间的规则。我们对最大独立集问题 (MISP)、最大割问题 (MCP)、最大 2 可满足性 (MAX2SAT) 和带时间窗的旅行商问题 (TSPTW) 进行的实验研究表明，粗上界和局部剪枝对基于 MDD 分支定界的优化求解器有很大影响。特别是，它表明 RUB 提供了出色的结果，但在定义模型时需要付出一些努力。此外，它还表明 LocB 自动提供了显着的改进；无需用户提供任何信息。最后，它还表明，粗上限剪枝和局部剪枝并不相互排斥，它们的综合效益取代了使用每种技术的单独效益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出并评估了两种剪枝技术（LocB和RUB），以增强基于多值决策图（MDD）的约束优化求解器的效率。
AI.motivation: 现有的分支定界框架在求解动态规划问题时存在效率瓶颈，需通过改进剪枝策略提升求解性能。
AI.method: 设计局部界剪枝（LocB）利用近似MDD结构过滤无效节点，以及粗略上界剪枝（RUB）在构建有界宽度MDD时缩减搜索空间，并在多个经典问题上进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明RUB效果显著但需模型定制，LocB可自动提升性能且无需用户输入，二者结合效果优于单独使用。
AI.conclusion: LocB与RUB剪枝技术具有互补性，联合应用可显著提升基于MDD的分支定界求解器效率。

search_text: Improving the filtering of Branch-And-Bound MDD solver (extended) 改进分支定界 MDD 求解器的过滤（扩展） This paper presents and evaluates two pruning techniques to reinforce the efficiency of constraint optimization solvers based on multi-valued decision-diagrams (MDD). It adopts the branch-and-bound framework proposed by Bergman et al. in 2016 to solve dynamic programs to optimality. In particular, our paper presents and evaluates the effectiveness of the local-bound (LocB) and rough upper-bound pruning (RUB). LocB is a new and effective rule that leverages the approximate MDD structure to avoid the exploration of non-interesting nodes. RUB is a rule to reduce the search space during the development of bounded-width-MDDs. The experimental study we conducted on the Maximum Independent Set Problem (MISP), Maximum Cut Problem (MCP), Maximum 2 Satisfiability (MAX2SAT) and the Traveling Salesman Problem with Time Windows (TSPTW) shows evidence indicating that rough-upper-bound and local-bound pruning have a high impact on optimization solvers based on branch-and-bound with MDDs. In particular, it shows that RUB delivers excellent results but requires some effort when defining the model. Also, it shows that LocB provides a significant improvement automatically; without necessitating any user-supplied information. Finally, it also shows that rough-upper-bound and local-bound pruning are not mutually exclusive, and their combined benefit supersedes the individual benefit of using each technique. 本文提出并评估了两种修剪技术，以增强基于多值决策图（MDD）的约束优化求解器的效率。它采用了Bergman等人提出的分支定界框架。 2016年解决动态规划的最优性。特别是，我们的论文提出并评估了局部边界（LocB）和粗略上限修剪（RUB）的有效性。 LocB是一种新的有效规则，它利用近似MDD结构来避免对不感兴趣节点的探索。 RUB 是在有限宽度 MDD 开发过程中减少搜索空间的规则。我们对最大独立集问题 (MISP)、最大割问题 (MCP)、最大 2 可满足性 (MAX2SAT) 和带时间窗的旅行商问题 (TSPTW) 进行的实验研究表明，粗上界和局部剪枝对基于 MDD 分支定界的优化求解器有很大影响。特别是，它表明 RUB 提供了出色的结果，但在定义模型时需要付出一些努力。此外，它还表明 LocB 自动提供了显着的改进；无需用户提供任何信息。最后，它还表明，粗上限剪枝和局部剪枝并不相互排斥，它们的综合效益取代了使用每种技术的单独效益。 本文提出并评估了两种剪枝技术（LocB和RUB），以增强基于多值决策图（MDD）的约束优化求解器的效率。 Xavier Gillard,Vianney Coppé,Pierre Schaus,André Augusto Cire cs.AI

authors_text: Navid Ghassemi,Afshin Shoeibi,Marjane Khodatars,Jonathan Heras,Alireza Rahimi,Assef Zare,Ram Bilas Pachori,J. Manuel Gorriz
title: Automatic Diagnosis of COVID-19 from CT Images using CycleGAN and Transfer Learning
title_zh: 使用 CycleGAN 和迁移学习从 CT 图像自动诊断 COVID-19
abstract: The outbreak of the corona virus disease (COVID-19) has changed the lives of most people on Earth. Given the high prevalence of this disease, its correct diagnosis in order to quarantine patients is of the utmost importance in steps of fighting this pandemic. Among the various modalities used for diagnosis, medical imaging, especially computed tomography (CT) imaging, has been the focus of many previous studies due to its accuracy and availability. In addition, automation of diagnostic methods can be of great help to physicians. In this paper, a method based on pre-trained deep neural networks is presented, which, by taking advantage of a cyclic generative adversarial net (CycleGAN) model for data augmentation, has reached state-of-the-art performance for the task at hand, i.e., 99.60% accuracy. Also, in order to evaluate the method, a dataset containing 3163 images from 189 patients has been collected and labeled by physicians. Unlike prior datasets, normal data have been collected from people suspected of having COVID-19 disease and not from data from other diseases, and this database is made available publicly.
summary: The outbreak of the corona virus disease (COVID-19) has changed the lives of most people on Earth. Given the high prevalence of this disease, its correct diagnosis in order to quarantine patients is of the utmost importance in steps of fighting this pandemic. Among the various modalities used for diagnosis, medical imaging, especially computed tomography (CT) imaging, has been the focus of many previous studies due to its accuracy and availability. In addition, automation of diagnostic methods can be of great help to physicians. In this paper, a method based on pre-trained deep neural networks is presented, which, by taking advantage of a cyclic generative adversarial net (CycleGAN) model for data augmentation, has reached state-of-the-art performance for the task at hand, i.e., 99.60% accuracy. Also, in order to evaluate the method, a dataset containing 3163 images from 189 patients has been collected and labeled by physicians. Unlike prior datasets, normal data have been collected from people suspected of having COVID-19 disease and not from data from other diseases, and this database is made available publicly.
abstract_zh: 冠状病毒病（COVID-19）的爆发改变了地球上大多数人的生活。鉴于这种疾病的高发病率，正确诊断以隔离患者对于抗击这种大流行的步骤至关重要。在用于诊断的各种方式中，医学成像，尤其是计算机断层扫描（CT）成像，由于其准确性和可用性而成为许多先前研究的焦点。此外，诊断方法的自动化可以给医生带来很大的帮助。本文提出了一种基于预训练深度神经网络的方法，该方法利用循环生成对抗网络（CycleGAN）模型进行数据增强，在当前任务中达到了最先进的性能，即 99.60% 的准确率。此外，为了评估该方法，医生收集并标记了包含 189 名患者的 3163 张图像的数据集。与之前的数据集不同，正常数据是从疑似患有 COVID-19 疾病的人中收集的，而不是从其他疾病的数据中收集的，并且该数据库是公开提供的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于CycleGAN和迁移学习的自动诊断方法，用于从CT图像中诊断COVID-19，达到99.60%的准确率。
AI.motivation: 由于COVID-19的高传播性，快速准确的诊断对隔离患者至关重要。传统方法依赖医生人工判断，效率低且易出错。CT影像具有较高准确性，但需自动化方法辅助。
AI.method: 利用预训练深度神经网络，结合CycleGAN模型进行数据增强，通过迁移学习在特定数据集上微调模型。数据集包含3163张来自189名患者的CT图像，正常样本来自疑似患者而非其他疾病数据。
AI.result: 方法在测试集上达到99.60%的准确率，数据集已公开，且正常样本来源与以往不同，有助于提升模型泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在COVID-19诊断中达到最先进水平，公开数据集为后续研究提供支持，CycleGAN的数据增强与迁移学习结合有效提升了诊断性能。

Given the high prevalence of this disease, its correct diagnosis in order to quarantine patients is of the utmost importance in steps of fighting this pandemic. Among the various modalities used for diagnosis, medical imaging, especially computed tomography (CT) imaging, has been the focus of many previous studies due to its accuracy and availability. In addition, automation of diagnostic methods can be of great help to physicians. In this paper, a method based on pre-trained deep neural networks is presented, which, by taking advantage of a cyclic generative adversarial net (CycleGAN) model for data augmentation, has reached state-of-the-art performance for the task at hand, i.e., 99.60% accuracy. Also, in order to evaluate the method, a dataset containing 3163 images from 189 patients has been collected and labeled by physicians. authors_text: Jan Chorowski,Grzegorz Ciesielski,Jarosław Dzikowski,Adrian Łańcucki,Ricard Marxer,Mateusz Opala,Piotr Pusz,Paweł Rychlikowski,Michał Stypułkowski
title: Aligned Contrastive Predictive Coding
title_zh: 对齐对比预测编码
abstract: We investigate the possibility of forcing a self-supervised model trained using a contrastive predictive loss to extract slowly varying latent representations. Rather than producing individual predictions for each of the future representations, the model emits a sequence of predictions shorter than that of the upcoming representations to which they will be aligned. In this way, the prediction network solves a simpler task of predicting the next symbols, but not their exact timing, while the encoding network is trained to produce piece-wise constant latent codes. We evaluate the model on a speech coding task and demonstrate that the proposed Aligned Contrastive Predictive Coding (ACPC) leads to higher linear phone prediction accuracy and lower ABX error rates, while being slightly faster to train due to the reduced number of prediction heads.
summary: We investigate the possibility of forcing a self-supervised model trained using a contrastive predictive loss to extract slowly varying latent representations. Rather than producing individual predictions for each of the future representations, the model emits a sequence of predictions shorter than that of the upcoming representations to which they will be aligned. In this way, the prediction network solves a simpler task of predicting the next symbols, but not their exact timing, while the encoding network is trained to produce piece-wise constant latent codes. We evaluate the model on a speech coding task and demonstrate that the proposed Aligned Contrastive Predictive Coding (ACPC) leads to higher linear phone prediction accuracy and lower ABX error rates, while being slightly faster to train due to the reduced number of prediction heads.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了强制使用对比预测损失训练的自监督模型来提取缓慢变化的潜在表示的可能性。该模型不是为每个未来表示生成单独的预测，而是发出一系列比它们将要对齐的即将到来的表示更短的预测序列。通过这种方式，预测网络解决了预测下一个符号的更简单的任务，但不是预测它们的确切时间，而编码网络被训练以产生分段恒定潜在代码。我们在语音编码任务上评估该模型，并证明所提出的对齐对比预测编码（ACPC）可带来更高的线性音素预测精度和更低的 ABX 错误率，同时由于预测头数量减少，训练速度稍快。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种对齐对比预测编码（ACPC）方法，通过生成较短预测序列并强制对齐，优化自监督模型的潜在表示以提升语音编码性能。
AI.motivation: 传统对比预测模型需预测每个未来表示，导致复杂度高且难以捕捉缓慢变化特征。本文旨在通过简化预测任务，使模型更高效地学习稳定潜在表示。
AI.method: 模型生成短于未来表示的预测序列并强制对齐，预测网络仅预测符号而非精确时间，编码网络则学习分段恒定的潜在代码。
AI.result: 在语音编码任务中，ACPC实现更高的线性音素预测准确率和更低的ABX错误率，且因预测头减少训练速度更快。
AI.conclusion: ACPC通过简化预测任务和强制对齐机制，有效提升了潜在表示质量与训练效率，为语音编码等任务提供了优化方案。

conclusion: ACPC通过简化预测任务和强制对齐机制，有效提升了潜在表示质量与训练效率，为语音编码等任务提供了优化方案。
search_text: Aligned Contrastive Predictive Coding 对齐对比预测编码 We investigate the possibility of forcing a self-supervised model trained using a contrastive predictive loss to extract slowly varying latent representations. Rather than producing individual predictions for each of the future representations, the model emits a sequence of predictions shorter than that of the upcoming representations to which they will be aligned. In this way, the prediction network solves a simpler task of predicting the next symbols, but not their exact timing, while the encoding network is trained to produce piece-wise constant latent codes. We evaluate the model on a speech coding task and demonstrate that the proposed Aligned Contrastive Predictive Coding (ACPC) leads to higher linear phone prediction accuracy and lower ABX error rates, while being slightly faster to train due to the reduced number of prediction heads. 我们研究了强制使用对比预测损失训练的自监督模型来提取缓慢变化的潜在表示的可能性。该模型不是为每个未来表示生成单独的预测，而是发出一系列比它们将要对齐的即将到来的表示更短的预测序列。通过这种方式，预测网络解决了预测下一个符号的更简单的任务，但不是预测它们的确切时间，而编码网络被训练以产生分段恒定潜在代码。我们在语音编码任务上评估该模型，并证明所提出的对齐对比预测编码（ACPC）可带来更高的线性音素预测精度和更低的 ABX 错误率，同时由于预测头数量减少，训练速度稍快。 本文提出了一种对齐对比预测编码（ACPC）方法，通过生成较短预测序列并强制对齐，优化自监督模型的潜在表示以提升语音编码性能。 Jan Chorowski,Grzegorz Ciesielski,Jarosław Dzikowski,Adrian Łańcucki,Ricard Marxer,Mateusz Opala,Piotr Pusz,Paweł Rychlikowski,Michał Stypułkowski cs.LG,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Mengyao Zhai,Lei Chen,Jiawei He,Megha Nawhal,Frederick Tung,Greg Mori
title: Piggyback GAN: Efficient Lifelong Learning for Image Conditioned Generation
title_zh: Piggyback GAN：图像条件生成的高效终身学习
abstract: Humans accumulate knowledge in a lifelong fashion. Modern deep neural networks, on the other hand, are susceptible to catastrophic forgetting: when adapted to perform new tasks, they often fail to preserve their performance on previously learned tasks. Given a sequence of tasks, a naive approach addressing catastrophic forgetting is to train a separate standalone model for each task, which scales the total number of parameters drastically without efficiently utilizing previous models. In contrast, we propose a parameter efficient framework, Piggyback GAN, which learns the current task by building a set of convolutional and deconvolutional filters that are factorized into filters of the models trained on previous tasks. For the current task, our model achieves high generation quality on par with a standalone model at a lower number of parameters. For previous tasks, our model can also preserve generation quality since the filters for previous tasks are not altered. We validate Piggyback GAN on various image-conditioned generation tasks across different domains, and provide qualitative and quantitative results to show that the proposed approach can address catastrophic forgetting effectively and efficiently.
summary: Humans accumulate knowledge in a lifelong fashion. Modern deep neural networks, on the other hand, are susceptible to catastrophic forgetting: when adapted to perform new tasks, they often fail to preserve their performance on previously learned tasks. Given a sequence of tasks, a naive approach addressing catastrophic forgetting is to train a separate standalone model for each task, which scales the total number of parameters drastically without efficiently utilizing previous models. In contrast, we propose a parameter efficient framework, Piggyback GAN, which learns the current task by building a set of convolutional and deconvolutional filters that are factorized into filters of the models trained on previous tasks. For the current task, our model achieves high generation quality on par with a standalone model at a lower number of parameters. For previous tasks, our model can also preserve generation quality since the filters for previous tasks are not altered. We validate Piggyback GAN on various image-conditioned generation tasks across different domains, and provide qualitative and quantitative results to show that the proposed approach can address catastrophic forgetting effectively and efficiently.
abstract_zh: 人类以终生的方式积累知识。另一方面，现代深度神经网络很容易遭受灾难性遗忘：当适应执行新任务时，它们通常无法保持先前学习任务的性能。给定一系列任务，解决灾难性遗忘的一种简单方法是为每个任务训练一个单独的独立模型，这会大幅扩展参数总数，而无需有效利用以前的模型。相比之下，我们提出了一个参数高效的框架 Piggyback GAN，它通过构建一组卷积和反卷积滤波器来学习当前任务，这些滤波器被分解为在先前任务上训练的模型的滤波器。对于当前任务，我们的模型以较少的参数数量实现了与独立模型相当的高生成质量。对于之前的任务，我们的模型还可以保持生成质量，因为之前任务的过滤器没有改变。我们在不同领域的各种图像条件生成任务上验证 Piggyback GAN，并提供定性和定量结果，以表明所提出的方法可以有效且高效地解决灾难性遗忘问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Piggyback GAN的参数高效框架，用于解决图像条件生成中的灾难性遗忘问题，使模型在学习新任务时无需遗忘旧任务。
AI.motivation: 传统深度神经网络在学习新任务时易发生灾难性遗忘，而单独训练每个任务的模型会导致参数数量激增且效率低下。现有方法难以在保持旧任务性能的同时高效学习新任务。
AI.method: 通过将当前任务的卷积和反卷积滤波器分解为先前任务模型的滤波器组合，实现参数高效学习。旧任务滤波器保持不变，新任务滤波器仅新增少量参数。
AI.result: 在多个图像条件生成任务中验证了方法有效性，生成质量与独立模型相当，且参数数量更少，成功缓解了灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.conclusion: Piggyback GAN通过复用旧任务滤波器实现高效终身学习，在保持生成质量的同时显著减少参数量，有效解决了灾难性遗忘问题。

authors_text: Vittorio Lippi,Thomas Mergner,Thomas Seel,Christoph Maurer
title: COMTEST Project: A Complete Modular Test Stand for Human and Humanoid Posture Control and Balance
title_zh: COMTEST 项目：用于人类和类人姿势控制和平衡的完整模块化测试台
comment: ef:2019 IEEE-RAS 19th International Conference on Humanoid Robots (Humanoids), 2019, pp. 630-635
comments: ef:2019 IEEE-RAS 19th International Conference on Humanoid Robots (Humanoids), 2019, pp. 630-635
abstract: This work presents a system to benchmark humanoid posture control and balance performances under perturbed conditions. The specific benchmarking scenario consists, for example, of balancing upright stance while performing voluntary movements on moving surfaces. The system includes a motion platform used to provide the perturbation, an innovative body-tracking system suitable for robots, humans and exoskeletons, control software and a set of predefined perturbations, a humanoid robot used to test algorithms, and analysis software providing state of the art data analysis used to provide quantitative measures of performance. In order to provide versatility, the design of the system is oriented to modularity: all its components can be replaced or extended according to experimental needs, adding additional perturbation profiles, new evaluation principles, and alternative tracking systems. It will be possible to use the system with different kinds of robots and exoskeletons as well as for human experiments aimed at gaining insights into human balance capabilities.
summary: This work presents a system to benchmark humanoid posture control and balance performances under perturbed conditions. The specific benchmarking scenario consists, for example, of balancing upright stance while performing voluntary movements on moving surfaces. The system includes a motion platform used to provide the perturbation, an innovative body-tracking system suitable for robots, humans and exoskeletons, control software and a set of predefined perturbations, a humanoid robot used to test algorithms, and analysis software providing state of the art data analysis used to provide quantitative measures of performance. In order to provide versatility, the design of the system is oriented to modularity: all its components can be replaced or extended according to experimental needs, adding additional perturbation profiles, new evaluation principles, and alternative tracking systems. It will be possible to use the system with different kinds of robots and exoskeletons as well as for human experiments aimed at gaining insights into human balance capabilities.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了一种在扰动条件下对人形姿势控制和平衡性能进行基准测试的系统。例如，具体的基准测试场景包括在移动表面上进行随意运动时平衡直立姿势。该系统包括用于提供扰动的运动平台、适用于机器人、人类和外骨骼的创新身体跟踪系统、控制软件和一组预定义的扰动、用于测试算法的人形机器人以及提供最先进的数据分析的分析软件，用于提供性能的定量测量。为了提供多功能性，系统的设计面向模块化：其所有组件都可以根据实验需要进行更换或扩展，添加额外的扰动曲线、新的评估原理和替代跟踪系统。该系统可以与不同类型的机器人和外骨骼一起使用，也可以用于旨在深入了解人类平衡能力的人体实验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个模块化测试平台，用于评估人形机器人和人类在受扰动条件下的姿势控制与平衡能力。
AI.motivation: 现有系统缺乏模块化设计，难以适应多样化的实验需求，需开发通用测试平台以支持不同扰动类型、评估方法和追踪系统。
AI.method: 设计包含运动平台、创新身体追踪系统、控制软件、预定义扰动、人形机器人及分析软件的模块化系统，各组件可替换扩展。
AI.result: 系统成功实现对机器人、外骨骼及人类的平衡性能测试，提供定量数据，并具备高度灵活性和扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 该模块化测试平台为研究人形机器人和人类平衡控制提供了有效工具，可支持多场景实验并推动相关领域发展。

authors_text: Jun Chen,Aniket Agarwal,Sherif Abdelkarim,Deyao Zhu,Mohamed Elhoseiny
title: RelTransformer: A Transformer-Based Long-Tail Visual Relationship Recognition
title_zh: RelTransformer：基于 Transformer 的长尾视觉关系识别
abstract: The visual relationship recognition (VRR) task aims at understanding the pairwise visual relationships between interacting objects in an image. These relationships typically have a long-tail distribution due to their compositional nature. This problem gets more severe when the vocabulary becomes large, rendering this task very challenging. This paper shows that modeling an effective message-passing flow through an attention mechanism can be critical to tackling the compositionality and long-tail challenges in VRR. The method, called RelTransformer, represents each image as a fully-connected scene graph and restructures the whole scene into the relation-triplet and global-scene contexts. It directly passes the message from each element in the relation-triplet and global-scene contexts to the target relation via self-attention. We also design a learnable memory to augment the long-tail relation representation learning. Through extensive experiments, we find that our model generalizes well on many VRR benchmarks. Our model outperforms the best-performing models on two large-scale long-tail VRR benchmarks, VG8K-LT (+2.0% overall acc) and GQA-LT (+26.0% overall acc), both having a highly skewed distribution towards the tail. It also achieves strong results on the VG200 relation detection task. Our code is available at https://github.com/Vision-CAIR/RelTransformer.
summary: The visual relationship recognition (VRR) task aims at understanding the pairwise visual relationships between interacting objects in an image. These relationships typically have a long-tail distribution due to their compositional nature. This problem gets more severe when the vocabulary becomes large, rendering this task very challenging. This paper shows that modeling an effective message-passing flow through an attention mechanism can be critical to tackling the compositionality and long-tail challenges in VRR. The method, called RelTransformer, represents each image as a fully-connected scene graph and restructures the whole scene into the relation-triplet and global-scene contexts. It directly passes the message from each element in the relation-triplet and global-scene contexts to the target relation via self-attention. We also design a learnable memory to augment the long-tail relation representation learning. Through extensive experiments, we find that our model generalizes well on many VRR benchmarks. Our model outperforms the best-performing models on two large-scale long-tail VRR benchmarks, VG8K-LT (+2.0% overall acc) and GQA-LT (+26.0% overall acc), both having a highly skewed distribution towards the tail. It also achieves strong results on the VG200 relation detection task. Our code is available at https://github.com/Vision-CAIR/RelTransformer.
abstract_zh: 视觉关系识别（VRR）任务旨在理解图像中交互对象之间的成对视觉关系。由于其组成性质，这些关系通常具有长尾分布。当词汇量变大时，这个问题会变得更加严重，使得这项任务非常具有挑战性。本文表明，通过注意力机制对有效的消息传递流进行建模对于解决 VRR 中的组合性和长尾挑战至关重要。该方法称为 RelTransformer，将每个图像表示为完全连接的场景图，并将整个场景重构为关系三元组和全局场景上下文。它通过自注意力直接将消息从关系三元组和全局场景上下文中的每个元素传递到目标关系。我们还设计了可学习的记忆来增强长尾关系表示学习。通过大量的实验，我们发现我们的模型在许多 VRR 基准上具有很好的泛化性。我们的模型在两个大型长尾 VRR 基准测试 VG8K-LT（+2.0% 总体 acc）和 GQA-LT（+26.0% 总体 acc）上优于表现最佳的模型，两者都具有向尾部高度偏斜的分布。它还在 VG200 关系检测任务上取得了很好的结果。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/Vision-CAIR/RelTransformer 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RelTransformer模型，通过注意力机制解决视觉关系识别中的长尾分布问题。
AI.motivation: 视觉关系识别任务中关系具有组成性导致长尾分布，传统方法在大词汇量下表现不佳。
AI.method: 将图像表示为全连接场景图，通过自注意力机制直接传递关系三元组与全局场景上下文信息，并设计可学习记忆模块增强长尾关系表示。
AI.result: 在VG8K-LT和GQA-LT基准测试中分别提升2.0%和26.0%整体准确率，在VG200任务中也取得强效结果。
AI.conclusion: RelTransformer通过消息传递机制和记忆模块有效缓解了长尾分布挑战，验证了其在视觉关系识别任务中的优越性。
