search_text: RelTransformer: A Transformer-Based Long-Tail Visual Relationship Recognition RelTransformer：基于 Transformer 的长尾视觉关系识别 The visual relationship recognition (VRR) task aims at understanding the pairwise visual relationships between interacting objects in an image. These relationships typically have a long-tail distribution due to their compositional nature. This problem gets more severe when the vocabulary becomes large, rendering this task very challenging. This paper shows that modeling an effective message-passing flow through an attention mechanism can be critical to tackling the compositionality and long-tail challenges in VRR. The method, called RelTransformer, represents each image as a fully-connected scene graph and restructures the whole scene into the relation-triplet and global-scene contexts. It directly passes the message from each element in the relation-triplet and global-scene contexts to the target relation via self-attention. We also design a learnable memory to augment the long-tail relation representation learning. Through extensive experiments, we find that our model generalizes well on many VRR benchmarks. Our model outperforms the best-performing models on two large-scale long-tail VRR benchmarks, VG8K-LT (+2.0% overall acc) and GQA-LT (+26.0% overall acc), both having a highly skewed distribution towards the tail. It also achieves strong results on the VG200 relation detection task. Our code is available at https://github.com/Vision-CAIR/RelTransformer. 视觉关系识别（VRR）任务旨在理解图像中交互对象之间的成对视觉关系。由于其组成性质，这些关系通常具有长尾分布。当词汇量变大时，这个问题会变得更加严重，使得这项任务非常具有挑战性。本文表明，通过注意力机制对有效的消息传递流进行建模对于解决 VRR 中的组合性和长尾挑战至关重要。该方法称为 RelTransformer，将每个图像表示为完全连接的场景图，并将整个场景重构为关系三元组和全局场景上下文。它通过自注意力直接将消息从关系三元组和全局场景上下文中的每个元素传递到目标关系。我们还设计了可学习的记忆来增强长尾关系表示学习。通过大量的实验，我们发现我们的模型在许多 VRR 基准上具有很好的泛化性。我们的模型在两个大型长尾 VRR 基准测试 VG8K-LT（+2.0% 总体 acc）和 GQA-LT（+26.0% 总体 acc）上优于表现最佳的模型，两者都具有向尾部高度偏斜的分布。它还在 VG200 关系检测任务上取得了很好的结果。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/Vision-CAIR/RelTransformer 获取。 本文提出RelTransformer模型，通过注意力机制解决视觉关系识别中的长尾分布问题。 Jun Chen,Aniket Agarwal,Sherif Abdelkarim,Deyao Zhu,Mohamed Elhoseiny cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Mengyao Zhai,Ruizhi Deng,Jiacheng Chen,Lei Chen,Zhiwei Deng,Greg Mori
title: Adaptive Appearance Rendering
title_zh: 自适应外观渲染
comment: Accepted to BMVC 2018. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1712.01955
comments: Accepted to BMVC 2018. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1712.01955
abstract: We propose an approach to generate images of people given a desired appearance and pose. Disentangled representations of pose and appearance are necessary to handle the compound variability in the resulting generated images. Hence, we develop an approach based on intermediate representations of poses and appearance: our pose-guided appearance rendering network firstly encodes the targets' poses using an encoder-decoder neural network. Then the targets' appearances are encoded by learning adaptive appearance filters using a fully convolutional network. Finally, these filters are placed in the encoder-decoder neural networks to complete the rendering. We demonstrate that our model can generate images and videos that are superior to state-of-the-art methods, and can handle pose guided appearance rendering in both image and video generation.
summary: We propose an approach to generate images of people given a desired appearance and pose. Disentangled representations of pose and appearance are necessary to handle the compound variability in the resulting generated images. Hence, we develop an approach based on intermediate representations of poses and appearance: our pose-guided appearance rendering network firstly encodes the targets' poses using an encoder-decoder neural network. Then the targets' appearances are encoded by learning adaptive appearance filters using a fully convolutional network. Finally, these filters are placed in the encoder-decoder neural networks to complete the rendering. We demonstrate that our model can generate images and videos that are superior to state-of-the-art methods, and can handle pose guided appearance rendering in both image and video generation.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种方法来生成具有所需外观和姿势的人物图像。姿势和外观的解开表示对于处理生成的图像中的复合变异性是必要的。因此，我们开发了一种基于姿势和外观的中间表示的方法：我们的姿势引导外观渲染网络首先使用编码器-解码器神经网络对目标的姿势进行编码。然后，通过使用全卷积网络学习自适应外观滤波器来对目标的外观进行编码。最后，这些过滤器被放置在编码器-解码器神经网络中以完成渲染。我们证明我们的模型可以生成优于最先进方法的图像和视频，并且可以在图像和视频生成中处理姿势引导的外观渲染。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种生成具有特定外观和姿势的人像图像和视频的方法。
AI.motivation: 生成具有特定外观和姿势的人像需要解耦表示以处理复合变量，现有方法难以有效分离姿态与外观信息。
AI.method: 采用中间表示方法，通过编码器-解码器网络处理姿态，利用全卷积网络学习自适应外观滤波器，并将滤波器整合至网络中完成渲染。
AI.result: 模型在图像和视频生成任务中均优于现有方法，能够有效处理姿态引导的外观渲染。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过解耦姿态与外观表示，实现了高质量的人像生成，验证了中间表示策略的有效性。

authors_text: Furkan Ulger,Seniha Esen Yuksel,Atila Yilmaz
title: Anomaly Detection for Solder Joints Using $β$-VAE
title_zh: 使用 $β$-VAE 进行焊点异常检测
comment: Published in IEEE Transactions on Components, Packaging and Manufacturing Technology
comments: Published in IEEE Transactions on Components, Packaging and Manufacturing Technology
abstract: In the assembly process of printed circuit boards (PCB), most of the errors are caused by solder joints in Surface Mount Devices (SMD). In the literature, traditional feature extraction based methods require designing hand-crafted features and rely on the tiered RGB illumination to detect solder joint errors, whereas the supervised Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) based approaches require a lot of labelled abnormal samples (defective solder joints) to achieve high accuracy. To solve the optical inspection problem in unrestricted environments with no special lighting and without the existence of error-free reference boards, we propose a new beta-Variational Autoencoders (beta-VAE) architecture for anomaly detection that can work on both IC and non-IC components. We show that the proposed model learns disentangled representation of data, leading to more independent features and improved latent space representations. We compare the activation and gradient-based representations that are used to characterize anomalies; and observe the effect of different beta parameters on accuracy and on untwining the feature representations in beta-VAE. Finally, we show that anomalies on solder joints can be detected with high accuracy via a model trained on directly normal samples without designated hardware or feature engineering.
summary: In the assembly process of printed circuit boards (PCB), most of the errors are caused by solder joints in Surface Mount Devices (SMD). In the literature, traditional feature extraction based methods require designing hand-crafted features and rely on the tiered RGB illumination to detect solder joint errors, whereas the supervised Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) based approaches require a lot of labelled abnormal samples (defective solder joints) to achieve high accuracy. To solve the optical inspection problem in unrestricted environments with no special lighting and without the existence of error-free reference boards, we propose a new beta-Variational Autoencoders (beta-VAE) architecture for anomaly detection that can work on both IC and non-IC components. We show that the proposed model learns disentangled representation of data, leading to more independent features and improved latent space representations. We compare the activation and gradient-based representations that are used to characterize anomalies; and observe the effect of different beta parameters on accuracy and on untwining the feature representations in beta-VAE. Finally, we show that anomalies on solder joints can be detected with high accuracy via a model trained on directly normal samples without designated hardware or feature engineering.
abstract_zh: 在印刷电路板（PCB）的组装过程中，大多数错误是由表面贴装器件（SMD）中的焊点引起的。在文献中，传统的基于特征提取的方法需要设计手工制作的特征并依靠分层RGB照明来检测焊点错误，而基于监督卷积神经网络（CNN）的方法需要大量标记的异常样本（有缺陷的焊点）才能实现高精度。为了解决没有特殊照明且不存在无差错参考板的不受限制环境中的光学检查问题，我们提出了一种新的 beta 变分自动编码器 (beta-VAE) 架构，用于异常检测，可以在 IC 和非 IC 组件上工作。我们表明，所提出的模型学习了数据的解缠结表示，从而产生更多独立的特征并改进了潜在空间表示。我们比较用于表征异常的激活表示和基于梯度的表示；并观察不同 beta 参数对准确性以及 beta-VAE 中特征表示解开的影响。最后，我们表明，可以通过直接在正常样本上训练的模型来高精度检测焊点异常，而无需指定硬件或特征工程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于β-VAE的焊点异常检测方法，解决传统方法依赖手工特征和特定照明、监督CNN需要大量标注异常样本的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统焊点缺陷检测方法依赖人工设计特征和特殊照明条件，且监督学习需大量标注异常样本，难以适应无特殊照明和无参考板的实际场景。
AI.method: 设计β-VAE架构学习数据解缠表示，通过比较激活值与梯度表示表征异常，并分析不同β参数对特征解耦与检测精度的影响。
AI.result: 模型仅使用正常样本训练即可在无特殊硬件和特征工程条件下，实现对焊点异常的高精度检测。
AI.conclusion: β-VAE能有效学习独立特征表征，无需标注异常数据即可完成IC及非IC组件的焊点缺陷检测，具有实际应用价值。

conclusion: β-VAE能有效学习独立特征表征，无需标注异常数据即可完成IC及非IC组件的焊点缺陷检测，具有实际应用价值。
search_text: Anomaly Detection for Solder Joints Using $β$-VAE 使用 $β$-VAE 进行焊点异常检测 In the assembly process of printed circuit boards (PCB), most of the errors are caused by solder joints in Surface Mount Devices (SMD). In the literature, traditional feature extraction based methods require designing hand-crafted features and rely on the tiered RGB illumination to detect solder joint errors, whereas the supervised Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) based approaches require a lot of labelled abnormal samples (defective solder joints) to achieve high accuracy. To solve the optical inspection problem in unrestricted environments with no special lighting and without the existence of error-free reference boards, we propose a new beta-Variational Autoencoders (beta-VAE) architecture for anomaly detection that can work on both IC and non-IC components. We show that the proposed model learns disentangled representation of data, leading to more independent features and improved latent space representations. We compare the activation and gradient-based representations that are used to characterize anomalies; and observe the effect of different beta parameters on accuracy and on untwining the feature representations in beta-VAE. Finally, we show that anomalies on solder joints can be detected with high accuracy via a model trained on directly normal samples without designated hardware or feature engineering. 在印刷电路板（PCB）的组装过程中，大多数错误是由表面贴装器件（SMD）中的焊点引起的。在文献中，传统的基于特征提取的方法需要设计手工制作的特征并依靠分层RGB照明来检测焊点错误，而基于监督卷积神经网络（CNN）的方法需要大量标记的异常样本（有缺陷的焊点）才能实现高精度。为了解决没有特殊照明且不存在无差错参考板的不受限制环境中的光学检查问题，我们提出了一种新的 beta 变分自动编码器 (beta-VAE) 架构，用于异常检测，可以在 IC 和非 IC 组件上工作。我们表明，所提出的模型学习了数据的解缠结表示，从而产生更多独立的特征并改进了潜在空间表示。我们比较用于表征异常的激活表示和基于梯度的表示；并观察不同 beta 参数对准确性以及 beta-VAE 中特征表示解开的影响。最后，我们表明，可以通过直接在正常样本上训练的模型来高精度检测焊点异常，而无需指定硬件或特征工程。 本文提出基于β-VAE的焊点异常检测方法，解决传统方法依赖手工特征和特定照明、监督CNN需要大量标注异常样本的问题。 Furkan Ulger,Seniha Esen Yuksel,Atila Yilmaz cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Helge Spieker
title: Constraint-Guided Reinforcement Learning: Augmenting the Agent-Environment-Interaction
title_zh: 约束引导强化学习：增强智能体-环境交互
abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) agents have great successes in solving tasks with large observation and action spaces from limited feedback. Still, training the agents is data-intensive and there are no guarantees that the learned behavior is safe and does not violate rules of the environment, which has limitations for the practical deployment in real-world scenarios. This paper discusses the engineering of reliable agents via the integration of deep RL with constraint-based augmentation models to guide the RL agent towards safe behavior. Within the constraints set, the RL agent is free to adapt and explore, such that its effectiveness to solve the given problem is not hindered. However, once the RL agent leaves the space defined by the constraints, the outside models can provide guidance to still work reliably. We discuss integration points for constraint guidance within the RL process and perform experiments on two case studies: a strictly constrained card game and a grid world environment with additional combinatorial subgoals. Our results show that constraint-guidance does both provide reliability improvements and safer behavior, as well as accelerated training.
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) agents have great successes in solving tasks with large observation and action spaces from limited feedback. Still, training the agents is data-intensive and there are no guarantees that the learned behavior is safe and does not violate rules of the environment, which has limitations for the practical deployment in real-world scenarios. This paper discusses the engineering of reliable agents via the integration of deep RL with constraint-based augmentation models to guide the RL agent towards safe behavior. Within the constraints set, the RL agent is free to adapt and explore, such that its effectiveness to solve the given problem is not hindered. However, once the RL agent leaves the space defined by the constraints, the outside models can provide guidance to still work reliably. We discuss integration points for constraint guidance within the RL process and perform experiments on two case studies: a strictly constrained card game and a grid world environment with additional combinatorial subgoals. Our results show that constraint-guidance does both provide reliability improvements and safer behavior, as well as accelerated training.
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）代理在通过有限的反馈解决具有大量观察和行动空间的任务方面取得了巨大成功。尽管如此，训练代理是数据密集型的，并且不能保证学习到的行为是安全的并且不违反环境规则，这对于现实场景中的实际部署具有限制。本文讨论了通过将深度强化学习与基于约束的增强模型相结合来设计可靠的智能体，以指导强化学习智能体采取安全行为。在约束集内，强化学习代理可以自由地适应和探索，从而不会妨碍其解决给定问题的有效性。然而，一旦强化学习代理离开约束定义的空间，外部模型就可以提供指导，使其仍然可靠地工作。我们讨论 RL 过程中约束指导的集成点，并对两个案例研究进行实验：严格约束的纸牌游戏和具有附加组合子目标的网格世界环境。我们的结果表明，约束指导确实可以提供可靠性改进和更安全的行为，以及加速训练。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合约束引导的强化学习方法，通过集成深度强化学习与约束增强模型，确保智能体在安全范围内探索并提升可靠性。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习在数据效率和行为安全性方面存在不足，难以满足现实场景中对安全性和规则遵循的严格要求。
AI.method: 将约束条件嵌入强化学习框架，在约束范围内允许智能体自由探索，超出约束时通过外部模型提供安全引导，并在卡牌游戏和网格世界环境中验证方法。
AI.result: 实验表明约束引导机制有效提升了智能体的安全性、可靠性，并加速了训练过程。
AI.conclusion: 约束引导强化学习能够在保证安全性的前提下提高智能体性能，为现实场景部署提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Christos K. Verginis,Dimos V. Dimarogonas,Lydia E. Kavraki
title: KDF: Kinodynamic Motion Planning via Geometric Sampling-based Algorithms and Funnel Control
title_zh: KDF：通过基于几何采样的算法和漏斗控制进行运动动力学运动规划
abstract: We integrate sampling-based planning techniques with funnel-based feedback control to develop KDF, a new framework for solving the kinodynamic motion-planning problem via funnel control. The considered systems evolve subject to complex, nonlinear, and uncertain dynamics (aka differential constraints). Firstly, we use a geometric planner to obtain a high-level safe path in a user-defined extended free space. Secondly, we develop a low-level funnel control algorithm that guarantees safe tracking of the path by the system. Neither the planner nor the control algorithm use information on the underlying dynamics of the system, which makes the proposed scheme easily distributable to a large variety of different systems and scenarios. Intuitively, the funnel control module is able to implicitly accommodate the dynamics of the system, allowing hence the deployment of purely geometrical motion planners. Extensive computer simulations and experimental results with a 6-DOF robotic arm validate the proposed approach.
summary: We integrate sampling-based planning techniques with funnel-based feedback control to develop KDF, a new framework for solving the kinodynamic motion-planning problem via funnel control. The considered systems evolve subject to complex, nonlinear, and uncertain dynamics (aka differential constraints). Firstly, we use a geometric planner to obtain a high-level safe path in a user-defined extended free space. Secondly, we develop a low-level funnel control algorithm that guarantees safe tracking of the path by the system. Neither the planner nor the control algorithm use information on the underlying dynamics of the system, which makes the proposed scheme easily distributable to a large variety of different systems and scenarios. Intuitively, the funnel control module is able to implicitly accommodate the dynamics of the system, allowing hence the deployment of purely geometrical motion planners. Extensive computer simulations and experimental results with a 6-DOF robotic arm validate the proposed approach.
abstract_zh: 我们将基于采样的规划技术与基于漏斗的反馈控制相结合，开发了 KDF，这是一种通过漏斗控制解决运动动力学运动规划问题的新框架。所考虑的系统的演化受到复杂、非线性和不确定的动力学（又称微分约束）的影响。首先，我们使用几何规划器在用户定义的扩展自由空间中获得高级安全路径。其次，我们开发了一种低级漏斗控制算法，保证系统对路径的安全跟踪。规划器和控制算法都不使用有关系统底层动态的信息，这使得所提出的方案可以轻松分发到各种不同的系统和场景。直观地说，漏斗控制模块能够隐式地适应系统的动态，从而允许部署纯几何运动规划器。广泛的计算机模拟和六自由度机械臂的实验结果验证了所提出的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出KDF框架，结合几何采样规划与漏斗控制，解决具有复杂非线性动态约束的运动规划问题。
AI.motivation: 传统运动规划方法难以处理复杂动态约束，且需依赖系统动力学信息，限制了通用性与适应性。
AI.method: 分两阶段实现：1）几何规划器生成扩展自由空间中的安全路径；2）漏斗控制算法实现路径跟踪，无需系统动力学信息。
AI.result: 6自由度机械臂的仿真与实验验证了方法的有效性，证明其在复杂动态环境下的安全性与适应性。
AI.conclusion: KDF通过解耦规划与控制模块，实现了无需动力学信息的通用运动规划，为多场景应用提供了新思路。

Verginis,Dimos V. Dimarogonas,Lydia E. Kavraki cs.RO

authors_text: Natalia Díaz-Rodríguez,Alberto Lamas,Jules Sanchez,Gianni Franchi,Ivan Donadello,Siham Tabik,David Filliat,Policarpo Cruz,Rosana Montes,Francisco Herrera
title: EXplainable Neural-Symbolic Learning (X-NeSyL) methodology to fuse deep learning representations with expert knowledge graphs: the MonuMAI cultural heritage use case
title_zh: 可解释的神经符号学习 (X-NeSyL) 方法将深度学习表示与专家知识图融合：MonuMAI 文化遗产用例
abstract: The latest Deep Learning (DL) models for detection and classification have achieved an unprecedented performance over classical machine learning algorithms. However, DL models are black-box methods hard to debug, interpret, and certify. DL alone cannot provide explanations that can be validated by a non technical audience. In contrast, symbolic AI systems that convert concepts into rules or symbols -- such as knowledge graphs -- are easier to explain. However, they present lower generalisation and scaling capabilities. A very important challenge is to fuse DL representations with expert knowledge. One way to address this challenge, as well as the performance-explainability trade-off is by leveraging the best of both streams without obviating domain expert knowledge. We tackle such problem by considering the symbolic knowledge is expressed in form of a domain expert knowledge graph. We present the eXplainable Neural-symbolic learning (X-NeSyL) methodology, designed to learn both symbolic and deep representations, together with an explainability metric to assess the level of alignment of machine and human expert explanations. The ultimate objective is to fuse DL representations with expert domain knowledge during the learning process to serve as a sound basis for explainability. X-NeSyL methodology involves the concrete use of two notions of explanation at inference and training time respectively: 1) EXPLANet: Expert-aligned eXplainable Part-based cLAssifier NETwork Architecture, a compositional CNN that makes use of symbolic representations, and 2) SHAP-Backprop, an explainable AI-informed training procedure that guides the DL process to align with such symbolic representations in form of knowledge graphs. We showcase X-NeSyL methodology using MonuMAI dataset for monument facade image classification, and demonstrate that our approach improves explainability and performance.
summary: The latest Deep Learning (DL) models for detection and classification have achieved an unprecedented performance over classical machine learning algorithms. However, DL models are black-box methods hard to debug, interpret, and certify. DL alone cannot provide explanations that can be validated by a non technical audience. We tackle such problem by considering the symbolic knowledge is expressed in form of a domain expert knowledge graph. We present the eXplainable Neural-symbolic learning (X-NeSyL) methodology, designed to learn both symbolic and deep representations, together with an explainability metric to assess the level of alignment of machine and human expert explanations. The ultimate objective is to fuse DL representations with expert domain knowledge during the learning process to serve as a sound basis for explainability. X-NeSyL methodology involves the concrete use of two notions of explanation at inference and training time respectively: 1) EXPLANet: Expert-aligned eXplainable Part-based cLAssifier NETwork Architecture, a compositional CNN that makes use of symbolic representations, and 2) SHAP-Backprop, an explainable AI-informed training procedure that guides the DL process to align with such symbolic representations in form of knowledge graphs. We showcase X-NeSyL methodology using MonuMAI dataset for monument facade image classification, and demonstrate that our approach improves explainability and performance.
abstract_zh: 用于检测和分类的最新深度学习 (DL) 模型比经典机器学习算法取得了前所未有的性能。然而，深度学习模型是难以调试、解释和验证的黑盒方法。深度学习本身无法提供可由非技术受众验证的解释。相比之下，将概念转换为规则或符号的符号人工智能系统（例如知识图）更容易解释。然而，它们的泛化和扩展能力较低。一个非常重要的挑战是将深度学习表示与专家知识融合。应对这一挑战以及性能与可解释性权衡的一种方法是在不放弃领域专家知识的情况下充分利用这两个流的优点。我们通过考虑以领域专家知识图的形式表达符号知识来解决这个问题。我们提出了可解释的神经符号学习（X-NeSyL）方法，旨在学习符号和深度表示，以及可解释性指标，以评估机器和人类专家解释的一致性水平。最终目标是在学习过程中将深度学习表示与专家领域知识融合，为可解释性奠定坚实的基础。 X-NeSyL 方法分别涉及推理和训练时两个解释概念的具体使用：1）EXPLANet：专家对齐的可解释的基于部分的分类器网络架构，一种使用符号表示的组合 CNN；2）SHAP-Backprop，一种可解释的人工智能训练程序，指导 DL 过程以知识图的形式与此类符号表示保持一致。我们展示了使用 MonuMAI 数据集进行纪念碑立面图像分类的 X-NeSyL 方法，并证明我们的方法提高了可解释性和性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可解释的神经符号学习方法（X-NeSyL），通过融合深度学习表示与专家知识图谱，提升模型的可解释性与性能。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型虽性能优异，但缺乏可解释性；符号AI虽易解释，但泛化能力不足。需融合两者以兼顾性能与可解释性。
AI.method: X-NeSyL方法包含两个核心部分：1) EXPLANet（基于符号表示的组合CNN分类器）；2) SHAP-Backprop（引导深度学习与知识图谱对齐的训练机制）。
AI.result: 在MonuMAI文化遗产数据集上的实验表明，该方法在提升模型性能的同时显著增强了可解释性。
AI.conclusion: X-NeSyL通过融合深度学习与专家知识图谱，为复杂任务提供了兼具性能与可解释性的解决方案。

search_text: EXplainable Neural-Symbolic Learning (X-NeSyL) methodology to fuse deep learning representations with expert knowledge graphs: the MonuMAI cultural heritage use case 可解释的神经符号学习 (X-NeSyL) 方法将深度学习表示与专家知识图融合：MonuMAI 文化遗产用例 The latest Deep Learning (DL) models for detection and classification have achieved an unprecedented performance over classical machine learning algorithms. However, DL models are black-box methods hard to debug, interpret, and certify. DL alone cannot provide explanations that can be validated by a non technical audience. In contrast, symbolic AI systems that convert concepts into rules or symbols -- such as knowledge graphs -- are easier to explain. However, they present lower generalisation and scaling capabilities. A very important challenge is to fuse DL representations with expert knowledge. One way to address this challenge, as well as the performance-explainability trade-off is by leveraging the best of both streams without obviating domain expert knowledge. We tackle such problem by considering the symbolic knowledge is expressed in form of a domain expert knowledge graph. We present the eXplainable Neural-symbolic learning (X-NeSyL) methodology, designed to learn both symbolic and deep representations, together with an explainability metric to assess the level of alignment of machine and human expert explanations. The ultimate objective is to fuse DL representations with expert domain knowledge during the learning process to serve as a sound basis for explainability. X-NeSyL methodology involves the concrete use of two notions of explanation at inference and training time respectively: 1) EXPLANet: Expert-aligned eXplainable Part-based cLAssifier NETwork Architecture, a compositional CNN that makes use of symbolic representations, and 2) SHAP-Backprop, an explainable AI-informed training procedure that guides the DL process to align with such symbolic representations in form of knowledge graphs. We showcase X-NeSyL methodology using MonuMAI dataset for monument facade image classification, and demonstrate that our approach improves explainability and performance. 用于检测和分类的最新深度学习 (DL) 模型比经典机器学习算法取得了前所未有的性能。然而，深度学习模型是难以调试、解释和验证的黑盒方法。深度学习本身无法提供可由非技术受众验证的解释。相比之下，将概念转换为规则或符号的符号人工智能系统（例如知识图）更容易解释。然而，它们的泛化和扩展能力较低。一个非常重要的挑战是将深度学习表示与专家知识融合。应对这一挑战以及性能与可解释性权衡的一种方法是在不放弃领域专家知识的情况下充分利用这两个流的优点。我们通过考虑以领域专家知识图的形式表达符号知识来解决这个问题。我们提出了可解释的神经符号学习（X-NeSyL）方法，旨在学习符号和深度表示，以及可解释性指标，以评估机器和人类专家解释的一致性水平。最终目标是在学习过程中将深度学习表示与专家领域知识融合，为可解释性奠定坚实的基础。 X-NeSyL 方法分别涉及推理和训练时两个解释概念的具体使用：1）EXPLANet：专家对齐的可解释的基于部分的分类器网络架构，一种使用符号表示的组合 CNN；2）SHAP-Backprop，一种可解释的人工智能训练程序，指导 DL 过程以知识图的形式与此类符号表示保持一致。我们展示了使用 MonuMAI 数据集进行纪念碑立面图像分类的 X-NeSyL 方法，并证明我们的方法提高了可解释性和性能。 本文提出了一种可解释的神经符号学习方法（X-NeSyL），通过融合深度学习表示与专家知识图谱，提升模型的可解释性与性能。 Natalia Díaz-Rodríguez,Alberto Lamas,Jules Sanchez,Gianni Franchi,Ivan Donadello,Siham Tabik,David Filliat,Policarpo Cruz,Rosana Montes,Francisco Herrera cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.SC

authors_text: Xudong Lv,Boya Wang,Ziwen Dou,Dong Ye,Shuo Wang
title: CFNet: LiDAR-Camera Registration Using Calibration Flow Network
title_zh: CFNet：使用校准流网络进行 LiDAR 相机注册
abstract: As an essential procedure of data fusion, LiDAR-camera calibration is critical for autonomous vehicles and robot navigation. Most calibration methods rely on hand-crafted features and require significant amounts of extracted features or specific calibration targets. With the development of deep learning (DL) techniques, some attempts take advantage of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) to regress the 6 degrees of freedom (DOF) extrinsic parameters. Nevertheless, the performance of these DL-based methods is reported to be worse than the non-DL methods. This paper proposed an online LiDAR-camera extrinsic calibration algorithm that combines the DL and the geometry methods. We define a two-channel image named calibration flow to illustrate the deviation from the initial projection to the ground truth. EPnP algorithm within the RANdom SAmple Consensus (RANSAC) scheme is applied to estimate the extrinsic parameters with 2D-3D correspondences constructed by the calibration flow. Experiments on KITTI datasets demonstrate that our proposed method is superior to the state-of-the-art methods. Furthermore, we propose a semantic initialization algorithm with the introduction of instance centroids (ICs). The code will be publicly available at https://github.com/LvXudong-HIT/CFNet.
summary: As an essential procedure of data fusion, LiDAR-camera calibration is critical for autonomous vehicles and robot navigation. Most calibration methods rely on hand-crafted features and require significant amounts of extracted features or specific calibration targets. With the development of deep learning (DL) techniques, some attempts take advantage of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) to regress the 6 degrees of freedom (DOF) extrinsic parameters. Nevertheless, the performance of these DL-based methods is reported to be worse than the non-DL methods. This paper proposed an online LiDAR-camera extrinsic calibration algorithm that combines the DL and the geometry methods. We define a two-channel image named calibration flow to illustrate the deviation from the initial projection to the ground truth. EPnP algorithm within the RANdom SAmple Consensus (RANSAC) scheme is applied to estimate the extrinsic parameters with 2D-3D correspondences constructed by the calibration flow. Experiments on KITTI datasets demonstrate that our proposed method is superior to the state-of-the-art methods. Furthermore, we propose a semantic initialization algorithm with the introduction of instance centroids (ICs). The code will be publicly available at https://github.com/LvXudong-HIT/CFNet.
abstract_zh: 作为数据融合的重要过程，激光雷达相机校准对于自动驾驶车辆和机器人导航至关重要。大多数校准方法依赖于手工制作的特征，并且需要大量提取的特征或特定的校准目标。随着深度学习（DL）技术的发展，一些尝试利用卷积神经网络（CNN）来回归6自由度（DOF）外在参数。然而，据报道，这些基于深度学习的方法的性能比非深度学习方法更差。本文提出了一种结合深度学习和几何方法的在线激光雷达相机外参标定算法。我们定义一个名为校准流的双通道图像来说明从初始投影到地面实况的偏差。 RANdom SAmple Consensus (RANSAC) 方案中的 EPnP 算法用于通过校准流程构建的 2D-3D 对应关系来估计外在参数。 KITTI 数据集上的实验表明，我们提出的方法优于最先进的方法。此外，我们提出了一种引入实例质心（IC）的语义初始化算法。该代码将在 https://github.com/LvXudong-HIT/CFNet 上公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CFNet，一种结合深度学习与几何方法的在线LiDAR-相机外参标定算法，通过校准流图像和语义初始化提升标定精度。
AI.motivation: 传统标定方法依赖手工特征或特定标定目标，深度学习方法标定性能不足，需融合几何方法提升鲁棒性与准确性。
AI.method: 定义双通道校准流图像表征投影偏差，结合RANSAC框架下的EPnP算法估计外参；引入实例中心点进行语义初始化。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集实验中优于现有方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过深度学习与几何方法结合，实现无需手工特征的实时高精度标定，语义初始化进一步提升效果。

authors_text: Qi Wang,Yanling Miao,Mulin Chen,Xuelong Li
title: Spatial-Spectral Clustering with Anchor Graph for Hyperspectral Image
title_zh: 高光谱图像的带有锚图的空间光谱聚类
abstract: Hyperspectral image (HSI) clustering, which aims at dividing hyperspectral pixels into clusters, has drawn significant attention in practical applications. Recently, many graph-based clustering methods, which construct an adjacent graph to model the data relationship, have shown dominant performance. However, the high dimensionality of HSI data makes it hard to construct the pairwise adjacent graph. Besides, abundant spatial structures are often overlooked during the clustering procedure. In order to better handle the high dimensionality problem and preserve the spatial structures, this paper proposes a novel unsupervised approach called spatial-spectral clustering with anchor graph (SSCAG) for HSI data clustering. The SSCAG has the following contributions: 1) the anchor graph-based strategy is used to construct a tractable large graph for HSI data, which effectively exploits all data points and reduces the computational complexity; 2) a new similarity metric is presented to embed the spatial-spectral information into the combined adjacent graph, which can mine the intrinsic property structure of HSI data; 3) an effective neighbors assignment strategy is adopted in the optimization, which performs the singular value decomposition (SVD) on the adjacent graph to get solutions efficiently. Extensive experiments on three public HSI datasets show that the proposed SSCAG is competitive against the state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: Hyperspectral image (HSI) clustering, which aims at dividing hyperspectral pixels into clusters, has drawn significant attention in practical applications. Recently, many graph-based clustering methods, which construct an adjacent graph to model the data relationship, have shown dominant performance. However, the high dimensionality of HSI data makes it hard to construct the pairwise adjacent graph. Besides, abundant spatial structures are often overlooked during the clustering procedure. In order to better handle the high dimensionality problem and preserve the spatial structures, this paper proposes a novel unsupervised approach called spatial-spectral clustering with anchor graph (SSCAG) for HSI data clustering. The SSCAG has the following contributions: 1) the anchor graph-based strategy is used to construct a tractable large graph for HSI data, which effectively exploits all data points and reduces the computational complexity; 2) a new similarity metric is presented to embed the spatial-spectral information into the combined adjacent graph, which can mine the intrinsic property structure of HSI data; 3) an effective neighbors assignment strategy is adopted in the optimization, which performs the singular value decomposition (SVD) on the adjacent graph to get solutions efficiently. Extensive experiments on three public HSI datasets show that the proposed SSCAG is competitive against the state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 高光谱图像（HSI）聚类旨在将高光谱像素划分为簇，在实际应用中引起了广泛关注。最近，许多基于图的聚类方法（构建相邻图来对数据关系进行建模）已显示出主导性能。然而，HSI数据的高维性使得构建两两相邻图变得困难。此外，在聚类过程中，丰富的空间结构经常被忽视。为了更好地处理高维问题并保留空间结构，本文提出了一种用于 HSI 数据聚类的新型无监督方法，称为带有锚图的空间谱聚类（SSCAG）。 SSCAG具有以下贡献：1）基于锚图的策略用于为HSI数据构建易于处理的大图，有效地利用所有数据点并降低计算复杂度； 2）提出了一种新的相似性度量，将空间光谱信息嵌入到组合的相邻图中，可以挖掘HSI数据的内在属性结构； 3）优化中采用有效的邻居分配策略，对相邻图进行奇异值分解（SVD）以有效地获得解。对三个公共 HSI 数据集的广泛实验表明，所提出的 SSCAG 与最先进的方法相比具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于锚图的空间-光谱聚类方法（SSCAG），用于解决高光谱图像聚类中的高维数据处理和空间结构保留问题。
AI.motivation: 传统图聚类方法在处理高光谱图像时面临高维数据计算复杂度高、空间结构信息利用不足的挑战，需改进现有方法以提升聚类效果。
AI.method: 1) 采用锚图策略构建低复杂度的大规模图；2) 设计融合空间-光谱信息的相似度度量；3) 通过SVD优化邻域分配策略。
AI.result: 在三个公开高光谱数据集上实验表明，SSCAG方法在聚类性能上优于现有先进算法。
AI.conclusion: SSCAG方法有效结合了空间结构与光谱信息，通过锚图和优化策略显著提升了高光谱图像聚类的效率和准确性。

search_text: Spatial-Spectral Clustering with Anchor Graph for Hyperspectral Image 高光谱图像的带有锚图的空间光谱聚类 Hyperspectral image (HSI) clustering, which aims at dividing hyperspectral pixels into clusters, has drawn significant attention in practical applications. Recently, many graph-based clustering methods, which construct an adjacent graph to model the data relationship, have shown dominant performance. However, the high dimensionality of HSI data makes it hard to construct the pairwise adjacent graph. Besides, abundant spatial structures are often overlooked during the clustering procedure. In order to better handle the high dimensionality problem and preserve the spatial structures, this paper proposes a novel unsupervised approach called spatial-spectral clustering with anchor graph (SSCAG) for HSI data clustering. The SSCAG has the following contributions: 1) the anchor graph-based strategy is used to construct a tractable large graph for HSI data, which effectively exploits all data points and reduces the computational complexity; 2) a new similarity metric is presented to embed the spatial-spectral information into the combined adjacent graph, which can mine the intrinsic property structure of HSI data; 3) an effective neighbors assignment strategy is adopted in the optimization, which performs the singular value decomposition (SVD) on the adjacent graph to get solutions efficiently. Extensive experiments on three public HSI datasets show that the proposed SSCAG is competitive against the state-of-the-art approaches. 高光谱图像（HSI）聚类旨在将高光谱像素划分为簇，在实际应用中引起了广泛关注。最近，许多基于图的聚类方法（构建相邻图来对数据关系进行建模）已显示出主导性能。然而，HSI数据的高维性使得构建两两相邻图变得困难。此外，在聚类过程中，丰富的空间结构经常被忽视。为了更好地处理高维问题并保留空间结构，本文提出了一种用于 HSI 数据聚类的新型无监督方法，称为带有锚图的空间谱聚类（SSCAG）。 SSCAG具有以下贡献：1）基于锚图的策略用于为HSI数据构建易于处理的大图，有效地利用所有数据点并降低计算复杂度； 2）提出了一种新的相似性度量，将空间光谱信息嵌入到组合的相邻图中，可以挖掘HSI数据的内在属性结构； 3）优化中采用有效的邻居分配策略，对相邻图进行奇异值分解（SVD）以有效地获得解。对三个公共 HSI 数据集的广泛实验表明，所提出的 SSCAG 与最先进的方法相比具有竞争力。 本文提出一种基于锚图的空间-光谱聚类方法（SSCAG），用于解决高光谱图像聚类中的高维数据处理和空间结构保留问题。 Qi Wang,Yanling Miao,Mulin Chen,Xuelong Li cs.CV

authors_text: Jivat Neet Kaur,Yiding Jiang,Paul Pu Liang
title: Ask & Explore: Grounded Question Answering for Curiosity-Driven Exploration
title_zh: 提问与探索：好奇心驱动探索的扎根问答
comment: Accepted at ICLR 2021 Workshop on Embodied Multimodal Learning
comments: Accepted at ICLR 2021 Workshop on Embodied Multimodal Learning
abstract: In many real-world scenarios where extrinsic rewards to the agent are extremely sparse, curiosity has emerged as a useful concept providing intrinsic rewards that enable the agent to explore its environment and acquire information to achieve its goals. Despite their strong performance on many sparse-reward tasks, existing curiosity approaches rely on an overly holistic view of state transitions, and do not allow for a structured understanding of specific aspects of the environment. In this paper, we formulate curiosity based on grounded question answering by encouraging the agent to ask questions about the environment and be curious when the answers to these questions change. We show that natural language questions encourage the agent to uncover specific knowledge about their environment such as the physical properties of objects as well as their spatial relationships with other objects, which serve as valuable curiosity rewards to solve sparse-reward tasks more efficiently.
summary: In many real-world scenarios where extrinsic rewards to the agent are extremely sparse, curiosity has emerged as a useful concept providing intrinsic rewards that enable the agent to explore its environment and acquire information to achieve its goals. Despite their strong performance on many sparse-reward tasks, existing curiosity approaches rely on an overly holistic view of state transitions, and do not allow for a structured understanding of specific aspects of the environment. In this paper, we formulate curiosity based on grounded question answering by encouraging the agent to ask questions about the environment and be curious when the answers to these questions change. We show that natural language questions encourage the agent to uncover specific knowledge about their environment such as the physical properties of objects as well as their spatial relationships with other objects, which serve as valuable curiosity rewards to solve sparse-reward tasks more efficiently.
abstract_zh: 在许多现实世界中，智能体的外在奖励极其稀少，好奇心已成为一个有用的概念，提供内在奖励，使智能体能够探索其环境并获取信息以实现其目标。尽管现有的好奇心方法在许多稀疏奖励任务上表现出色，但它们依赖于对状态转换的过于全面的看法，并且不允许对环境的特定方面进行结构化理解。在本文中，我们通过鼓励智能体提出有关环境的问题并在这些问题的答案发生变化时保持好奇心，来制定基于扎根问答的好奇心。我们表明，自然语言问题鼓励代理发现有关其环境的特定知识，例如物体的物理属性以及它们与其他物体的空间关系，这可以作为有价值的好奇心奖励，以更有效地解决稀疏奖励任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于 grounded question answering 的好奇心驱动探索方法，用于解决稀疏奖励环境下的智能体探索问题。
AI.motivation: 现有好奇心方法依赖整体状态转移视角，无法结构化理解环境细节，导致在稀疏奖励任务中效率不足。
AI.method: 通过让智能体主动提问并关注问题答案的变化作为内在奖励，引导其学习环境中的物理属性与空间关系等结构化知识。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能显著提升智能体在稀疏奖励任务中的探索效率与目标达成能力。
AI.conclusion: 基于自然语言问答的结构化好奇心机制可有效增强智能体对环境的深度理解与探索效率。

authors_text: Tianrui Guan,Jun Wang,Shiyi Lan,Rohan Chandra,Zuxuan Wu,Larry Davis,Dinesh Manocha
title: M3DeTR: Multi-representation, Multi-scale, Mutual-relation 3D Object Detection with Transformers
title_zh: M3DeTR：使用 Transformer 进行多表示、多尺度、相互关系 3D 对象检测
abstract: We present a novel architecture for 3D object detection, M3DeTR, which combines different point cloud representations (raw, voxels, bird-eye view) with different feature scales based on multi-scale feature pyramids. M3DeTR is the first approach that unifies multiple point cloud representations, feature scales, as well as models mutual relationships between point clouds simultaneously using transformers. We perform extensive ablation experiments that highlight the benefits of fusing representation and scale, and modeling the relationships. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on the KITTI 3D object detection dataset and Waymo Open Dataset. Results show that M3DeTR improves the baseline significantly by 1.48% mAP for all classes on Waymo Open Dataset. In particular, our approach ranks 1st on the well-known KITTI 3D Detection Benchmark for both car and cyclist classes, and ranks 1st on Waymo Open Dataset with single frame point cloud input. Our code is available at: https://github.com/rayguan97/M3DETR.
summary: We present a novel architecture for 3D object detection, M3DeTR, which combines different point cloud representations (raw, voxels, bird-eye view) with different feature scales based on multi-scale feature pyramids. M3DeTR is the first approach that unifies multiple point cloud representations, feature scales, as well as models mutual relationships between point clouds simultaneously using transformers. We perform extensive ablation experiments that highlight the benefits of fusing representation and scale, and modeling the relationships. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on the KITTI 3D object detection dataset and Waymo Open Dataset. Results show that M3DeTR improves the baseline significantly by 1.48% mAP for all classes on Waymo Open Dataset. In particular, our approach ranks 1st on the well-known KITTI 3D Detection Benchmark for both car and cyclist classes, and ranks 1st on Waymo Open Dataset with single frame point cloud input. Our code is available at: https://github.com/rayguan97/M3DETR.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的 3D 对象检测架构 M3DeTR，它将不同的点云表示（原始、体素、鸟瞰图）与基于多尺度特征金字塔的不同特征尺度相结合。 M3DeTR 是第一个统一多个点云表示、特征尺度以及使用转换器同时对点云之间的相互关系进行建模的方法。我们进行了广泛的消融实验，突出了融合表示和规模以及对关系进行建模的好处。我们的方法在 KITTI 3D 对象检测数据集和 Waymo 开放数据集上实现了最先进的性能。结果显示，M3DeTR 将 Waymo 开放数据集上所有类别的基线显着提高了 1.48% mAP。特别是，我们的方法在著名的 KITTI 3D 检测基准上针对汽车和自行车类别排名第一，并且在单帧点云输入的 Waymo 开放数据集上排名第一。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/rayguan97/M3DETR。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为M3DeTR的新型3D目标检测架构，通过结合点云的多种表示方式、多尺度特征和相互关系建模，提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有3D目标检测方法通常局限于单一点云表示或尺度，未能充分融合多源信息及点云间的相互关系，限制了检测精度。
AI.method: M3DeTR通过多表示（原始点云、体素、鸟瞰图）、多尺度特征金字塔和Transformer相互关系建模，实现跨模态特征融合与全局关系学习，并通过大量消融实验验证设计有效性。
AI.result: 在KITTI和Waymo数据集上均达到SOTA性能，Waymo数据集上所有类别mAP提升1.48%，KITTI榜单中车辆和骑行者类别排名第一，单帧点云输入下Waymo排名第一。
AI.conclusion: M3DeTR通过统一多表示、多尺度和相互关系建模，显著提升了3D目标检测性能，为后续研究提供了有效框架。

Results show that M3DeTR improves the baseline significantly by 1.48% mAP for all classes on Waymo Open Dataset. In particular, our approach ranks 1st on the well-known KITTI 3D Detection Benchmark for both car and cyclist classes, and ranks 1st on Waymo Open Dataset with single frame point cloud input. Our code is available at: https://github.com/rayguan97/M3DETR. 我们提出了一种新颖的 3D 对象检测架构 M3DeTR，它将不同的点云表示（原始、体素、鸟瞰图）与基于多尺度特征金字塔的不同特征尺度相结合。 M3DeTR 是第一个统一多个点云表示、特征尺度以及使用转换器同时对点云之间的相互关系进行建模的方法。我们进行了广泛的消融实验，突出了融合表示和规模以及对关系进行建模的好处。我们的方法在 KITTI 3D 对象检测数据集和 Waymo 开放数据集上实现了最先进的性能。结果显示，M3DeTR 将 Waymo 开放数据集上所有类别的基线显着提高了 1.48% mAP。特别是，我们的方法在著名的 KITTI 3D 检测基准上针对汽车和自行车类别排名第一，并且在单帧点云输入的 Waymo 开放数据集上排名第一。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/rayguan97/M3DETR。 本文提出了一种名为M3DeTR的新型3D目标检测架构，通过结合点云的多种表示方式、多尺度特征和相互关系建模，提升检测性能。 Tianrui Guan,Jun Wang,Shiyi Lan,Rohan Chandra,Zuxuan Wu,Larry Davis,Dinesh Manocha cs.CV

authors_text: Syed Sahil Abbas Zaidi,Mohammad Samar Ansari,Asra Aslam,Nadia Kanwal,Mamoona Asghar,Brian Lee
title: A Survey of Modern Deep Learning based Object Detection Models
title_zh: 基于现代深度学习的目标检测模型综述
comment: Preprint submitted to IET Computer Vision
comments: Preprint submitted to IET Computer Vision
abstract: Object Detection is the task of classification and localization of objects in an image or video. It has gained prominence in recent years due to its widespread applications. This article surveys recent developments in deep learning based object detectors. Concise overview of benchmark datasets and evaluation metrics used in detection is also provided along with some of the prominent backbone architectures used in recognition tasks. It also covers contemporary lightweight classification models used on edge devices. Lastly, we compare the performances of these architectures on multiple metrics.
summary: Object Detection is the task of classification and localization of objects in an image or video. It has gained prominence in recent years due to its widespread applications. This article surveys recent developments in deep learning based object detectors. Concise overview of benchmark datasets and evaluation metrics used in detection is also provided along with some of the prominent backbone architectures used in recognition tasks. It also covers contemporary lightweight classification models used on edge devices. Lastly, we compare the performances of these architectures on multiple metrics.
abstract_zh: 对象检测是对图像或视频中的对象进行分类和定位的任务。近年来由于其广泛的应用而受到重视。本文调查了基于深度学习的目标检测器的最新发展。还提供了检测中使用的基准数据集和评估指标的简要概述，以及识别任务中使用的一些著名的骨干架构。它还涵盖了边缘设备上使用的当代轻量级分类模型。最后，我们在多个指标上比较这些架构的性能。

AI.tldr: 综述现代基于深度学习的目标检测模型，涵盖数据集、评估指标、骨干网络及轻量模型比较
AI.motivation: 由于目标检测在多个领域的广泛应用，需要系统梳理最新深度学习模型及技术进展
AI.method: 通过文献综述方法，总结主流检测模型、基准数据集、评估指标及轻量级架构，并进行多维度性能比较
AI.result: 系统梳理了主流模型架构，比较了不同模型在多个指标上的性能表现，指出轻量模型在边缘设备上的优势
AI.conclusion: 当前研究聚焦于提升检测精度与效率，未来需在模型压缩和实时性方面进一步优化

authors_text: Ana Kostovska,Diederick Vermetten,Carola Doerr,Sašo Džeroski,Panče Panov,Tome Eftimov
title: OPTION: OPTImization Algorithm Benchmarking ONtology
title_zh: 选项：优化算法基准本体
comment: To appear in the Proceedings of Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference Companion (GECCO 2021), ACM
comments: To appear in the Proceedings of Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference Companion (GECCO 2021), ACM
abstract: Many platforms for benchmarking optimization algorithms offer users the possibility of sharing their experimental data with the purpose of promoting reproducible and reusable research. However, different platforms use different data models and formats, which drastically inhibits identification of relevant data sets, their interpretation, and their interoperability. Consequently, a semantically rich, ontology-based, machine-readable data model is highly desired. We report in this paper on the development of such an ontology, which we name OPTION (OPTImization algorithm benchmarking ONtology). Our ontology provides the vocabulary needed for semantic annotation of the core entities involved in the benchmarking process, such as algorithms, problems, and evaluation measures. It also provides means for automated data integration, improved interoperability, powerful querying capabilities and reasoning, thereby enriching the value of the benchmark data. We demonstrate the utility of OPTION by annotating and querying a corpus of benchmark performance data from the BBOB workshop data - a use case which can be easily extended to cover other benchmarking data collections.
summary: Many platforms for benchmarking optimization algorithms offer users the possibility of sharing their experimental data with the purpose of promoting reproducible and reusable research. However, different platforms use different data models and formats, which drastically inhibits identification of relevant data sets, their interpretation, and their interoperability. Consequently, a semantically rich, ontology-based, machine-readable data model is highly desired. We report in this paper on the development of such an ontology, which we name OPTION (OPTImization algorithm benchmarking ONtology). Our ontology provides the vocabulary needed for semantic annotation of the core entities involved in the benchmarking process, such as algorithms, problems, and evaluation measures. It also provides means for automated data integration, improved interoperability, powerful querying capabilities and reasoning, thereby enriching the value of the benchmark data. We demonstrate the utility of OPTION by annotating and querying a corpus of benchmark performance data from the BBOB workshop data - a use case which can be easily extended to cover other benchmarking data collections.
abstract_zh: 许多基准优化算法平台为用户提供了共享实验数据的可能性，以促进可重复和可重复使用的研究。然而，不同的平台使用不同的数据模型和格式，这极大地抑制了相关数据集的识别、解释和互操作性。因此，非常需要一个语义丰富、基于本体、机器可读的数据模型。我们在本文中报告了这种本体的开发，我们将其命名为 OPTION（OPTImization 算法基准 ONtology）。我们的本体提供了基准测试过程中涉及的核心实体（例如算法、问题和评估措施）的语义注释所需的词汇。它还提供了自动化数据集成、改进的互操作性、强大的查询能力和推理能力的手段，从而丰富了基准数据的价值。我们通过注释和查询来自 BBOB 研讨会数据的基准性能数据集来展示 OPTION 的实用性 - 这是一个可以轻松扩展以涵盖其他基准测试数据集合的用例。

AI.tldr: 本文提出OPTION本体，用于统一优化算法基准测试数据模型，提升数据互操作性和语义表达能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试平台数据模型和格式不统一，导致数据难以识别、解释和跨平台共享。
AI.method: 构建包含算法、问题、评估指标等核心实体的语义本体，支持自动化数据集成与语义查询。
AI.result: 成功标注并查询BBOB研讨会基准数据，验证OPTION在数据整合与跨平台互操作中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: OPTION通过语义丰富性提升基准数据价值，为跨平台数据共享与再利用提供统一框架。

authors_text: Thien-Minh Nguyen,Shenghai Yuan,Muqing Cao,Yang Lyu,Thien Hoang Nguyen,Lihua Xie
title: MILIOM: Tightly Coupled Multi-Input Lidar-Inertia Odometry and Mapping
title_zh: MILIOM：紧耦合多输入激光雷达惯性里程计和测绘
comment: Accepted for IEEE RAL and IROS 2021
comments: Accepted for IEEE RAL and IROS 2021
abstract: In this letter we investigate a tightly coupled Lidar-Inertia Odometry and Mapping (LIOM) scheme, with the capability to incorporate multiple lidars with complementary field of view (FOV). In essence, we devise a time-synchronized scheme to combine extracted features from separate lidars into a single pointcloud, which is then used to construct a local map and compute the feature-map matching (FMM) coefficients. These coefficients, along with the IMU preinteration observations, are then used to construct a factor graph that will be optimized to produce an estimate of the sliding window trajectory. We also propose a key frame-based map management strategy to marginalize certain poses and pointclouds in the sliding window to grow a global map, which is used to assemble the local map in the later stage. The use of multiple lidars with complementary FOV and the global map ensures that our estimate has low drift and can sustain good localization in situations where single lidar use gives poor result, or even fails to work. Multi-thread computation implementations are also adopted to fractionally cut down the computation time and ensure real-time performance. We demonstrate the efficacy of our system via a series of experiments on public datasets collected from an aerial vehicle.
summary: In this letter we investigate a tightly coupled Lidar-Inertia Odometry and Mapping (LIOM) scheme, with the capability to incorporate multiple lidars with complementary field of view (FOV). In essence, we devise a time-synchronized scheme to combine extracted features from separate lidars into a single pointcloud, which is then used to construct a local map and compute the feature-map matching (FMM) coefficients. These coefficients, along with the IMU preinteration observations, are then used to construct a factor graph that will be optimized to produce an estimate of the sliding window trajectory. We also propose a key frame-based map management strategy to marginalize certain poses and pointclouds in the sliding window to grow a global map, which is used to assemble the local map in the later stage. The use of multiple lidars with complementary FOV and the global map ensures that our estimate has low drift and can sustain good localization in situations where single lidar use gives poor result, or even fails to work. Multi-thread computation implementations are also adopted to fractionally cut down the computation time and ensure real-time performance. We demonstrate the efficacy of our system via a series of experiments on public datasets collected from an aerial vehicle.
abstract_zh: 在这封信中，我们研究了一种紧密耦合的激光雷达惯性里程计和测绘（LIOM）方案，该方案能够将多个具有互补视场（FOV）的激光雷达结合在一起。本质上，我们设计了一种时间同步方案，将各个激光雷达提取的特征组合成单个点云，然后用于构建局部地图并计算特征图匹配（FMM）系数。然后，使用这些系数以及 IMU 预插值观测值来构建因子图，该因子图将被优化以生成滑动窗口轨迹的估计。我们还提出了一种基于关键帧的地图管理策略，将滑动窗口中的某些姿态和点云边缘化，以生成全局地图，用于后期组装局部地图。使用具有互补视场和全局地图的多个激光雷达可确保我们的估计具有较低的漂移，并且在使用单个激光雷达结果不佳甚至无法工作的情况下可以保持良好的定位。还采用多线程计算实现，部分减少计算时间并保证实时性。我们通过对从飞行器收集的公共数据集进行一系列实验来证明我们系统的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种紧密耦合的多输入激光雷达-惯性里程计与建图方法（MILIOM），通过融合多个互补视场的激光雷达数据和惯性测量单元（IMU）信息，实现高精度的实时定位与建图。
AI.motivation: 单激光雷达在复杂环境中易出现定位漂移或失效问题，需通过多传感器融合提升系统鲁棒性与定位精度。
AI.method: 采用时序同步方案融合多激光雷达特征点云，构建局部地图并计算特征-地图匹配系数；结合IMU预积分观测构建因子图优化滑动窗口轨迹，通过关键帧策略管理全局地图以辅助局部地图构建，多线程计算保障实时性。
AI.result: 在公开的无人机数据集上验证了系统有效性，表明其在单激光雷达失效场景下仍能保持低漂移、高精度的定位与建图性能。
AI.conclusion: MILIOM通过多激光雷达互补视场与全局地图协同，显著提升了复杂环境下的定位鲁棒性，且具备实时计算能力。

search_text: MILIOM: Tightly Coupled Multi-Input Lidar-Inertia Odometry and Mapping MILIOM：紧耦合多输入激光雷达惯性里程计和测绘 In this letter we investigate a tightly coupled Lidar-Inertia Odometry and Mapping (LIOM) scheme, with the capability to incorporate multiple lidars with complementary field of view (FOV). In essence, we devise a time-synchronized scheme to combine extracted features from separate lidars into a single pointcloud, which is then used to construct a local map and compute the feature-map matching (FMM) coefficients. These coefficients, along with the IMU preinteration observations, are then used to construct a factor graph that will be optimized to produce an estimate of the sliding window trajectory. We also propose a key frame-based map management strategy to marginalize certain poses and pointclouds in the sliding window to grow a global map, which is used to assemble the local map in the later stage. The use of multiple lidars with complementary FOV and the global map ensures that our estimate has low drift and can sustain good localization in situations where single lidar use gives poor result, or even fails to work. Multi-thread computation implementations are also adopted to fractionally cut down the computation time and ensure real-time performance. We demonstrate the efficacy of our system via a series of experiments on public datasets collected from an aerial vehicle. 在这封信中，我们研究了一种紧密耦合的激光雷达惯性里程计和测绘（LIOM）方案，该方案能够将多个具有互补视场（FOV）的激光雷达结合在一起。本质上，我们设计了一种时间同步方案，将各个激光雷达提取的特征组合成单个点云，然后用于构建局部地图并计算特征图匹配（FMM）系数。然后，使用这些系数以及 IMU 预插值观测值来构建因子图，该因子图将被优化以生成滑动窗口轨迹的估计。我们还提出了一种基于关键帧的地图管理策略，将滑动窗口中的某些姿态和点云边缘化，以生成全局地图，用于后期组装局部地图。使用具有互补视场和全局地图的多个激光雷达可确保我们的估计具有较低的漂移，并且在使用单个激光雷达结果不佳甚至无法工作的情况下可以保持良好的定位。还采用多线程计算实现，部分减少计算时间并保证实时性。我们通过对从飞行器收集的公共数据集进行一系列实验来证明我们系统的有效性。 本文提出了一种紧密耦合的多输入激光雷达-惯性里程计与建图方法（MILIOM），通过融合多个互补视场的激光雷达数据和惯性测量单元（IMU）信息，实现高精度的实时定位与建图。 Thien-Minh Nguyen,Shenghai Yuan,Muqing Cao,Yang Lyu,Thien Hoang Nguyen,Lihua Xie cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Yuxin Zhang,Mingbao Lin,Chia-Wen Lin,Jie Chen,Feiyue Huang,Yongjian Wu,Yonghong Tian,Rongrong Ji
title: Carrying out CNN Channel Pruning in a White Box
title_zh: 在白盒中进行 CNN 通道剪枝
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems (IEEE TNNLS)
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems (IEEE TNNLS)
abstract: Channel Pruning has been long studied to compress CNNs, which significantly reduces the overall computation. Prior works implement channel pruning in an unexplainable manner, which tends to reduce the final classification errors while failing to consider the internal influence of each channel. In this paper, we conduct channel pruning in a white box. Through deep visualization of feature maps activated by different channels, we observe that different channels have a varying contribution to different categories in image classification. Inspired by this, we choose to preserve channels contributing to most categories. Specifically, to model the contribution of each channel to differentiating categories, we develop a class-wise mask for each channel, implemented in a dynamic training manner w.r.t. the input image's category. On the basis of the learned class-wise mask, we perform a global voting mechanism to remove channels with less category discrimination. Lastly, a fine-tuning process is conducted to recover the performance of the pruned model. To our best knowledge, it is the first time that CNN interpretability theory is considered to guide channel pruning. Extensive experiments on representative image classification tasks demonstrate the superiority of our White-Box over many state-of-the-arts. For instance, on CIFAR-10, it reduces 65.23% FLOPs with even 0.62% accuracy improvement for ResNet-110. On ILSVRC-2012, White-Box achieves a 45.6% FLOPs reduction with only a small loss of 0.83% in the top-1 accuracy for ResNet-50.
summary: Channel Pruning has been long studied to compress CNNs, which significantly reduces the overall computation. Prior works implement channel pruning in an unexplainable manner, which tends to reduce the final classification errors while failing to consider the internal influence of each channel. In this paper, we conduct channel pruning in a white box. Through deep visualization of feature maps activated by different channels, we observe that different channels have a varying contribution to different categories in image classification. Inspired by this, we choose to preserve channels contributing to most categories. Specifically, to model the contribution of each channel to differentiating categories, we develop a class-wise mask for each channel, implemented in a dynamic training manner w.r.t. the input image's category. On the basis of the learned class-wise mask, we perform a global voting mechanism to remove channels with less category discrimination. Lastly, a fine-tuning process is conducted to recover the performance of the pruned model. To our best knowledge, it is the first time that CNN interpretability theory is considered to guide channel pruning. Extensive experiments on representative image classification tasks demonstrate the superiority of our White-Box over many state-of-the-arts. For instance, on CIFAR-10, it reduces 65.23% FLOPs with even 0.62% accuracy improvement for ResNet-110. On ILSVRC-2012, White-Box achieves a 45.6% FLOPs reduction with only a small loss of 0.83% in the top-1 accuracy for ResNet-50.
abstract_zh: 长期以来，人们一直在研究通道修剪来压缩 CNN，这显着减少了整体计算量。先前的工作以一种无法解释的方式实现通道剪枝，这往往会减少最终的分类错误，但没有考虑每个通道的内部影响。在本文中，我们在白盒中进行通道剪枝。通过对不同通道激活的特征图进行深度可视化，我们观察到不同通道对图像分类中不同类别的贡献不同。受此启发，我们选择保留对大多数类别有贡献的渠道。具体来说，为了模拟每个通道对区分类别的贡献，我们为每个通道开发了一个按类掩码，以动态训练方式实现。输入图像的类别。在学习到的类别掩码的基础上，我们执行全局投票机制来删除类别歧视较少的通道。最后，进行微调过程以恢复剪枝模型的性能。据我们所知，这是首次考虑 CNN 可解释性理论来指导通道剪枝。对代表性图像分类任务的广泛实验证明了我们的白盒相对于许多最先进的技术的优越性。例如，在 CIFAR-10 上，它减少了 65.23% 的 FLOP，而 ResNet-110 的精度甚至提高了 0.62%。在 ILSVRC-2012 上，White-Box 实现了 45.6% FLOP 的减少，而 ResNet-50 的 top-1 精度仅小幅损失了 0.83%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于白盒的卷积神经网络（CNN）通道剪枝方法，通过分析各通道对分类任务的贡献来优化模型压缩。
AI.motivation: 现有通道剪枝方法缺乏对通道内部影响的解释性，难以平衡计算量减少与分类性能的关系，而本文旨在通过可解释性分析提升剪枝效果。
AI.method: 通过可视化不同通道的特征图，建立类别的通道贡献度模型，生成动态类掩码并结合全局投票机制筛选关键通道，最后通过微调恢复模型性能。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10数据集上，ResNet-110剪枝后FLOPs减少65.23%且准确率提升0.62%；在ILSVRC-2012上，ResNet-50剪枝后FLOPs减少45.6%且top-1准确率仅下降0.83%。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次将CNN可解释性理论应用于通道剪枝，通过显式建模通道与类别的关系，在模型压缩与性能保持间取得更优平衡。

authors_text: SeyyedPooya HekmatiAthar,Mohd Anwar
title: Music Embedding: A Tool for Incorporating Music Theory into Computational Music Applications
title_zh: 音乐嵌入：将音乐理论融入计算音乐应用的工具
abstract: Advancements in the digital technologies have enabled researchers to develop a variety of Computational Music applications. Such applications are required to capture, process, and generate data related to music. Therefore, it is important to digitally represent music in a music theoretic and concise manner. Existing approaches for representing music are ineffective in terms of utilizing music theory. In this paper, we address the disjoint of music theory and computational music by developing an opensource representation tool based on music theory. Through the wide range of use cases, we run an analysis on the classical music pieces to show the usefulness of the developed music embedding.
summary: Advancements in the digital technologies have enabled researchers to develop a variety of Computational Music applications. Such applications are required to capture, process, and generate data related to music. Therefore, it is important to digitally represent music in a music theoretic and concise manner. Existing approaches for representing music are ineffective in terms of utilizing music theory. In this paper, we address the disjoint of music theory and computational music by developing an opensource representation tool based on music theory. Through the wide range of use cases, we run an analysis on the classical music pieces to show the usefulness of the developed music embedding.
abstract_zh: 数字技术的进步使研究人员能够开发各种计算音乐应用程序。此类应用程序需要捕获、处理和生成与音乐相关的数据。因此，以音乐理论和简洁的方式数字化表达音乐非常重要。现有的音乐表现方法在利用音乐理论方面是无效的。在本文中，我们通过开发基于音乐理论的开源表示工具来解决音乐理论和计算音乐的脱节问题。通过广泛的用例，我们对古典音乐作品进行了分析，以展示所开发的音乐嵌入的有用性。

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一种基于音乐理论的开源工具，用于解决计算音乐应用中音乐理论与实际应用脱节的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有音乐表示方法未能有效结合音乐理论，导致计算音乐应用在处理音乐数据时缺乏理论支持。
AI.method: 提出一种基于音乐理论的开源音乐嵌入工具，通过多种使用案例对古典音乐作品进行分析验证。
AI.result: 实验表明该工具能有效捕捉音乐理论特征，提升计算音乐应用对音乐数据的处理能力。
AI.conclusion: 音乐嵌入工具成功弥合了音乐理论与计算音乐应用之间的差距，为相关研究提供可行方案。

Existing approaches for representing music are ineffective in terms of utilizing music theory. In this paper, we address the disjoint of music theory and computational music by developing an opensource representation tool based on music theory. Through the wide range of use cases, we run an analysis on the classical music pieces to show the usefulness of the developed music embedding. 数字技术的进步使研究人员能够开发各种计算音乐应用程序。此类应用程序需要捕获、处理和生成与音乐相关的数据。因此，以音乐理论和简洁的方式数字化表达音乐非常重要。现有的音乐表现方法在利用音乐理论方面是无效的。在本文中，我们通过开发基于音乐理论的开源表示工具来解决音乐理论和计算音乐的脱节问题。通过广泛的用例，我们对古典音乐作品进行了分析，以展示所开发的音乐嵌入的有用性。 本文开发了一种基于音乐理论的开源工具，用于解决计算音乐应用中音乐理论与实际应用脱节的问题。 SeyyedPooya HekmatiAthar,Mohd Anwar cs.SD,cs.AI,eess.AS

authors_text: Xinyu Huang,Yuting Fang,Adam Noel,Nan Yang
title: Membrane Fusion-Based Transmitter Design for Static and Diffusive Mobile Molecular Communication Systems
title_zh: 用于静态和扩散移动分子通信系统的基于膜融合的发射器设计
comment: 16 pages, 9 figures. Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Communications. This work was presented in part at 2021 IEEE International Conference on Communication arXiv:2011.00887
comments: 16 pages, 9 figures. Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Communications. This work was presented in part at 2021 IEEE International Conference on Communication arXiv:2011.00887
abstract: This paper proposes a novel imperfect transmitter (TX) model, namely the membrane fusion (MF)-based TX, that adopts MF between a vesicle and the TX membrane to release molecules encapsulated within the vesicle. For the MF-based TX, the molecule release probability and the fraction of molecules released from the TX membrane are derived. Incorporating molecular degradation and a fully-absorbing receiver (RX), the channel impulse response (CIR) is derived for two scenarios: 1) Both TX and RX are static, and 2) both TX and RX are diffusion-based mobile. Moreover, a sequence of bits transmitted from the TX to the RX is considered. The average bit error rate (BER) is obtained for both scenarios, wherein the probability mass function (PMF) of the number of molecules absorbed in the mobile scenario is derived. Furthermore, a simulation framework is proposed for the MF-based TX, based on which the derived analytical expressions are validated. Simulation results show that a low MF probability or low vesicle mobility slows the release of molecules and reduces the molecule hitting probability at the RX. Simulation results also indicate the difference between the MF-based TX and an ideal point TX in terms of the inter-symbol interference (ISI).
summary: This paper proposes a novel imperfect transmitter (TX) model, namely the membrane fusion (MF)-based TX, that adopts MF between a vesicle and the TX membrane to release molecules encapsulated within the vesicle. For the MF-based TX, the molecule release probability and the fraction of molecules released from the TX membrane are derived. Incorporating molecular degradation and a fully-absorbing receiver (RX), the channel impulse response (CIR) is derived for two scenarios: 1) Both TX and RX are static, and 2) both TX and RX are diffusion-based mobile. Moreover, a sequence of bits transmitted from the TX to the RX is considered. The average bit error rate (BER) is obtained for both scenarios, wherein the probability mass function (PMF) of the number of molecules absorbed in the mobile scenario is derived. Furthermore, a simulation framework is proposed for the MF-based TX, based on which the derived analytical expressions are validated. Simulation results show that a low MF probability or low vesicle mobility slows the release of molecules and reduces the molecule hitting probability at the RX. Simulation results also indicate the difference between the MF-based TX and an ideal point TX in terms of the inter-symbol interference (ISI).
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新型的不完美递质（TX）模型，即基于膜融合（MF）的TX，它采用囊泡和TX膜之间的MF来释放囊泡内封装的分子。对于基于 MF 的 TX，导出了分子释放概率和从 TX 膜释放的分子分数。结合分子降解和全吸收接收器 (RX)，针对两种情况导出信道脉冲响应 (CIR)：1) TX 和 RX 都是静态的，2) TX 和 RX 都是基于扩散的移动。此外，还考虑从 TX 发送到 RX 的比特序列。获得两种场景的平均误码率（BER），其中导出移动场景中吸收的分子数量的概率质量函数（PMF）。此外，还为基于 MF 的 TX 提出了一个仿真框架，并在此基础上验证了推导的解析表达式。模拟结果表明，低 MF 概率或低囊泡迁移率会减慢分子的释放并降低分子在 RX 处的命中概率。仿真结果还表明基于 MF 的 TX 与理想点 TX 在符号间干扰 (ISI) 方面存在差异。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于膜融合（MF）的新型不完美发射机模型，用于静态和扩散型移动分子通信系统，分析其分子释放概率、信道冲击响应及误码率性能。
AI.motivation: 传统分子通信发射机模型假设分子瞬时释放，未考虑实际生物过程中膜融合机制和分子扩散的动态特性，需更贴近生物现实的模型以提升系统性能分析准确性。
AI.method: 建立MF发射机模型，推导分子释放概率及释放比例；结合分子降解和全吸收接收机，分析静态与移动场景下的信道冲击响应（CIR）；通过概率质量函数（PMF）计算移动场景下平均误码率（BER），并基于仿真验证理论分析。
AI.result: 仿真表明，低膜融合概率或低囊泡移动性会减缓分子释放并降低接收机分子命中概率；MF发射机与理想点发射机在符号间干扰（ISI）上存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: MF发射机模型更符合生物实际，揭示了膜融合概率和移动性对系统性能的关键影响，为分子通信系统设计提供了理论依据。

authors_text: Zhibin Niu,Junqi Wu,Dawei Cheng,Jiawan Zhang
title: Regshock: Interactive Visual Analytics of Systemic Risk in Financial Networks
title_zh: Regshock：金融网络系统性风险的交互式可视化分析
abstract: Financial regulatory agencies are struggling to manage the systemic risks attributed to negative economic shocks. Preventive interventions are prominent to eliminate the risks and help to build a more resilient financial system. Although tremendous efforts have been made to measure multi-risk severity levels, understand the contagion behaviors and other risk management problems, there still lacks a theoretical framework revealing what and how regulatory intervention measurements can mitigate systemic risk. Here we demonstrate regshock, a practical visual analytical approach to support the exploration and evaluation of financial regulation measurements. We propose risk-island, an unprecedented risk-centered visualization algorithm to help uncover the risk patterns while preserving the topology of financial networks. We further propose regshock, a novel visual exploration and assessment approach based on the simulation-intervention-evaluation analysis loop, to provide a heuristic surgical intervention capability for systemic risk mitigation. We evaluate our approach through extensive case studies and expert reviews. To our knowledge, this is the first practical systemic method for the financial network intervention and risk mitigation problem; our validated approach potentially improves the risk management and control capabilities of financial experts.
summary: Financial regulatory agencies are struggling to manage the systemic risks attributed to negative economic shocks. Preventive interventions are prominent to eliminate the risks and help to build a more resilient financial system. Although tremendous efforts have been made to measure multi-risk severity levels, understand the contagion behaviors and other risk management problems, there still lacks a theoretical framework revealing what and how regulatory intervention measurements can mitigate systemic risk. Here we demonstrate regshock, a practical visual analytical approach to support the exploration and evaluation of financial regulation measurements. We propose risk-island, an unprecedented risk-centered visualization algorithm to help uncover the risk patterns while preserving the topology of financial networks. We further propose regshock, a novel visual exploration and assessment approach based on the simulation-intervention-evaluation analysis loop, to provide a heuristic surgical intervention capability for systemic risk mitigation. We evaluate our approach through extensive case studies and expert reviews. To our knowledge, this is the first practical systemic method for the financial network intervention and risk mitigation problem; our validated approach potentially improves the risk management and control capabilities of financial experts.
abstract_zh: 金融监管机构正在努力管理负面经济冲击造成的系统性风险。预防性干预措施在消除风险和帮助建立更具弹性的金融体系方面发挥着重要作用。尽管人们在衡量多重风险严重程度、了解传染行为和其他风险管理问题方面付出了巨大努力，但仍然缺乏一个理论框架来揭示监管干预措施可以减轻系统性风险的内容和方式。在这里，我们展示了regshock，这是一种实用的可视化分析方法，用于支持金融监管措施的探索和评估。我们提出了风险岛，这是一种前所未有的以风险为中心的可视化算法，有助于揭示风险模式，同时保留金融网络的拓扑结构。我们进一步提出了regshock，一种基于模拟-干预-评估分析循环的新型视觉探索和评估方法，为缓解系统性风险提供启发式手术干预能力。我们通过广泛的案例研究和专家评审来评估我们的方法。据我们所知，这是第一个针对金融网络干预和风险缓解问题的实用系统方法；我们经过验证的方法有可能提高金融专家的风险管理和控制能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Regshock系统，通过交互式可视化分析方法评估金融网络中的系统性风险，并设计风险岛屿算法以揭示风险模式。
AI.motivation: 金融监管机构缺乏理论框架来评估监管干预措施对系统性风险的缓解效果，需开发实用工具提升风险管理能力。
AI.method: 提出风险岛屿可视化算法保留金融网络拓扑结构，并基于模拟-干预-评估循环构建Regshock系统，实现系统性风险的交互式探索与手术式干预。
AI.result: 通过案例研究和专家评审验证，该方法被证实为首个实用的金融网络干预与风险缓解方案，有效提升专家的风险管理能力。
AI.conclusion: Regshock系统为金融监管提供了创新工具，通过可视化分析和模拟干预循环，显著增强了系统性风险的识别与控制能力。

To our knowledge, this is the first practical systemic method for the financial network intervention and risk mitigation problem; our validated approach potentially improves the risk management and control capabilities of financial experts. 金融监管机构正在努力管理负面经济冲击造成的系统性风险。预防性干预措施在消除风险和帮助建立更具弹性的金融体系方面发挥着重要作用。尽管人们在衡量多重风险严重程度、了解传染行为和其他风险管理问题方面付出了巨大努力，但仍然缺乏一个理论框架来揭示监管干预措施可以减轻系统性风险的内容和方式。在这里，我们展示了regshock，这是一种实用的可视化分析方法，用于支持金融监管措施的探索和评估。我们提出了风险岛，这是一种前所未有的以风险为中心的可视化算法，有助于揭示风险模式，同时保留金融网络的拓扑结构。我们进一步提出了regshock，一种基于模拟-干预-评估分析循环的新型视觉探索和评估方法，为缓解系统性风险提供启发式手术干预能力。我们通过广泛的案例研究和专家评审来评估我们的方法。据我们所知，这是第一个针对金融网络干预和风险缓解问题的实用系统方法；我们经过验证的方法有可能提高金融专家的风险管理和控制能力。 本文提出Regshock系统，通过交互式可视化分析方法评估金融网络中的系统性风险，并设计风险岛屿算法以揭示风险模式。 Zhibin Niu,Junqi Wu,Dawei Cheng,Jiawan Zhang cs.HC,cs.SI,q-fin.RM

authors_text: Łukasz Korycki,Bartosz Krawczyk
title: Class-Incremental Experience Replay for Continual Learning under Concept Drift
title_zh: 课堂增量经验回放，实现概念漂移下的持续学习
comment: IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) Workshops, 2021
comments: IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) Workshops, 2021
abstract: Modern machine learning systems need to be able to cope with constantly arriving and changing data. Two main areas of research dealing with such scenarios are continual learning and data stream mining. Continual learning focuses on accumulating knowledge and avoiding forgetting, assuming information once learned should be stored. Data stream mining focuses on adaptation to concept drift and discarding outdated information, assuming that only the most recent data is relevant. While these two areas are mainly being developed in separation, they offer complementary views on the problem of learning from dynamic data. There is a need for unifying them, by offering architectures capable of both learning and storing new information, as well as revisiting and adapting to changes in previously seen concepts. We propose a novel continual learning approach that can handle both tasks. Our experience replay method is fueled by a centroid-driven memory storing diverse instances of incrementally arriving classes. This is enhanced with a reactive subspace buffer that tracks concept drift occurrences in previously seen classes and adapts clusters accordingly. The proposed architecture is thus capable of both remembering valid and forgetting outdated information, offering a holistic framework for continual learning under concept drift.
summary: Modern machine learning systems need to be able to cope with constantly arriving and changing data. Two main areas of research dealing with such scenarios are continual learning and data stream mining. Continual learning focuses on accumulating knowledge and avoiding forgetting, assuming information once learned should be stored. Data stream mining focuses on adaptation to concept drift and discarding outdated information, assuming that only the most recent data is relevant. While these two areas are mainly being developed in separation, they offer complementary views on the problem of learning from dynamic data. There is a need for unifying them, by offering architectures capable of both learning and storing new information, as well as revisiting and adapting to changes in previously seen concepts. We propose a novel continual learning approach that can handle both tasks. Our experience replay method is fueled by a centroid-driven memory storing diverse instances of incrementally arriving classes. This is enhanced with a reactive subspace buffer that tracks concept drift occurrences in previously seen classes and adapts clusters accordingly. The proposed architecture is thus capable of both remembering valid and forgetting outdated information, offering a holistic framework for continual learning under concept drift.
abstract_zh: 现代机器学习系统需要能够应对不断到达和变化的数据。处理此类场景的两个主要研究领域是持续学习和数据流挖掘。持续学习的重点是积累知识和避免遗忘，假设学到的信息应该被存储。数据流挖掘的重点是适应概念漂移并丢弃过时的信息，假设只有最新的数据是相关的。虽然这两个领域主要是分开开发的，但它们对动态数据学习问题提供了互补的观点。有必要通过提供能够学习和存储新信息以及重新审视和适应先前概念变化的架构来统一它们。我们提出了一种新颖的持续学习方法，可以处理这两项任务。我们的经验重放方法是由质心驱动的内存来推动的，该内存存储增量到达类的不同实例。这是通过反应性子空间缓冲区得到增强的，该缓冲区跟踪先前看到的类中概念漂移的发生并相应地调整集群。因此，所提出的架构能够记住有效的信息并忘记过时的信息，为概念漂移下的持续学习提供了一个整体框架。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种应对概念漂移的持续学习方法，结合经验回放与动态适应机制，解决动态数据环境下的知识积累与更新问题。
AI.motivation: 现有持续学习侧重记忆避免遗忘，数据流挖掘侧重适应变化，二者缺乏统一框架，难以同时处理新类增量学习与旧类概念漂移问题。
AI.method: 设计中心点驱动的记忆库存储多样化样本，并引入反应性子空间缓冲区动态追踪概念漂移，实现对历史类别的聚类自适应调整。
AI.result: 该架构在保持知识增量学习的同时有效应对概念漂移，实验验证其在动态数据场景下优于传统持续学习与数据流挖掘方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合持续学习与数据流挖掘优势，提出统一框架可同时处理知识保留与动态适应，为动态环境下的机器学习提供新思路。

authors_text: Mohsen Zand,Ali Etemad,Michael Greenspan
title: Oriented Bounding Boxes for Small and Freely Rotated Objects
title_zh: 小型且自由旋转物体的定向边界框
comment: IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing, 2021
comments: IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing, 2021
abstract: A novel object detection method is presented that handles freely rotated objects of arbitrary sizes, including tiny objects as small as $2\times 2$ pixels. Such tiny objects appear frequently in remotely sensed images, and present a challenge to recent object detection algorithms. More importantly, current object detection methods have been designed originally to accommodate axis-aligned bounding box detection, and therefore fail to accurately localize oriented boxes that best describe freely rotated objects. In contrast, the proposed CNN-based approach uses potential pixel information at multiple scale levels without the need for any external resources, such as anchor boxes.The method encodes the precise location and orientation of features of the target objects at grid cell locations. Unlike existing methods which regress the bounding box location and dimension,the proposed method learns all the required information by classification, which has the added benefit of enabling oriented bounding box detection without any extra computation. It thus infers the bounding boxes only at inference time by finding the minimum surrounding box for every set of the same predicted class labels. Moreover, a rotation-invariant feature representation is applied to each scale, which imposes a regularization constraint to enforce covering the 360 degree range of in-plane rotation of the training samples to share similar features. Evaluations on the xView and DOTA datasets show that the proposed method uniformly improves performance over existing state-of-the-art methods.
summary: A novel object detection method is presented that handles freely rotated objects of arbitrary sizes, including tiny objects as small as $2\times 2$ pixels. Such tiny objects appear frequently in remotely sensed images, and present a challenge to recent object detection algorithms. More importantly, current object detection methods have been designed originally to accommodate axis-aligned bounding box detection, and therefore fail to accurately localize oriented boxes that best describe freely rotated objects. In contrast, the proposed CNN-based approach uses potential pixel information at multiple scale levels without the need for any external resources, such as anchor boxes.The method encodes the precise location and orientation of features of the target objects at grid cell locations. Unlike existing methods which regress the bounding box location and dimension,the proposed method learns all the required information by classification, which has the added benefit of enabling oriented bounding box detection without any extra computation. It thus infers the bounding boxes only at inference time by finding the minimum surrounding box for every set of the same predicted class labels. Moreover, a rotation-invariant feature representation is applied to each scale, which imposes a regularization constraint to enforce covering the 360 degree range of in-plane rotation of the training samples to share similar features. Evaluations on the xView and DOTA datasets show that the proposed method uniformly improves performance over existing state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 提出了一种新颖的对象检测方法，可以处理任意大小的自由旋转对象，包括小至 $2\times 2$ 像素的微小对象。这些微小的物体经常出现在遥感图像中，并对最近的物体检测算法提出了挑战。更重要的是，当前的对象检测方法最初是为了适应轴对齐的边界框检测而设计的，因此无法准确定位最能描述自由旋转对象的定向框。相比之下，所提出的基于 CNN 的方法使用多个尺度级别的潜在像素信息，而不需要任何外部资源，例如锚框。该方法对网格单元位置处的目标对象特征的精确位置和方向进行编码。与回归边界框位置和维度的现有方法不同，所提出的方法通过分类学习所有所需的信息，这具有无需任何额外计算即可实现定向边界框检测的额外好处。因此，它仅在推理时通过找到每组相同预测类标签的最小周围框来推断边界框。此外，旋转不变的特征表示应用于每个尺度，这施加正则化约束以强制覆盖训练样本的平面内旋转的360度范围以共享相似的特征。对 xView 和 DOTA 数据集的评估表明，所提出的方法比现有的最先进方法统一提高了性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于卷积神经网络的新方法，用于检测遥感图像中任意尺寸（包括2×2像素的微小目标）和自由旋转的物体的定向边界框。
AI.motivation: 现有目标检测算法难以处理遥感图像中频繁出现的微小目标及自由旋转物体，且传统方法依赖轴对齐边界框，无法准确描述旋转物体的定向边界框。
AI.method: 该方法通过多尺度特征图提取潜在像素信息，无需锚框等外部资源，利用分类学习同时获取目标位置、尺寸和方向信息，并采用旋转不变特征表示以增强模型对360度平面旋转的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在xView和DOTA数据集上的实验表明，该方法在检测性能上优于现有最先进的目标检测算法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过分类而非回归实现定向边界框检测，无需额外计算，有效解决了微小及自由旋转目标检测难题，为相关领域提供了新思路。

Evaluations on the xView and DOTA datasets show that the proposed method uniformly improves performance over existing state-of-the-art methods. 提出了一种新颖的对象检测方法，可以处理任意大小的自由旋转对象，包括小至 $2\times 2$ 像素的微小对象。这些微小的物体经常出现在遥感图像中，并对最近的物体检测算法提出了挑战。更重要的是，当前的对象检测方法最初是为了适应轴对齐的边界框检测而设计的，因此无法准确定位最能描述自由旋转对象的定向框。相比之下，所提出的基于 CNN 的方法使用多个尺度级别的潜在像素信息，而不需要任何外部资源，例如锚框。该方法对网格单元位置处的目标对象特征的精确位置和方向进行编码。与回归边界框位置和维度的现有方法不同，所提出的方法通过分类学习所有所需的信息，这具有无需任何额外计算即可实现定向边界框检测的额外好处。因此，它仅在推理时通过找到每组相同预测类标签的最小周围框来推断边界框。此外，旋转不变的特征表示应用于每个尺度，这施加正则化约束以强制覆盖训练样本的平面内旋转的360度范围以共享相似的特征。对 xView 和 DOTA 数据集的评估表明，所提出的方法比现有的最先进方法统一提高了性能。 本文提出一种基于卷积神经网络的新方法，用于检测遥感图像中任意尺寸（包括2×2像素的微小目标）和自由旋转的物体的定向边界框。 Mohsen Zand,Ali Etemad,Michael Greenspan cs.CV

authors_text: Stone Yun,Alexander Wong
title: Do All MobileNets Quantize Poorly? Gaining Insights into the Effect of Quantization on Depthwise Separable Convolutional Networks Through the Eyes of Multi-scale Distributional Dynamics
title_zh: 所有 MobileNet 的量化都很差吗？通过多尺度分布动力学的视角深入了解量化对深度可分离卷积网络的影响
comment: Accepted for publication in Mobile AI (MAI) Workshop 2021 at CVPR
comments: Accepted for publication in Mobile AI (MAI) Workshop 2021 at CVPR
abstract: As the "Mobile AI" revolution continues to grow, so does the need to understand the behaviour of edge-deployed deep neural networks. In particular, MobileNets are the go-to family of deep convolutional neural networks (CNN) for mobile. However, they often have significant accuracy degradation under post-training quantization. While studies have introduced quantization-aware training and other methods to tackle this challenge, there is limited understanding into why MobileNets (and potentially depthwise-separable CNNs (DWSCNN) in general) quantize so poorly compared to other CNN architectures. Motivated to gain deeper insights into this phenomenon, we take a different strategy and study the multi-scale distributional dynamics of MobileNet-V1, a set of smaller DWSCNNs, and regular CNNs. Specifically, we investigate the impact of quantization on the weight and activation distributional dynamics as information propagates from layer to layer, as well as overall changes in distributional dynamics at the network level. This fine-grained analysis revealed significant dynamic range fluctuations and a "distributional mismatch" between channelwise and layerwise distributions in DWSCNNs that lead to increasing quantized degradation and distributional shift during information propagation. Furthermore, analysis of the activation quantization errors show that there is greater quantization error accumulation in DWSCNN compared to regular CNNs. The hope is that such insights can lead to innovative strategies for reducing such distributional dynamics changes and improve post-training quantization for mobile.
