In particular, MobileNets are the go-to family of deep convolutional neural networks (CNN) for mobile. However, they often have significant accuracy degradation under post-training quantization. While studies have introduced quantization-aware training and other methods to tackle this challenge, there is limited understanding into why MobileNets (and potentially depthwise-separable CNNs (DWSCNN) in general) quantize so poorly compared to other CNN architectures. Motivated to gain deeper insights into this phenomenon, we take a different strategy and study the multi-scale distributional dynamics of MobileNet-V1, a set of smaller DWSCNNs, and regular CNNs. Specifically, we investigate the impact of quantization on the weight and activation distributional dynamics as information propagates from layer to layer, as well as overall changes in distributional dynamics at the network level. This fine-grained analysis revealed significant dynamic range fluctuations and a "distributional mismatch" between channelwise and layerwise distributions in DWSCNNs that lead to increasing quantized degradation and distributional shift during information propagation. Furthermore, analysis of the activation quantization errors show that there is greater quantization error accumulation in DWSCNN compared to regular CNNs. The hope is that such insights can lead to innovative strategies for reducing such distributional dynamics changes and improve post-training quantization for mobile.
abstract_zh: 随着“移动人工智能”革命的不断发展，了解边缘部署的深度神经网络的行为的需求也在不断增长。特别是，MobileNet 是移动领域首选的深度卷积神经网络 (CNN) 系列。然而，它们在训练后量化下通常会出现显着的精度下降。虽然研究引入了量化感知训练和其他方法来应对这一挑战，但对于为什么 MobileNet（以及一般的潜在深度可分离 CNN (DWSCNN)）与其他 CNN 架构相比量化如此糟糕，人们的理解还很有限。为了更深入地了解这一现象，我们采取了不同的策略，研究了 MobileNet-V1、一组较小的 DWSCNN 和常规 CNN 的多尺度分布动态。具体来说，我们研究了信息从一层传播到另一层时量化对权重和激活分布动态的影响，以及网络层面分布动态的整体变化。这种细粒度分析揭示了 DWSCNN 中通道和分层分布之间的显着动态范围波动和“分布不匹配”，导致信息传播过程中量化退化和分布偏移的增加。此外，对激活量化误差的分析表明，与常规 CNN 相比，DWSCNN 中存在更大的量化误差累积。希望这些见解能够带来创新策略，以减少这种分布动态变化并改善移动设备的训练后量化。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了MobileNet等深度可分离卷积网络在量化过程中的性能下降问题，通过多尺度分布动态分析揭示其量化退化的原因。
AI.motivation: 尽管MobileNet是移动端主流网络，但其在量化后精度下降显著，而现有研究缺乏对其量化表现差的根本原因的深入分析。
AI.method: 通过分析MobileNet-V1和常规CNN的权重与激活分布动态，研究量化对信息传播过程中分布变化的影响，揭示通道级与层级分布的不匹配现象。
AI.result: 发现深度可分离卷积网络存在动态范围波动和分布不匹配问题，导致量化误差累积加剧，相比常规CNN表现更差。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为优化移动端网络量化策略提供了新视角，未来可通过减少分布动态变化来提升量化效果。

authors_text: Osman Boyaci,Mohammad Rasoul Narimani,Katherine Davis,Muhammad Ismail,Thomas J Overbye,Erchin Serpedin
title: Joint Detection and Localization of Stealth False Data Injection Attacks in Smart Grids using Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用图神经网络联合检测和定位智能电网中的隐形虚假数据注入攻击
abstract: False data injection attacks (FDIA) are a main category of cyber-attacks threatening the security of power systems. Contrary to the detection of these attacks, less attention has been paid to identifying the attacked units of the grid. To this end, this work jointly studies detecting and localizing the stealth FDIA in power grids. Exploiting the inherent graph topology of power systems as well as the spatial correlations of measurement data, this paper proposes an approach based on the graph neural network (GNN) to identify the presence and location of the FDIA. The proposed approach leverages the auto-regressive moving average (ARMA) type graph filters (GFs) which can better adapt to sharp changes in the spectral domain due to their rational type filter composition compared to the polynomial type GFs such as Chebyshev. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work based on GNN that automatically detects and localizes FDIA in power systems. Extensive simulations and visualizations show that the proposed approach outperforms the available methods in both detection and localization of FDIA for different IEEE test systems. Thus, the targeted areas can be identified and preventive actions can be taken before the attack impacts the grid.
summary: False data injection attacks (FDIA) are a main category of cyber-attacks threatening the security of power systems. Contrary to the detection of these attacks, less attention has been paid to identifying the attacked units of the grid. To this end, this work jointly studies detecting and localizing the stealth FDIA in power grids. Exploiting the inherent graph topology of power systems as well as the spatial correlations of measurement data, this paper proposes an approach based on the graph neural network (GNN) to identify the presence and location of the FDIA. The proposed approach leverages the auto-regressive moving average (ARMA) type graph filters (GFs) which can better adapt to sharp changes in the spectral domain due to their rational type filter composition compared to the polynomial type GFs such as Chebyshev. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work based on GNN that automatically detects and localizes FDIA in power systems. Extensive simulations and visualizations show that the proposed approach outperforms the available methods in both detection and localization of FDIA for different IEEE test systems. Thus, the targeted areas can be identified and preventive actions can be taken before the attack impacts the grid.
abstract_zh: 虚假数据注入攻击（FDIA）是威胁电力系统安全的网络攻击的主要类别。与检测这些攻击相反，人们很少关注识别网格的受攻击单元。为此，本工作共同研究电网中隐形FDIA的检测和定位。利用电力系统固有的图拓扑以及测量数据的空间相关性，本文提出了一种基于图神经网络（GNN）的方法来识别 FDIA 的存在和位置。所提出的方法利用自回归移动平均（ARMA）型图滤波器（GF），与切比雪夫等多项式型 GF 相比，由于其合理型滤波器组成，该方法可以更好地适应谱域中的急剧变化。据我们所知，这是第一个基于 GNN 自动检测和定位电力系统中 FDIA 的工作。广泛的模拟和可视化表明，所提出的方法在不同 IEEE 测试系统的 FDIA 检测和定位方面均优于现有方法。因此，可以在攻击影响电网之前识别目标区域并采取预防措施。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图神经网络的方法，用于在智能电网中联合检测和定位隐蔽的虚假数据注入攻击（FDIA）。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注FDIA的检测，而对攻击单元的定位研究不足，但定位攻击源对于采取预防措施至关重要。
AI.method: 利用电力系统的图拓扑结构和测量数据的空间相关性，设计基于图神经网络（GNN）的框架，采用自回归移动平均（ARMA）型图滤波器以适应频谱域的剧烈变化。
AI.result: 在多个IEEE测试系统中，该方法在FDIA检测和定位任务中均优于现有方法，能有效识别攻击目标区域。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法可自动检测并定位FDIA，为电力系统提供及时的防御响应，提升电网安全性。

authors_text: Zhe Gan,Yen-Chun Chen,Linjie Li,Tianlong Chen,Yu Cheng,Shuohang Wang,Jingjing Liu,Lijuan Wang,Zicheng Liu
title: Playing Lottery Tickets with Vision and Language
title_zh: 用视觉和语言玩彩票
abstract: Large-scale pre-training has recently revolutionized vision-and-language (VL) research. Models such as LXMERT and UNITER have significantly lifted the state of the art over a wide range of VL tasks. However, the large number of parameters in such models hinders their application in practice. In parallel, work on the lottery ticket hypothesis (LTH) has shown that deep neural networks contain small matching subnetworks that can achieve on par or even better performance than the dense networks when trained in isolation. In this work, we perform the first empirical study to assess whether such trainable subnetworks also exist in pre-trained VL models. We use UNITER as the main testbed (also test on LXMERT and ViLT), and consolidate 7 representative VL tasks for experiments, including visual question answering, visual commonsense reasoning, visual entailment, referring expression comprehension, image-text retrieval, GQA, and NLVR$^2$. Through comprehensive analysis, we summarize our main findings as follows. ($i$) It is difficult to find subnetworks that strictly match the performance of the full model. However, we can find "relaxed" winning tickets at 50%-70% sparsity that maintain 99% of the full accuracy. ($ii$) Subnetworks found by task-specific pruning transfer reasonably well to the other tasks, while those found on the pre-training tasks at 60%/70% sparsity transfer universally, matching 98%/96% of the full accuracy on average over all the tasks. ($iii$) Besides UNITER, other models such as LXMERT and ViLT can also play lottery tickets. However, the highest sparsity we can achieve for ViLT is far lower than LXMERT and UNITER (30% vs. 70%). ($iv$) LTH also remains relevant when using other training methods (e.g., adversarial training).

We use UNITER as the main testbed (also test on LXMERT and ViLT), and consolidate 7 representative VL tasks for experiments, including visual question answering, visual commonsense reasoning, visual entailment, referring expression comprehension, image-text retrieval, GQA, and NLVR$^2$. Through comprehensive analysis, we summarize our main findings as follows. ($i$) It is difficult to find subnetworks that strictly match the performance of the full model. However, we can find "relaxed" winning tickets at 50%-70% sparsity that maintain 99% of the full accuracy. ($ii$) Subnetworks found by task-specific pruning transfer reasonably well to the other tasks, while those found on the pre-training tasks at 60%/70% sparsity transfer universally, matching 98%/96% of the full accuracy on average over all the tasks. ($iii$) Besides UNITER, other models such as LXMERT and ViLT can also play lottery tickets. However, the highest sparsity we can achieve for ViLT is far lower than LXMERT and UNITER (30% vs. 70%). ($iv$) LTH also remains relevant when using other training methods (e.g., adversarial training).
abstract_zh: 大规模预训练最近彻底改变了视觉和语言（VL）研究。 LXMERT 和 UNITER 等模型显着提升了各种 VL 任务的最新技术水平。然而，此类模型中的大量参数阻碍了其在实际中的应用。与此同时，彩票假设 (LTH) 的研究表明，深度神经网络包含小型匹配子网络，在单独训练时可以实现与密集网络相当甚至更好的性能。在这项工作中，我们进行了第一个实证研究，以评估此类可训练子网络是否也存在于预训练的 VL 模型中。我们使用 UNITER 作为主要测试平台（也在 LXMERT 和 ViLT 上进行测试），并整合 7 个代表性的 VL 任务进行实验，包括视觉问答、视觉常识推理、视觉蕴涵、指称表达理解、图文检索、GQA 和 NLVR$^2$。经过综合分析，我们的主要发现总结如下。 ($i$) 很难找到与完整模型的性能严格匹配的子网络。然而，我们可以找到稀疏度为 50%-70% 的“轻松”中奖彩票，并保持 99% 的完全准确度。 ($ii$) 通过特定于任务的剪枝发现的子网络相当好地转移到其他任务，而在 60%/70% 稀疏度的预训练任务中发现的子网络普遍转移，平均匹配所有任务的 98%/96% 的完全准确度。 ($iii$) 除了 UNITER 之外，其他型号如 LXMERT 和 ViLT 也可以玩彩票。然而，我们可以为 ViLT 实现的最高稀疏度远低于 LXMERT 和 UNITER（30% 与 70%）。 ($iv$) 当使用其他训练方法（例如对抗性训练）时，LTH 也仍然具有相关性。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究预训练视觉-语言模型中是否存在可训练的子网络（即彩票票假设），以减少参数数量同时保持性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管大型预训练模型在视觉-语言任务中表现优异，但其参数量大限制了实际应用。彩票票假设表明深层网络中存在小型子网络可达到与全网络相当的性能，因此本文探索该假设在视觉-语言模型中的适用性。
AI.method: 以UNITER为主测试模型（同时测试LXMERT和ViLT），选取7个视觉-语言任务进行实验，通过任务特定剪枝和预训练任务剪枝寻找子网络，并评估不同稀疏度下的性能表现。
AI.result: 发现难以找到与全模型严格匹配的子网络，但50%-70%稀疏度的子网络可保持99%的准确率；任务特定剪枝的子网络在其他任务中表现良好，预训练任务剪枝的子网络在60%/70%稀疏度下平均达到98%/96%的全模型准确率；ViLT的最高稀疏度（30%）远低于UNITER和LXMERT（70%）；其他训练方法（如对抗训练）下彩票票假设仍有效。
AI.conclusion: 视觉-语言模型中存在彩票票子网络，可通过剪枝实现高效部署，但不同模型的稀疏度上限存在差异，为实际应用提供了参数优化的可能性。

authors_text: Mikhail Shubov
title: Drone Launched Short Range Rockets
title_zh: 无人机发射短程火箭
abstract: A concept of drone launched short range rockets (DLSRR) is presented. A drone or an aircraft rises DLSRR to a release altitude of up to 20 $km$. At the release altitude, the drone or an aircraft is moving at a velocity of up to 700 $m/s$ and a steep angle of up to 68$^o$ to the horizontal. After DLSRRs are released, their motors start firing. DLSRRs use slow burning motors to gain altitude and velocity. At the apogee of their flight DLSRRs release projectiles which fly to the target and strike it at high impact velocity. The projectiles reach a target at ranges of up to 442 $km$ and impact velocities up to 1.88 $km/s$. We show that a rocket launched at high altitude and high initial velocity does not need expensive thermal protection to survive ascent. Delivery of munitions to target by DLSRRs should be much less expensive than delivery by a conventional rocket. %% Even though delivery of munitions by bomber aircraft is even less expensive, a bomber needs to fly close to the target, while a DLSRR carrier releases the rockets from a distance of at least 200 $km$ from the target. %% All parameters of DLSRRs, and their trajectories are calculated based on theoretical (mechanical and thermodynamical) analysis and on several MatLab programs.
summary: A concept of drone launched short range rockets (DLSRR) is presented. A drone or an aircraft rises DLSRR to a release altitude of up to 20 $km$. At the release altitude, the drone or an aircraft is moving at a velocity of up to 700 $m/s$ and a steep angle of up to 68$^o$ to the horizontal. After DLSRRs are released, their motors start firing. DLSRRs use slow burning motors to gain altitude and velocity. At the apogee of their flight DLSRRs release projectiles which fly to the target and strike it at high impact velocity. The projectiles reach a target at ranges of up to 442 $km$ and impact velocities up to 1.88 $km/s$. We show that a rocket launched at high altitude and high initial velocity does not need expensive thermal protection to survive ascent. Delivery of munitions to target by DLSRRs should be much less expensive than delivery by a conventional rocket. %% Even though delivery of munitions by bomber aircraft is even less expensive, a bomber needs to fly close to the target, while a DLSRR carrier releases the rockets from a distance of at least 200 $km$ from the target. %% All parameters of DLSRRs, and their trajectories are calculated based on theoretical (mechanical and thermodynamical) analysis and on several MatLab programs.
abstract_zh: 提出了无人机发射短程火箭（DLSRR）的概念。无人机或飞机将 DLSRR 提升到高达 20 $km$ 的释放高度。在释放高度，无人机或飞机以高达 700 $m/s$ 的速度移动，与水平面的角度高达 68$^o$。 DLSRR 释放后，它们的电机开始点火。 DLSRR 使用缓慢燃烧的发动机来获得高度和速度。在飞行的最高点，DLSRR 发射射弹，这些射弹飞向目标并以高冲击速度击中目标。射弹到达目标的射程可达 442 $km$，撞击速度可达 1.88 $km/s$。我们证明，在高空和高初速发射的火箭不需要昂贵的热保护来维持上升。通过 DLSRR 向目标运送弹药应该比通过传统火箭运送弹药便宜得多。 %% 尽管轰炸机运送弹药的成本更低，但轰炸机需要飞近目标，而 DLSRR 运载火箭则从距目标至少 200 $km$ 的距离发射火箭。 %% DLSRR 的所有参数及其轨迹都是根据理论（机械和热力学）分析和多个 MatLab 程序计算的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无人机发射短程火箭（DLSRR）的概念，通过高空高速释放火箭并利用其推进系统实现远距离目标打击。
AI.motivation: 传统火箭成本高昂且需复杂热防护，而轰炸机虽成本更低但需接近目标。DLSRR通过高空发射可兼顾成本与安全距离。
AI.method: 基于力学和热力学理论分析，结合MATLAB程序计算DLSRR的飞行参数及弹道轨迹。
AI.result: 火箭弹射程达442公里，撞击速度达1.88公里/秒，无需热防护系统，成本显著低于传统火箭。
AI.conclusion: DLSRR为低成本、远距离精确打击提供了可行方案，优于传统火箭且比轰炸机更安全。

motivation: 传统火箭成本高昂且需复杂热防护，而轰炸机虽成本更低但需接近目标。DLSRR通过高空发射可兼顾成本与安全距离。
method: 基于力学和热力学理论分析，结合MATLAB程序计算DLSRR的飞行参数及弹道轨迹。
result: 火箭弹射程达442公里，撞击速度达1.88公里/秒，无需热防护系统，成本显著低于传统火箭。
conclusion: DLSRR为低成本、远距离精确打击提供了可行方案，优于传统火箭且比轰炸机更安全。
search_text: Drone Launched Short Range Rockets 无人机发射短程火箭 A concept of drone launched short range rockets (DLSRR) is presented. A drone or an aircraft rises DLSRR to a release altitude of up to 20 $km$. At the release altitude, the drone or an aircraft is moving at a velocity of up to 700 $m/s$ and a steep angle of up to 68$^o$ to the horizontal. After DLSRRs are released, their motors start firing. DLSRRs use slow burning motors to gain altitude and velocity. At the apogee of their flight DLSRRs release projectiles which fly to the target and strike it at high impact velocity. The projectiles reach a target at ranges of up to 442 $km$ and impact velocities up to 1.88 $km/s$. We show that a rocket launched at high altitude and high initial velocity does not need expensive thermal protection to survive ascent. Delivery of munitions to target by DLSRRs should be much less expensive than delivery by a conventional rocket. %% Even though delivery of munitions by bomber aircraft is even less expensive, a bomber needs to fly close to the target, while a DLSRR carrier releases the rockets from a distance of at least 200 $km$ from the target. %% All parameters of DLSRRs, and their trajectories are calculated based on theoretical (mechanical and thermodynamical) analysis and on several MatLab programs. 提出了无人机发射短程火箭（DLSRR）的概念。无人机或飞机将 DLSRR 提升到高达 20 $km$ 的释放高度。在释放高度，无人机或飞机以高达 700 $m/s$ 的速度移动，与水平面的角度高达 68$^o$。 DLSRR 释放后，它们的电机开始点火。 DLSRR 使用缓慢燃烧的发动机来获得高度和速度。在飞行的最高点，DLSRR 发射射弹，这些射弹飞向目标并以高冲击速度击中目标。射弹到达目标的射程可达 442 $km$，撞击速度可达 1.88 $km/s$。我们证明，在高空和高初速发射的火箭不需要昂贵的热保护来维持上升。通过 DLSRR 向目标运送弹药应该比通过传统火箭运送弹药便宜得多。 %% 尽管轰炸机运送弹药的成本更低，但轰炸机需要飞近目标，而 DLSRR 运载火箭则从距目标至少 200 $km$ 的距离发射火箭。 %% DLSRR 的所有参数及其轨迹都是根据理论（机械和热力学）分析和多个 MatLab 程序计算的。 本文提出了一种无人机发射短程火箭（DLSRR）的概念，通过高空高速释放火箭并利用其推进系统实现远距离目标打击。 Mikhail Shubov cs.RO

authors_text: Gregory LeMasurier,Jordan Allspaw,Holly A. Yanco
title: Semi-Autonomous Planning and Visualization in Virtual Reality
title_zh: 虚拟现实中的半自主规划和可视化
comment: Virtual, Augmented, and Mixed Reality for HRI, March 2021, Boulder, CO
comments: Virtual, Augmented, and Mixed Reality for HRI, March 2021, Boulder, CO
abstract: Virtual reality (VR) interfaces for robots provide a three-dimensional (3D) view of the robot in its environment, which allows people to better plan complex robot movements in tight or cluttered spaces. In our prior work, we created a VR interface to allow for the teleoperation of a humanoid robot. As detailed in this paper, we have now focused on a human-in-the-loop planner where the operator can send higher level manipulation and navigation goals in VR through functional waypoints, visualize the results of a robot planner in the 3D virtual space, and then deny, alter or confirm the plan to send to the robot. In addition, we have adapted our interface to also work for a mobile manipulation robot in addition to the humanoid robot. For a video demonstration please see the accompanying video at https://youtu.be/wEHZug_fxrA.
summary: Virtual reality (VR) interfaces for robots provide a three-dimensional (3D) view of the robot in its environment, which allows people to better plan complex robot movements in tight or cluttered spaces. In our prior work, we created a VR interface to allow for the teleoperation of a humanoid robot. As detailed in this paper, we have now focused on a human-in-the-loop planner where the operator can send higher level manipulation and navigation goals in VR through functional waypoints, visualize the results of a robot planner in the 3D virtual space, and then deny, alter or confirm the plan to send to the robot. In addition, we have adapted our interface to also work for a mobile manipulation robot in addition to the humanoid robot. For a video demonstration please see the accompanying video at https://youtu.be/wEHZug_fxrA.
abstract_zh: 机器人的虚拟现实 (VR) 界面提供机器人在其环境中的三维 (3D) 视图，使人们能够更好地规划狭窄或杂乱空间中的复杂机器人运动。在我们之前的工作中，我们创建了一个 VR 界面来实现人形机器人的远程操作。正如本文所详述的，我们现在专注于人机循环规划器，操作员可以通过功能航路点在 VR 中发送更高级别的操作和导航目标，在 3D 虚拟空间中可视化机器人规划器的结果，然后拒绝、更改或确认发送给机器人的计划。此外，我们还对界面进行了调整，使其不仅适用于人形机器人，还适用于移动操纵机器人。有关视频演示，请参阅 https://youtu.be/wEHZug_fxrA 上的随附视频。

AI.tldr: 开发了一个半自主的VR规划系统，使操作者能在虚拟环境中设定机器人任务，可视化路径并调整计划。
AI.motivation: 传统机器人路径规划在复杂环境中效率低，VR的3D视角可提升操作者对空间的理解与规划能力。
AI.method: 设计VR交互接口，集成路径规划算法，允许用户通过功能路点设定目标，实时可视化规划结果并调整方案，适配人形与移动机械臂机器人。
AI.result: 系统成功实现两种机器人的人机协同规划，用户可通过VR直观调整路径，视频演示验证了方法的可行性。
AI.conclusion: VR半自主规划系统提升了复杂环境下的任务效率，未来可扩展至更多机器人类型与场景。

authors_text: Jordan Allspaw,Gregory LeMasurier,Holly Yanco
title: Implementing Virtual Reality for Teleoperation of a Humanoid Robot
title_zh: 实现人形机器人远程操作的虚拟现实
comment: Virtual, Augmented, and Mixed Reality for HRI, March 23, 2020, Cambridge, UK
comments: Virtual, Augmented, and Mixed Reality for HRI, March 23, 2020, Cambridge, UK
abstract: Our research explores the potential of a humanoid robot for work in unpredictable environments, but controlling a humanoid robot remains a very difficult problem. In our previous work, we designed a prototype virtual reality (VR) interface to allow an operator to command a humanoid robot. However, while usable, the initial interface was not sufficient for commanding the robot to perform the tasks; for example, in some cases, there was a lack of precision available for robot control. The interface was overly cumbersome in some areas as well. In this paper, we discuss numerous additions, inspired by traditional interfaces and virtual reality video games, to our prior implementation, providing additional ways to visualize and command a humanoid robot to perform difficult tasks within a virtual world.
summary: Our research explores the potential of a humanoid robot for work in unpredictable environments, but controlling a humanoid robot remains a very difficult problem. In our previous work, we designed a prototype virtual reality (VR) interface to allow an operator to command a humanoid robot. However, while usable, the initial interface was not sufficient for commanding the robot to perform the tasks; for example, in some cases, there was a lack of precision available for robot control. The interface was overly cumbersome in some areas as well. In this paper, we discuss numerous additions, inspired by traditional interfaces and virtual reality video games, to our prior implementation, providing additional ways to visualize and command a humanoid robot to perform difficult tasks within a virtual world.
abstract_zh: 我们的研究探索了人形机器人在不可预测的环境中工作的潜力，但控制人形机器人仍然是一个非常困难的问题。在我们之前的工作中，我们设计了一个原型虚拟现实（VR）界面，以允许操作员命令人形机器人。然而，虽然可用，但初始界面不足以命令机器人执行任务；例如，在某些情况下，机器人控制缺乏精度。该界面在某些方面也过于繁琐。在本文中，受传统界面和虚拟现实视频游戏的启发，我们讨论了对我们之前的实现的许多补充，提供了额外的方法来可视化和命令人形机器人在虚拟世界中执行困难的任务。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过改进虚拟现实接口，提升人形机器人在复杂环境中的远程操作能力。
AI.motivation: 现有VR接口在控制精度和操作便捷性上存在不足，难以满足复杂任务的需求。
AI.method: 结合传统控制界面与虚拟现实游戏元素，优化可视化和操作方式，提升控制精度和效率。
AI.result: 改进后的接口提高了控制精度，简化了操作流程，增强了复杂任务的执行能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合传统界面与VR游戏机制，优化后的VR接口有效提升了人形机器人远程操作的可行性和效率。

search_text: Implementing Virtual Reality for Teleoperation of a Humanoid Robot 实现人形机器人远程操作的虚拟现实 Our research explores the potential of a humanoid robot for work in unpredictable environments, but controlling a humanoid robot remains a very difficult problem. In our previous work, we designed a prototype virtual reality (VR) interface to allow an operator to command a humanoid robot. However, while usable, the initial interface was not sufficient for commanding the robot to perform the tasks; for example, in some cases, there was a lack of precision available for robot control. The interface was overly cumbersome in some areas as well. In this paper, we discuss numerous additions, inspired by traditional interfaces and virtual reality video games, to our prior implementation, providing additional ways to visualize and command a humanoid robot to perform difficult tasks within a virtual world. 我们的研究探索了人形机器人在不可预测的环境中工作的潜力，但控制人形机器人仍然是一个非常困难的问题。在我们之前的工作中，我们设计了一个原型虚拟现实（VR）界面，以允许操作员命令人形机器人。然而，虽然可用，但初始界面不足以命令机器人执行任务；例如，在某些情况下，机器人控制缺乏精度。该界面在某些方面也过于繁琐。在本文中，受传统界面和虚拟现实视频游戏的启发，我们讨论了对我们之前的实现的许多补充，提供了额外的方法来可视化和命令人形机器人在虚拟世界中执行困难的任务。 本文旨在通过改进虚拟现实接口，提升人形机器人在复杂环境中的远程操作能力。 Jordan Allspaw,Gregory LeMasurier,Holly Yanco cs.RO

authors_text: Wengran Wang,Chenhao Zhang,Andreas Stahlbauer,Gordon Fraser,Thomas Price
title: SnapCheck: Automated Testing for Snap Programs
title_zh: SnapCheck：Snap 程序的自动测试
abstract: Programming environments such as Snap, Scratch, and Processing engage learners by allowing them to create programming artifacts such as apps and games, with visual and interactive output. Learning programming with such a media-focused context has been shown to increase retention and success rate. However, assessing these visual, interactive projects requires time and laborious manual effort, and it is therefore difficult to offer automated or real-time feedback to students as they work. In this paper, we introduce SnapCheck, a dynamic testing framework for Snap that enables instructors to author test cases with Condition-Action templates. The goal of SnapCheck is to allow instructors or researchers to author property-based test cases that can automatically assess students' interactive programs with high accuracy. Our evaluation of SnapCheck on 162 code snapshots from a Pong game assignment in an introductory programming course shows that our automated testing framework achieves at least 98% accuracy over all rubric items, showing potentials to use SnapCheck for auto-grading and providing formative feedback to students.
summary: Programming environments such as Snap, Scratch, and Processing engage learners by allowing them to create programming artifacts such as apps and games, with visual and interactive output. Learning programming with such a media-focused context has been shown to increase retention and success rate. However, assessing these visual, interactive projects requires time and laborious manual effort, and it is therefore difficult to offer automated or real-time feedback to students as they work. In this paper, we introduce SnapCheck, a dynamic testing framework for Snap that enables instructors to author test cases with Condition-Action templates. The goal of SnapCheck is to allow instructors or researchers to author property-based test cases that can automatically assess students' interactive programs with high accuracy. Our evaluation of SnapCheck on 162 code snapshots from a Pong game assignment in an introductory programming course shows that our automated testing framework achieves at least 98% accuracy over all rubric items, showing potentials to use SnapCheck for auto-grading and providing formative feedback to students.
abstract_zh: Snap、Scratch 和Processing 等编程环境通过允许学习者创建具有可视化和交互式输出的编程工件（例如应用程序和游戏）来吸引学习者。事实证明，在这种以媒体为中心的背景下学习编程可以提高记忆力和成功率。然而，评估这些视觉、交互式项目需要时间和费力的手动工作，因此很难在学生工作时向他们提供自动化或实时反馈。在本文中，我们介绍了 SnapCheck，这是一个 Snap 的动态测试框架，使教师能够使用条件-操作模板编写测试用例。 SnapCheck 的目标是允许教师或研究人员编写基于属性的测试用例，可以自动高精度地评估学生的交互程序。我们对入门编程课程中 Pong 游戏作业的 162 个代码快照进行的 SnapCheck 评估表明，我们的自动化测试框架在所有评分项目上实现了至少 98% 的准确率，显示出使用 SnapCheck 进行自动评分并为学生提供形成性反馈的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SnapCheck，一种用于Snap程序的自动化测试框架，通过条件-动作模板实现对学生交互式项目的高精度评估。
AI.motivation: 可视化编程环境（如Snap）的项目评估依赖人工，难以提供实时反馈，影响教学效率。
AI.method: 设计动态测试框架SnapCheck，允许教师通过条件-动作模板编写属性化测试用例，自动验证学生程序。
AI.result: 在162份Pong游戏代码快照的评估中，SnapCheck在所有评分项上达到至少98%的准确率。
AI.conclusion: SnapCheck验证了自动化评分与反馈在可视化编程教育中的可行性，可有效提升教学效率与学生学习效果。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出SnapCheck，一种用于Snap程序的自动化测试框架，通过条件-动作模板实现对学生交互式项目的高精度评估。
ai_content.motivation: 可视化编程环境（如Snap）的项目评估依赖人工，难以提供实时反馈，影响教学效率。
ai_content.method: 设计动态测试框架SnapCheck，允许教师通过条件-动作模板编写属性化测试用例，自动验证学生程序。
ai_content.result: 在162份Pong游戏代码快照的评估中，SnapCheck在所有评分项上达到至少98%的准确率。
ai_content.conclusion: SnapCheck验证了自动化评分与反馈在可视化编程教育中的可行性，可有效提升教学效率与学生学习效果。

search_text: SnapCheck: Automated Testing for Snap Programs SnapCheck：Snap 程序的自动测试 Programming environments such as Snap, Scratch, and Processing engage learners by allowing them to create programming artifacts such as apps and games, with visual and interactive output. Learning programming with such a media-focused context has been shown to increase retention and success rate. However, assessing these visual, interactive projects requires time and laborious manual effort, and it is therefore difficult to offer automated or real-time feedback to students as they work. In this paper, we introduce SnapCheck, a dynamic testing framework for Snap that enables instructors to author test cases with Condition-Action templates. The goal of SnapCheck is to allow instructors or researchers to author property-based test cases that can automatically assess students' interactive programs with high accuracy. Our evaluation of SnapCheck on 162 code snapshots from a Pong game assignment in an introductory programming course shows that our automated testing framework achieves at least 98% accuracy over all rubric items, showing potentials to use SnapCheck for auto-grading and providing formative feedback to students. Snap、Scratch 和Processing 等编程环境通过允许学习者创建具有可视化和交互式输出的编程工件（例如应用程序和游戏）来吸引学习者。事实证明，在这种以媒体为中心的背景下学习编程可以提高记忆力和成功率。然而，评估这些视觉、交互式项目需要时间和费力的手动工作，因此很难在学生工作时向他们提供自动化或实时反馈。在本文中，我们介绍了 SnapCheck，这是一个 Snap 的动态测试框架，使教师能够使用条件-操作模板编写测试用例。 SnapCheck 的目标是允许教师或研究人员编写基于属性的测试用例，可以自动高精度地评估学生的交互程序。我们对入门编程课程中 Pong 游戏作业的 162 个代码快照进行的 SnapCheck 评估表明，我们的自动化测试框架在所有评分项目上实现了至少 98% 的准确率，显示出使用 SnapCheck 进行自动评分并为学生提供形成性反馈的潜力。 本文提出SnapCheck，一种用于Snap程序的自动化测试框架，通过条件-动作模板实现对学生交互式项目的高精度评估。 Wengran Wang,Chenhao Zhang,Andreas Stahlbauer,Gordon Fraser,Thomas Price cs.SE,cs.HC

authors_text: Pavel Surynek
title: Compilation-based Solvers for Multi-Agent Path Finding: a Survey, Discussion, and Future Opportunities
title_zh: 用于多智能体路径查找的基于编译的求解器：调查、讨论和未来机会
abstract: Multi-agent path finding (MAPF) attracts considerable attention in artificial intelligence community as well as in robotics, and other fields such as warehouse logistics. The task in the standard MAPF is to find paths through which agents can navigate from their starting positions to specified individual goal positions. The combination of two additional requirements makes the problem computationally challenging: (i) agents must not collide with each other and (ii) the paths must be optimal with respect to some objective. Two major approaches to optimal MAPF solving include (1) dedicated search-based methods, which solve MAPF directly, and (2) compilation-based methods that reduce a MAPF instance to an instance in a different well established formalism, for which an efficient solver exists. The compilation-based MAPF solving can benefit from advancements accumulated during the development of the target solver often decades long. We summarize and compare contemporary compilation-based solvers for MAPF using formalisms like ASP, MIP, and SAT. We show the lessons learned from past developments and current trends in the topic and discuss its wider impact.
summary: Multi-agent path finding (MAPF) attracts considerable attention in artificial intelligence community as well as in robotics, and other fields such as warehouse logistics. The task in the standard MAPF is to find paths through which agents can navigate from their starting positions to specified individual goal positions. The combination of two additional requirements makes the problem computationally challenging: (i) agents must not collide with each other and (ii) the paths must be optimal with respect to some objective. Two major approaches to optimal MAPF solving include (1) dedicated search-based methods, which solve MAPF directly, and (2) compilation-based methods that reduce a MAPF instance to an instance in a different well established formalism, for which an efficient solver exists. The compilation-based MAPF solving can benefit from advancements accumulated during the development of the target solver often decades long. We summarize and compare contemporary compilation-based solvers for MAPF using formalisms like ASP, MIP, and SAT. We show the lessons learned from past developments and current trends in the topic and discuss its wider impact.
abstract_zh: 多智能体路径查找（MAPF）在人工智能界、机器人技术以及仓储物流等其他领域引起了相当大的关注。标准 MAPF 中的任务是找到代理可以从其起始位置导航到指定的单独目标位置的路径。两个附加要求的结合使得该问题在计算上具有挑战性：（i）代理不得相互碰撞，（ii）路径必须相对于某些目标是最佳的。最佳 MAPF 求解的两种主要方法包括（1）基于专用搜索的方法，直接求解 MAPF，以及（2）基于编译的方法，将 MAPF 实例简化为不同的已建立的形式体系中的实例，对此存在有效的求解器。基于编译的 MAPF 求解可以受益于目标求解器开发过程中积累的进步（通常长达数十年）。我们使用 ASP、MIP 和 SAT 等形式总结并比较了当代基于编译的 MAPF 求解器。我们展示了从该主题的过去发展和当前趋势中汲取的经验教训，并讨论了其更广泛的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文综述并比较了基于编译的多智能体路径规划（MAPF）求解方法，探讨其发展历程、现状及未来方向。
AI.motivation: MAPF问题因避障和路径最优性要求而计算复杂，基于编译的方法可借助已有高效求解器的优势，提升解决效率。
AI.method: 通过总结和对比ASP、MIP、SAT等形式化方法的当前编译求解器，分析其技术特点与适用场景。
AI.result: 提炼出编译方法的发展经验与当前趋势，讨论其在人工智能、机器人等领域的广泛应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 编译基于形式化方法的MAPF求解技术具有重要研究价值，未来需进一步优化编译效率与求解器适配性。

authors_text: Wengran Wang,Archit Kwatra,James Skripchuk,Neeloy Gomes,Alexandra Milliken,Chris Martens,Tiffany Barnes,Thomas Price
title: Novices' Learning Barriers When Using Code Examples in Open-Ended Programming
title_zh: 新手在开放式编程中使用代码示例时的学习障碍
abstract: Open-ended programming increases students' motivation by allowing them to solve authentic problems and connect programming to their own interests. However, such open-ended projects are also challenging, as they often encourage students to explore new programming features and attempt tasks that they have not learned before. Code examples are effective learning materials for students and are well-suited to supporting open-ended programming. However, there is little work to understand how novices learn with examples during open-ended programming, and few real-world deployments of such tools. In this paper, we explore novices' learning barriers when interacting with code examples during open-ended programming. We deployed Example Helper, a tool that offers galleries of code examples to search and use, with 44 novice students in an introductory programming classroom, working on an open-ended project in Snap. We found three high-level barriers that novices encountered when using examples: decision, search and integration barriers. We discuss how these barriers arise and design opportunities to address them.
summary: Open-ended programming increases students' motivation by allowing them to solve authentic problems and connect programming to their own interests. However, such open-ended projects are also challenging, as they often encourage students to explore new programming features and attempt tasks that they have not learned before. Code examples are effective learning materials for students and are well-suited to supporting open-ended programming. However, there is little work to understand how novices learn with examples during open-ended programming, and few real-world deployments of such tools. In this paper, we explore novices' learning barriers when interacting with code examples during open-ended programming. We deployed Example Helper, a tool that offers galleries of code examples to search and use, with 44 novice students in an introductory programming classroom, working on an open-ended project in Snap. We found three high-level barriers that novices encountered when using examples: decision, search and integration barriers. We discuss how these barriers arise and design opportunities to address them.
abstract_zh: 开放式编程允许学生解决真实的问题并将编程与自己的兴趣联系起来，从而提高学生的积极性。然而，这种开放式项目也具有挑战性，因为它们经常鼓励学生探索新的编程功能并尝试他们以前没有学过的任务。代码示例是学生有效的学习材料，非常适合支持开放式编程。然而，很少有工作可以理解新手在开放式编程过程中如何通过示例进行学习，而且此类工具的实际部署也很少。在本文中，我们探讨了新手在开放式编程期间与代码示例交互时的学习障碍。我们部署了Example Helper，这是一个提供代码示例库供搜索和使用的工具，44 名新手学生在入门编程课堂上，在 Snap 中开发一个开放式项目。我们发现新手在使用示例时遇到的三个高级障碍：决策、搜索和集成障碍。我们讨论这些障碍是如何产生的，并设计解决这些障碍的机会。

AI.tldr: 研究新手在开放性编程中使用代码示例时遇到的学习障碍
AI.motivation: 开放性编程虽能提升动机，但学生面临挑战，代码示例虽有效但缺乏对其使用障碍的研究
AI.method: 部署Example Helper工具，收集44名新手在Snap中的开放项目数据
AI.result: 发现三个主要障碍：决策、搜索和整合障碍
AI.conclusion: 分析障碍成因，提出改进设计的机遇

authors_text: Gunduz Vehbi Demirci,Hakan Ferhatosmanoglu
title: Partitioning sparse deep neural networks for scalable training and inference
title_zh: 分区稀疏深度神经网络以进行可扩展的训练和推理
comment: Gunduz Vehbi Demirci and Hakan Ferhatosmanoglu. 2021. Partitioning Sparse Deep Neural Networks for Scalable Training and Inference. In 2021 International Conference on Supercomputing (ICS '21), June 14-17, 2021, Virtual Event, USA. ACM, New York, NY, USA, 12 pages
comments: Gunduz Vehbi Demirci and Hakan Ferhatosmanoglu. 2021. Partitioning Sparse Deep Neural Networks for Scalable Training and Inference. In 2021 International Conference on Supercomputing (ICS '21), June 14-17, 2021, Virtual Event, USA. ACM, New York, NY, USA, 12 pages
abstract: The state-of-the-art deep neural networks (DNNs) have significant computational and data management requirements. The size of both training data and models continue to increase. Sparsification and pruning methods are shown to be effective in removing a large fraction of connections in DNNs. The resulting sparse networks present unique challenges to further improve the computational efficiency of training and inference in deep learning. Both the feedforward (inference) and backpropagation steps in stochastic gradient descent (SGD) algorithm for training sparse DNNs involve consecutive sparse matrix-vector multiplications (SpMVs). We first introduce a distributed-memory parallel SpMV-based solution for the SGD algorithm to improve its scalability. The parallelization approach is based on row-wise partitioning of weight matrices that represent neuron connections between consecutive layers. We then propose a novel hypergraph model for partitioning weight matrices to reduce the total communication volume and ensure computational load-balance among processors. Experiments performed on sparse DNNs demonstrate that the proposed solution is highly efficient and scalable. By utilizing the proposed matrix partitioning scheme, the performance of our solution is further improved significantly.
summary: The state-of-the-art deep neural networks (DNNs) have significant computational and data management requirements. The size of both training data and models continue to increase. Sparsification and pruning methods are shown to be effective in removing a large fraction of connections in DNNs. The resulting sparse networks present unique challenges to further improve the computational efficiency of training and inference in deep learning. Both the feedforward (inference) and backpropagation steps in stochastic gradient descent (SGD) algorithm for training sparse DNNs involve consecutive sparse matrix-vector multiplications (SpMVs). We first introduce a distributed-memory parallel SpMV-based solution for the SGD algorithm to improve its scalability. The parallelization approach is based on row-wise partitioning of weight matrices that represent neuron connections between consecutive layers. We then propose a novel hypergraph model for partitioning weight matrices to reduce the total communication volume and ensure computational load-balance among processors. Experiments performed on sparse DNNs demonstrate that the proposed solution is highly efficient and scalable. By utilizing the proposed matrix partitioning scheme, the performance of our solution is further improved significantly.
abstract_zh: 最先进的深度神经网络 (DNN) 具有巨大的计算和数据管理要求。训练数据和模型的规模不断增加。稀疏化和剪枝方法被证明可以有效去除 DNN 中的大部分连接。由此产生的稀疏网络对进一步提高深度学习中训练和推理的计算效率提出了独特的挑战。用于训练稀疏 DNN 的随机梯度下降 (SGD) 算法中的前馈（推理）和反向传播步骤都涉及连续稀疏矩阵向量乘法 (SpMV)。我们首先为 SGD 算法引入基于分布式内存并行 SpMV 的解决方案，以提高其可扩展性。并行化方法基于权重矩阵的行划分，权重矩阵表示连续层之间的神经元连接。然后，我们提出了一种新颖的超图模型，用于划分权重矩阵，以减少总通信量并确保处理器之间的计算负载平衡。在稀疏 DNN 上进行的实验表明，所提出的解决方案非常高效且可扩展。通过利用所提出的矩阵划分方案，我们的解决方案的性能进一步显着提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对稀疏深度神经网络的分区方法，以提升训练和推理的计算效率与可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 随着深度神经网络规模扩大，稀疏化后的网络在训练和推理中面临计算效率与通信开销的挑战，需优化分区策略以实现高效并行计算。
AI.method: 基于分布式内存的并行稀疏矩阵-向量乘法（SpMV）方案，结合新型超图模型对权重矩阵进行分区，以降低通信量并平衡计算负载。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在稀疏DNN上显著提升了训练和推理性能，验证了其高效性与可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的分区方案有效解决了稀疏DNN的计算瓶颈，为大规模深度学习系统的优化提供了可行路径。

search_text: Partitioning sparse deep neural networks for scalable training and inference 分区稀疏深度神经网络以进行可扩展的训练和推理 The state-of-the-art deep neural networks (DNNs) have significant computational and data management requirements. The size of both training data and models continue to increase. Sparsification and pruning methods are shown to be effective in removing a large fraction of connections in DNNs. The resulting sparse networks present unique challenges to further improve the computational efficiency of training and inference in deep learning. Both the feedforward (inference) and backpropagation steps in stochastic gradient descent (SGD) algorithm for training sparse DNNs involve consecutive sparse matrix-vector multiplications (SpMVs). We first introduce a distributed-memory parallel SpMV-based solution for the SGD algorithm to improve its scalability. The parallelization approach is based on row-wise partitioning of weight matrices that represent neuron connections between consecutive layers. We then propose a novel hypergraph model for partitioning weight matrices to reduce the total communication volume and ensure computational load-balance among processors. Experiments performed on sparse DNNs demonstrate that the proposed solution is highly efficient and scalable. By utilizing the proposed matrix partitioning scheme, the performance of our solution is further improved significantly. 最先进的深度神经网络 (DNN) 具有巨大的计算和数据管理要求。训练数据和模型的规模不断增加。稀疏化和剪枝方法被证明可以有效去除 DNN 中的大部分连接。由此产生的稀疏网络对进一步提高深度学习中训练和推理的计算效率提出了独特的挑战。用于训练稀疏 DNN 的随机梯度下降 (SGD) 算法中的前馈（推理）和反向传播步骤都涉及连续稀疏矩阵向量乘法 (SpMV)。我们首先为 SGD 算法引入基于分布式内存并行 SpMV 的解决方案，以提高其可扩展性。并行化方法基于权重矩阵的行划分，权重矩阵表示连续层之间的神经元连接。然后，我们提出了一种新颖的超图模型，用于划分权重矩阵，以减少总通信量并确保处理器之间的计算负载平衡。在稀疏 DNN 上进行的实验表明，所提出的解决方案非常高效且可扩展。通过利用所提出的矩阵划分方案，我们的解决方案的性能进一步显着提高。 本文提出一种针对稀疏深度神经网络的分区方法，以提升训练和推理的计算效率与可扩展性。 Gunduz Vehbi Demirci,Hakan Ferhatosmanoglu cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.DC

authors_text: Théophile Champion,Marek Grześ,Howard Bowman
title: Realising Active Inference in Variational Message Passing: the Outcome-blind Certainty Seeker
title_zh: 在变分消息传递中实现主动推理：结果盲目的确定性寻求者
comment: 60 pages, 19 figures, final version accepted for publication in Neural Computation
comments: 60 pages, 19 figures, final version accepted for publication in Neural Computation
abstract: Active inference is a state-of-the-art framework in neuroscience that offers a unified theory of brain function. It is also proposed as a framework for planning in AI. Unfortunately, the complex mathematics required to create new models -- can impede application of active inference in neuroscience and AI research. This paper addresses this problem by providing a complete mathematical treatment of the active inference framework -- in discrete time and state spaces -- and the derivation of the update equations for any new model. We leverage the theoretical connection between active inference and variational message passing as describe by John Winn and Christopher M. Bishop in 2005. Since, variational message passing is a well-defined methodology for deriving Bayesian belief update equations, this paper opens the door to advanced generative models for active inference. We show that using a fully factorized variational distribution simplifies the expected free energy -- that furnishes priors over policies -- so that agents seek unambiguous states. Finally, we consider future extensions that support deep tree searches for sequential policy optimisation -- based upon structure learning and belief propagation.
summary: Active inference is a state-of-the-art framework in neuroscience that offers a unified theory of brain function. It is also proposed as a framework for planning in AI. Unfortunately, the complex mathematics required to create new models -- can impede application of active inference in neuroscience and AI research. This paper addresses this problem by providing a complete mathematical treatment of the active inference framework -- in discrete time and state spaces -- and the derivation of the update equations for any new model. We leverage the theoretical connection between active inference and variational message passing as describe by John Winn and Christopher M. Bishop in 2005. Since, variational message passing is a well-defined methodology for deriving Bayesian belief update equations, this paper opens the door to advanced generative models for active inference. We show that using a fully factorized variational distribution simplifies the expected free energy -- that furnishes priors over policies -- so that agents seek unambiguous states. Finally, we consider future extensions that support deep tree searches for sequential policy optimisation -- based upon structure learning and belief propagation.
abstract_zh: 主动推理是神经科学领域最先进的框架，提供了大脑功能的统一理论。它还被提议作为人工智能规划的框架。不幸的是，创建新模型所需的复杂数学可能会阻碍主动推理在神经科学和人工智能研究中的应用。本文通过在离散时间和状态空间中提供主动推理框架的完整数学处理以及任何新模型的更新方程的推导来解决这个问题。我们利用了 John Winn 和 Christopher M. Bishop 在 2005 年描述的主动推理和变分消息传递之间的理论联系。由于变分消息传递是导出贝叶斯置信更新方程的明确定义的方法，因此本文为主动推理的高级生成模型打开了大门。我们证明，使用完全因式分解的变分分布可以简化预期的自由能（提供优先于政策的先验），以便智能体寻求明确的状态。最后，我们考虑未来的扩展，支持基于结构学习和置信传播的深度树搜索以实现顺序策略优化。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过变分消息传递框架实现主动推理，简化其数学复杂性以促进在神经科学和AI中的应用。
AI.motivation: 主动推理框架的数学复杂性阻碍了其在神经科学和AI领域的应用，需提供更易实现的数学工具。
AI.method: 基于变分消息传递理论，推导离散时间状态空间下的更新方程，并利用完全因子化变分分布简化预期自由能。
AI.result: 简化后的预期自由能使智能体追求明确状态，为高级生成模型奠定基础，并提出基于结构学习的深度树搜索扩展方案。
AI.conclusion: 本文为活性推理提供了可扩展的数学框架，通过变分消息传递降低应用门槛，未来将支持更复杂的策略优化方法。

authors_text: Gabriel Eilertsen,Apostolia Tsirikoglou,Claes Lundström,Jonas Unger
title: Ensembles of GANs for synthetic training data generation
title_zh: 用于生成合成训练数据的 GAN 集合
comment: ICLR 2021 workshop on Synthetic Data Generation: Quality, Privacy, Bias
comments: ICLR 2021 workshop on Synthetic Data Generation: Quality, Privacy, Bias
abstract: Insufficient training data is a major bottleneck for most deep learning practices, not least in medical imaging where data is difficult to collect and publicly available datasets are scarce due to ethics and privacy. This work investigates the use of synthetic images, created by generative adversarial networks (GANs), as the only source of training data. We demonstrate that for this application, it is of great importance to make use of multiple GANs to improve the diversity of the generated data, i.e. to sufficiently cover the data distribution. While a single GAN can generate seemingly diverse image content, training on this data in most cases lead to severe over-fitting. We test the impact of ensembled GANs on synthetic 2D data as well as common image datasets (SVHN and CIFAR-10), and using both DCGANs and progressively growing GANs. As a specific use case, we focus on synthesizing digital pathology patches to provide anonymized training data.
summary: Insufficient training data is a major bottleneck for most deep learning practices, not least in medical imaging where data is difficult to collect and publicly available datasets are scarce due to ethics and privacy. This work investigates the use of synthetic images, created by generative adversarial networks (GANs), as the only source of training data. We demonstrate that for this application, it is of great importance to make use of multiple GANs to improve the diversity of the generated data, i.e. to sufficiently cover the data distribution. While a single GAN can generate seemingly diverse image content, training on this data in most cases lead to severe over-fitting. We test the impact of ensembled GANs on synthetic 2D data as well as common image datasets (SVHN and CIFAR-10), and using both DCGANs and progressively growing GANs. As a specific use case, we focus on synthesizing digital pathology patches to provide anonymized training data.
abstract_zh: 训练数据不足是大多数深度学习实践的主要瓶颈，尤其是在医学成像领域，因为道德和隐私原因，数据难以收集且公开可用的数据集稀缺。这项工作研究了生成对抗网络（GAN）创建的合成图像作为训练数据的唯一来源的使用。我们证明，对于该应用程序，利用多个 GAN 来提高生成数据的多样性（即充分覆盖数据分布）非常重要。虽然单个 GAN 可以生成看似不同的图像内容，但在大多数情况下对此数据进行训练会导致严重的过度拟合。我们测试了集成 GAN 对合成 2D 数据以及常见图像数据集（SVHN 和 CIFAR-10）的影响，并使用 DCGAN 和逐步增长的 GAN。作为一个特定的用例，我们专注于合成数字病理学补丁以提供匿名训练数据。

AI.tldr: 本文研究利用多个生成对抗网络（GANs）生成合成训练数据，以解决医疗影像等领域训练数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 医疗影像等领域因伦理和隐私问题导致公开数据稀缺，单一GAN生成的数据易导致模型过拟合，需提升数据多样性。
AI.method: 通过集成多个GAN（包括DCGAN和渐进增长GAN）生成合成数据，并在2D数据及SVHN/CIFAR-10数据集上验证效果，重点应用于数字病理切片合成。
AI.result: 实验表明，集成GAN显著提升生成数据的多样性，减少过拟合，且在合成病理切片任务中有效生成匿名化训练数据。
AI.conclusion: 多GAN集成方法能有效增强合成数据质量，为数据稀缺领域提供可行的训练数据生成方案。

method: 通过集成多个GAN（包括DCGAN和渐进增长GAN）生成合成数据，并在2D数据及SVHN/CIFAR-10数据集上验证效果，重点应用于数字病理切片合成。
result: 实验表明，集成GAN显著提升生成数据的多样性，减少过拟合，且在合成病理切片任务中有效生成匿名化训练数据。
conclusion: 多GAN集成方法能有效增强合成数据质量，为数据稀缺领域提供可行的训练数据生成方案。
search_text: Ensembles of GANs for synthetic training data generation 用于生成合成训练数据的 GAN 集合 Insufficient training data is a major bottleneck for most deep learning practices, not least in medical imaging where data is difficult to collect and publicly available datasets are scarce due to ethics and privacy. This work investigates the use of synthetic images, created by generative adversarial networks (GANs), as the only source of training data. We demonstrate that for this application, it is of great importance to make use of multiple GANs to improve the diversity of the generated data, i.e. to sufficiently cover the data distribution. While a single GAN can generate seemingly diverse image content, training on this data in most cases lead to severe over-fitting. We test the impact of ensembled GANs on synthetic 2D data as well as common image datasets (SVHN and CIFAR-10), and using both DCGANs and progressively growing GANs. As a specific use case, we focus on synthesizing digital pathology patches to provide anonymized training data. 训练数据不足是大多数深度学习实践的主要瓶颈，尤其是在医学成像领域，因为道德和隐私原因，数据难以收集且公开可用的数据集稀缺。这项工作研究了生成对抗网络（GAN）创建的合成图像作为训练数据的唯一来源的使用。我们证明，对于该应用程序，利用多个 GAN 来提高生成数据的多样性（即充分覆盖数据分布）非常重要。虽然单个 GAN 可以生成看似不同的图像内容，但在大多数情况下对此数据进行训练会导致严重的过度拟合。我们测试了集成 GAN 对合成 2D 数据以及常见图像数据集（SVHN 和 CIFAR-10）的影响，并使用 DCGAN 和逐步增长的 GAN。作为一个特定的用例，我们专注于合成数字病理学补丁以提供匿名训练数据。 本文研究利用多个生成对抗网络（GANs）生成合成训练数据，以解决医疗影像等领域训练数据不足的问题。 Gabriel Eilertsen,Apostolia Tsirikoglou,Claes Lundström,Jonas Unger cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Valentina Rossi,Paolo Testolina,Marco Giordani,Michele Zorzi
title: On the Role of Sensor Fusion for Object Detection in Future Vehicular Networks
title_zh: 传感器融合在未来车辆网络中目标检测中的作用
comment: This paper has been accepted for presentation at the Joint European Conference on Networks and Communications & 6G Summit (EuCNC/6G Summit). 6 pages, 6 figures, 1 table
comments: This paper has been accepted for presentation at the Joint European Conference on Networks and Communications & 6G Summit (EuCNC/6G Summit). 6 pages, 6 figures, 1 table
abstract: Fully autonomous driving systems require fast detection and recognition of sensitive objects in the environment. In this context, intelligent vehicles should share their sensor data with computing platforms and/or other vehicles, to detect objects beyond their own sensors' fields of view. However, the resulting huge volumes of data to be exchanged can be challenging to handle for standard communication technologies. In this paper, we evaluate how using a combination of different sensors affects the detection of the environment in which the vehicles move and operate. The final objective is to identify the optimal setup that would minimize the amount of data to be distributed over the channel, with negligible degradation in terms of object detection accuracy. To this aim, we extend an already available object detection algorithm so that it can consider, as an input, camera images, LiDAR point clouds, or a combination of the two, and compare the accuracy performance of the different approaches using two realistic datasets. Our results show that, although sensor fusion always achieves more accurate detections, LiDAR only inputs can obtain similar results for large objects while mitigating the burden on the channel.
summary: Fully autonomous driving systems require fast detection and recognition of sensitive objects in the environment. In this context, intelligent vehicles should share their sensor data with computing platforms and/or other vehicles, to detect objects beyond their own sensors' fields of view. However, the resulting huge volumes of data to be exchanged can be challenging to handle for standard communication technologies. In this paper, we evaluate how using a combination of different sensors affects the detection of the environment in which the vehicles move and operate. The final objective is to identify the optimal setup that would minimize the amount of data to be distributed over the channel, with negligible degradation in terms of object detection accuracy. To this aim, we extend an already available object detection algorithm so that it can consider, as an input, camera images, LiDAR point clouds, or a combination of the two, and compare the accuracy performance of the different approaches using two realistic datasets. Our results show that, although sensor fusion always achieves more accurate detections, LiDAR only inputs can obtain similar results for large objects while mitigating the burden on the channel.
abstract_zh: 全自动驾驶系统需要快速检测和识别环境中的敏感物体。在这种情况下，智能车辆应与计算平台和/或其他车辆共享其传感器数据，以检测超出其自身传感器视野的物体。然而，由此产生的大量要交换的数据对于标准通信技术来说可能难以处理。在本文中，我们评估了使用不同传感器的组合如何影响车辆移动和运行环境的检测。最终目标是确定最佳设置，最大限度地减少在通道上分发的数据量，并且物体检测精度的下降可以忽略不计。为此，我们扩展了现有的对象检测算法，使其可以考虑相机图像、LiDAR 点云或两者的组合作为输入，并使用两个实际数据集比较不同方法的准确性性能。我们的结果表明，虽然传感器融合总是能实现更准确的检测，但仅 LiDAR 输入可以获得大型物体的类似结果，同时减轻通道的负担。

AI.tldr: 本文研究传感器融合在车载网络中物体检测的作用，旨在找到在保持检测精度的同时减少数据传输量的最佳传感器配置。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶系统需要快速准确检测环境中的物体，但车辆间共享传感器数据会产生大量数据，给通信技术带来挑战。
AI.method: 扩展现有物体检测算法以支持摄像头图像、LiDAR点云或两者结合的输入，并使用两个真实数据集比较不同方法的检测精度。
AI.result: 传感器融合检测精度最高，但仅使用LiDAR输入在检测大型物体时可达到相近精度，同时减轻通信负担。
AI.conclusion: 传感器融合虽更优，但LiDAR单模态在特定场景下可平衡检测精度与数据传输效率，为车载网络提供可行优化方案。

authors_text: Pablo Martinez-Gonzalez,Sergiu Oprea,John Alejandro Castro-Vargas,Alberto Garcia-Garcia,Sergio Orts-Escolano,Jose Garcia-Rodriguez,Markus Vincze
title: UnrealROX+: An Improved Tool for Acquiring Synthetic Data from Virtual 3D Environments
title_zh: UnrealROX+：用于从虚拟 3D 环境获取合成数据的改进工具
comment: Accepted at International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN) 2021
comments: Accepted at International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN) 2021
abstract: Synthetic data generation has become essential in last years for feeding data-driven algorithms, which surpassed traditional techniques performance in almost every computer vision problem. Gathering and labelling the amount of data needed for these data-hungry models in the real world may become unfeasible and error-prone, while synthetic data give us the possibility of generating huge amounts of data with pixel-perfect annotations. However, most synthetic datasets lack from enough realism in their rendered images. In that context UnrealROX generation tool was presented in 2019, allowing to generate highly realistic data, at high resolutions and framerates, with an efficient pipeline based on Unreal Engine, a cutting-edge videogame engine. UnrealROX enabled robotic vision researchers to generate realistic and visually plausible data with full ground truth for a wide variety of problems such as class and instance semantic segmentation, object detection, depth estimation, visual grasping, and navigation. Nevertheless, its workflow was very tied to generate image sequences from a robotic on-board camera, making hard to generate data for other purposes. In this work, we present UnrealROX+, an improved version of UnrealROX where its decoupled and easy-to-use data acquisition system allows to quickly design and generate data in a much more flexible and customizable way. Moreover, it is packaged as an Unreal plug-in, which makes it more comfortable to use with already existing Unreal projects, and it also includes new features such as generating albedo or a Python API for interacting with the virtual environment from Deep Learning frameworks.
summary: Synthetic data generation has become essential in last years for feeding data-driven algorithms, which surpassed traditional techniques performance in almost every computer vision problem. Gathering and labelling the amount of data needed for these data-hungry models in the real world may become unfeasible and error-prone, while synthetic data give us the possibility of generating huge amounts of data with pixel-perfect annotations. However, most synthetic datasets lack from enough realism in their rendered images. In that context UnrealROX generation tool was presented in 2019, allowing to generate highly realistic data, at high resolutions and framerates, with an efficient pipeline based on Unreal Engine, a cutting-edge videogame engine. UnrealROX enabled robotic vision researchers to generate realistic and visually plausible data with full ground truth for a wide variety of problems such as class and instance semantic segmentation, object detection, depth estimation, visual grasping, and navigation. Nevertheless, its workflow was very tied to generate image sequences from a robotic on-board camera, making hard to generate data for other purposes. In this work, we present UnrealROX+, an improved version of UnrealROX where its decoupled and easy-to-use data acquisition system allows to quickly design and generate data in a much more flexible and customizable way. Moreover, it is packaged as an Unreal plug-in, which makes it more comfortable to use with already existing Unreal projects, and it also includes new features such as generating albedo or a Python API for interacting with the virtual environment from Deep Learning frameworks.
abstract_zh: 近年来，合成数据生成对于提供数据驱动算法至关重要，该算法在几乎每个计算机视觉问题上都超越了传统技术的性能。在现实世界中收集和标记这些数据匮乏的模型所需的数据量可能变得不可行且容易出错，而合成数据使我们有可能通过像素完美的注释生成大量数据。然而，大多数合成数据集的渲染图像缺乏足够的真实感。在此背景下，UnrealROX 生成工具于 2019 年推出，能够通过基于尖端视频游戏引擎 Unreal Engine 的高效管道，以高分辨率和帧速率生成高度真实的数据。 UnrealROX 使机器人视觉研究人员能够针对类和实例语义分割、对象检测、深度估计、视觉抓取和导航等各种问题生成具有完整基本事实的真实且视觉上可信的数据。尽管如此，它的工作流程与从机器人车载摄像头生成图像序列密切相关，因此很难生成用于其他目的的数据。在这项工作中，我们展示了 UnrealROX+，这是 UnrealROX 的改进版本，其解耦且易于使用的数据采集系统允许以更加灵活和可定制的方式快速设计和生成数据。此外，它被打包为 Unreal 插件，这使得它更适合与现有的 Unreal 项目一起使用，并且它还包括新功能，例如生成反照率或用于从深度学习框架与虚拟环境进行交互的 Python API。

AI.tldr: 本文提出UnrealROX+，一种改进的工具，用于从虚拟3D环境生成更灵活且高质量的合成数据。
AI.motivation: 现有合成数据工具（如UnrealROX）在生成图像序列时受限于机器人车载摄像头的流程，难以满足多样化需求，且缺乏灵活性和扩展性。
AI.method: 通过解耦数据采集系统，将工具封装为Unreal插件，并新增生成反照率贴图和Python API等功能，提升定制化与兼容性。
AI.result: UnrealROX+支持快速设计数据、无缝集成现有Unreal项目，并提供更丰富的功能接口，显著提升合成数据生成效率与实用性。
AI.conclusion: UnrealROX+解决了原有工具的局限性，为机器人视觉和计算机视觉任务提供了更高效、灵活的合成数据生成方案。

Moreover, it is packaged as an Unreal plug-in, which makes it more comfortable to use with already existing Unreal projects, and it also includes new features such as generating albedo or a Python API for interacting with the virtual environment from Deep Learning frameworks. 近年来，合成数据生成对于提供数据驱动算法至关重要，该算法在几乎每个计算机视觉问题上都超越了传统技术的性能。在现实世界中收集和标记这些数据匮乏的模型所需的数据量可能变得不可行且容易出错，而合成数据使我们有可能通过像素完美的注释生成大量数据。然而，大多数合成数据集的渲染图像缺乏足够的真实感。在此背景下，UnrealROX 生成工具于 2019 年推出，能够通过基于尖端视频游戏引擎 Unreal Engine 的高效管道，以高分辨率和帧速率生成高度真实的数据。 UnrealROX 使机器人视觉研究人员能够针对类和实例语义分割、对象检测、深度估计、视觉抓取和导航等各种问题生成具有完整基本事实的真实且视觉上可信的数据。尽管如此，它的工作流程与从机器人车载摄像头生成图像序列密切相关，因此很难生成用于其他目的的数据。在这项工作中，我们展示了 UnrealROX+，这是 UnrealROX 的改进版本，其解耦且易于使用的数据采集系统允许以更加灵活和可定制的方式快速设计和生成数据。此外，它被打包为 Unreal 插件，这使得它更适合与现有的 Unreal 项目一起使用，并且它还包括新功能，例如生成反照率或用于从深度学习框架与虚拟环境进行交互的 Python API。 本文提出UnrealROX+，一种改进的工具，用于从虚拟3D环境生成更灵活且高质量的合成数据。 Pablo Martinez-Gonzalez,Sergiu Oprea,John Alejandro Castro-Vargas,Alberto Garcia-Garcia,Sergio Orts-Escolano,Jose Garcia-Rodriguez,Markus Vincze cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.GR,cs.LG

authors_text: Jan-Nico Zaech,Dengxin Dai,Alexander Liniger,Martin Danelljan,Luc Van Gool
title: Learnable Online Graph Representations for 3D Multi-Object Tracking
title_zh: 用于 3D 多对象跟踪的可学习在线图形表示
abstract: Tracking of objects in 3D is a fundamental task in computer vision that finds use in a wide range of applications such as autonomous driving, robotics or augmented reality. Most recent approaches for 3D multi object tracking (MOT) from LIDAR use object dynamics together with a set of handcrafted features to match detections of objects. However, manually designing such features and heuristics is cumbersome and often leads to suboptimal performance. In this work, we instead strive towards a unified and learning based approach to the 3D MOT problem. We design a graph structure to jointly process detection and track states in an online manner. To this end, we employ a Neural Message Passing network for data association that is fully trainable. Our approach provides a natural way for track initialization and handling of false positive detections, while significantly improving track stability. We show the merit of the proposed approach on the publicly available nuScenes dataset by achieving state-of-the-art performance of 65.6% AMOTA and 58% fewer ID-switches.
summary: Tracking of objects in 3D is a fundamental task in computer vision that finds use in a wide range of applications such as autonomous driving, robotics or augmented reality. Most recent approaches for 3D multi object tracking (MOT) from LIDAR use object dynamics together with a set of handcrafted features to match detections of objects. However, manually designing such features and heuristics is cumbersome and often leads to suboptimal performance. In this work, we instead strive towards a unified and learning based approach to the 3D MOT problem. We design a graph structure to jointly process detection and track states in an online manner. To this end, we employ a Neural Message Passing network for data association that is fully trainable. Our approach provides a natural way for track initialization and handling of false positive detections, while significantly improving track stability. We show the merit of the proposed approach on the publicly available nuScenes dataset by achieving state-of-the-art performance of 65.6% AMOTA and 58% fewer ID-switches.
abstract_zh: 3D 对象跟踪是计算机视觉中的一项基本任务，可广泛应用于自动驾驶、机器人或增强现实等领域。 LIDAR 的最新 3D 多对象跟踪 (MOT) 方法使用对象动力学以及一组手工制作的特征来匹配对象检测。然而，手动设计此类特征和启发式方法非常麻烦，并且通常会导致性能不佳。在这项工作中，我们致力于采用统一的、基于学习的方法来解决 3D MOT 问题。我们设计了一种图结构来以在线方式联合处理检测和跟踪状态。为此，我们采用完全可训练的神经消息传递网络进行数据关联。我们的方法为轨道初始化和误报检测处理提供了一种自然的方式，同时显着提高了轨道稳定性。我们通过实现 65.6% AMOTA 的最先进性能和减少 58% 的 ID 开关，在公开的 nuScenes 数据集上展示了所提出方法的优点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可学习在线图表示的3D多目标跟踪方法，通过神经消息传递网络实现检测与跟踪状态的联合处理。
AI.motivation: 现有3D多目标跟踪方法依赖手工设计特征和启发式规则，导致性能次优且设计过程繁琐，需探索统一的端到端学习框架。
AI.method: 构建图结构联合处理检测与跟踪状态，采用全可训练的神经消息传递网络进行数据关联，实现轨迹初始化与误检处理。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上达到65.6% AMOTA指标，ID切换减少58%，取得当前最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过图神经网络有效建模目标间交互关系，在3D多目标跟踪任务中展现出优越的鲁棒性与准确性。

search_text: Learnable Online Graph Representations for 3D Multi-Object Tracking 用于 3D 多对象跟踪的可学习在线图形表示 Tracking of objects in 3D is a fundamental task in computer vision that finds use in a wide range of applications such as autonomous driving, robotics or augmented reality. Most recent approaches for 3D multi object tracking (MOT) from LIDAR use object dynamics together with a set of handcrafted features to match detections of objects. However, manually designing such features and heuristics is cumbersome and often leads to suboptimal performance. In this work, we instead strive towards a unified and learning based approach to the 3D MOT problem. We design a graph structure to jointly process detection and track states in an online manner. To this end, we employ a Neural Message Passing network for data association that is fully trainable. Our approach provides a natural way for track initialization and handling of false positive detections, while significantly improving track stability. We show the merit of the proposed approach on the publicly available nuScenes dataset by achieving state-of-the-art performance of 65.6% AMOTA and 58% fewer ID-switches. 3D 对象跟踪是计算机视觉中的一项基本任务，可广泛应用于自动驾驶、机器人或增强现实等领域。 LIDAR 的最新 3D 多对象跟踪 (MOT) 方法使用对象动力学以及一组手工制作的特征来匹配对象检测。然而，手动设计此类特征和启发式方法非常麻烦，并且通常会导致性能不佳。在这项工作中，我们致力于采用统一的、基于学习的方法来解决 3D MOT 问题。我们设计了一种图结构来以在线方式联合处理检测和跟踪状态。为此，我们采用完全可训练的神经消息传递网络进行数据关联。我们的方法为轨道初始化和误报检测处理提供了一种自然的方式，同时显着提高了轨道稳定性。我们通过实现 65.6% AMOTA 的最先进性能和减少 58% 的 ID 开关，在公开的 nuScenes 数据集上展示了所提出方法的优点。 本文提出一种基于可学习在线图表示的3D多目标跟踪方法，通过神经消息传递网络实现检测与跟踪状态的联合处理。 Jan-Nico Zaech,Dengxin Dai,Alexander Liniger,Martin Danelljan,Luc Van Gool cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Yanyi Zhang,Xinyu Li,Chunhui Liu,Bing Shuai,Yi Zhu,Biagio Brattoli,Hao Chen,Ivan Marsic,Joseph Tighe
title: VidTr: Video Transformer Without Convolutions
title_zh: VidTr：无卷积的视频转换器
abstract: We introduce Video Transformer (VidTr) with separable-attention for video classification. Comparing with commonly used 3D networks, VidTr is able to aggregate spatio-temporal information via stacked attentions and provide better performance with higher efficiency. We first introduce the vanilla video transformer and show that transformer module is able to perform spatio-temporal modeling from raw pixels, but with heavy memory usage. We then present VidTr which reduces the memory cost by 3.3$\times$ while keeping the same performance. To further optimize the model, we propose the standard deviation based topK pooling for attention ($pool_{topK\_std}$), which reduces the computation by dropping non-informative features along temporal dimension. VidTr achieves state-of-the-art performance on five commonly used datasets with lower computational requirement, showing both the efficiency and effectiveness of our design. Finally, error analysis and visualization show that VidTr is especially good at predicting actions that require long-term temporal reasoning.
summary: We introduce Video Transformer (VidTr) with separable-attention for video classification. Comparing with commonly used 3D networks, VidTr is able to aggregate spatio-temporal information via stacked attentions and provide better performance with higher efficiency. We first introduce the vanilla video transformer and show that transformer module is able to perform spatio-temporal modeling from raw pixels, but with heavy memory usage. We then present VidTr which reduces the memory cost by 3.3$\times$ while keeping the same performance. To further optimize the model, we propose the standard deviation based topK pooling for attention ($pool_{topK\_std}$), which reduces the computation by dropping non-informative features along temporal dimension. VidTr achieves state-of-the-art performance on five commonly used datasets with lower computational requirement, showing both the efficiency and effectiveness of our design. Finally, error analysis and visualization show that VidTr is especially good at predicting actions that require long-term temporal reasoning.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了具有可分离注意力的视频变换器（VidTr），用于视频分类。与常用的3D网络相比，VidTr能够通过堆叠注意力聚合时空信息，并以更高的效率提供更好的性能。我们首先介绍普通视频转换器，并表明转换器模块能够从原始像素执行时空建模，但会占用大量内存。然后我们提出了 VidTr，它在保持相同性能的同时将内存成本降低了 3.3$\times$。为了进一步优化模型，我们提出了基于标准差的 topK 注意力池（$pool_{topK\_std}$），它通过沿时间维度丢弃非信息特征来减少计算量。 VidTr 在五个常用数据集上以较低的计算要求实现了最先进的性能，显示了我们设计的效率和有效性。最后，错误分析和可视化表明，VidTr 特别擅长预测需要长期时间推理的动作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需卷积的视频分类模型VidTr，通过分离注意力机制实现时空信息聚合。
AI.motivation: 传统3D网络在视频分类中存在计算效率低、内存消耗大的问题，而现有Transformer模型虽能建模时空信息但内存占用过高。
AI.method: 设计分离注意力机制的视频Transformer，结合标准差引导的时序TopK池化（pool_topK_std）优化计算，降低3.3倍内存消耗。
AI.result: 在五个主流数据集上达到SOTA性能，计算需求更低，且对需要长期时序推理的动作预测效果显著。
AI.conclusion: VidTr通过创新注意力机制和池化策略，在保持性能的同时显著提升视频分类效率，验证了设计的有效性。

authors_text: Sander R. Klomp,Matthew van Rijn,Rob G. J. Wijnhoven,Cees G. M. Snoek,Peter H. N. de With
title: Safe Fakes: Evaluating Face Anonymizers for Face Detectors
title_zh: 安全假货：评估人脸检测器的人脸匿名器
abstract: Since the introduction of the GDPR and CCPA legislation, both public and private facial image datasets are increasingly scrutinized. Several datasets have been taken offline completely and some have been anonymized. However, it is unclear how anonymization impacts face detection performance. To our knowledge, this paper presents the first empirical study on the effect of image anonymization on supervised training of face detectors. We compare conventional face anonymizers with three state-of-the-art Generative Adversarial Network-based (GAN) methods, by training an off-the-shelf face detector on anonymized data. Our experiments investigate the suitability of anonymization methods for maintaining face detector performance, the effect of detectors overtraining on anonymization artefacts, dataset size for training an anonymizer, and the effect of training time of anonymization GANs. A final experiment investigates the correlation between common GAN evaluation metrics and the performance of a trained face detector. Although all tested anonymization methods lower the performance of trained face detectors, faces anonymized using GANs cause far smaller performance degradation than conventional methods. As the most important finding, the best-performing GAN, DeepPrivacy, removes identifiable faces for a face detector trained on anonymized data, resulting in a modest decrease from 91.0 to 88.3 mAP. In the last few years, there have been rapid improvements in realism of GAN-generated faces. We expect that further progression in GAN research will allow the use of Deep Fake technology for privacy-preserving Safe Fakes, without any performance degradation for training face detectors.
summary: Since the introduction of the GDPR and CCPA legislation, both public and private facial image datasets are increasingly scrutinized. Several datasets have been taken offline completely and some have been anonymized. However, it is unclear how anonymization impacts face detection performance. To our knowledge, this paper presents the first empirical study on the effect of image anonymization on supervised training of face detectors. We compare conventional face anonymizers with three state-of-the-art Generative Adversarial Network-based (GAN) methods, by training an off-the-shelf face detector on anonymized data. Our experiments investigate the suitability of anonymization methods for maintaining face detector performance, the effect of detectors overtraining on anonymization artefacts, dataset size for training an anonymizer, and the effect of training time of anonymization GANs. A final experiment investigates the correlation between common GAN evaluation metrics and the performance of a trained face detector. Although all tested anonymization methods lower the performance of trained face detectors, faces anonymized using GANs cause far smaller performance degradation than conventional methods. As the most important finding, the best-performing GAN, DeepPrivacy, removes identifiable faces for a face detector trained on anonymized data, resulting in a modest decrease from 91.0 to 88.3 mAP. In the last few years, there have been rapid improvements in realism of GAN-generated faces. We expect that further progression in GAN research will allow the use of Deep Fake technology for privacy-preserving Safe Fakes, without any performance degradation for training face detectors.
abstract_zh: 自 GDPR 和 CCPA 立法出台以来，公共和私人面部图像数据集都受到越来越多的审查。一些数据集已完全离线，一些数据集已匿名。然而，目前尚不清楚匿名化如何影响人脸检测性能。据我们所知，本文首次对图像匿名化对人脸检测器监督训练的影响进行了实证研究。我们通过在匿名数据上训练现成的人脸检测器，将传统的人脸匿名器与三种最先进的基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的方法进行比较。我们的实验研究了匿名化方法对于维持人脸检测器性能的适用性、检测器过度训练对匿名化伪影的影响、训练匿名器的数据集大小以及匿名化 GAN 训练时间的影响。最后一个实验研究了常见的 GAN 评估指标与经过训练的人脸检测器的性能之间的相关性。尽管所有测试的匿名方法都会降低经过训练的人脸检测器的性能，但使用 GAN 匿名化的人脸造成的性能下降比传统方法要小得多。最重要的发现是，性能最好的 GAN DeepPrivacy 删除了在匿名数据上训练的人脸检测器的可识别人脸，导致 mAP 从 91.0 适度下降到 88.3。在过去的几年里，GAN 生成的人脸的真实感得到了快速提高。我们预计 GAN 研究的进一步进展将允许使用 Deep Fake 技术来保护隐私的 Safe Fakes，而不会降低训练人脸检测器的性能。

AI.result: GAN方法（如DeepPrivacy）使检测性能仅下降2.7mAP，传统方法影响更显著
AI.conclusion: 随着GAN技术进步，未来可能实现不影响检测性能的隐私保护匿名化方法

search_text: Safe Fakes: Evaluating Face Anonymizers for Face Detectors 安全假货：评估人脸检测器的人脸匿名器 Since the introduction of the GDPR and CCPA legislation, both public and private facial image datasets are increasingly scrutinized. Several datasets have been taken offline completely and some have been anonymized. However, it is unclear how anonymization impacts face detection performance. To our knowledge, this paper presents the first empirical study on the effect of image anonymization on supervised training of face detectors. We compare conventional face anonymizers with three state-of-the-art Generative Adversarial Network-based (GAN) methods, by training an off-the-shelf face detector on anonymized data. Our experiments investigate the suitability of anonymization methods for maintaining face detector performance, the effect of detectors overtraining on anonymization artefacts, dataset size for training an anonymizer, and the effect of training time of anonymization GANs. A final experiment investigates the correlation between common GAN evaluation metrics and the performance of a trained face detector. Although all tested anonymization methods lower the performance of trained face detectors, faces anonymized using GANs cause far smaller performance degradation than conventional methods. As the most important finding, the best-performing GAN, DeepPrivacy, removes identifiable faces for a face detector trained on anonymized data, resulting in a modest decrease from 91.0 to 88.3 mAP. In the last few years, there have been rapid improvements in realism of GAN-generated faces. We expect that further progression in GAN research will allow the use of Deep Fake technology for privacy-preserving Safe Fakes, without any performance degradation for training face detectors. 自 GDPR 和 CCPA 立法出台以来，公共和私人面部图像数据集都受到越来越多的审查。一些数据集已完全离线，一些数据集已匿名。然而，目前尚不清楚匿名化如何影响人脸检测性能。据我们所知，本文首次对图像匿名化对人脸检测器监督训练的影响进行了实证研究。我们通过在匿名数据上训练现成的人脸检测器，将传统的人脸匿名器与三种最先进的基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的方法进行比较。我们的实验研究了匿名化方法对于维持人脸检测器性能的适用性、检测器过度训练对匿名化伪影的影响、训练匿名器的数据集大小以及匿名化 GAN 训练时间的影响。最后一个实验研究了常见的 GAN 评估指标与经过训练的人脸检测器的性能之间的相关性。尽管所有测试的匿名方法都会降低经过训练的人脸检测器的性能，但使用 GAN 匿名化的人脸造成的性能下降比传统方法要小得多。最重要的发现是，性能最好的 GAN DeepPrivacy 删除了在匿名数据上训练的人脸检测器的可识别人脸，导致 mAP 从 91.0 适度下降到 88.3。在过去的几年里，GAN 生成的人脸的真实感得到了快速提高。我们预计 GAN 研究的进一步进展将允许使用 Deep Fake 技术来保护隐私的 Safe Fakes，而不会降低训练人脸检测器的性能。 评估不同匿名化方法对人脸检测器训练效果的影响 Sander R. authors_text: Tao Jiang,Necati Cihan Camgoz,Richard Bowden
title: Skeletor: Skeletal Transformers for Robust Body-Pose Estimation
title_zh: Skeletor：用于稳健身体姿势估计的骨骼变压器
abstract: Predicting 3D human pose from a single monoscopic video can be highly challenging due to factors such as low resolution, motion blur and occlusion, in addition to the fundamental ambiguity in estimating 3D from 2D. Approaches that directly regress the 3D pose from independent images can be particularly susceptible to these factors and result in jitter, noise and/or inconsistencies in skeletal estimation. Much of which can be overcome if the temporal evolution of the scene and skeleton are taken into account. However, rather than tracking body parts and trying to temporally smooth them, we propose a novel transformer based network that can learn a distribution over both pose and motion in an unsupervised fashion. We call our approach Skeletor. Skeletor overcomes inaccuracies in detection and corrects partial or entire skeleton corruption. Skeletor uses strong priors learn from on 25 million frames to correct skeleton sequences smoothly and consistently. Skeletor can achieve this as it implicitly learns the spatio-temporal context of human motion via a transformer based neural network. Extensive experiments show that Skeletor achieves improved performance on 3D human pose estimation and further provides benefits for downstream tasks such as sign language translation.
summary: Predicting 3D human pose from a single monoscopic video can be highly challenging due to factors such as low resolution, motion blur and occlusion, in addition to the fundamental ambiguity in estimating 3D from 2D. Approaches that directly regress the 3D pose from independent images can be particularly susceptible to these factors and result in jitter, noise and/or inconsistencies in skeletal estimation. Much of which can be overcome if the temporal evolution of the scene and skeleton are taken into account. However, rather than tracking body parts and trying to temporally smooth them, we propose a novel transformer based network that can learn a distribution over both pose and motion in an unsupervised fashion. We call our approach Skeletor. Skeletor overcomes inaccuracies in detection and corrects partial or entire skeleton corruption. Skeletor uses strong priors learn from on 25 million frames to correct skeleton sequences smoothly and consistently. Skeletor can achieve this as it implicitly learns the spatio-temporal context of human motion via a transformer based neural network. Extensive experiments show that Skeletor achieves improved performance on 3D human pose estimation and further provides benefits for downstream tasks such as sign language translation.
abstract_zh: 除了从 2D 估计 3D 的基本模糊性之外，由于低分辨率、运动模糊和遮挡等因素，从单个单视场视频预测 3D 人体姿势可能非常具有挑战性。直接从独立图像回归 3D 姿态的方法特别容易受到这些因素的影响，并导致骨骼估计中的抖动、噪声和/或不一致。如果考虑到场景和骨架的时间演变，其中大部分问题都可以克服。然而，我们不是跟踪身体部位并尝试在时间上平滑它们，而是提出了一种基于变压器的新型网络，它可以以无监督的方式学习姿势和运动的分布。我们将我们的方法称为“骨架”。 Skeletor 克服了检测中的不准确性，并纠正了部分或整个骨架损坏。 Skeletor 使用从 2500 万帧中学习的强大先验知识来平滑一致地纠正骨架序列。 Skeletor 可以实现这一点，因为它通过基于 Transformer 的神经网络隐式学习人体运动的时空背景。大量实验表明，Skeletor 在 3D 人体姿势估计方面取得了改进的性能，并进一步为手语翻译等下游任务带来了好处。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的新型神经网络Skeletor，用于从单目视频中鲁棒地估计3D人体姿态。
AI.motivation: 现有方法直接从独立图像回归3D姿态，易受低分辨率、运动模糊和遮挡影响，导致骨骼估计出现抖动和不一致。传统方法未能有效利用时序信息。
AI.method: Skeletor通过无监督学习同时建模姿态和运动分布，利用2500万帧数据训练的强先验知识，隐式学习人体运动的时空上下文以纠正骨骼序列。
AI.result: 实验表明Skeletor在3D人体姿态估计任务中表现优于现有方法，并有效提升了手语翻译等下游任务的性能。
AI.conclusion: Skeletor通过Transformer架构有效解决了单目视频中3D姿态估计的鲁棒性问题，验证了时序建模与先验知识结合的优势。

authors_text: Marco Gaido,Matteo Negri,Mauro Cettolo,Marco Turchi
title: Beyond Voice Activity Detection: Hybrid Audio Segmentation for Direct Speech Translation
title_zh: 超越语音活动检测：用于直接语音翻译的混合音频分割
abstract: The audio segmentation mismatch between training data and those seen at run-time is a major problem in direct speech translation. Indeed, while systems are usually trained on manually segmented corpora, in real use cases they are often presented with continuous audio requiring automatic (and sub-optimal) segmentation. After comparing existing techniques (VAD-based, fixed-length and hybrid segmentation methods), in this paper we propose enhanced hybrid solutions to produce better results without sacrificing latency. Through experiments on different domains and language pairs, we show that our methods outperform all the other techniques, reducing by at least 30% the gap between the traditional VAD-based approach and optimal manual segmentation.
summary: The audio segmentation mismatch between training data and those seen at run-time is a major problem in direct speech translation. Indeed, while systems are usually trained on manually segmented corpora, in real use cases they are often presented with continuous audio requiring automatic (and sub-optimal) segmentation. After comparing existing techniques (VAD-based, fixed-length and hybrid segmentation methods), in this paper we propose enhanced hybrid solutions to produce better results without sacrificing latency. Through experiments on different domains and language pairs, we show that our methods outperform all the other techniques, reducing by at least 30% the gap between the traditional VAD-based approach and optimal manual segmentation.
abstract_zh: 训练数据与运行时看到的音频分段不匹配是直接语音翻译中的一个主要问题。事实上，虽然系统通常是在手动分割的语料库上进行训练的，但在实际使用案例中，它们通常会呈现需要自动（且次优）分割的连续音频。在比较现有技术（基于 VAD、固定长度和混合分割方法）后，在本文中，我们提出了增强的混合解决方案，以在不牺牲延迟的情况下产生更好的结果。通过对不同领域和语言对的实验，我们表明我们的方法优于所有其他技术，将传统的基于 VAD 的方法和最佳手动分割之间的差距缩小了至少 30%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出改进的混合音频分割方法，解决直接语音翻译中训练数据与实际应用间的分割不匹配问题。
AI.motivation: 现有语音翻译系统依赖手动分割的训练数据，但实际场景中连续音频需自动分割，导致性能下降。
AI.method: 通过比较VAD、固定长度及混合分割方法，提出增强型混合分割方案，在保证低延迟的同时优化分割质量。
AI.result: 实验表明，新方法在多领域和语言对上优于其他技术，缩小了传统VAD与手动分割间性能差距至少30%。
AI.conclusion: 改进的混合分割方法有效提升了直接语音翻译的准确性，为实际应用提供了更优的解决方案。
