motivation: 现有语音翻译系统依赖手动分割的训练数据，但实际场景中连续音频需自动分割，导致性能下降。
method: 通过比较VAD、固定长度及混合分割方法，提出增强型混合分割方案，在保证低延迟的同时优化分割质量。
result: 实验表明，新方法在多领域和语言对上优于其他技术，缩小了传统VAD与手动分割间性能差距至少30%。
conclusion: 改进的混合分割方法有效提升了直接语音翻译的准确性，为实际应用提供了更优的解决方案。
search_text: Beyond Voice Activity Detection: Hybrid Audio Segmentation for Direct Speech Translation 超越语音活动检测：用于直接语音翻译的混合音频分割 The audio segmentation mismatch between training data and those seen at run-time is a major problem in direct speech translation. Indeed, while systems are usually trained on manually segmented corpora, in real use cases they are often presented with continuous audio requiring automatic (and sub-optimal) segmentation. After comparing existing techniques (VAD-based, fixed-length and hybrid segmentation methods), in this paper we propose enhanced hybrid solutions to produce better results without sacrificing latency. Through experiments on different domains and language pairs, we show that our methods outperform all the other techniques, reducing by at least 30% the gap between the traditional VAD-based approach and optimal manual segmentation. 训练数据与运行时看到的音频分段不匹配是直接语音翻译中的一个主要问题。事实上，虽然系统通常是在手动分割的语料库上进行训练的，但在实际使用案例中，它们通常会呈现需要自动（且次优）分割的连续音频。在比较现有技术（基于 VAD、固定长度和混合分割方法）后，在本文中，我们提出了增强的混合解决方案，以在不牺牲延迟的情况下产生更好的结果。通过对不同领域和语言对的实验，我们表明我们的方法优于所有其他技术，将传统的基于 VAD 的方法和最佳手动分割之间的差距缩小了至少 30%。 本文提出改进的混合音频分割方法，解决直接语音翻译中训练数据与实际应用间的分割不匹配问题。 Marco Gaido,Matteo Negri,Mauro Cettolo,Marco Turchi cs.SD,cs.CL,eess.AS

authors_text: Vishnu Dutt Sharma,Pratap Tokekar
title: Risk-Aware Path Planning for Ground Vehicles using Occluded Aerial Images
title_zh: 使用遮挡航空图像进行地面车辆的风险感知路径规划
abstract: We consider scenarios where a ground vehicle plans its path using data gathered by an aerial vehicle. In the aerial images, navigable areas of the scene may be occluded due to obstacles. Naively planning paths using aerial images may result in longer paths as a conservative planner may try to avoid regions that are occluded. We propose a modular, deep learning-based framework that allows the robot to predict the existence of navigable areas in the occluded regions. Specifically, we use image inpainting methods to fill in parts of the areas that are potentially occluded, which can then be semantically segmented to determine navigability. We use supervised neural networks for both modules. However, these predictions may be incorrect. Therefore, we extract uncertainty in these predictions and use a risk-aware approach that takes these uncertainties into account for path planning. We compare modules in our approach with non-learning-based approaches to show the efficacy of the proposed framework through photo-realistic simulations. The modular pipeline allows further improvement in path planning and deployment in different settings.
summary: We consider scenarios where a ground vehicle plans its path using data gathered by an aerial vehicle. In the aerial images, navigable areas of the scene may be occluded due to obstacles. Naively planning paths using aerial images may result in longer paths as a conservative planner may try to avoid regions that are occluded. We propose a modular, deep learning-based framework that allows the robot to predict the existence of navigable areas in the occluded regions. Specifically, we use image inpainting methods to fill in parts of the areas that are potentially occluded, which can then be semantically segmented to determine navigability. We use supervised neural networks for both modules. However, these predictions may be incorrect. Therefore, we extract uncertainty in these predictions and use a risk-aware approach that takes these uncertainties into account for path planning. We compare modules in our approach with non-learning-based approaches to show the efficacy of the proposed framework through photo-realistic simulations. The modular pipeline allows further improvement in path planning and deployment in different settings.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑地面车辆使用飞行器收集的数据来规划其路径的场景。在航拍图像中，场景的可导航区域可能会因障碍物而被遮挡。使用航空图像天真地规划路径可能会导致更长的路径，因为保守的规划者可能会尝试避开被遮挡的区域。我们提出了一个基于深度学习的模块化框架，允许机器人预测遮挡区域中是否存在可导航区域。具体来说，我们使用图像修复方法来填充可能被遮挡的部分区域，然后可以对这些区域进行语义分割以确定可导航性。我们对这两个模块都使用监督神经网络。然而，这些预测可能是不正确的。因此，我们提取这些预测中的不确定性，并使用风险意识方法将这些不确定性考虑到路径规划中。我们将我们的方法中的模块与非基于学习的方法进行比较，以通过逼真的模拟来展示所提出的框架的功效。模块化管道可以进一步改进不同设置中的路径规划和部署。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的模块化框架，用于地面车辆在遮挡航拍图像下的风险感知路径规划，以提高路径效率和安全性。
AI.motivation: 传统路径规划方法在遮挡区域可能过于保守，导致路径冗余，需结合预测与不确定性分析以提高效率。
AI.method: 采用图像修复填充遮挡区域，通过语义分割判断可行驶性，并利用不确定性量化进行风险感知路径规划。
AI.result: 仿真结果验证了该框架在路径规划效率和安全性上的优越性，且模块化设计便于扩展应用。
AI.conclusion: 模块化框架有效提升了路径规划性能，未来可进一步优化模型以适应更多复杂环境。

search_text: Risk-Aware Path Planning for Ground Vehicles using Occluded Aerial Images 使用遮挡航空图像进行地面车辆的风险感知路径规划 We consider scenarios where a ground vehicle plans its path using data gathered by an aerial vehicle. In the aerial images, navigable areas of the scene may be occluded due to obstacles. Naively planning paths using aerial images may result in longer paths as a conservative planner may try to avoid regions that are occluded. We propose a modular, deep learning-based framework that allows the robot to predict the existence of navigable areas in the occluded regions. Specifically, we use image inpainting methods to fill in parts of the areas that are potentially occluded, which can then be semantically segmented to determine navigability. We use supervised neural networks for both modules. However, these predictions may be incorrect. Therefore, we extract uncertainty in these predictions and use a risk-aware approach that takes these uncertainties into account for path planning. We compare modules in our approach with non-learning-based approaches to show the efficacy of the proposed framework through photo-realistic simulations. authors_text: Soroush Nasiriany,Vitchyr H. Pong,Ashvin Nair,Alexander Khazatsky,Glen Berseth,Sergey Levine
title: DisCo RL: Distribution-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning for General-Purpose Policies
title_zh: DisCo RL：通用策略的分布条件强化学习
abstract: Can we use reinforcement learning to learn general-purpose policies that can perform a wide range of different tasks, resulting in flexible and reusable skills? Contextual policies provide this capability in principle, but the representation of the context determines the degree of generalization and expressivity. Categorical contexts preclude generalization to entirely new tasks. Goal-conditioned policies may enable some generalization, but cannot capture all tasks that might be desired. In this paper, we propose goal distributions as a general and broadly applicable task representation suitable for contextual policies. Goal distributions are general in the sense that they can represent any state-based reward function when equipped with an appropriate distribution class, while the particular choice of distribution class allows us to trade off expressivity and learnability. We develop an off-policy algorithm called distribution-conditioned reinforcement learning (DisCo RL) to efficiently learn these policies. We evaluate DisCo RL on a variety of robot manipulation tasks and find that it significantly outperforms prior methods on tasks that require generalization to new goal distributions.
summary: Can we use reinforcement learning to learn general-purpose policies that can perform a wide range of different tasks, resulting in flexible and reusable skills? Contextual policies provide this capability in principle, but the representation of the context determines the degree of generalization and expressivity. Categorical contexts preclude generalization to entirely new tasks. Goal-conditioned policies may enable some generalization, but cannot capture all tasks that might be desired. In this paper, we propose goal distributions as a general and broadly applicable task representation suitable for contextual policies. Goal distributions are general in the sense that they can represent any state-based reward function when equipped with an appropriate distribution class, while the particular choice of distribution class allows us to trade off expressivity and learnability. We develop an off-policy algorithm called distribution-conditioned reinforcement learning (DisCo RL) to efficiently learn these policies. We evaluate DisCo RL on a variety of robot manipulation tasks and find that it significantly outperforms prior methods on tasks that require generalization to new goal distributions.
abstract_zh: 我们能否使用强化学习来学习可以执行各种不同任务的通用策略，从而获得灵活且可重用的技能？上下文策略原则上提供了这种能力，但上下文的表示决定了泛化和表达的程度。分类上下文妨碍了对全新任务的泛化。以目标为条件的策略可能会实现一定程度的概括，但无法捕获可能需要的所有任务。在本文中，我们提出目标分布作为适合上下文策略的通用且广泛适用的任务表示。目标分布是通用的，因为当配备适当的分布类时，它们可以代表任何基于状态的奖励函数，而分布类的特定选择允许我们权衡表达性和可学习性。我们开发了一种称为分布条件强化学习（DisCo RL）的离策略算法来有效地学习这些策略。我们在各种机器人操作任务上评估了 DisCo RL，发现它在需要泛化到新目标分布的任务上显着优于先前的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DisCo RL的分布条件强化学习方法，旨在学习能够执行多种任务的通用策略。
AI.motivation: 现有上下文策略在表示任务上下文时存在泛化能力不足或表达能力有限的问题，无法有效应对新任务或复杂目标。
AI.method: 通过引入目标分布作为任务表示，结合分布类选择平衡表达性与可学习性，并开发了离线策略算法DisCo RL进行高效训练。
AI.result: 在多种机器人操作任务中，DisCo RL在需要泛化到新目标分布的任务上显著优于先前方法。
AI.conclusion: 目标分布为上下文策略提供了更通用的任务表示，DisCo RL验证了该方法在学习灵活可复用技能上的有效性。

authors_text: Saeedeh Parsaeefard,Sayed Ehsan Etesami,Alberto Leon Garcia
title: Robust Federated Learning by Mixture of Experts
title_zh: 专家混合的稳健联邦学习
abstract: We present a novel weighted average model based on the mixture of experts (MoE) concept to provide robustness in Federated learning (FL) against the poisoned/corrupted/outdated local models. These threats along with the non-IID nature of data sets can considerably diminish the accuracy of the FL model. Our proposed MoE-FL setup relies on the trust between users and the server where the users share a portion of their public data sets with the server. The server applies a robust aggregation method by solving the optimization problem or the Softmax method to highlight the outlier cases and to reduce their adverse effect on the FL process. Our experiments illustrate that MoE-FL outperforms the performance of the traditional aggregation approach for high rate of poisoned data from attackers.
summary: We present a novel weighted average model based on the mixture of experts (MoE) concept to provide robustness in Federated learning (FL) against the poisoned/corrupted/outdated local models. These threats along with the non-IID nature of data sets can considerably diminish the accuracy of the FL model. Our proposed MoE-FL setup relies on the trust between users and the server where the users share a portion of their public data sets with the server. The server applies a robust aggregation method by solving the optimization problem or the Softmax method to highlight the outlier cases and to reduce their adverse effect on the FL process. Our experiments illustrate that MoE-FL outperforms the performance of the traditional aggregation approach for high rate of poisoned data from attackers.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于专家混合（MoE）概念的新型加权平均模型，以提供联邦学习（FL）针对中毒/损坏/过时的本地模型的鲁棒性。这些威胁以及数据集的非独立同分布性质会大大降低 FL 模型的准确性。我们提出的 MoE-FL 设置依赖于用户和服务器之间的信任，其中用户与服务器共享其公共数据集的一部分。服务器通过解决优化问题或Softmax方法来应用鲁棒聚合方法来突出异常值情况并减少它们对FL过程的不利影响。我们的实验表明，对于来自攻击者的高中毒数据率，MoE-FL 的性能优于传统聚合方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于专家混合（MoE）的加权平均模型，以增强联邦学习在对抗中毒/损坏/过时本地模型及非独立同分布数据时的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统联邦学习在面对恶意数据、非独立同分布数据时易导致模型准确性显著下降，需更鲁棒的聚合方法。
AI.method: MoE-FL通过用户共享部分公共数据，服务器采用优化问题求解或Softmax方法进行鲁棒聚合，识别并抑制异常数据影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，MoE-FL在高比例攻击数据场景下优于传统聚合方法。
AI.conclusion: MoE-FL通过鲁棒聚合机制有效提升了联邦学习在对抗高比例恶意数据时的性能。

search_text: Robust Federated Learning by Mixture of Experts 专家混合的稳健联邦学习 We present a novel weighted average model based on the mixture of experts (MoE) concept to provide robustness in Federated learning (FL) against the poisoned/corrupted/outdated local models. These threats along with the non-IID nature of data sets can considerably diminish the accuracy of the FL model. Our proposed MoE-FL setup relies on the trust between users and the server where the users share a portion of their public data sets with the server. The server applies a robust aggregation method by solving the optimization problem or the Softmax method to highlight the outlier cases and to reduce their adverse effect on the FL process. Our experiments illustrate that MoE-FL outperforms the performance of the traditional aggregation approach for high rate of poisoned data from attackers. 我们提出了一种基于专家混合（MoE）概念的新型加权平均模型，以提供联邦学习（FL）针对中毒/损坏/过时的本地模型的鲁棒性。这些威胁以及数据集的非独立同分布性质会大大降低 FL 模型的准确性。我们提出的 MoE-FL 设置依赖于用户和服务器之间的信任，其中用户与服务器共享其公共数据集的一部分。服务器通过解决优化问题或Softmax方法来应用鲁棒聚合方法来突出异常值情况并减少它们对FL过程的不利影响。我们的实验表明，对于来自攻击者的高中毒数据率，MoE-FL 的性能优于传统聚合方法。 本文提出一种基于专家混合（MoE）的加权平均模型，以增强联邦学习在对抗中毒/损坏/过时本地模型及非独立同分布数据时的鲁棒性。 Saeedeh Parsaeefard,Sayed Ehsan Etesami,Alberto Leon Garcia cs.LG,cs.DC,cs.NE,cs.NI

authors_text: Keping Yu,Zhiwei Guo,Yu Shen,Wei Wang,Jerry Chun-Wei Lin,Takuro Sato
title: Secure Artificial Intelligence of Things for Implicit Group Recommendations
title_zh: 保护物联网的人工智能以实现隐式组推荐
abstract: The emergence of Artificial Intelligence of Things (AIoT) has provided novel insights for many social computing applications such as group recommender systems. As distance among people has been greatly shortened, it has been a more general demand to provide personalized services to groups instead of individuals. In order to capture group-level preference features from individuals, existing methods were mostly established via aggregation and face two aspects of challenges: secure data management workflow is absent, and implicit preference feedbacks is ignored. To tackle current difficulties, this paper proposes secure Artificial Intelligence of Things for implicit Group Recommendations (SAIoT-GR). As for hardware module, a secure IoT structure is developed as the bottom support platform. As for software module, collaborative Bayesian network model and non-cooperative game are can be introduced as algorithms. Such a secure AIoT architecture is able to maximize the advantages of the two modules. In addition, a large number of experiments are carried out to evaluate the performance of the SAIoT-GR in terms of efficiency and robustness.
summary: The emergence of Artificial Intelligence of Things (AIoT) has provided novel insights for many social computing applications such as group recommender systems. As distance among people has been greatly shortened, it has been a more general demand to provide personalized services to groups instead of individuals. In order to capture group-level preference features from individuals, existing methods were mostly established via aggregation and face two aspects of challenges: secure data management workflow is absent, and implicit preference feedbacks is ignored. To tackle current difficulties, this paper proposes secure Artificial Intelligence of Things for implicit Group Recommendations (SAIoT-GR). As for hardware module, a secure IoT structure is developed as the bottom support platform. As for software module, collaborative Bayesian network model and non-cooperative game are can be introduced as algorithms. Such a secure AIoT architecture is able to maximize the advantages of the two modules. In addition, a large number of experiments are carried out to evaluate the performance of the SAIoT-GR in terms of efficiency and robustness.
abstract_zh: 物联网人工智能 (AIoT) 的出现为群组推荐系统等许多社交计算应用提供了新颖的见解。随着人与人之间的距离大大缩短，为群体提供个性化服务已经不再是个人的普遍需求。为了捕获个体的群体层面的偏好特征，现有的方法大多是通过聚合建立的，并面临两个方面的挑战：缺乏安全的数据管理工作流程，以及忽略隐式偏好反馈。为了解决当前的困难，本文提出了用于隐式群组推荐的安全物联网人工智能（SAIoT-GR）。硬件模块方面，开发了安全的物联网结构作为底层支撑平台。软件模块方面，可以引入协作贝叶斯网络模型和非合作博弈作为算法。这样的安全AIoT架构能够最大限度地发挥两个模块的优势。此外，还进行了大量实验来评估SAIoT-GR在效率和鲁棒性方面的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SAIoT-GR的安全人工智能物联网架构，用于隐式群体推荐。
AI.motivation: 随着人们之间距离的缩短，提供面向群体的个性化服务成为更普遍的需求。现有方法在聚合个体偏好以捕捉群体层面特征时，缺乏安全的数据管理流程并忽视了隐式偏好反馈。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种名为SAIoT-GR的安全人工智能物联网架构，包括硬件模块中的安全物联网结构和软件模块中的协作贝叶斯网络模型与非合作博弈算法。
AI.result: 通过大量实验评估了SAIoT-GR在效率和鲁棒性方面的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该安全AIoT架构能够充分发挥硬件和软件模块的优势，有效解决当前群体推荐中的安全与隐式反馈问题。

authors_text: Yiming Zhao,Xinming Huang,Ziming Zhang
title: Deep Lucas-Kanade Homography for Multimodal Image Alignment
title_zh: 用于多模态图像对齐的深度 Lucas-Kanade 单应性
abstract: Estimating homography to align image pairs captured by different sensors or image pairs with large appearance changes is an important and general challenge for many computer vision applications. In contrast to others, we propose a generic solution to pixel-wise align multimodal image pairs by extending the traditional Lucas-Kanade algorithm with networks. The key contribution in our method is how we construct feature maps, named as deep Lucas-Kanade feature map (DLKFM). The learned DLKFM can spontaneously recognize invariant features under various appearance-changing conditions. It also has two nice properties for the Lucas-Kanade algorithm: (1) The template feature map keeps brightness consistency with the input feature map, thus the color difference is very small while they are well-aligned. (2) The Lucas-Kanade objective function built on DLKFM has a smooth landscape around ground truth homography parameters, so the iterative solution of the Lucas-Kanade can easily converge to the ground truth. With those properties, directly updating the Lucas-Kanade algorithm on our feature maps will precisely align image pairs with large appearance changes. We share the datasets, code, and demo video online.
summary: Estimating homography to align image pairs captured by different sensors or image pairs with large appearance changes is an important and general challenge for many computer vision applications. In contrast to others, we propose a generic solution to pixel-wise align multimodal image pairs by extending the traditional Lucas-Kanade algorithm with networks. The key contribution in our method is how we construct feature maps, named as deep Lucas-Kanade feature map (DLKFM). The learned DLKFM can spontaneously recognize invariant features under various appearance-changing conditions. It also has two nice properties for the Lucas-Kanade algorithm: (1) The template feature map keeps brightness consistency with the input feature map, thus the color difference is very small while they are well-aligned. (2) The Lucas-Kanade objective function built on DLKFM has a smooth landscape around ground truth homography parameters, so the iterative solution of the Lucas-Kanade can easily converge to the ground truth. With those properties, directly updating the Lucas-Kanade algorithm on our feature maps will precisely align image pairs with large appearance changes. We share the datasets, code, and demo video online.
abstract_zh: 对于许多计算机视觉应用来说，估计单应性以对齐由不同传感器捕获的图像对或具有较大外观变化的图像对是一个重要且普遍的挑战。与其他算法相比，我们提出了一种通过使用网络扩展传统 Lucas-Kanade 算法来按像素对齐多模态图像对的通用解决方案。我们的方法的关键贡献是如何构建特征图，称为深度 Lucas-Kanade 特征图（DLKFM）。学习到的 DLKFM 可以自发地识别各种外观变化条件下的不变特征。 Lucas-Kanade 算法还具有两个很好的特性：（1）模板特征图与输入特征图保持亮度一致，因此颜色差异非常小，同时它们对齐得很好。 (2) 基于 DLKFM 构建的 Lucas-Kanade 目标函数在地面实况单应性参数周围具有平滑的景观，因此 Lucas-Kanade 的迭代解决方案可以轻松收敛到地面实况。有了这些属性，直接更新特征图上的 Lucas-Kanade 算法将精确对齐具有较大外观变化的图像对。我们在线共享数据集、代码和演示视频。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的Lucas-Kanade算法扩展方法，用于对多模态图像对进行像素级对齐，解决传感器差异或外观变化大的图像配准问题。
AI.motivation: 传统Lucas-Kanade算法在处理多模态图像或外观变化显著的图像对时效果不佳，亟需一种通用且鲁棒的解决方案以应对实际应用中的复杂场景。
AI.method: 通过构建名为深度Lucas-Kanade特征图（DLKFM）的特征映射，结合网络扩展经典算法。DLKFM具有亮度一致性保持和目标函数景观平滑性两大特性，使迭代优化能快速收敛到真实单应性参数。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能精准对齐具有显著外观差异的图像对，公开了数据集、代码及演示视频验证效果。
AI.conclusion: DLKFM的创新设计使扩展后的Lucas-Kanade算法在多模态图像对齐任务中表现出色，为复杂场景下的图像配准提供了有效解决方案。

We share the datasets, code, and demo video online. 对于许多计算机视觉应用来说，估计单应性以对齐由不同传感器捕获的图像对或具有较大外观变化的图像对是一个重要且普遍的挑战。与其他算法相比，我们提出了一种通过使用网络扩展传统 Lucas-Kanade 算法来按像素对齐多模态图像对的通用解决方案。我们的方法的关键贡献是如何构建特征图，称为深度 Lucas-Kanade 特征图（DLKFM）。学习到的 DLKFM 可以自发地识别各种外观变化条件下的不变特征。 Lucas-Kanade 算法还具有两个很好的特性：（1）模板特征图与输入特征图保持亮度一致，因此颜色差异非常小，同时它们对齐得很好。 (2) 基于 DLKFM 构建的 Lucas-Kanade 目标函数在地面实况单应性参数周围具有平滑的景观，因此 Lucas-Kanade 的迭代解决方案可以轻松收敛到地面实况。有了这些属性，直接更新特征图上的 Lucas-Kanade 算法将精确对齐具有较大外观变化的图像对。我们在线共享数据集、代码和演示视频。 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的Lucas-Kanade算法扩展方法，用于对多模态图像对进行像素级对齐，解决传感器差异或外观变化大的图像配准问题。 Yiming Zhao,Xinming Huang,Ziming Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Giuseppe Pastore,Fabio Cermelli,Yongqin Xian,Massimiliano Mancini,Zeynep Akata,Barbara Caputo
title: A Closer Look at Self-training for Zero-Label Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 仔细研究零标签语义分割的自我训练
abstract: Being able to segment unseen classes not observed during training is an important technical challenge in deep learning, because of its potential to reduce the expensive annotation required for semantic segmentation. Prior zero-label semantic segmentation works approach this task by learning visual-semantic embeddings or generative models. However, they are prone to overfitting on the seen classes because there is no training signal for them. In this paper, we study the challenging generalized zero-label semantic segmentation task where the model has to segment both seen and unseen classes at test time. We assume that pixels of unseen classes could be present in the training images but without being annotated. Our idea is to capture the latent information on unseen classes by supervising the model with self-produced pseudo-labels for unlabeled pixels. We propose a consistency regularizer to filter out noisy pseudo-labels by taking the intersections of the pseudo-labels generated from different augmentations of the same image. Our framework generates pseudo-labels and then retrain the model with human-annotated and pseudo-labelled data. This procedure is repeated for several iterations. As a result, our approach achieves the new state-of-the-art on PascalVOC12 and COCO-stuff datasets in the challenging generalized zero-label semantic segmentation setting, surpassing other existing methods addressing this task with more complex strategies.
summary: Being able to segment unseen classes not observed during training is an important technical challenge in deep learning, because of its potential to reduce the expensive annotation required for semantic segmentation. Prior zero-label semantic segmentation works approach this task by learning visual-semantic embeddings or generative models. However, they are prone to overfitting on the seen classes because there is no training signal for them. In this paper, we study the challenging generalized zero-label semantic segmentation task where the model has to segment both seen and unseen classes at test time. We assume that pixels of unseen classes could be present in the training images but without being annotated. Our idea is to capture the latent information on unseen classes by supervising the model with self-produced pseudo-labels for unlabeled pixels. We propose a consistency regularizer to filter out noisy pseudo-labels by taking the intersections of the pseudo-labels generated from different augmentations of the same image. Our framework generates pseudo-labels and then retrain the model with human-annotated and pseudo-labelled data. This procedure is repeated for several iterations. As a result, our approach achieves the new state-of-the-art on PascalVOC12 and COCO-stuff datasets in the challenging generalized zero-label semantic segmentation setting, surpassing other existing methods addressing this task with more complex strategies.
abstract_zh: 能够分割训练期间未观察到的看不见的类是深度学习中的一个重要技术挑战，因为它有可能减少语义分割所需的昂贵注释。先前的零标签语义分割工作通过学习视觉语义嵌入或生成模型来完成此任务。然而，它们很容易在所见的类上过度拟合，因为没有针对它们的训练信号。在本文中，我们研究了具有挑战性的广义零标签语义分割任务，其中模型必须在测试时分割可见和不可见的类。我们假设训练图像中可能存在未见过的类别的像素，但没有注释。我们的想法是通过使用针对未标记像素自行生成的伪标签来监督模型，从而捕获未见类别的潜在信息。我们提出了一种一致性正则化器，通过取同一图像的不同增强生成的伪标签的交集来过滤掉噪声伪标签。我们的框架生成伪标签，然后使用人工注释和伪标签数据重新训练模型。该过程重复多次。因此，我们的方法在具有挑战性的广义零标签语义分割设置中在 PascalVOC12 和 COCO-stuff 数据集上实现了新的最先进技术，超越了使用更复杂策略解决此任务的其他现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在无标注数据情况下，通过自训练方法实现对已知和未知类别的语义分割任务。
AI.motivation: 现有零标签语义分割方法易在已知类别上过拟合，且无法有效处理测试时出现的未知类别。
AI.method: 通过生成伪标签并结合一致性正则化策略，利用不同数据增强下的标签交集过滤噪声，迭代训练模型。
AI.result: 在PascalVOC12和COCO-stuff数据集上达到通用零标签语义分割任务的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自训练与一致性约束有效提升了模型对未知类别的分割能力，为零标签学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Julia Rosenzweig,Joachim Sicking,Sebastian Houben,Michael Mock,Maram Akila
title: Patch Shortcuts: Interpretable Proxy Models Efficiently Find Black-Box Vulnerabilities
title_zh: 补丁快捷方式：可解释的代理模型有效查找黑盒漏洞
comment: Under IEEE Copyright; accepted at the SAIAD (Safe Artificial Intelligence for Automated Driving) Workshop at CVPR 2021
comments: Under IEEE Copyright; accepted at the SAIAD (Safe Artificial Intelligence for Automated Driving) Workshop at CVPR 2021
abstract: An important pillar for safe machine learning (ML) is the systematic mitigation of weaknesses in neural networks to afford their deployment in critical applications. An ubiquitous class of safety risks are learned shortcuts, i.e. spurious correlations a network exploits for its decisions that have no semantic connection to the actual task. Networks relying on such shortcuts bear the risk of not generalizing well to unseen inputs. Explainability methods help to uncover such network vulnerabilities. However, many of these techniques are not directly applicable if access to the network is constrained, in so-called black-box setups. These setups are prevalent when using third-party ML components. To address this constraint, we present an approach to detect learned shortcuts using an interpretable-by-design network as a proxy to the black-box model of interest. Leveraging the proxy's guarantees on introspection we automatically extract candidates for learned shortcuts. Their transferability to the black box is validated in a systematic fashion. Concretely, as proxy model we choose a BagNet, which bases its decisions purely on local image patches. We demonstrate on the autonomous driving dataset A2D2 that extracted patch shortcuts significantly influence the black box model. By efficiently identifying such patch-based vulnerabilities, we contribute to safer ML models.
summary: An important pillar for safe machine learning (ML) is the systematic mitigation of weaknesses in neural networks to afford their deployment in critical applications. An ubiquitous class of safety risks are learned shortcuts, i.e. spurious correlations a network exploits for its decisions that have no semantic connection to the actual task. Networks relying on such shortcuts bear the risk of not generalizing well to unseen inputs. Explainability methods help to uncover such network vulnerabilities. However, many of these techniques are not directly applicable if access to the network is constrained, in so-called black-box setups. These setups are prevalent when using third-party ML components. To address this constraint, we present an approach to detect learned shortcuts using an interpretable-by-design network as a proxy to the black-box model of interest. Leveraging the proxy's guarantees on introspection we automatically extract candidates for learned shortcuts. Their transferability to the black box is validated in a systematic fashion. Concretely, as proxy model we choose a BagNet, which bases its decisions purely on local image patches. We demonstrate on the autonomous driving dataset A2D2 that extracted patch shortcuts significantly influence the black box model. By efficiently identifying such patch-based vulnerabilities, we contribute to safer ML models.
abstract_zh: 安全机器学习 (ML) 的一个重要支柱是系统地缓解神经网络的弱点，以支持其在关键应用中的部署。一类普遍存在的安全风险是习得的捷径，即网络利用与实际任务没有语义联系的决策的虚假相关性。依赖这种捷径的网络面临着不能很好地概括未知输入的风险。可解释性方法有助于发现此类网络漏洞。然而，如果在所谓的黑盒设置中对网络的访问受到限制，那么许多这些技术就不能直接应用。使用第三方 ML 组件时，这些设置很常见。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了一种方法来检测学习的捷径，使用可解释的设计网络作为感兴趣的黑盒模型的代理。利用代理对内省的保证，我们自动提取学习捷径的候选者。它们向黑匣子的可转移性以系统的方式得到验证。具体来说，我们选择 BagNet 作为代理模型，它的决策完全基于本地图像块。我们在自动驾驶数据集 A2D2 上演示了提取的补丁快捷方式显着影响黑盒模型。通过有效识别此类基于补丁的漏洞，我们为更安全的机器学习模型做出了贡献。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用可解释的代理模型（BagNet）检测黑盒神经网络中的学习快捷方式漏洞，通过局部图像块分析提高模型安全性。
AI.motivation: 现有可解释性方法难以应对黑盒场景下的模型漏洞检测需求，而依赖第三方ML组件时黑盒设置普遍存在，需开发无需模型访问权限的检测方案。
AI.method: 构建基于局部图像块决策的BagNet代理模型，自动提取候选快捷方式并验证其在目标黑盒模型中的可转移性。
AI.result: 在A2D2自动驾驶数据集实验证明，提取的patch shortcuts显著影响黑盒模型决策，有效识别出潜在漏洞。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过可解释代理模型高效发现黑盒漏洞，为构建更安全的机器学习系统提供新思路。

authors_text: Parker Ewen,Jean-Pierre Sleiman,Yuxin Chen,Wei-Chun Lu,Marco Hutter,Ram Vasudevan
title: Generating Continuous Motion and Force Plans in Real-Time for Legged Mobile Manipulation
title_zh: 实时生成腿式移动操纵的连续运动和力计划
abstract: Manipulators can be added to legged robots, allowing them to interact with and change their environment. Legged mobile manipulation planners must consider how contact forces generated by these manipulators affect the system. Current planning strategies either treat these forces as immutable during planning or are unable to optimize over these contact forces while operating in real-time. This paper presents the Stability and Task Oriented Receding-Horizon Motion and Manipulation Autonomous Planner (STORMMAP) that is able to generate continuous plans for the robot's motion and manipulation force trajectories that ensure dynamic feasibility and stability of the platform, and incentivizes accomplishing manipulation and motion tasks specified by a user. STORMMAP uses a nonlinear optimization problem to compute these plans and is able to run in real-time by assuming contact locations are given a-priori, either by a user or an external algorithm. A variety of simulated experiments on a quadruped with a manipulator mounted to its torso demonstrate the versatility of STORMMAP. In contrast to existing state of the art methods, the approach described in this paper generates continuous plans in under ten milliseconds, an order of magnitude faster than previous strategies.
summary: Manipulators can be added to legged robots, allowing them to interact with and change their environment. Legged mobile manipulation planners must consider how contact forces generated by these manipulators affect the system. Current planning strategies either treat these forces as immutable during planning or are unable to optimize over these contact forces while operating in real-time. This paper presents the Stability and Task Oriented Receding-Horizon Motion and Manipulation Autonomous Planner (STORMMAP) that is able to generate continuous plans for the robot's motion and manipulation force trajectories that ensure dynamic feasibility and stability of the platform, and incentivizes accomplishing manipulation and motion tasks specified by a user. STORMMAP uses a nonlinear optimization problem to compute these plans and is able to run in real-time by assuming contact locations are given a-priori, either by a user or an external algorithm. A variety of simulated experiments on a quadruped with a manipulator mounted to its torso demonstrate the versatility of STORMMAP. In contrast to existing state of the art methods, the approach described in this paper generates continuous plans in under ten milliseconds, an order of magnitude faster than previous strategies.
abstract_zh: 可以将操纵器添加到有腿机器人上，使它们能够与环境交互并改变环境。腿式移动操纵规划者必须考虑这些操纵器产生的接触力如何影响系统。当前的规划策略要么在规划期间将这些力视为不可变，要么无法在实时操作时优化这些接触力。本文提出了面向稳定性和任务的后退地平线运动和操纵自主规划器（STORMMAP），它能够为机器人的运动和操纵力轨迹生成连续计划，确保平台的动态可行性和稳定性，并激励完成用户指定的操纵和运动任务。 STORMMAP 使用非线性优化问题来计算这些计划，并且能够通过假设由用户或外部算法先验给出接触位置来实时运行。在躯干上安装有机械手的四足动物上进行的各种模拟实验证明了 STORMMAP 的多功能性。与现有的最先进方法相比，本文描述的方法在十毫秒内生成连续计划，比以前的策略快一个数量级。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为STORMMAP的实时规划方法，用于生成足式移动机械臂的连续运动和力轨迹，确保系统动态可行性和稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法无法在实时操作中优化机械臂接触力，或将其视为固定值，限制了足式移动机械臂与环境交互的能力。
AI.method: 通过非线性优化问题计算运动和力轨迹，假设接触点位置预先已知（由用户或外部算法提供），以实现实时计算。
AI.result: 在四足机器人仿真中，STORMMAP在十毫秒内生成连续计划，比现有方法快一个数量级，展示了其多功能性。
AI.conclusion: STORMMAP通过联合优化运动和力轨迹，解决了足式移动机械臂的实时规划问题，显著优于现有技术。

authors_text: Wauter Bosma,Sander Dalm,Erwin van Eijk,Rachid el Harchaoui,Edwin Rijgersberg,Hannah Tereza Tops,Alle Veenstra,Rolf Ypma
title: Establishing phone-pair co-usage by comparing mobility patterns
title_zh: 通过比较移动模式建立电话对共同使用
abstract: In forensic investigations it is often of value to establish whether two phones were used by the same person during a given time period. We present a method that uses time and location of cell tower registrations of mobile phones to assess the strength of evidence that any pair of phones were used by the same person. The method is transparent as it uses logistic regression to discriminate between the hypotheses of same and different user, and a standard kernel density estimation to quantify the weight of evidence in terms of a likelihood ratio. We further add to previous theoretical work by training and validating our method on real world data, paving the way for application in practice. The method shows good performance under different modeling choices and robustness under lower quantity or quality of data. We discuss practical usage in court.
summary: In forensic investigations it is often of value to establish whether two phones were used by the same person during a given time period. We present a method that uses time and location of cell tower registrations of mobile phones to assess the strength of evidence that any pair of phones were used by the same person. The method is transparent as it uses logistic regression to discriminate between the hypotheses of same and different user, and a standard kernel density estimation to quantify the weight of evidence in terms of a likelihood ratio. We further add to previous theoretical work by training and validating our method on real world data, paving the way for application in practice. The method shows good performance under different modeling choices and robustness under lower quantity or quality of data. We discuss practical usage in court.
abstract_zh: 在法医调查中，确定同一个人在给定时间段内是否使用了两部手机通常很有价值。我们提出了一种方法，使用手机信号塔注册的时间和位置来评估同一个人使用任何对手机的证据强度。该方法是透明的，因为它使用逻辑回归来区分相同和不同用户的假设，并使用标准核密度估计来根据似然比来量化证据的权重。我们通过在现实世界数据上训练和验证我们的方法，进一步补充了之前的理论工作，为实践中的应用铺平了道路。该方法在不同的建模选择下表现出良好的性能，并且在较低数量或质量的数据下表现出鲁棒性。我们讨论法庭上的实际用法。

AI.tldr: 通过比较手机的移动模式来确定两部手机是否由同一人使用。
AI.motivation: 在法医调查中需要确定两部手机是否由同一人使用，以提供关键证据支持调查。
AI.method: 采用逻辑回归区分同一用户与不同用户的假设，并结合核密度估计计算似然比，通过真实数据训练和验证方法。
AI.result: 方法在不同模型选择下表现稳定，且在数据量或质量较低时仍具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法经过实际数据验证，具备实用价值，可应用于法庭等实际场景。

authors_text: Zhen Bi,Ningyu Zhang,Ganqiang Ye,Haiyang Yu,Xi Chen,Huajun Chen
title: Interventional Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis
title_zh: 基于干预方面的情感分析
abstract: Recent neural-based aspect-based sentiment analysis approaches, though achieving promising improvement on benchmark datasets, have reported suffering from poor robustness when encountering confounder such as non-target aspects. In this paper, we take a causal view to addressing this issue. We propose a simple yet effective method, namely, Sentiment Adjustment (SENTA), by applying a backdoor adjustment to disentangle those confounding factors. Experimental results on the Aspect Robustness Test Set (ARTS) dataset demonstrate that our approach improves the performance while maintaining accuracy in the original test set.
summary: Recent neural-based aspect-based sentiment analysis approaches, though achieving promising improvement on benchmark datasets, have reported suffering from poor robustness when encountering confounder such as non-target aspects. In this paper, we take a causal view to addressing this issue. We propose a simple yet effective method, namely, Sentiment Adjustment (SENTA), by applying a backdoor adjustment to disentangle those confounding factors. Experimental results on the Aspect Robustness Test Set (ARTS) dataset demonstrate that our approach improves the performance while maintaining accuracy in the original test set.
abstract_zh: 最近基于神经的基于方面的情感分析方法虽然在基准数据集上取得了有希望的改进，但在遇到非目标方面等混杂因素时，鲁棒性较差。在本文中，我们采取因果观点来解决这个问题。我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法，即情绪调整（SENTA），通过应用后门调整来理清这些混杂因素。 Aspect Robustness Test Set (ARTS) 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的方法在保持原始测试集准确性的同时提高了性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于因果推理的干预型方面情感分析方法（SENTA），以解决现有模型在处理混淆因素时的鲁棒性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络方法在基准数据集表现良好，但面对非目标方面等混淆因素时存在性能下降问题，需提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过因果推断中的后门调整技术，设计Sentiment Adjustment（SENTA）方法分离混淆因素，实现对目标方面情感的精准分析。
AI.result: 在ARTS数据集实验中，SENTA方法在提升模型鲁棒性的同时，保持了原测试集的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 因果干预视角有效解决了方面情感分析中的混淆因素问题，为后续研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Arsalan Tahir,Muhammad Adil,Arslan Ali
title: Rapid Detection of Aircrafts in Satellite Imagery based on Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: 基于深度神经网络的卫星图像中飞机快速检测
abstract: Object detection is one of the fundamental objectives in Applied Computer Vision. In some of the applications, object detection becomes very challenging such as in the case of satellite image processing. Satellite image processing has remained the focus of researchers in domains of Precision Agriculture, Climate Change, Disaster Management, etc. Therefore, object detection in satellite imagery is one of the most researched problems in this domain. This paper focuses on aircraft detection. in satellite imagery using deep learning techniques. In this paper, we used YOLO deep learning framework for aircraft detection. This method uses satellite images collected by different sources as learning for the model to perform detection. Object detection in satellite images is mostly complex because objects have many variations, types, poses, sizes, complex and dense background. YOLO has some limitations for small size objects (less than$\sim$32 pixels per object), therefore we upsample the prediction grid to reduce the coarseness of the model and to accurately detect the densely clustered objects. The improved model shows good accuracy and performance on different unknown images having small, rotating, and dense objects to meet the requirements in real-time.
summary: Object detection is one of the fundamental objectives in Applied Computer Vision. In some of the applications, object detection becomes very challenging such as in the case of satellite image processing. Satellite image processing has remained the focus of researchers in domains of Precision Agriculture, Climate Change, Disaster Management, etc. Therefore, object detection in satellite imagery is one of the most researched problems in this domain. This paper focuses on aircraft detection. in satellite imagery using deep learning techniques. In this paper, we used YOLO deep learning framework for aircraft detection. This method uses satellite images collected by different sources as learning for the model to perform detection. Object detection in satellite images is mostly complex because objects have many variations, types, poses, sizes, complex and dense background. YOLO has some limitations for small size objects (less than$\sim$32 pixels per object), therefore we upsample the prediction grid to reduce the coarseness of the model and to accurately detect the densely clustered objects. The improved model shows good accuracy and performance on different unknown images having small, rotating, and dense objects to meet the requirements in real-time.
abstract_zh: 对象检测是应用计算机视觉的基本目标之一。在某些应用中，物体检测变得非常具有挑战性，例如在卫星图像处理的情况下。卫星图像处理一直是精准农业、气候变化、灾害管理等领域研究人员关注的焦点。因此，卫星图像中的目标检测是该领域研究最多的问题之一。本文主要研究飞机检测。使用深度学习技术的卫星图像。在本文中，我们使用YOLO深度学习框架进行飞机检测。该方法使用不同来源收集的卫星图像作为模型的学习来执行检测。卫星图像中的目标检测大多很复杂，因为目标有很多变化、类型、姿势、大小、复杂而密集的背景。 YOLO 对于小尺寸物体（每个物体小于 $\sim$32 像素）有一些限制，因此我们对预测网格进行上采样以降低模型的粗糙度并准确检测密集聚类的物体。改进后的模型在具有小、旋转、密集物体的不同未知图像上表现出良好的精度和性能，满足实时要求。

AI.tldr: 基于深度神经网络，提出改进的YOLO框架以实现卫星图像中飞机的快速检测。
AI.motivation: 卫星图像中的飞机检测在多个应用领域中具有挑战性，因物体尺寸小、密集分布且背景复杂，需提高检测精度和实时性。
AI.method: 采用YOLO深度学习框架，通过上采样预测网格优化模型，提升对小尺寸、密集分布飞机的检测能力。
AI.result: 改进后的模型在多种未知图像中表现出较高的检测准确率和性能，有效识别小尺寸、旋转及密集分布的飞机。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了卫星图像中飞机检测的难点，满足实际应用中的实时性要求。

search_text: Rapid Detection of Aircrafts in Satellite Imagery based on Deep Neural Networks 基于深度神经网络的卫星图像中飞机快速检测 Object detection is one of the fundamental objectives in Applied Computer Vision. In some of the applications, object detection becomes very challenging such as in the case of satellite image processing. Satellite image processing has remained the focus of researchers in domains of Precision Agriculture, Climate Change, Disaster Management, etc. Therefore, object detection in satellite imagery is one of the most researched problems in this domain. This paper focuses on aircraft detection. in satellite imagery using deep learning techniques. In this paper, we used YOLO deep learning framework for aircraft detection. This method uses satellite images collected by different sources as learning for the model to perform detection. Object detection in satellite images is mostly complex because objects have many variations, types, poses, sizes, complex and dense background. YOLO has some limitations for small size objects (less than$\sim$32 pixels per object), therefore we upsample the prediction grid to reduce the coarseness of the model and to accurately detect the densely clustered objects. The improved model shows good accuracy and performance on different unknown images having small, rotating, and dense objects to meet the requirements in real-time. 对象检测是应用计算机视觉的基本目标之一。在某些应用中，物体检测变得非常具有挑战性，例如在卫星图像处理的情况下。卫星图像处理一直是精准农业、气候变化、灾害管理等领域研究人员关注的焦点。因此，卫星图像中的目标检测是该领域研究最多的问题之一。本文主要研究飞机检测。使用深度学习技术的卫星图像。在本文中，我们使用YOLO深度学习框架进行飞机检测。该方法使用不同来源收集的卫星图像作为模型的学习来执行检测。卫星图像中的目标检测大多很复杂，因为目标有很多变化、类型、姿势、大小、复杂而密集的背景。 YOLO 对于小尺寸物体（每个物体小于 $\sim$32 像素）有一些限制，因此我们对预测网格进行上采样以降低模型的粗糙度并准确检测密集聚类的物体。改进后的模型在具有小、旋转、密集物体的不同未知图像上表现出良好的精度和性能，满足实时要求。 基于深度神经网络，提出改进的YOLO框架以实现卫星图像中飞机的快速检测。 Arsalan Tahir,Muhammad Adil,Arslan Ali cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Gabriel Mittag,Sebastian Möller
title: Deep Learning Based Assessment of Synthetic Speech Naturalness
title_zh: 基于深度学习的合成语音自然度评估
abstract: In this paper, we present a new objective prediction model for synthetic speech naturalness. It can be used to evaluate Text-To-Speech or Voice Conversion systems and works language independently. The model is trained end-to-end and based on a CNN-LSTM network that previously showed to give good results for speech quality estimation. We trained and tested the model on 16 different datasets, such as from the Blizzard Challenge and the Voice Conversion Challenge. Further, we show that the reliability of deep learning-based naturalness prediction can be improved by transfer learning from speech quality prediction models that are trained on objective POLQA scores. The proposed model is made publicly available and can, for example, be used to evaluate different TTS system configurations.
summary: In this paper, we present a new objective prediction model for synthetic speech naturalness. It can be used to evaluate Text-To-Speech or Voice Conversion systems and works language independently. The model is trained end-to-end and based on a CNN-LSTM network that previously showed to give good results for speech quality estimation. We trained and tested the model on 16 different datasets, such as from the Blizzard Challenge and the Voice Conversion Challenge. Further, we show that the reliability of deep learning-based naturalness prediction can be improved by transfer learning from speech quality prediction models that are trained on objective POLQA scores. The proposed model is made publicly available and can, for example, be used to evaluate different TTS system configurations.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种新的合成语音自然度客观预测模型。它可用于评估文本到语音或语音转换系统并独立工作语言。该模型基于 CNN-LSTM 网络进行端到端训练，该网络之前已显示出可以为语音质量估计提供良好的结果。我们在 16 个不同的数据集（例如暴雪挑战赛和语音转换挑战赛）上训练和测试了模型。此外，我们还表明，基于客观 POLQA 分数训练的语音质量预测模型的迁移学习可以提高基于深度学习的自然度预测的可靠性。所提出的模型已公开可用，例如可用于评估不同的 TTS 系统配置。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的合成语音自然度评估模型，适用于文本到语音（TTS）和语音转换系统，且具有语言独立性。
AI.motivation: 现有合成语音评估依赖主观评分，效率低且成本高，需开发客观自动化模型以支持跨语言和跨数据集的评估需求。
AI.method: 采用端到端训练的CNN-LSTM网络架构，结合迁移学习从基于POLQA分数的语音质量预测模型中获取知识，提升预测可靠性。
AI.result: 模型在16个数据集（如Blizzard Challenge）上验证有效，迁移学习显著提升预测一致性，模型已开源供评估不同TTS系统配置。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为合成语音自然度评估提供高效客观方案，通过迁移学习增强模型泛化能力，助力TTS和语音转换系统的优化。

authors_text: Roy Schwartz,Nitzan Tur
title: The Metric Relaxation for $0$-Extension Admits an $Ω(\log^{2/3}{k})$ Gap
title_zh: $0$-扩展的度量放宽承认 $Ω(\log^{2/3}{k})$ 差距
comment: 27 pages, 3 figures, will appear in STOC 2021
comments: 27 pages, 3 figures, will appear in STOC 2021
abstract: We consider the $0$-Extension problem, where we are given an undirected graph $\mathcal{G}=(V,E)$ equipped with non-negative edge weights $w:E\rightarrow \mathbb{R}^+$, a collection $ T=\{ t_1,\ldots,t_k\}\subseteq V$ of $k$ special vertices called terminals, and a semi-metric $D$ over $T$. The goal is to assign every non-terminal vertex to a terminal while minimizing the sum over all edges of the weight of the edge multiplied by the distance in $D$ between the terminals to which the endpoints of the edge are assigned. $0$-Extension admits two known algorithms, achieving approximations of $O(\log{k})$ [C{ă}linescu-Karloff-Rabani SICOMP '05] and $O(\log{k}/\log{\log{k}})$ [Fakcharoenphol-Harrelson-Rao-Talwar SODA '03]. Both known algorithms are based on rounding a natural linear programming relaxation called the metric relaxation, in which $D$ is extended from $T$ to the entire of $V$. The current best known integrality gap for the metric relaxation is $Ω(\sqrt{\log{k}})$. In this work we present an improved integrality gap of $Ω(\log^{\frac{2}{3}}k)$ for the metric relaxation. Our construction is based on the randomized extension of one graph by another, a notion that captures lifts of graphs as a special case and might be of independent interest. Inspired by algebraic topology, our analysis of the gap instance is based on proving no continuous section (in the topological sense) exists in the randomized extension.
summary: We consider the $0$-Extension problem, where we are given an undirected graph $\mathcal{G}=(V,E)$ equipped with non-negative edge weights $w:E\rightarrow \mathbb{R}^+$, a collection $ T=\{ t_1,\ldots,t_k\}\subseteq V$ of $k$ special vertices called terminals, and a semi-metric $D$ over $T$. The goal is to assign every non-terminal vertex to a terminal while minimizing the sum over all edges of the weight of the edge multiplied by the distance in $D$ between the terminals to which the endpoints of the edge are assigned. $0$-Extension admits two known algorithms, achieving approximations of $O(\log{k})$ [C{ă}linescu-Karloff-Rabani SICOMP '05] and $O(\log{k}/\log{\log{k}})$ [Fakcharoenphol-Harrelson-Rao-Talwar SODA '03]. Both known algorithms are based on rounding a natural linear programming relaxation called the metric relaxation, in which $D$ is extended from $T$ to the entire of $V$. The current best known integrality gap for the metric relaxation is $Ω(\sqrt{\log{k}})$. In this work we present an improved integrality gap of $Ω(\log^{\frac{2}{3}}k)$ for the metric relaxation. Our construction is based on the randomized extension of one graph by another, a notion that captures lifts of graphs as a special case and might be of independent interest. Inspired by algebraic topology, our analysis of the gap instance is based on proving no continuous section (in the topological sense) exists in the randomized extension.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑 $0$ 扩展问题，其中给定一个无向图 $\mathcal{G}=(V,E)$，配备非负边权重 $w:E\rightarrow \mathbb{R}^+$，一个集合 $T=\{ t_1,\ldots,t_k\}\subseteq V$，其中 $k$ 个特殊顶点（称为终端），以及 $T$ 上的半度量 $D$。目标是将每个非终端顶点分配给终端，同时最小化边的权重乘以分配了边的端点的终端之间的距离（$D$）的所有边的总和。 $0$-扩展允许两种已知算法，实现 $O(\log{k})$ [C{ă}linescu-Karloff-Rabani SICOMP '05] 和 $O(\log{k}/\log{\log{k}})$ [Fakcharoenphol-Harrelson-Rao-Talwar SODA '03] 的近似值。两种已知算法都基于舍入称为度量松弛的自然线性规划松弛，其中 $D$ 从 $T$ 扩展到整个 $V$。当前最著名的度量松弛完整性差距是 $Ω(\sqrt{\log{k}})$。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种改进的度量松弛完整性差距 $Ω(\log^{\frac{2}{3}}k)$。我们的构建基于一个图到另一个图的随机扩展，这一概念将图的提升作为一种特殊情况，并且可能具有独立的兴趣。受代数拓扑的启发，我们对间隙实例的分析基于证明随机扩展中不存在连续部分（在拓扑意义上）。

AI.tldr: 研究0-扩展问题的度量松弛，证明其积分间隙至少为Ω(log^{2/3}k)。
AI.motivation: 已知0-扩展问题的最佳近似比为O(log k / log log k)，而度量松弛的最佳已知积分间隙仅为Ω(√log k)，存在差距，本文旨在改进下界。
AI.method: 基于图的随机扩展这一新概念（可视为图提升的推广），通过构造随机扩展实例，并利用代数拓扑中连续截面不存在的思想来分析间隙。
AI.result: 将度量松弛的已知最佳积分间隙从Ω(√log k)改进到Ω(log^{2/3} k)。
AI.conclusion: 度量松弛的积分间隙至少为Ω(log^{2/3}k)，表明该松弛与最优近似比之间仍存在差距，且图的随机扩展这一概念可能具有独立的研究价值。

ai_content.motivation: 已知0-扩展问题的最佳近似比为O(log k / log log k)，而度量松弛的最佳已知积分间隙仅为Ω(√log k)，存在差距，本文旨在改进下界。

search_text: The Metric Relaxation for $0$-Extension Admits an $Ω(\log^{2/3}{k})$ Gap $0$-扩展的度量放宽承认 $Ω(\log^{2/3}{k})$ 差距 We consider the $0$-Extension problem, where we are given an undirected graph $\mathcal{G}=(V,E)$ equipped with non-negative edge weights $w:E\rightarrow \mathbb{R}^+$, a collection $ T=\{ t_1,\ldots,t_k\}\subseteq V$ of $k$ special vertices called terminals, and a semi-metric $D$ over $T$. The goal is to assign every non-terminal vertex to a terminal while minimizing the sum over all edges of the weight of the edge multiplied by the distance in $D$ between the terminals to which the endpoints of the edge are assigned. $0$-Extension admits two known algorithms, achieving approximations of $O(\log{k})$ [C{ă}linescu-Karloff-Rabani SICOMP '05] and $O(\log{k}/\log{\log{k}})$ [Fakcharoenphol-Harrelson-Rao-Talwar SODA '03]. Both known algorithms are based on rounding a natural linear programming relaxation called the metric relaxation, in which $D$ is extended from $T$ to the entire of $V$. The current best known integrality gap for the metric relaxation is $Ω(\sqrt{\log{k}})$. In this work we present an improved integrality gap of $Ω(\log^{\frac{2}{3}}k)$ for the metric relaxation. Our construction is based on the randomized extension of one graph by another, a notion that captures lifts of graphs as a special case and might be of independent interest. Inspired by algebraic topology, our analysis of the gap instance is based on proving no continuous section (in the topological sense) exists in the randomized extension. 我们考虑 $0$ 扩展问题，其中给定一个无向图 $\mathcal{G}=(V,E)$，配备非负边权重 $w:E\rightarrow \mathbb{R}^+$，一个集合 $T=\{ t_1,\ldots,t_k\}\subseteq V$，其中 $k$ 个特殊顶点（称为终端），以及 $T$ 上的半度量 $D$。目标是将每个非终端顶点分配给终端，同时最小化边的权重乘以分配了边的端点的终端之间的距离（$D$）的所有边的总和。 $0$-扩展允许两种已知算法，实现 $O(\log{k})$ [C{ă}linescu-Karloff-Rabani SICOMP '05] 和 $O(\log{k}/\log{\log{k}})$ [Fakcharoenphol-Harrelson-Rao-Talwar SODA '03] 的近似值。两种已知算法都基于舍入称为度量松弛的自然线性规划松弛，其中 $D$ 从 $T$ 扩展到整个 $V$。当前最著名的度量松弛完整性差距是 $Ω(\sqrt{\log{k}})$。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种改进的度量松弛完整性差距 $Ω(\log^{\frac{2}{3}}k)$。我们的构建基于一个图到另一个图的随机扩展，这一概念将图的提升作为一种特殊情况，并且可能具有独立的兴趣。受代数拓扑的启发，我们对间隙实例的分析基于证明随机扩展中不存在连续部分（在拓扑意义上）。 研究0-扩展问题的度量松弛，证明其积分间隙至少为Ω(log^{2/3}k)。 Roy Schwartz,Nitzan Tur cs.DS,math.MG

authors_text: Kilian Kleeberger,Florian Roth,Richard Bormann,Marco F. Huber
title: Automatic Grasp Pose Generation for Parallel Jaw Grippers
title_zh: 平行颚式夹具的自动抓取姿势生成
comment: Accepted at 2021 International Conference on Intelligent Autonomous Systems (IAS-16 2021)
comments: Accepted at 2021 International Conference on Intelligent Autonomous Systems (IAS-16 2021)
abstract: This paper presents a novel approach for the automatic offline grasp pose synthesis on known rigid objects for parallel jaw grippers. We use several criteria such as gripper stroke, surface friction, and a collision check to determine suitable 6D grasp poses on an object. In contrast to most available approaches, we neither aim for the best grasp pose nor for as many grasp poses as possible, but for a highly diverse set of grasps distributed all along the object. In order to accomplish this objective, we employ a clustering algorithm to the sampled set of grasps. This allows to simultaneously reduce the set of grasp pose candidates and maintain a high variance in terms of position and orientation between the individual grasps. We demonstrate that the grasps generated by our method can be successfully used in real-world robotic grasping applications.
summary: This paper presents a novel approach for the automatic offline grasp pose synthesis on known rigid objects for parallel jaw grippers. We use several criteria such as gripper stroke, surface friction, and a collision check to determine suitable 6D grasp poses on an object. In contrast to most available approaches, we neither aim for the best grasp pose nor for as many grasp poses as possible, but for a highly diverse set of grasps distributed all along the object. In order to accomplish this objective, we employ a clustering algorithm to the sampled set of grasps. This allows to simultaneously reduce the set of grasp pose candidates and maintain a high variance in terms of position and orientation between the individual grasps. We demonstrate that the grasps generated by our method can be successfully used in real-world robotic grasping applications.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新方法，用于对平行颚式夹具的已知刚性物体进行自动离线抓取姿势合成。我们使用多种标准，例如夹具行程、表面摩擦力和碰撞检查来确定物体上合适的 6D 抓取姿势。与大多数可用的方法相比，我们的目标既不是最佳的抓取姿势，也不是尽可能多的抓取姿势，而是为了沿着物体分布的高度多样化的抓取集合。为了实现这一目标，我们对采样的掌握点集合采用了聚类算法。这允许同时减少候选抓取姿势的集合，并在各个抓取之间的位置和方向方面保持较高的方差。我们证明，我们的方法生成的抓取可以成功地用于现实世界的机器人抓取应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种为并行夹爪自动生成多样化抓取姿态的方法，用于已知的刚性物体。
AI.motivation: 现有方法多关注最优或数量最多的抓取姿态，但本文旨在生成分布于物体各处的高多样性抓取姿态，以提升实际应用的适应性。
AI.method: 采用聚类算法对采样后的抓取姿态进行处理，减少候选姿态数量，同时保持位置和方向的高方差。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法生成的抓取姿态能够有效应用于实际机器人抓取任务中。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功实现了多样化抓取姿态的生成，验证了其在实际机器人抓取中的有效性。

authors_text: Jialun Li,Xiaojia Xie,Hengbo Ma,Xiao Liu,Jianping He
title: Speed Planning Using Bezier Polynomials with Trapezoidal Corridors
title_zh: 使用贝塞尔多项式和梯形走廊进行速度规划
abstract: To generate safe and real-time trajectories for an autonomous vehicle in dynamic environments, path and speed decoupled planning methods are often considered. This paper studies speed planning, which mainly deals with dynamic obstacle avoidance given the planning path. The main challenges lie in the decisions in non-convex space and the trade-off between safety, comfort and efficiency performances. This work uses dynamic programming to search heuristic waypoints on the S-T graph and to construct convex feasible spaces. Further, a piecewise Bezier polynomials optimization approach with trapezoidal corridors is presented, which theoretically guarantees the safety and optimality of the trajectory. The simulations verify the effectiveness of the proposed approach.
summary: To generate safe and real-time trajectories for an autonomous vehicle in dynamic environments, path and speed decoupled planning methods are often considered. This paper studies speed planning, which mainly deals with dynamic obstacle avoidance given the planning path. The main challenges lie in the decisions in non-convex space and the trade-off between safety, comfort and efficiency performances. This work uses dynamic programming to search heuristic waypoints on the S-T graph and to construct convex feasible spaces. Further, a piecewise Bezier polynomials optimization approach with trapezoidal corridors is presented, which theoretically guarantees the safety and optimality of the trajectory. The simulations verify the effectiveness of the proposed approach.
abstract_zh: 为了在动态环境中为自动驾驶车辆生成安全、实时的轨迹，通常会考虑路径和速度解耦的规划方法。本文研究速度规划，主要涉及给定规划路径的动态避障问题。主要挑战在于非凸空间中的决策以及安全性、舒适性和效率性能之间的权衡。这项工作使用动态规划来搜索 S-T 图上的启发式路径点并构造凸可行空间。进一步提出了梯形走廊的分段贝塞尔多项式优化方法，从理论上保证了轨迹的安全性和最优性。模拟验证了所提出方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于贝塞尔多项式和梯形走廊的速度规划方法，用于自动驾驶车辆在动态环境中的安全轨迹生成。
AI.motivation: 传统路径与速度解耦规划方法在非凸空间决策及安全、舒适、效率的权衡上存在挑战，需更优方法保证轨迹安全性与最优性。
AI.method: 采用动态规划在S-T图中搜索启发式航路点并构建凸可行空间，结合分段贝塞尔多项式优化与梯形走廊约束，理论保证轨迹安全性和最优性。
AI.result: 仿真验证了所提方法在动态障碍物规避中的有效性，能够生成满足安全、舒适与效率要求的轨迹。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过凸空间构建与贝塞尔优化有效解决非凸空间规划难题，为自动驾驶动态轨迹规划提供可行方案。

authors_text: Roberto Olmos,Siham Tabik,Francisco Perez-Hernandez,Alberto Lamas,Francisco Herrera
title: MULTICAST: MULTI Confirmation-level Alarm SysTem based on CNN and LSTM to mitigate false alarms for handgun detection in video-surveillance
title_zh: 组播：基于 CNN 和 LSTM 的多确认级警报系统，可减少视频监控中手枪检测的误报
abstract: Despite the constant advances in computer vision, integrating modern single-image detectors in real-time handgun alarm systems in video-surveillance is still debatable. Using such detectors still implies a high number of false alarms and false negatives. In this context, most existent studies select one of the latest single-image detectors and train it on a better dataset or use some pre-processing, post-processing or data-fusion approach to further reduce false alarms. However, none of these works tried to exploit the temporal information present in the videos to mitigate false detections. This paper presents a new system, called MULTI Confirmation-level Alarm SysTem based on Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) and Long Short Term Memory networks (LSTM) (MULTICAST), that leverages not only the spacial information but also the temporal information existent in the videos for a more reliable handgun detection. MULTICAST consists of three stages, i) a handgun detection stage, ii) a CNN-based spacial confirmation stage and iii) LSTM-based temporal confirmation stage. The temporal confirmation stage uses the positions of the detected handgun in previous instants to predict its trajectory in the next frame. Our experiments show that MULTICAST reduces by 80% the number of false alarms with respect to Faster R-CNN based-single-image detector, which makes it more useful in providing more effective and rapid security responses.
summary: Despite the constant advances in computer vision, integrating modern single-image detectors in real-time handgun alarm systems in video-surveillance is still debatable. Using such detectors still implies a high number of false alarms and false negatives. In this context, most existent studies select one of the latest single-image detectors and train it on a better dataset or use some pre-processing, post-processing or data-fusion approach to further reduce false alarms. However, none of these works tried to exploit the temporal information present in the videos to mitigate false detections. This paper presents a new system, called MULTI Confirmation-level Alarm SysTem based on Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) and Long Short Term Memory networks (LSTM) (MULTICAST), that leverages not only the spacial information but also the temporal information existent in the videos for a more reliable handgun detection. MULTICAST consists of three stages, i) a handgun detection stage, ii) a CNN-based spacial confirmation stage and iii) LSTM-based temporal confirmation stage. The temporal confirmation stage uses the positions of the detected handgun in previous instants to predict its trajectory in the next frame. Our experiments show that MULTICAST reduces by 80% the number of false alarms with respect to Faster R-CNN based-single-image detector, which makes it more useful in providing more effective and rapid security responses.
abstract_zh: 尽管计算机视觉不断进步，但将现代单图像探测器集成到视频监控的实时手枪报警系统中仍然存在争议。使用此类探测器仍然意味着大量误报和漏报。在这种情况下，大多数现有研究选择最新的单图像探测器之一，并在更好的数据集上对其进行训练，或使用一些预处理、后处理或​​数据融合方法来进一步减少误报。然而，这些工作都没有尝试利用视频中存在的时间信息来减少错误检测。本文提出了一种新系统，称为多确认级报警系统，基于卷积神经网络（CNN）和长短期记忆网络（LSTM）（MULTICAST），该系统不仅利用视频中存在的空间信息，还利用视频中存在的时间信息来实现更可靠的手枪检测。 MULTICAST 由三个阶段组成，i）手枪检测阶段，ii）基于 CNN 的空间确认阶段和 iii）基于 LSTM 的时间确认阶段。时间确认阶段使用检测到的手枪在前一时刻的位置来预测其在下一帧中的轨迹。我们的实验表明，相对于基于 Faster R-CNN 的单图像检测器，MULTICAST 减少了 80% 的误报数量，这使得它在提供更有效、更快速的安全响应方面更有用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MULTICAST系统，结合CNN和LSTM利用视频中的时空信息，减少视频监控中手枪检测的误报。
AI.motivation: 现有单图像检测器在视频监控中存在高误报率和漏报率，且未有效利用视频中的时间信息。
AI.method: 系统分三阶段：手枪检测阶段、CNN空间确认阶段和LSTM时间确认阶段，通过轨迹预测降低误报。
AI.result: 实验表明，与Faster R-CNN相比，误报率降低80%，提升安全响应有效性。
AI.conclusion: 结合时空信息的多级确认系统能显著减少误报，为视频监控提供更可靠的枪支检测方案。

search_text: MULTICAST: MULTI Confirmation-level Alarm SysTem based on CNN and LSTM to mitigate false alarms for handgun detection in video-surveillance 组播：基于 CNN 和 LSTM 的多确认级警报系统，可减少视频监控中手枪检测的误报 Despite the constant advances in computer vision, integrating modern single-image detectors in real-time handgun alarm systems in video-surveillance is still debatable. Using such detectors still implies a high number of false alarms and false negatives. In this context, most existent studies select one of the latest single-image detectors and train it on a better dataset or use some pre-processing, post-processing or data-fusion approach to further reduce false alarms. However, none of these works tried to exploit the temporal information present in the videos to mitigate false detections. This paper presents a new system, called MULTI Confirmation-level Alarm SysTem based on Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) and Long Short Term Memory networks (LSTM) (MULTICAST), that leverages not only the spacial information but also the temporal information existent in the videos for a more reliable handgun detection. MULTICAST consists of three stages, i) a handgun detection stage, ii) a CNN-based spacial confirmation stage and iii) LSTM-based temporal confirmation stage. The temporal confirmation stage uses the positions of the detected handgun in previous instants to predict its trajectory in the next frame. Our experiments show that MULTICAST reduces by 80% the number of false alarms with respect to Faster R-CNN based-single-image detector, which makes it more useful in providing more effective and rapid security responses. 尽管计算机视觉不断进步，但将现代单图像探测器集成到视频监控的实时手枪报警系统中仍然存在争议。使用此类探测器仍然意味着大量误报和漏报。在这种情况下，大多数现有研究选择最新的单图像探测器之一，并在更好的数据集上对其进行训练，或使用一些预处理、后处理或​​数据融合方法来进一步减少误报。然而，这些工作都没有尝试利用视频中存在的时间信息来减少错误检测。本文提出了一种新系统，称为多确认级报警系统，基于卷积神经网络（CNN）和长短期记忆网络（LSTM）（MULTICAST），该系统不仅利用视频中存在的空间信息，还利用视频中存在的时间信息来实现更可靠的手枪检测。 MULTICAST 由三个阶段组成，i）手枪检测阶段，ii）基于 CNN 的空间确认阶段和 iii）基于 LSTM 的时间确认阶段。时间确认阶段使用检测到的手枪在前一时刻的位置来预测其在下一帧中的轨迹。我们的实验表明，相对于基于 Faster R-CNN 的单图像检测器，MULTICAST 减少了 80% 的误报数量，这使得它在提供更有效、更快速的安全响应方面更有用。 本文提出MULTICAST系统，结合CNN和LSTM利用视频中的时空信息，减少视频监控中手枪检测的误报。 Roberto Olmos,Siham Tabik,Francisco Perez-Hernandez,Alberto Lamas,Francisco Herrera cs.CV

authors_text: Zahra Gharaee
title: Online recognition of unsegmented actions with hierarchical SOM architecture
title_zh: 利用分层 SOM 架构在线识别未分段动作
abstract: Automatic recognition of an online series of unsegmented actions requires a method for segmentation that determines when an action starts and when it ends. In this paper, a novel approach for recognizing unsegmented actions in online test experiments is proposed. The method uses self-organizing neural networks to build a three-layer cognitive architecture. The unique features of an action sequence are represented as a series of elicited key activations by the first-layer self-organizing map. An average length of a key activation vector is calculated for all action sequences in a training set and adjusted in learning trials to generate input patterns to the second-layer self-organizing map. The pattern vectors are clustered in the second layer, and the clusters are then labeled by an action identity in the third layer neural network. The experiment results show that although the performance drops slightly in online experiments compared to the offline tests, the ability of the proposed architecture to deal with the unsegmented action sequences as well as the online performance makes the system more plausible and practical in real-case scenarios.
summary: Automatic recognition of an online series of unsegmented actions requires a method for segmentation that determines when an action starts and when it ends. In this paper, a novel approach for recognizing unsegmented actions in online test experiments is proposed. The method uses self-organizing neural networks to build a three-layer cognitive architecture. The unique features of an action sequence are represented as a series of elicited key activations by the first-layer self-organizing map. An average length of a key activation vector is calculated for all action sequences in a training set and adjusted in learning trials to generate input patterns to the second-layer self-organizing map. The pattern vectors are clustered in the second layer, and the clusters are then labeled by an action identity in the third layer neural network. The experiment results show that although the performance drops slightly in online experiments compared to the offline tests, the ability of the proposed architecture to deal with the unsegmented action sequences as well as the online performance makes the system more plausible and practical in real-case scenarios.
abstract_zh: 自动识别一系列在线未分段动作需要一种分段方法来确定动作何时开始和何时结束。在本文中，提出了一种在在线测试实验中识别未分段动作的新方法。该方法使用自组织神经网络构建三层认知架构。动作序列的独特特征由第一层自组织映射表示为一系列引发的关键激活。针对训练集中的所有动作序列计算关键激活向量的平均长度，并在学习试验中进行调整以生成第二层自组织映射的输入模式。模式向量在第二层中聚类，然后在第三层神经网络中用动作标识来标记聚类。实验结果表明，尽管与离线测试相比，在线实验的性能略有下降，但所提出的架构处理未分段动作序列的能力以及在线性能使系统在实际场景中更加合理和实用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分层自组织映射（SOM）架构的在线无分割动作识别方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效处理在线场景中未预先分割的动作序列，需开发能实时识别且无需人工分割的解决方案。
AI.method: 构建三层认知架构：第一层SOM提取动作关键激活特征，第二层SOM聚类模式向量，第三层神经网络分配动作标签。
AI.result: 在线实验性能略低于离线测试，但系统对无分割动作序列的处理能力和实时性更符合实际应用需求。
AI.conclusion: 该分层SOM架构在保持在线处理能力的同时有效识别无分割动作，提升了实际场景的可行性。

authors_text: Shahin Amiriparian,Tobias Hübner,Maurice Gerczuk,Sandra Ottl,Björn W. Schuller
title: DeepSpectrumLite: A Power-Efficient Transfer Learning Framework for Embedded Speech and Audio Processing from Decentralised Data
title_zh: DeepSpectrumLite：一种用于从分散数据进行嵌入式语音和音频处理的高效迁移学习框架
abstract: Deep neural speech and audio processing systems have a large number of trainable parameters, a relatively complex architecture, and require a vast amount of training data and computational power. These constraints make it more challenging to integrate such systems into embedded devices and utilise them for real-time, real-world applications. We tackle these limitations by introducing DeepSpectrumLite, an open-source, lightweight transfer learning framework for on-device speech and audio recognition using pre-trained image convolutional neural networks (CNNs). The framework creates and augments Mel-spectrogram plots on-the-fly from raw audio signals which are then used to finetune specific pre-trained CNNs for the target classification task. Subsequently, the whole pipeline can be run in real-time with a mean inference lag of 242.0 ms when a DenseNet121 model is used on a consumer-grade Motorola moto e7 plus smartphone. DeepSpectrumLite operates decentralised, eliminating the need for data upload for further processing. By obtaining state-of-the-art results on a set of paralinguistics tasks, we demonstrate the suitability of the proposed transfer learning approach for embedded audio signal processing, even when data is scarce. We provide an extensive command-line interface for users and developers which is comprehensively documented and publicly available at https://github.com/DeepSpectrum/DeepSpectrumLite.
summary: Deep neural speech and audio processing systems have a large number of trainable parameters, a relatively complex architecture, and require a vast amount of training data and computational power. These constraints make it more challenging to integrate such systems into embedded devices and utilise them for real-time, real-world applications. We tackle these limitations by introducing DeepSpectrumLite, an open-source, lightweight transfer learning framework for on-device speech and audio recognition using pre-trained image convolutional neural networks (CNNs). The framework creates and augments Mel-spectrogram plots on-the-fly from raw audio signals which are then used to finetune specific pre-trained CNNs for the target classification task. Subsequently, the whole pipeline can be run in real-time with a mean inference lag of 242.0 ms when a DenseNet121 model is used on a consumer-grade Motorola moto e7 plus smartphone. DeepSpectrumLite operates decentralised, eliminating the need for data upload for further processing. By obtaining state-of-the-art results on a set of paralinguistics tasks, we demonstrate the suitability of the proposed transfer learning approach for embedded audio signal processing, even when data is scarce. We provide an extensive command-line interface for users and developers which is comprehensively documented and publicly available at https://github.com/DeepSpectrum/DeepSpectrumLite.
abstract_zh: 深度神经语音和音频处理系统具有大量可训练参数、相对复杂的架构，需要大量的训练数据和计算能力。这些限制使得将此类系统集成到嵌入式设备并将其用于实时、真实应用程序变得更具挑战性。我们通过引入 DeepSpectrumLite 来解决这些限制，这是一个开源、轻量级的迁移学习框架，用于使用预训练的图像卷积神经网络 (CNN) 进行设备上语音和音频识别。该框架根据原始音频信号即时创建并增强梅尔频谱图，然后使用这些信号来微调特定的预训练 CNN 以实现目标分类任务。随后，当在消费级摩托罗拉 moto e7 plus 智能手机上使用 DenseNet121 模型时，整个管道可以实时运行，平均推理延迟为 242.0 毫秒。 DeepSpectrumLite 分散运行，无需上传数据进行进一步处理。通过在一组副语言学任务上获得最先进的结果，我们证明了所提出的迁移学习方法对于嵌入式音频信号处理的适用性，即使在数据稀缺的情况下也是如此。我们为用户和开发人员提供了广泛的命令行界面，该界面有完整的文档记录并可在 https://github.com/DeepSpectrum/DeepSpectrumLite 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeepSpectrumLite，一个基于迁移学习的轻量级框架，用于嵌入式设备上的语音和音频处理，通过预训练图像CNN实现去中心化数据处理。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习语音系统参数多、计算需求高，难以部署于嵌入式设备。现有方法依赖大量数据和云端计算，无法满足实时、低功耗需求。
AI.method: 利用预训练图像CNN（如DenseNet121），在设备端实时生成Mel频谱图并微调模型，无需上传数据。通过命令行接口实现端到端处理。
AI.result: 在摩托罗拉Moto E7 Plus手机上实现实时推理，平均延迟242ms，在paralinguistics任务中达到SOTA性能，验证了框架有效性。
AI.conclusion: 迁移学习可有效解决嵌入式音频处理中的数据稀缺和计算限制问题，DeepSpectrumLite为边缘设备提供了高效、开源的解决方案。

ai_content_json.method: 利用预训练图像CNN（如DenseNet121），在设备端实时生成Mel频谱图并微调模型，无需上传数据。通过命令行接口实现端到端处理。
ai_content_json.result: 在摩托罗拉Moto E7 Plus手机上实现实时推理，平均延迟242ms，在paralinguistics任务中达到SOTA性能，验证了框架有效性。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 迁移学习可有效解决嵌入式音频处理中的数据稀缺和计算限制问题，DeepSpectrumLite为边缘设备提供了高效、开源的解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出DeepSpectrumLite，一个基于迁移学习的轻量级框架，用于嵌入式设备上的语音和音频处理，通过预训练图像CNN实现去中心化数据处理。
motivation: 传统深度学习语音系统参数多、计算需求高，难以部署于嵌入式设备。现有方法依赖大量数据和云端计算，无法满足实时、低功耗需求。
method: 利用预训练图像CNN（如DenseNet121），在设备端实时生成Mel频谱图并微调模型，无需上传数据。通过命令行接口实现端到端处理。
result: 在摩托罗拉Moto E7 Plus手机上实现实时推理，平均延迟242ms，在paralinguistics任务中达到SOTA性能，验证了框架有效性。
conclusion: 迁移学习可有效解决嵌入式音频处理中的数据稀缺和计算限制问题，DeepSpectrumLite为边缘设备提供了高效、开源的解决方案。
search_text: DeepSpectrumLite: A Power-Efficient Transfer Learning Framework for Embedded Speech and Audio Processing from Decentralised Data DeepSpectrumLite：一种用于从分散数据进行嵌入式语音和音频处理的高效迁移学习框架 Deep neural speech and audio processing systems have a large number of trainable parameters, a relatively complex architecture, and require a vast amount of training data and computational power. These constraints make it more challenging to integrate such systems into embedded devices and utilise them for real-time, real-world applications. We tackle these limitations by introducing DeepSpectrumLite, an open-source, lightweight transfer learning framework for on-device speech and audio recognition using pre-trained image convolutional neural networks (CNNs). The framework creates and augments Mel-spectrogram plots on-the-fly from raw audio signals which are then used to finetune specific pre-trained CNNs for the target classification task. Subsequently, the whole pipeline can be run in real-time with a mean inference lag of 242.0 ms when a DenseNet121 model is used on a consumer-grade Motorola moto e7 plus smartphone. DeepSpectrumLite operates decentralised, eliminating the need for data upload for further processing. By obtaining state-of-the-art results on a set of paralinguistics tasks, we demonstrate the suitability of the proposed transfer learning approach for embedded audio signal processing, even when data is scarce. We provide an extensive command-line interface for users and developers which is comprehensively documented and publicly available at https://github.com/DeepSpectrum/DeepSpectrumLite. 深度神经语音和音频处理系统具有大量可训练参数、相对复杂的架构，需要大量的训练数据和计算能力。这些限制使得将此类系统集成到嵌入式设备并将其用于实时、真实应用程序变得更具挑战性。我们通过引入 DeepSpectrumLite 来解决这些限制，这是一个开源、轻量级的迁移学习框架，用于使用预训练的图像卷积神经网络 (CNN) 进行设备上语音和音频识别。该框架根据原始音频信号即时创建并增强梅尔频谱图，然后使用这些信号来微调特定的预训练 CNN 以实现目标分类任务。随后，当在消费级摩托罗拉 moto e7 plus 智能手机上使用 DenseNet121 模型时，整个管道可以实时运行，平均推理延迟为 242.0 毫秒。 DeepSpectrumLite 分散运行，无需上传数据进行进一步处理。通过在一组副语言学任务上获得最先进的结果，我们证明了所提出的迁移学习方法对于嵌入式音频信号处理的适用性，即使在数据稀缺的情况下也是如此。我们为用户和开发人员提供了广泛的命令行界面，该界面有完整的文档记录并可在 https://github.com/DeepSpectrum/DeepSpectrumLite 上公开获取。 本文提出DeepSpectrumLite，一个基于迁移学习的轻量级框架，用于嵌入式设备上的语音和音频处理，通过预训练图像CNN实现去中心化数据处理。 Shahin Amiriparian,Tobias Hübner,Maurice Gerczuk,Sandra Ottl,Björn W. Schuller cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Bodhisatwa Mandal,Swarnendu Ghosh,Teresa Gonçalves,Paulo Quaresma,Mita Nasipuri,Nibaran Das
title: GuideBP: Guiding Backpropagation Through Weaker Pathways of Parallel Logits
title_zh: GuideBP：通过并行 Logits 的较弱路径指导反向传播
abstract: Convolutional neural networks often generate multiple logits and use simple techniques like addition or averaging for loss computation. But this allows gradients to be distributed equally among all paths. The proposed approach guides the gradients of backpropagation along weakest concept representations. A weakness scores defines the class specific performance of individual pathways which is then used to create a logit that would guide gradients along the weakest pathways. The proposed approach has been shown to perform better than traditional column merging techniques and can be used in several application scenarios. Not only can the proposed model be used as an efficient technique for training multiple instances of a model parallely, but also CNNs with multiple output branches have been shown to perform better with the proposed upgrade. Various experiments establish the flexibility of the learning technique which is simple yet effective in various multi-objective scenarios both empirically and statistically.
summary: Convolutional neural networks often generate multiple logits and use simple techniques like addition or averaging for loss computation. But this allows gradients to be distributed equally among all paths. The proposed approach guides the gradients of backpropagation along weakest concept representations. A weakness scores defines the class specific performance of individual pathways which is then used to create a logit that would guide gradients along the weakest pathways. The proposed approach has been shown to perform better than traditional column merging techniques and can be used in several application scenarios. Not only can the proposed model be used as an efficient technique for training multiple instances of a model parallely, but also CNNs with multiple output branches have been shown to perform better with the proposed upgrade. Various experiments establish the flexibility of the learning technique which is simple yet effective in various multi-objective scenarios both empirically and statistically.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络通常生成多个逻辑并使用简单的技术（例如加法或平均）来计算损失。但这允许梯度在所有路径之间均匀分布。所提出的方法沿着最弱的概念表示引导反向传播的梯度。弱点分数定义了各个路径的类别特定性能，然后用于创建一个逻辑，该逻辑将引导沿着最弱路径的梯度。所提出的方法已被证明比传统的列合并技术表现更好，并且可用于多种应用场景。所提出的模型不仅可以用作并行训练模型的多个实例的有效技术，而且具有多个输出分支的 CNN 已被证明通过所提出的升级可以表现得更好。各种实验证明了学习技术的灵活性，无论是经验上还是统计上，这种学习技术在各种多目标场景中都是简单而有效的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GuideBP方法，通过引导反向传播沿着并行logits中较弱的路径进行，以提升卷积神经网络的训练效率与性能。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在计算损失时对所有路径的梯度分配均等，未能有效利用不同路径的性能差异，导致训练效率受限。
AI.method: 通过定义路径弱度评分衡量各路径的类别特异性性能，生成引导梯度沿弱路径传播的logit，实现针对性优化。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法优于传统列合并技术，在多实例并行训练及多输出分支CNN中均能提升性能，且在多目标场景下表现灵活有效。
AI.conclusion: GuideBP是一种简单高效的多目标学习技术，通过聚焦弱路径优化，显著提升了模型训练效率与适用性。

authors_text: Jose L. Gómez,Gabriel Villalonga,Antonio M. López
title: Co-training for Deep Object Detection: Comparing Single-modal and Multi-modal Approaches
title_zh: 深度目标检测的协同训练：比较单模态和多模态方法
abstract: Top-performing computer vision models are powered by convolutional neural networks (CNNs). Training an accurate CNN highly depends on both the raw sensor data and their associated ground truth (GT). Collecting such GT is usually done through human labeling, which is time-consuming and does not scale as we wish. This data labeling bottleneck may be intensified due to domain shifts among image sensors, which could force per-sensor data labeling. In this paper, we focus on the use of co-training, a semi-supervised learning (SSL) method, for obtaining self-labeled object bounding boxes (BBs), i.e., the GT to train deep object detectors. In particular, we assess the goodness of multi-modal co-training by relying on two different views of an image, namely, appearance (RGB) and estimated depth (D). Moreover, we compare appearance-based single-modal co-training with multi-modal. Our results suggest that in a standard SSL setting (no domain shift, a few human-labeled data) and under virtual-to-real domain shift (many virtual-world labeled data, no human-labeled data) multi-modal co-training outperforms single-modal. In the latter case, by performing GAN-based domain translation both co-training modalities are on pair; at least, when using an off-the-shelf depth estimation model not specifically trained on the translated images.
summary: Top-performing computer vision models are powered by convolutional neural networks (CNNs). Training an accurate CNN highly depends on both the raw sensor data and their associated ground truth (GT). Collecting such GT is usually done through human labeling, which is time-consuming and does not scale as we wish. This data labeling bottleneck may be intensified due to domain shifts among image sensors, which could force per-sensor data labeling. In this paper, we focus on the use of co-training, a semi-supervised learning (SSL) method, for obtaining self-labeled object bounding boxes (BBs), i.e., the GT to train deep object detectors. In particular, we assess the goodness of multi-modal co-training by relying on two different views of an image, namely, appearance (RGB) and estimated depth (D). Moreover, we compare appearance-based single-modal co-training with multi-modal. Our results suggest that in a standard SSL setting (no domain shift, a few human-labeled data) and under virtual-to-real domain shift (many virtual-world labeled data, no human-labeled data) multi-modal co-training outperforms single-modal. In the latter case, by performing GAN-based domain translation both co-training modalities are on pair; at least, when using an off-the-shelf depth estimation model not specifically trained on the translated images.
abstract_zh: 性能最佳的计算机视觉模型由卷积神经网络 (CNN) 提供支持。训练准确的 CNN 在很大程度上取决于原始传感器数据及其相关的地面实况 (GT)。收集此类GT通常是通过人工标记来完成的，这非常耗时并且无法按照我们希望的方式进行扩展。由于图像传感器之间的域转移，这种数据标记瓶颈可能会加剧，这可能会迫使每个传感器进行数据标记。在本文中，我们重点关注使用协同训练（一种半监督学习（SSL）方法）来获得自标记对象边界框（BB），即训练深度对象检测器的 GT。特别是，我们通过依赖图像的两个不同视图，即外观（RGB）和估计深度（D）来评估多模态协同训练的优点。此外，我们还比较了基于外观的单模态协同训练与多模态协同训练。我们的结果表明，在标准 SSL 设置（无域转换，少量人类标记数据）和虚拟到真实域转换（许多虚拟世界标记数据，无人类标记数据）下，多模态协同训练优于单模态。在后一种情况下，通过执行基于 GAN 的域翻译，两种协同训练模式都是成对的；至少，当使用未针对翻译图像进行专门训练的现成深度估计模型时。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了使用协同训练方法生成自标注目标边界框以训练深度目标检测器，比较了单模态（如RGB）和多模态（RGB与深度）方法的效果。
AI.motivation: 高质量的标注数据获取成本高且难以扩展，尤其在存在领域偏移时需针对不同传感器单独标注。协同训练可减少对人工标注的依赖，但多模态方法的有效性尚需验证。
AI.method: 基于半监督学习框架，利用图像的两种视角（RGB外观和估计深度）进行协同训练，对比单模态与多模态方法，并通过GAN领域转换处理虚拟到现实的领域偏移。
AI.result: 在标准半监督设置和虚拟到现实领域偏移场景中，多模态协同训练均优于单模态方法；使用GAN转换后，两种方法性能接近，尤其当深度模型未针对转换图像专门训练时仍有效。
AI.conclusion: 多模态协同训练能更有效提升目标检测性能，尤其在领域偏移场景下，结合GAN转换和现成深度模型可实现良好效果。
