search_text: Co-training for Deep Object Detection: Comparing Single-modal and Multi-modal Approaches 深度目标检测的协同训练：比较单模态和多模态方法 Top-performing computer vision models are powered by convolutional neural networks (CNNs). Training an accurate CNN highly depends on both the raw sensor data and their associated ground truth (GT). Collecting such GT is usually done through human labeling, which is time-consuming and does not scale as we wish. This data labeling bottleneck may be intensified due to domain shifts among image sensors, which could force per-sensor data labeling. In this paper, we focus on the use of co-training, a semi-supervised learning (SSL) method, for obtaining self-labeled object bounding boxes (BBs), i.e., the GT to train deep object detectors. In particular, we assess the goodness of multi-modal co-training by relying on two different views of an image, namely, appearance (RGB) and estimated depth (D). Moreover, we compare appearance-based single-modal co-training with multi-modal. Our results suggest that in a standard SSL setting (no domain shift, a few human-labeled data) and under virtual-to-real domain shift (many virtual-world labeled data, no human-labeled data) multi-modal co-training outperforms single-modal. In the latter case, by performing GAN-based domain translation both co-training modalities are on pair; at least, when using an off-the-shelf depth estimation model not specifically trained on the translated images. 性能最佳的计算机视觉模型由卷积神经网络 (CNN) 提供支持。训练准确的 CNN 在很大程度上取决于原始传感器数据及其相关的地面实况 (GT)。收集此类GT通常是通过人工标记来完成的，这非常耗时并且无法按照我们希望的方式进行扩展。由于图像传感器之间的域转移，这种数据标记瓶颈可能会加剧，这可能会迫使每个传感器进行数据标记。在本文中，我们重点关注使用协同训练（一种半监督学习（SSL）方法）来获得自标记对象边界框（BB），即训练深度对象检测器的 GT。特别是，我们通过依赖图像的两个不同视图，即外观（RGB）和估计深度（D）来评估多模态协同训练的优点。此外，我们还比较了基于外观的单模态协同训练与多模态协同训练。我们的结果表明，在标准 SSL 设置（无域转换，少量人类标记数据）和虚拟到真实域转换（许多虚拟世界标记数据，无人类标记数据）下，多模态协同训练优于单模态。在后一种情况下，通过执行基于 GAN 的域翻译，两种协同训练模式都是成对的；至少，当使用未针对翻译图像进行专门训练的现成深度估计模型时。 本文研究了使用协同训练方法生成自标注目标边界框以训练深度目标检测器，比较了单模态（如RGB）和多模态（RGB与深度）方法的效果。 Jose L. Gómez,Gabriel Villalonga,Antonio M. López cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Wilhelm Friedemann,Tobias Friedrich,Hans Gawendowicz,Pascal Lenzner,Anna Melnichenko,Jannik Peters,Daniel Stephan,Michael Vaichenker
title: Efficiency and Stability in Euclidean Network Design
title_zh: 欧几里德网络设计的效率和稳定性
comment: To appear at the 33rd ACM Symposium on Paralellism in Algorithms and Architectures (SPAA), full version
comments: To appear at the 33rd ACM Symposium on Paralellism in Algorithms and Architectures (SPAA), full version
abstract: Network Design problems typically ask for a minimum cost sub-network from a given host network. This classical point-of-view assumes a central authority enforcing the optimum solution. But how should networks be designed to cope with selfish agents that own parts of the network? In this setting, agents will deviate from a minimum cost network if this decreases their individual cost. Hence, designed networks should be both efficient in terms of total cost and stable in terms of the agents' willingness to accept the network. We study this novel type of Network Design problem by investigating the creation of $(β,γ)$-networks, that are in $β$-approximate Nash equilibrium and have a total cost of at most $γ$ times the optimal cost, for the recently proposed Euclidean Generalized Network Creation Game by Bilò et al. [SPAA 2019]. There, $n$ agents corresponding to points in Euclidean space create costly edges among themselves to optimize their centrality in the created network. Our main result is a simple $\mathcal{O}(n^2)$-time algorithm that computes a $(β,β)$-network with low $β$ for any given set of points. Moreover, on integer grid point sets or random point sets our algorithm achieves a low constant $β$. Besides these results, we discuss a generalization of our algorithm to instances with arbitrary, even non-metric, edge lengths. Moreover, we show that no such positive results are possible when focusing on either optimal networks or perfectly stable networks as in both cases NP-hard problems arise, there exist instances with very unstable optimal networks, and there are instances for perfectly stable networks with high total cost. Along the way, we significantly improve several results from Bilò et al. and we asymptotically resolve their conjecture about the Price of Anarchy by providing a tight bound.

[SPAA 2019]. There, $n$ agents corresponding to points in Euclidean space create costly edges among themselves to optimize their centrality in the created network. Our main result is a simple $\mathcal{O}(n^2)$-time algorithm that computes a $(β,β)$-network with low $β$ for any given set of points. Moreover, on integer grid point sets or random point sets our algorithm achieves a low constant $β$. abstract_zh: 网络设计问题通常要求给定主机网络的成本最低的子网络。这种经典的观点假设有一个中央权威来执行最佳解决方案。但网络应该如何设计来应对拥有部分网络的自私代理呢？在这种情况下，如果代理人的个人成本降低，他们就会偏离最低成本网络。因此，设计的网络应该既在总成本方面高效，又在代理人接受网络的意愿方面稳定。我们通过研究 $(β,γ)$-网络的创建来研究这种新型网络设计问题，该网络处于 $β$-近似纳什均衡，并且总成本最多为 $γ$ 乘以最佳成本，用于 Bilò 等人最近提出的欧几里得广义网络创建博弈。 [SPAA 2019]。在那里，对应于欧几里得空间中的点的 $n$ 代理在它们之间创建了昂贵的边，以优化它们在所创建的网络中的中心性。我们的主要结果是一个简单的 $\mathcal{O}(n^2)$ 时间算法，该算法针对任何给定的点集计算具有较低 $β$ 的 $(β,β)$ 网络。此外，在整数网格点集或随机点集上，我们的算法实现了较低的常数 $β$。除了这些结果之外，我们还讨论了将我们的算法推广到具有任意（甚至非度量）边长度的实例。此外，我们表明，当关注最优网络或完全稳定的网络时，不可能出现这样的积极结果，因为在这两种情况下都会出现 NP 困难问题，存在最优网络非常不稳定的实例，并且存在总成本较高的完全稳定网络的实例。在此过程中，我们显着改进了 Bilò 等人的多项结果。我们通过提供紧界来渐进地解决他们关于无政府状态的代价的猜想。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在欧几里得空间中设计网络时如何平衡效率与稳定性，提出一种算法以创建近似纳什均衡且总成本较低的网络。
AI.motivation: 传统网络设计假设中央机构强制最优解，但现实中网络由自私代理构建，需确保网络既高效又稳定，避免代理因个人利益偏离最优方案。
AI.method: 提出一种时间复杂度为O(n²)的算法，构造满足(β,β)-网络条件的解，并推广至非度量边长场景，同时分析最优网络与完全稳定网络的计算复杂性。
AI.result: 算法在任意点集上实现低β值，在网格或随机点集上达到常数级β；改进了Bilò等人的结果，并证明价格分歧的紧界，部分解决其猜想。
AI.conclusion: 通过算法设计有效平衡效率与稳定性，证明最优网络或完全稳定网络存在计算难题，揭示了实际网络设计中效率与稳定性的权衡本质。

authors_text: Xuefeng Li,Alan Blair
title: Eccentric Regularization: Minimizing Hyperspherical Energy without explicit projection
title_zh: 偏心正则化：无需显式投影即可最小化超球面能量
abstract: Several regularization methods have recently been introduced which force the latent activations of an autoencoder or deep neural network to conform to either a Gaussian or hyperspherical distribution, or to minimize the implicit rank of the distribution in latent space. In the present work, we introduce a novel regularizing loss function which simulates a pairwise repulsive force between items and an attractive force of each item toward the origin. We show that minimizing this loss function in isolation achieves a hyperspherical distribution. Moreover, when used as a regularizing term, the scaling factor can be adjusted to allow greater flexibility and tolerance of eccentricity, thus allowing the latent variables to be stratified according to their relative importance, while still promoting diversity. We apply this method of Eccentric Regularization to an autoencoder, and demonstrate its effectiveness in image generation, representation learning and downstream classification tasks.
summary: Several regularization methods have recently been introduced which force the latent activations of an autoencoder or deep neural network to conform to either a Gaussian or hyperspherical distribution, or to minimize the implicit rank of the distribution in latent space. In the present work, we introduce a novel regularizing loss function which simulates a pairwise repulsive force between items and an attractive force of each item toward the origin. We show that minimizing this loss function in isolation achieves a hyperspherical distribution. Moreover, when used as a regularizing term, the scaling factor can be adjusted to allow greater flexibility and tolerance of eccentricity, thus allowing the latent variables to be stratified according to their relative importance, while still promoting diversity. We apply this method of Eccentric Regularization to an autoencoder, and demonstrate its effectiveness in image generation, representation learning and downstream classification tasks.
abstract_zh: 最近引入了几种正则化方法，这些方法强制自动编码器或深度神经网络的潜在激活符合高斯分布或超球面分布，或者最小化潜在空间中分布的隐式秩。在目前的工作中，我们引入了一种新颖的正则化损失函数，它模拟项目之间的成对排斥力以及每个项目对原点的吸引力。我们证明，单独最小化这种损失函数可以实现超球面分布。此外，当用作正则化项时，可以调整比例因子以允许更大的灵活性和偏心率的容忍度，从而允许潜在变量根据其相对重要性进行分层，同时仍然促进多样性。我们将这种偏心正则化方法应用于自动编码器，并证明了其在图像生成、表示学习和下游分类任务中的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为偏心正则化的新方法，通过模拟成对排斥力和向原点的吸引力，使自编码器的潜在激活值符合超球面分布。
AI.motivation: 现有正则化方法强制潜在空间服从高斯或超球面分布，但缺乏对潜在变量重要性分层和灵活性的考虑。
AI.method: 设计包含排斥力和吸引力的损失函数，通过调整缩放因子控制潜在变量的偏心度，无需显式投影即可实现超球面分布。
AI.result: 该方法在图像生成、表征学习和下游分类任务中表现出有效性，能够根据潜在变量相对重要性进行分层。
AI.conclusion: 偏心正则化通过灵活调整缩放因子，在保持多样性的同时提升了潜在空间的结构化能力。

search_text: Eccentric Regularization: Minimizing Hyperspherical Energy without explicit projection 偏心正则化：无需显式投影即可最小化超球面能量 Several regularization methods have recently been introduced which force the latent activations of an autoencoder or deep neural network to conform to either a Gaussian or hyperspherical distribution, or to minimize the implicit rank of the distribution in latent space. In the present work, we introduce a novel regularizing loss function which simulates a pairwise repulsive force between items and an attractive force of each item toward the origin. We show that minimizing this loss function in isolation achieves a hyperspherical distribution. Moreover, when used as a regularizing term, the scaling factor can be adjusted to allow greater flexibility and tolerance of eccentricity, thus allowing the latent variables to be stratified according to their relative importance, while still promoting diversity. We apply this method of Eccentric Regularization to an autoencoder, and demonstrate its effectiveness in image generation, representation learning and downstream classification tasks. 最近引入了几种正则化方法，这些方法强制自动编码器或深度神经网络的潜在激活符合高斯分布或超球面分布，或者最小化潜在空间中分布的隐式秩。在目前的工作中，我们引入了一种新颖的正则化损失函数，它模拟项目之间的成对排斥力以及每个项目对原点的吸引力。我们证明，单独最小化这种损失函数可以实现超球面分布。此外，当用作正则化项时，可以调整比例因子以允许更大的灵活性和偏心率的容忍度，从而允许潜在变量根据其相对重要性进行分层，同时仍然促进多样性。我们将这种偏心正则化方法应用于自动编码器，并证明了其在图像生成、表示学习和下游分类任务中的有效性。 本文提出一种名为偏心正则化的新方法，通过模拟成对排斥力和向原点的吸引力，使自编码器的潜在激活值符合超球面分布。 Xuefeng Li,Alan Blair cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Giorgia Dellaferrera,Stanislaw Wozniak,Giacomo Indiveri,Angeliki Pantazi,Evangelos Eleftheriou
title: Learning in Deep Neural Networks Using a Biologically Inspired Optimizer
title_zh: 使用受生物学启发的优化器在深度神经网络中学习
abstract: Plasticity circuits in the brain are known to be influenced by the distribution of the synaptic weights through the mechanisms of synaptic integration and local regulation of synaptic strength. However, the complex interplay of stimulation-dependent plasticity with local learning signals is disregarded by most of the artificial neural network training algorithms devised so far. Here, we propose a novel biologically inspired optimizer for artificial (ANNs) and spiking neural networks (SNNs) that incorporates key principles of synaptic integration observed in dendrites of cortical neurons: GRAPES (Group Responsibility for Adjusting the Propagation of Error Signals). GRAPES implements a weight-distribution dependent modulation of the error signal at each node of the neural network. We show that this biologically inspired mechanism leads to a systematic improvement of the convergence rate of the network, and substantially improves classification accuracy of ANNs and SNNs with both feedforward and recurrent architectures. Furthermore, we demonstrate that GRAPES supports performance scalability for models of increasing complexity and mitigates catastrophic forgetting by enabling networks to generalize to unseen tasks based on previously acquired knowledge. The local characteristics of GRAPES minimize the required memory resources, making it optimally suited for dedicated hardware implementations. Overall, our work indicates that reconciling neurophysiology insights with machine intelligence is key to boosting the performance of neural networks.
summary: Plasticity circuits in the brain are known to be influenced by the distribution of the synaptic weights through the mechanisms of synaptic integration and local regulation of synaptic strength. However, the complex interplay of stimulation-dependent plasticity with local learning signals is disregarded by most of the artificial neural network training algorithms devised so far. Here, we propose a novel biologically inspired optimizer for artificial (ANNs) and spiking neural networks (SNNs) that incorporates key principles of synaptic integration observed in dendrites of cortical neurons: GRAPES (Group Responsibility for Adjusting the Propagation of Error Signals). GRAPES implements a weight-distribution dependent modulation of the error signal at each node of the neural network. We show that this biologically inspired mechanism leads to a systematic improvement of the convergence rate of the network, and substantially improves classification accuracy of ANNs and SNNs with both feedforward and recurrent architectures. Furthermore, we demonstrate that GRAPES supports performance scalability for models of increasing complexity and mitigates catastrophic forgetting by enabling networks to generalize to unseen tasks based on previously acquired knowledge. The local characteristics of GRAPES minimize the required memory resources, making it optimally suited for dedicated hardware implementations. Overall, our work indicates that reconciling neurophysiology insights with machine intelligence is key to boosting the performance of neural networks.
abstract_zh: 已知大脑中的可塑性回路通过突触整合和突触强度的局部调节机制受到突触权重分布的影响。然而，迄今为止设计的大多数人工神经网络训练算法都忽略了刺激依赖性可塑性与局部学习信号的复杂相互作用。在这里，我们提出了一种新颖的受生物学启发的人工神经网络（ANN）和尖峰神经网络（SNN）优化器，它结合了在皮质神经元树突中观察到的突触整合的关键原理：GRAPES（调整误差信号传播的组责任）。 GRAPES 在神经网络的每个节点上实现误差信号的权重分布相关调制。我们表明，这种受生物学启发的机制可以系统地提高网络的收敛速度，并显着提高前馈和循环架构的 ANN 和 SNN 的分类准确性。此外，我们证明 GRAPES 支持日益复杂的模型的性能可扩展性，并通过使网络能够基于先前获得的知识泛化到未见过的任务来减轻灾难性遗忘。 GRAPES 的本地特性最大限度地减少了所需的内存资源，使其最适合专用硬件实现。总的来说，我们的工作表明，将神经生理学见解与机器智能相协调是提高神经网络性能的关键。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种受生物神经元突触整合机制启发的优化器GRAPES，用于改进深度神经网络的训练效率与性能。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络训练算法忽视了突触可塑性与局部学习信号的复杂交互，导致模型收敛速度和泛化能力受限。
AI.method: 设计GRAPES优化器，通过节点权重分布动态调节误差信号，模拟皮层神经元树突的突触整合特性。
AI.result: GRAPES显著提升前馈/循环神经网络的收敛速度与分类精度，支持复杂模型扩展，减少灾难性遗忘，并降低硬件内存需求。
AI.conclusion: 融合神经生理学原理的优化方法可有效增强神经网络性能，为类脑智能系统提供新思路。

However, the complex interplay of stimulation-dependent plasticity with local learning signals is disregarded by most of the artificial neural network training algorithms devised so far. Here, we propose a novel biologically inspired optimizer for artificial (ANNs) and spiking neural networks (SNNs) that incorporates key principles of synaptic integration observed in dendrites of cortical neurons: GRAPES (Group Responsibility for Adjusting the Propagation of Error Signals). We show that this biologically inspired mechanism leads to a systematic improvement of the convergence rate of the network, and substantially improves classification accuracy of ANNs and SNNs with both feedforward and recurrent architectures. Furthermore, we demonstrate that GRAPES supports performance scalability for models of increasing complexity and mitigates catastrophic forgetting by enabling networks to generalize to unseen tasks based on previously acquired knowledge. The local characteristics of GRAPES minimize the required memory resources, making it optimally suited for dedicated hardware implementations. authors_text: Amin Honarmandi Shandiz,László Tóth,Gábor Gosztolya,Alexandra Markó,Tamás Gábor Csapó
title: Improving Neural Silent Speech Interface Models by Adversarial Training
title_zh: 通过对抗训练改进神经无声语音接口模型
abstract: Besides the well-known classification task, these days neural networks are frequently being applied to generate or transform data, such as images and audio signals. In such tasks, the conventional loss functions like the mean squared error (MSE) may not give satisfactory results. To improve the perceptual quality of the generated signals, one possibility is to increase their similarity to real signals, where the similarity is evaluated via a discriminator network. The combination of the generator and discriminator nets is called a Generative Adversarial Network (GAN). Here, we evaluate this adversarial training framework in the articulatory-to-acoustic mapping task, where the goal is to reconstruct the speech signal from a recording of the movement of articulatory organs. As the generator, we apply a 3D convolutional network that gave us good results in an earlier study. To turn it into a GAN, we extend the conventional MSE training loss with an adversarial loss component provided by a discriminator network. As for the evaluation, we report various objective speech quality metrics such as the Perceptual Evaluation of Speech Quality (PESQ), and the Mel-Cepstral Distortion (MCD). Our results indicate that the application of the adversarial training loss brings about a slight, but consistent improvement in all these metrics.
summary: Besides the well-known classification task, these days neural networks are frequently being applied to generate or transform data, such as images and audio signals. In such tasks, the conventional loss functions like the mean squared error (MSE) may not give satisfactory results. To improve the perceptual quality of the generated signals, one possibility is to increase their similarity to real signals, where the similarity is evaluated via a discriminator network. The combination of the generator and discriminator nets is called a Generative Adversarial Network (GAN). Here, we evaluate this adversarial training framework in the articulatory-to-acoustic mapping task, where the goal is to reconstruct the speech signal from a recording of the movement of articulatory organs. As the generator, we apply a 3D convolutional network that gave us good results in an earlier study. To turn it into a GAN, we extend the conventional MSE training loss with an adversarial loss component provided by a discriminator network. As for the evaluation, we report various objective speech quality metrics such as the Perceptual Evaluation of Speech Quality (PESQ), and the Mel-Cepstral Distortion (MCD). Our results indicate that the application of the adversarial training loss brings about a slight, but consistent improvement in all these metrics.
abstract_zh: 除了众所周知的分类任务之外，如今神经网络还经常被应用于生成或转换数据，例如图像和音频信号。在此类任务中，均方误差（MSE）等传统损失函数可能无法给出令人满意的结果。为了提高生成信号的感知质量，一种可能性是增加它们与真实信号的相似性，其中通过鉴别器网络评估相似性。生成器网络和鉴别器网络的组合称为生成对抗网络（GAN）。在这里，我们在发音到声学映射任务中评估这种对抗性训练框架，其目标是从发音器官运动的记录中重建语音信号。作为生成器，我们应用了 3D 卷积网络，该网络在早期的研究中给我们带来了良好的结果。为了将其转变为 GAN，我们用判别器网络提供的对抗性损失组件扩展了传统的 MSE 训练损失。至于评估，我们报告了各种客观语音质量指标，例如语音质量感知评估 (PESQ) 和梅尔倒谱失真 (MCD)。我们的结果表明，对抗性训练损失的应用给所有这些指标带来了轻微但一致的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文将对抗训练框架应用于无声语音接口模型，通过生成对抗网络（GAN）提升从发音器官运动重建语音信号的质量。
AI.motivation: 传统均方误差（MSE）损失函数在生成语音信号任务中难以满足感知质量要求，需通过判别网络评估生成信号与真实信号的相似性以提升效果。
AI.method: 采用3D卷积网络作为生成器，结合判别网络提供的对抗损失函数，扩展传统MSE训练损失，构建生成对抗网络（GAN）框架。
AI.result: 实验表明，对抗训练损失在PESQ（感知语音质量）和MCD（梅尔倒谱失真）等客观指标上均带来小幅但一致的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 对抗训练能有效提升无声语音接口模型的语音重建质量，为相关任务提供了一种可行的改进方法。

authors_text: Patrick Zschech,Jannis Walk,Kai Heinrich,Michael Vössing,Niklas Kühl
title: A Picture is Worth a Collaboration: Accumulating Design Knowledge for Computer-Vision-based Hybrid Intelligence Systems
title_zh: 一张图值得合作：积累基于计算机视觉的混合智能系统的设计知识
comment: Preprint accepted for archival and presentation at the 29th European Conference on Information Systems (ECIS 2021)
comments: Preprint accepted for archival and presentation at the 29th European Conference on Information Systems (ECIS 2021)
abstract: Computer vision (CV) techniques try to mimic human capabilities of visual perception to support labor-intensive and time-consuming tasks like the recognition and localization of critical objects. Nowadays, CV increasingly relies on artificial intelligence (AI) to automatically extract useful information from images that can be utilized for decision support and business process automation. However, the focus of extant research is often exclusively on technical aspects when designing AI-based CV systems while neglecting socio-technical facets, such as trust, control, and autonomy. For this purpose, we consider the design of such systems from a hybrid intelligence (HI) perspective and aim to derive prescriptive design knowledge for CV-based HI systems. We apply a reflective, practice-inspired design science approach and accumulate design knowledge from six comprehensive CV projects. As a result, we identify four design-related mechanisms (i.e., automation, signaling, modification, and collaboration) that inform our derived meta-requirements and design principles. This can serve as a basis for further socio-technical research on CV-based HI systems.
summary: Computer vision (CV) techniques try to mimic human capabilities of visual perception to support labor-intensive and time-consuming tasks like the recognition and localization of critical objects. Nowadays, CV increasingly relies on artificial intelligence (AI) to automatically extract useful information from images that can be utilized for decision support and business process automation. However, the focus of extant research is often exclusively on technical aspects when designing AI-based CV systems while neglecting socio-technical facets, such as trust, control, and autonomy. For this purpose, we consider the design of such systems from a hybrid intelligence (HI) perspective and aim to derive prescriptive design knowledge for CV-based HI systems. We apply a reflective, practice-inspired design science approach and accumulate design knowledge from six comprehensive CV projects. As a result, we identify four design-related mechanisms (i.e., automation, signaling, modification, and collaboration) that inform our derived meta-requirements and design principles. This can serve as a basis for further socio-technical research on CV-based HI systems.
abstract_zh: 计算机视觉（CV）技术试图模仿人类的视觉感知能力，以支持劳动密集型且耗时的任务，例如关键对象的识别和定位。如今，计算机视觉越来越依赖人工智能 (AI) 从图像中自动提取有用信息，用于决策支持和业务流程自动化。然而，现有研究的重点在设计基于人工智能的计算机视觉系统时往往只关注技术方面，而忽略了社会技术方面，例如信任、控制和自主。为此，我们从混合智能 (HI) 的角度考虑此类系统的设计，旨在导出基于 CV 的 HI 系统的规范性设计知识。我们采用反思性的、受实践启发的设计科学方法，并从六个综合简历项目中积累设计知识​​。因此，我们确定了四种与设计相关的机制（即自动化、信号、修改和协作），这些机制为我们派生的元需求和设计原则提供信息。这可以作为基于 CV 的 HI 系统进一步社会技术研究的基础。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过整合技术与社会技术因素，为基于计算机视觉的混合智能系统设计提供指导性设计知识。
AI.motivation: 现有研究过度关注计算机视觉系统的技术层面，忽视了信任、控制与自主性等社会技术因素，需从混合智能视角补充设计理论。
AI.method: 采用反思性实践导向的设计科学方法，通过六个计算机视觉项目的案例研究积累设计知识。
AI.result: 识别出自动化、信号传递、修改与协作四种设计机制，并提炼出元需求与设计原则。
AI.conclusion: 研究为计算机视觉混合智能系统的社会技术设计提供了理论框架，可支持后续相关研究。

authors_text: Shuwei Shi,Qingyan Bai,Mingdeng Cao,Weihao Xia,Jiahao Wang,Yifan Chen,Yujiu Yang
title: Region-Adaptive Deformable Network for Image Quality Assessment
title_zh: 用于图像质量评估的区域自适应变形网络
comment: CVPR NTIRE Workshop 2021. The first two authors contribute equally to this work. Code is available at https://github.com/IIGROUP/RADN
comments: CVPR NTIRE Workshop 2021. The first two authors contribute equally to this work. Code is available at https://github.com/IIGROUP/RADN
abstract: Image quality assessment (IQA) aims to assess the perceptual quality of images. The outputs of the IQA algorithms are expected to be consistent with human subjective perception. In image restoration and enhancement tasks, images generated by generative adversarial networks (GAN) can achieve better visual performance than traditional CNN-generated images, although they have spatial shift and texture noise. Unfortunately, the existing IQA methods have unsatisfactory performance on the GAN-based distortion partially because of their low tolerance to spatial misalignment. To this end, we propose the reference-oriented deformable convolution, which can improve the performance of an IQA network on GAN-based distortion by adaptively considering this misalignment. We further propose a patch-level attention module to enhance the interaction among different patch regions, which are processed independently in previous patch-based methods. The modified residual block is also proposed by applying modifications to the classic residual block to construct a patch-region-based baseline called WResNet. Equipping this baseline with the two proposed modules, we further propose Region-Adaptive Deformable Network (RADN). The experiment results on the NTIRE 2021 Perceptual Image Quality Assessment Challenge dataset show the superior performance of RADN, and the ensemble approach won fourth place in the final testing phase of the challenge. Code is available at https://github.com/IIGROUP/RADN.
summary: Image quality assessment (IQA) aims to assess the perceptual quality of images. The outputs of the IQA algorithms are expected to be consistent with human subjective perception. In image restoration and enhancement tasks, images generated by generative adversarial networks (GAN) can achieve better visual performance than traditional CNN-generated images, although they have spatial shift and texture noise. Unfortunately, the existing IQA methods have unsatisfactory performance on the GAN-based distortion partially because of their low tolerance to spatial misalignment. To this end, we propose the reference-oriented deformable convolution, which can improve the performance of an IQA network on GAN-based distortion by adaptively considering this misalignment. We further propose a patch-level attention module to enhance the interaction among different patch regions, which are processed independently in previous patch-based methods. The modified residual block is also proposed by applying modifications to the classic residual block to construct a patch-region-based baseline called WResNet. Equipping this baseline with the two proposed modules, we further propose Region-Adaptive Deformable Network (RADN). The experiment results on the NTIRE 2021 Perceptual Image Quality Assessment Challenge dataset show the superior performance of RADN, and the ensemble approach won fourth place in the final testing phase of the challenge. Code is available at https://github.com/IIGROUP/RADN.
abstract_zh: 图像质量评估（IQA）旨在评估图像的感知质量。 IQA 算法的输出预计与人类主观感知一致。在图像恢复和增强任务中，生成对抗网络（GAN）生成的图像可以比传统的 CNN 生成的图像获得更好的视觉性能，尽管它们具有空间移位和纹理噪声。不幸的是，现有的 IQA 方法在基于 GAN 的失真方面的性能并不令人满意，部分原因是它们对空间失准的容忍度较低。为此，我们提出了面向参考的可变形卷积，它可以通过自适应地考虑这种错位来提高 IQA 网络在基于 GAN 的失真上的性能。我们进一步提出了一个补丁级注意模块来增强不同补丁区域之间的交互，这些区域在之前基于补丁的方法中是独立处理的。改进的残差块还通过对经典残差块进行修改来构建称为WResNet的基于补丁区域的基线来提出。在此基线上配备两个提议的模块，我们进一步提出区域自适应可变形网络（RADN）。 NTIRE 2021感知图像质量评估挑战数据集上的实验结果显示了RADN的优越性能，集成方法在挑战的最后测试阶段获得了第四名。代码可在 https://github.com/IIGROUP/RADN 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种区域自适应可变形网络（RADN），用于改进基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的图像质量评估方法。
AI.motivation: 现有图像质量评估方法在处理GAN生成图像时表现不佳，主要因其对空间错位和纹理噪声的容忍度低。
AI.method: 设计参考导向的可变形卷积以适应空间错位，并引入块级注意力模块增强区域交互，结合改进的残差块构建WResNet基线，最终形成RADN网络。
AI.result: 在NTIRE 2021数据集上实验表明RADN性能优越，集成方法在挑战赛测试阶段获得第四名。
AI.conclusion: RADN通过区域自适应机制有效提升了GAN生成图像的质量评估能力，验证了方法的有效性。

authors_text: Yide Yu,Amin Honarmandi Shandiz,László Tóth
title: Reconstructing Speech from Real-Time Articulatory MRI Using Neural Vocoders
title_zh: 使用神经声码器从实时发音 MRI 重建语音
abstract: Several approaches exist for the recording of articulatory movements, such as eletromagnetic and permanent magnetic articulagraphy, ultrasound tongue imaging and surface electromyography. Although magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is more costly than the above approaches, the recent developments in this area now allow the recording of real-time MRI videos of the articulators with an acceptable resolution. Here, we experiment with the reconstruction of the speech signal from a real-time MRI recording using deep neural networks. Instead of estimating speech directly, our networks are trained to output a spectral vector, from which we reconstruct the speech signal using the WaveGlow neural vocoder. We compare the performance of three deep neural architectures for the estimation task, combining convolutional (CNN) and recurrence-based (LSTM) neural layers. Besides the mean absolute error (MAE) of our networks, we also evaluate our models by comparing the speech signals obtained using several objective speech quality metrics like the mean cepstral distortion (MCD), Short-Time Objective Intelligibility (STOI), Perceptual Evaluation of Speech Quality (PESQ) and Signal-to-Distortion Ratio (SDR). The results indicate that our approach can successfully reconstruct the gross spectral shape, but more improvements are needed to reproduce the fine spectral details.
summary: Several approaches exist for the recording of articulatory movements, such as eletromagnetic and permanent magnetic articulagraphy, ultrasound tongue imaging and surface electromyography. Although magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is more costly than the above approaches, the recent developments in this area now allow the recording of real-time MRI videos of the articulators with an acceptable resolution. Here, we experiment with the reconstruction of the speech signal from a real-time MRI recording using deep neural networks. Instead of estimating speech directly, our networks are trained to output a spectral vector, from which we reconstruct the speech signal using the WaveGlow neural vocoder. We compare the performance of three deep neural architectures for the estimation task, combining convolutional (CNN) and recurrence-based (LSTM) neural layers. Besides the mean absolute error (MAE) of our networks, we also evaluate our models by comparing the speech signals obtained using several objective speech quality metrics like the mean cepstral distortion (MCD), Short-Time Objective Intelligibility (STOI), Perceptual Evaluation of Speech Quality (PESQ) and Signal-to-Distortion Ratio (SDR). The results indicate that our approach can successfully reconstruct the gross spectral shape, but more improvements are needed to reproduce the fine spectral details.
abstract_zh: 存在多种记录关节运动的方法，例如电磁和永磁关节描记术、超声舌成像和表面肌电图。尽管磁共振成像 (MRI) 比上述方法成本更高，但该领域的最新发展现在允许以可接受的分辨率记录咬合架的实时 MRI 视频。在这里，我们尝试使用深度神经网络从实时 MRI 记录中重建语音信号。我们的网络不是直接估计语音，而是经过训练来输出频谱向量，然后使用 WaveGlow 神经声码器从中重建语音信号。我们比较了三种深度神经架构在估计任务中的性能，结合了卷积 (CNN) 和基于递归 (LSTM) 的神经层。除了网络的平均绝对误差（MAE）之外，我们还通过比较使用几种客观语音质量指标获得的语音信号来评估我们的模型，例如平均倒谱失真（MCD）、短时客观清晰度（STOI）、语音质量感知评估（PESQ）和信号失真比（SDR）。结果表明，我们的方法可以成功地重建总体光谱形状，但需要更多改进来重现精细的光谱细节。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用实时舌部MRI数据重建语音信号的方法，通过深度神经网络生成频谱向量并结合WaveGlow声码器合成语音。
AI.motivation: 尽管MRI成本较高，但其能提供实时高分辨率的发音器运动数据，现有研究多依赖其他低成本方法，本文旨在探索MRI在语音重建中的可行性。
AI.method: 采用卷积神经网络（CNN）和长短期记忆网络（LSTM）组合架构，从MRI视频中估计频谱向量，并使用WaveGlow神经声码器重建语音信号，通过MCD、STOI等指标评估效果。
AI.result: 模型成功重建了语音的总体频谱轮廓，但在精细频谱细节的还原上仍有不足，需进一步优化。
AI.conclusion: MRI结合神经网络可实现语音重建，但需改进模型以提升频谱细节精度，未来可探索更复杂的网络结构或数据增强方法。

search_text: Reconstructing Speech from Real-Time Articulatory MRI Using Neural Vocoders 使用神经声码器从实时发音 MRI 重建语音 Several approaches exist for the recording of articulatory movements, such as eletromagnetic and permanent magnetic articulagraphy, ultrasound tongue imaging and surface electromyography. Although magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is more costly than the above approaches, the recent developments in this area now allow the recording of real-time MRI videos of the articulators with an acceptable resolution. Here, we experiment with the reconstruction of the speech signal from a real-time MRI recording using deep neural networks. Instead of estimating speech directly, our networks are trained to output a spectral vector, from which we reconstruct the speech signal using the WaveGlow neural vocoder. We compare the performance of three deep neural architectures for the estimation task, combining convolutional (CNN) and recurrence-based (LSTM) neural layers. Besides the mean absolute error (MAE) of our networks, we also evaluate our models by comparing the speech signals obtained using several objective speech quality metrics like the mean cepstral distortion (MCD), Short-Time Objective Intelligibility (STOI), Perceptual Evaluation of Speech Quality (PESQ) and Signal-to-Distortion Ratio (SDR). The results indicate that our approach can successfully reconstruct the gross spectral shape, but more improvements are needed to reproduce the fine spectral details. 存在多种记录关节运动的方法，例如电磁和永磁关节描记术、超声舌成像和表面肌电图。尽管磁共振成像 (MRI) 比上述方法成本更高，但该领域的最新发展现在允许以可接受的分辨率记录咬合架的实时 MRI 视频。在这里，我们尝试使用深度神经网络从实时 MRI 记录中重建语音信号。我们的网络不是直接估计语音，而是经过训练来输出频谱向量，然后使用 WaveGlow 神经声码器从中重建语音信号。我们比较了三种深度神经架构在估计任务中的性能，结合了卷积 (CNN) 和基于递归 (LSTM) 的神经层。除了网络的平均绝对误差（MAE）之外，我们还通过比较使用几种客观语音质量指标获得的语音信号来评估我们的模型，例如平均倒谱失真（MCD）、短时客观清晰度（STOI）、语音质量感知评估（PESQ）和信号失真比（SDR）。结果表明，我们的方法可以成功地重建总体光谱形状，但需要更多改进来重现精细的光谱细节。 本文提出了一种利用实时舌部MRI数据重建语音信号的方法，通过深度神经网络生成频谱向量并结合WaveGlow声码器合成语音。 Yide Yu,Amin Honarmandi Shandiz,László Tóth cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Zhiyuan Zhou,Kai Xuan,Zhifu Tao,Ligang Zhou
title: Generalized-TODIM Method for Multi-criteria Decision Making with Basic Uncertain Information and its Application
title_zh: 基本不确定信息多准则决策的广义TODIM方法及其应用
abstract: Due to the fact that basic uncertain information provides a simple form for decision information with certainty degree, it has been developed to reflect the quality of observed or subjective assessments. In order to study the algebra structure and preference relation of basic uncertain information, we develop some algebra operations for basic uncertain information. The order relation of such type of information has also been considered. Finally, to apply the developed algebra operations and order relations, a generalized TODIM method for multi-attribute decision making with basic uncertain information is given. The numerical example shows that the developed decision procedure is valid.
summary: Due to the fact that basic uncertain information provides a simple form for decision information with certainty degree, it has been developed to reflect the quality of observed or subjective assessments. In order to study the algebra structure and preference relation of basic uncertain information, we develop some algebra operations for basic uncertain information. The order relation of such type of information has also been considered. Finally, to apply the developed algebra operations and order relations, a generalized TODIM method for multi-attribute decision making with basic uncertain information is given. The numerical example shows that the developed decision procedure is valid.
abstract_zh: 由于基本不确定信息为具有确定性程度的决策信息提供了一种简单的形式，因此它被发展为反映观察或主观评估的质量。为了研究基本不确定信息的代数结构和偏好关系，我们开发了一些基本不确定信息的代数运算。还考虑了此类信息的顺序关系。最后，为了应用所发展的代数运算和顺序关系，给出了一种用于具有基本不确定信息的多属性决策的广义TODIM方法。数值算例表明所开发的决策程序是有效的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于基本不确定信息的广义TODIM多准则决策方法，并验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 基本不确定信息能有效表达决策中的不确定性，但缺乏相应的代数运算和偏好关系处理方法，需建立系统化决策框架。
AI.method: 开发基本不确定信息的代数运算规则与序关系，结合TODIM方法构建多属性决策模型。
AI.result: 通过数值实例验证该方法能有效处理不确定信息下的多准则决策问题。
AI.conclusion: 提出的广义TODIM方法为处理不确定信息的多准则决策提供了新工具，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Fabian Gröger,Anne-Marie Rickmann,Christian Wachinger
title: STRUDEL: Self-Training with Uncertainty Dependent Label Refinement across Domains
title_zh: STRUDEL：跨域不确定性依赖标签细化的自我训练
comment: accepted at Machine Learning in Medical Imaging (MLMI 2021)
comments: accepted at Machine Learning in Medical Imaging (MLMI 2021)
abstract: We propose an unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) approach for white matter hyperintensity (WMH) segmentation, which uses Self-Training with Uncertainty DEpendent Label refinement (STRUDEL). Self-training has recently been introduced as a highly effective method for UDA, which is based on self-generated pseudo labels. However, pseudo labels can be very noisy and therefore deteriorate model performance. We propose to predict the uncertainty of pseudo labels and integrate it in the training process with an uncertainty-guided loss function to highlight labels with high certainty. STRUDEL is further improved by incorporating the segmentation output of an existing method in the pseudo label generation that showed high robustness for WMH segmentation. In our experiments, we evaluate STRUDEL with a standard U-Net and a modified network with a higher receptive field. Our results on WMH segmentation across datasets demonstrate the significant improvement of STRUDEL with respect to standard self-training.
summary: We propose an unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) approach for white matter hyperintensity (WMH) segmentation, which uses Self-Training with Uncertainty DEpendent Label refinement (STRUDEL). Self-training has recently been introduced as a highly effective method for UDA, which is based on self-generated pseudo labels. However, pseudo labels can be very noisy and therefore deteriorate model performance. We propose to predict the uncertainty of pseudo labels and integrate it in the training process with an uncertainty-guided loss function to highlight labels with high certainty. STRUDEL is further improved by incorporating the segmentation output of an existing method in the pseudo label generation that showed high robustness for WMH segmentation. In our experiments, we evaluate STRUDEL with a standard U-Net and a modified network with a higher receptive field. Our results on WMH segmentation across datasets demonstrate the significant improvement of STRUDEL with respect to standard self-training.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于白质高信号（WMH）分割的无监督域适应（UDA）方法，该方法使用具有不确定性依赖标签细化的自我训练（STRUDEL）。自我训练最近被引入作为 UDA 的一种高效方法，它基于自我生成的伪标签。然而，伪标签可能非常嘈杂，因此会降低模型性能。我们建议预测伪标签的不确定性，并将其与不确定性引导损失函数集成到训练过程中，以突出具有高确定性的标签。通过将现有方法的分割输出合并到伪标签生成中，STRUDEL 得到了进一步改进，这对 WMH 分割表现出高度的鲁棒性。在我们的实验中，我们使用标准 U-Net 和具有更高感受野的修改网络来评估 STRUDEL。我们对跨数据集的 WMH 分割的结果证明了 STRUDEL 在标准自我训练方面的显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无监督域适应方法STRUDEL，用于白质高信号（WMH）分割，通过结合不确定性引导的伪标签优化和现有方法的分割输出提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自训练方法生成的伪标签存在噪声，导致模型性能下降，需通过不确定性估计和鲁棒分割输出改进伪标签质量。
AI.method: 设计不确定性依赖的损失函数，结合现有高鲁棒性方法的分割结果优化伪标签生成，并应用于U-Net及其改进网络进行跨域分割。
AI.result: 在多个数据集的WMH分割任务中，STRUDEL显著优于标准自训练方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: STRUDEL通过不确定性引导和现有方法辅助，有效提升了无监督域适应下的WMH分割性能。

STRUDEL is further improved by incorporating the segmentation output of an existing method in the pseudo label generation that showed high robustness for WMH segmentation. In our experiments, we evaluate STRUDEL with a standard U-Net and a modified network with a higher receptive field. Our results on WMH segmentation across datasets demonstrate the significant improvement of STRUDEL with respect to standard self-training. 我们提出了一种用于白质高信号（WMH）分割的无监督域适应（UDA）方法，该方法使用具有不确定性依赖标签细化的自我训练（STRUDEL）。自我训练最近被引入作为 UDA 的一种高效方法，它基于自我生成的伪标签。然而，伪标签可能非常嘈杂，因此会降低模型性能。我们建议预测伪标签的不确定性，并将其与不确定性引导损失函数集成到训练过程中，以突出具有高确定性的标签。通过将现有方法的分割输出合并到伪标签生成中，STRUDEL 得到了进一步改进，这对 WMH 分割表现出高度的鲁棒性。在我们的实验中，我们使用标准 U-Net 和具有更高感受野的修改网络来评估 STRUDEL。我们对跨数据集的 WMH 分割的结果证明了 STRUDEL 在标准自我训练方面的显着改进。 本文提出了一种无监督域适应方法STRUDEL，用于白质高信号（WMH）分割，通过结合不确定性引导的伪标签优化和现有方法的分割输出提升性能。 Fabian Gröger,Anne-Marie Rickmann,Christian Wachinger cs.CV

authors_text: Nachuan Li,Austen Z. Fan,Riley Fischer,Wissam Kontar,Bin Ran
title: A Prioritized Trajectory Planning Algorithm for Connected and Automated Vehicle Mandatory Lane Changes
title_zh: 用于联网和自动车辆强制变道的优先轨迹规划算法
abstract: We introduce a prioritized system-optimal algorithm for mandatory lane change (MLC) behavior of connected and automated vehicles (CAV) from a dedicated lane. Our approach applies a cooperative lane change that prioritizes the decisions of lane changing vehicles which are closer to the end of the diverging zone (DZ), and optimizes the predicted total system travel time. Our experiments on synthetic data show that the proposed algorithm improves the traffic network efficiency by attaining higher speeds in the dedicated lane and earlier MLC positions while ensuring a low computational time. Our approach outperforms the traditional gap acceptance model.
summary: We introduce a prioritized system-optimal algorithm for mandatory lane change (MLC) behavior of connected and automated vehicles (CAV) from a dedicated lane. Our approach applies a cooperative lane change that prioritizes the decisions of lane changing vehicles which are closer to the end of the diverging zone (DZ), and optimizes the predicted total system travel time. Our experiments on synthetic data show that the proposed algorithm improves the traffic network efficiency by attaining higher speeds in the dedicated lane and earlier MLC positions while ensuring a low computational time. Our approach outperforms the traditional gap acceptance model.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种优先系统优化算法，用于从专用车道强制联网和自动驾驶车辆 (CAV) 进行变道 (MLC) 行为。我们的方法采用协作变道，优先考虑更接近分流区 (DZ) 末端的变道车辆的决策，并优化预测的总系统行驶时间。我们对合成数据的实验表明，所提出的算法通过在专用车道和较早的 MLC 位置获得更高的速度，同时确保较低的计算时间来提高交通网络效率。我们的方法优于传统的间隙接受模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向联网和自动驾驶车辆的强制变道优先轨迹规划算法，旨在优化交通网络效率。
AI.motivation: 传统间隙接受模型在处理强制变道时存在效率低下问题，需通过协同决策提升系统整体交通效率。
AI.method: 设计优先系统最优算法，通过合作变道机制优先处理接近分流区末端的车辆决策，并优化总系统行驶时间。
AI.result: 实验表明算法提升专用道车速、提前变道位置，降低计算时间，且优于传统模型。
AI.conclusion: 该算法有效平衡个体与系统需求，在保证效率的同时具备实际应用潜力。

authors_text: Sangrok Lee,Taekang Woo,Sang Hun Lee
title: SBNet: Segmentation-based Network for Natural Language-based Vehicle Search
title_zh: SBNet：用于基于自然语言的车辆搜索的分段网络
abstract: Natural language-based vehicle retrieval is a task to find a target vehicle within a given image based on a natural language description as a query. This technology can be applied to various areas including police searching for a suspect vehicle. However, it is challenging due to the ambiguity of language descriptions and the difficulty of processing multi-modal data. To tackle this problem, we propose a deep neural network called SBNet that performs natural language-based segmentation for vehicle retrieval. We also propose two task-specific modules to improve performance: a substitution module that helps features from different domains to be embedded in the same space and a future prediction module that learns temporal information. SBnet has been trained using the CityFlow-NL dataset that contains 2,498 tracks of vehicles with three unique natural language descriptions each and tested 530 unique vehicle tracks and their corresponding query sets. SBNet achieved a significant improvement over the baseline in the natural language-based vehicle tracking track in the AI City Challenge 2021.
summary: Natural language-based vehicle retrieval is a task to find a target vehicle within a given image based on a natural language description as a query. This technology can be applied to various areas including police searching for a suspect vehicle. However, it is challenging due to the ambiguity of language descriptions and the difficulty of processing multi-modal data. To tackle this problem, we propose a deep neural network called SBNet that performs natural language-based segmentation for vehicle retrieval. We also propose two task-specific modules to improve performance: a substitution module that helps features from different domains to be embedded in the same space and a future prediction module that learns temporal information. SBnet has been trained using the CityFlow-NL dataset that contains 2,498 tracks of vehicles with three unique natural language descriptions each and tested 530 unique vehicle tracks and their corresponding query sets. SBNet achieved a significant improvement over the baseline in the natural language-based vehicle tracking track in the AI City Challenge 2021.
abstract_zh: 基于自然语言的车辆检索是基于自然语言描述作为查询在给定图像中查找目标车辆的任务。该技术可应用于各种领域，包括警察搜寻可疑车辆。然而，由于语言描述的模糊性和处理多模态数据的困难，这具有挑战性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种名为 SBNet 的深度神经网络，它可以执行基于自然语言的车辆检索分割。我们还提出了两个特定于任务的模块来提高性能：一个替换模块可以帮助来自不同领域的特征嵌入到同一空间中，另一个未来预测模块可以学习时间信息。 SBnet 已使用 CityFlow-NL 数据集进行训练，该数据集包含 2,498 个车辆轨迹，每个车辆轨迹均具有三种独特的自然语言描述，并测试了 530 个独特的车辆轨迹及其相应的查询集。 SBNet 在 2021 年人工智能城市挑战赛中基于自然语言的车辆跟踪赛道的基线取得了显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SBNet，一种基于分割的深度神经网络，用于根据自然语言描述在图像中检索目标车辆。
AI.motivation: 自然语言车辆检索面临语言描述模糊性和多模态数据处理困难的挑战，现有方法性能不足，需改进特征对齐与时间信息建模。
AI.method: 设计SBNet网络，包含跨域特征嵌入的替换模块和学习时间信息的未来预测模块，并基于CityFlow-NL数据集进行训练与测试。
AI.result: 在AI City Challenge 2021的自然语言车辆追踪任务中，SBNet显著优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入任务特定模块和多模态数据训练，SBNet有效提升了自然语言驱动的车辆检索性能，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

This technology can be applied to various areas including police searching for a suspect vehicle. However, it is challenging due to the ambiguity of language descriptions and the difficulty of processing multi-modal data. To tackle this problem, we propose a deep neural network called SBNet that performs natural language-based segmentation for vehicle retrieval. We also propose two task-specific modules to improve performance: a substitution module that helps features from different domains to be embedded in the same space and a future prediction module that learns temporal information. authors_text: Andrey Guzhov,Federico Raue,Jörn Hees,Andreas Dengel
title: ESResNe(X)t-fbsp: Learning Robust Time-Frequency Transformation of Audio
title_zh: ESResNe(X)t-fbsp：学习音频的鲁棒时频变换
abstract: Environmental Sound Classification (ESC) is a rapidly evolving field that recently demonstrated the advantages of application of visual domain techniques to the audio-related tasks. Previous studies indicate that the domain-specific modification of cross-domain approaches show a promise in pushing the whole area of ESC forward. In this paper, we present a new time-frequency transformation layer that is based on complex frequency B-spline (fbsp) wavelets. Being used with a high-performance audio classification model, the proposed fbsp-layer provides an accuracy improvement over the previously used Short-Time Fourier Transform (STFT) on standard datasets. We also investigate the influence of different pre-training strategies, including the joint use of two large-scale datasets for weight initialization: ImageNet and AudioSet. Our proposed model out-performs other approaches by achieving accuracies of 95.20 % on the ESC-50 and 89.14 % on the UrbanSound8K datasets. Additionally, we assess the increase of model robustness against additive white Gaussian noise and reduction of an effective sample rate introduced by the proposed layer and demonstrate that the fbsp-layer improves the model's ability to withstand signal perturbations, in comparison to STFT-based training. For the sake of reproducibility, our code is made available.
summary: Environmental Sound Classification (ESC) is a rapidly evolving field that recently demonstrated the advantages of application of visual domain techniques to the audio-related tasks. Previous studies indicate that the domain-specific modification of cross-domain approaches show a promise in pushing the whole area of ESC forward. In this paper, we present a new time-frequency transformation layer that is based on complex frequency B-spline (fbsp) wavelets. Being used with a high-performance audio classification model, the proposed fbsp-layer provides an accuracy improvement over the previously used Short-Time Fourier Transform (STFT) on standard datasets. We also investigate the influence of different pre-training strategies, including the joint use of two large-scale datasets for weight initialization: ImageNet and AudioSet. Our proposed model out-performs other approaches by achieving accuracies of 95.20 % on the ESC-50 and 89.14 % on the UrbanSound8K datasets. Additionally, we assess the increase of model robustness against additive white Gaussian noise and reduction of an effective sample rate introduced by the proposed layer and demonstrate that the fbsp-layer improves the model's ability to withstand signal perturbations, in comparison to STFT-based training. For the sake of reproducibility, our code is made available.
abstract_zh: 环境声音分类（ESC）是一个快速发展的领域，最近展示了将视觉域技术应用于音频相关任务的优势。先前的研究表明，跨域方法的特定域修改有望推动整个 ESC 领域的发展。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于复频 B 样条 (fbsp) 小波的新时频变换层。与高性能音频分类模型一起使用，所提出的 fbsp 层比之前在标准数据集上使用的短时傅里叶变换（STFT）提供了准确性改进。我们还研究了不同预训练策略的影响，包括联合使用两个大型数据集进行权重初始化：ImageNet 和 AudioSet。我们提出的模型在 ESC-50 上的准确率达到 95.20%，在 UrbanSound8K 数据集上的准确率达到 89.14%，优于其他方法。此外，我们评估了模型针对加性高斯白噪声的鲁棒性的提高以及所提出的层引入的有效采样率的降低，并证明与基于 STFT 的训练相比，fbsp 层提高了模型承受信号扰动的能力。为了可重复性，我们的代码是可用的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于复数频率B样条(fbsp)小波的新时间-频率变换层，用于改进环境声音分类任务。
AI.motivation: 传统短时傅里叶变换(STFT)在音频分类中存在局限性，而视觉领域技术跨域应用显示出潜力，需通过领域特异性改进提升ESC性能。
AI.method: 设计fbsp波层集成至高性能音频分类模型，结合ImageNet和AudioSet双大规模数据集预训练策略，并评估其抗噪能力和采样率鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在ESC-50数据集上达到95.20%准确率，在UrbanSound8K上达89.14%，优于STFT方法且提升模型对信号扰动的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: fbsp层有效增强了时间-频率表示能力，为环境声音分类提供了更优的特征提取框架并开源代码以保障复现性。

ai_content.result: 在ESC-50数据集上达到95.20%准确率，在UrbanSound8K上达89.14%，优于STFT方法且提升模型对信号扰动的鲁棒性。

search_text: ESResNe(X)t-fbsp: Learning Robust Time-Frequency Transformation of Audio ESResNe(X)t-fbsp：学习音频的鲁棒时频变换 Environmental Sound Classification (ESC) is a rapidly evolving field that recently demonstrated the advantages of application of visual domain techniques to the audio-related tasks. Previous studies indicate that the domain-specific modification of cross-domain approaches show a promise in pushing the whole area of ESC forward. In this paper, we present a new time-frequency transformation layer that is based on complex frequency B-spline (fbsp) wavelets. Being used with a high-performance audio classification model, the proposed fbsp-layer provides an accuracy improvement over the previously used Short-Time Fourier Transform (STFT) on standard datasets. We also investigate the influence of different pre-training strategies, including the joint use of two large-scale datasets for weight initialization: ImageNet and AudioSet. Our proposed model out-performs other approaches by achieving accuracies of 95.20 % on the ESC-50 and 89.14 % on the UrbanSound8K datasets. Additionally, we assess the increase of model robustness against additive white Gaussian noise and reduction of an effective sample rate introduced by the proposed layer and demonstrate that the fbsp-layer improves the model's ability to withstand signal perturbations, in comparison to STFT-based training. For the sake of reproducibility, our code is made available. 环境声音分类（ESC）是一个快速发展的领域，最近展示了将视觉域技术应用于音频相关任务的优势。先前的研究表明，跨域方法的特定域修改有望推动整个 ESC 领域的发展。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于复频 B 样条 (fbsp) 小波的新时频变换层。与高性能音频分类模型一起使用，所提出的 fbsp 层比之前在标准数据集上使用的短时傅里叶变换（STFT）提供了准确性改进。我们还研究了不同预训练策略的影响，包括联合使用两个大型数据集进行权重初始化：ImageNet 和 AudioSet。我们提出的模型在 ESC-50 上的准确率达到 95.20%，在 UrbanSound8K 数据集上的准确率达到 89.14%，优于其他方法。此外，我们评估了模型针对加性高斯白噪声的鲁棒性的提高以及所提出的层引入的有效采样率的降低，并证明与基于 STFT 的训练相比，fbsp 层提高了模型承受信号扰动的能力。为了可重复性，我们的代码是可用的。 本文提出了一种基于复数频率B样条(fbsp)小波的新时间-频率变换层，用于改进环境声音分类任务。 Andrey Guzhov,Federico Raue,Jörn Hees,Andreas Dengel cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Ziyi Cheng,Xuhong Ren,Felix Juefei-Xu,Wanli Xue,Qing Guo,Lei Ma,Jianjun Zhao
title: DeepMix: Online Auto Data Augmentation for Robust Visual Object Tracking
title_zh: DeepMix：用于鲁棒视觉对象跟踪的在线自动数据增强
comment: 6 pages, 2 figures. This work has been accepted to ICME 2021
comments: 6 pages, 2 figures. This work has been accepted to ICME 2021
abstract: Online updating of the object model via samples from historical frames is of great importance for accurate visual object tracking. Recent works mainly focus on constructing effective and efficient updating methods while neglecting the training samples for learning discriminative object models, which is also a key part of a learning problem. In this paper, we propose the DeepMix that takes historical samples' embeddings as input and generates augmented embeddings online, enhancing the state-of-the-art online learning methods for visual object tracking. More specifically, we first propose the online data augmentation for tracking that online augments the historical samples through object-aware filtering. Then, we propose MixNet which is an offline trained network for performing online data augmentation within one-step, enhancing the tracking accuracy while preserving high speeds of the state-of-the-art online learning methods. The extensive experiments on three different tracking frameworks, i.e., DiMP, DSiam, and SiamRPN++, and three large-scale and challenging datasets, \ie, OTB-2015, LaSOT, and VOT, demonstrate the effectiveness and advantages of the proposed method.
summary: Online updating of the object model via samples from historical frames is of great importance for accurate visual object tracking. Recent works mainly focus on constructing effective and efficient updating methods while neglecting the training samples for learning discriminative object models, which is also a key part of a learning problem. In this paper, we propose the DeepMix that takes historical samples' embeddings as input and generates augmented embeddings online, enhancing the state-of-the-art online learning methods for visual object tracking. More specifically, we first propose the online data augmentation for tracking that online augments the historical samples through object-aware filtering. Then, we propose MixNet which is an offline trained network for performing online data augmentation within one-step, enhancing the tracking accuracy while preserving high speeds of the state-of-the-art online learning methods. The extensive experiments on three different tracking frameworks, i.e., DiMP, DSiam, and SiamRPN++, and three large-scale and challenging datasets, \ie, OTB-2015, LaSOT, and VOT, demonstrate the effectiveness and advantages of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 通过历史帧中的样本在线更新对象模型对于准确的视觉对象跟踪非常重要。最近的工作主要集中在构建有效且高效的更新方法，而忽略了用于学习判别对象模型的训练样本，这也是学习问题的关键部分。在本文中，我们提出了 DeepMix，它以历史样本的嵌入作为输入并在线生成增强嵌入，增强了用于视觉对象跟踪的最先进的在线学习方法。更具体地说，我们首先提出用于跟踪的在线数据增强，通过对象感知过滤在线增强历史样本。然后，我们提出了 MixNet，这是一种离线训练的网络，用于一步执行在线数据增强，提高跟踪精度，同时保持最先进的在线学习方法的高速。在三个不同的跟踪框架（DiMP、DSiam 和 SiamRPN++）以及三个大规模且具有挑战性的数据集（OTB-2015、LaSOT 和 VOT）上进行的广泛实验证明了该方法的有效性和优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeepMix方法，通过在线自动生成数据增强样本提升视觉目标跟踪的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有跟踪方法侧重于模型更新机制，但忽视了训练样本对学习判别性目标模型的关键作用。
AI.method: 提出在线数据增强框架与MixNet网络，通过历史样本嵌入生成增强数据，在保持速度的同时提升跟踪精度。
AI.result: 在DiMP/DSiam/SiamRPN++框架及OTB-2015/LaSOT/VOT数据集上验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: DeepMix通过在线数据增强与高效网络设计，显著提升了视觉目标跟踪的准确性和鲁棒性。

authors_text: Prakruthi Karuna,Erik Hemberg,Una-May O'Reilly,Nick Rutar
title: Automating Cyber Threat Hunting Using NLP, Automated Query Generation, and Genetic Perturbation
title_zh: 使用 NLP、自动查询生成和遗传扰动自动进行网络威胁搜寻
abstract: Scaling the cyber hunt problem poses several key technical challenges. Detecting and characterizing cyber threats at scale in large enterprise networks is hard because of the vast quantity and complexity of the data that must be analyzed as adversaries deploy varied and evolving tactics to accomplish their goals. There is a great need to automate all aspects, and, indeed, the workflow of cyber hunting. AI offers many ways to support this. We have developed the WILEE system that automates cyber threat hunting by translating high-level threat descriptions into many possible concrete implementations. Both the (high-level) abstract and (low-level) concrete implementations are represented using a custom domain specific language (DSL). WILEE uses the implementations along with other logic, also written in the DSL, to automatically generate queries to confirm (or refute) any hypotheses tied to the potential adversarial workflows represented at various layers of abstraction.
summary: Scaling the cyber hunt problem poses several key technical challenges. Detecting and characterizing cyber threats at scale in large enterprise networks is hard because of the vast quantity and complexity of the data that must be analyzed as adversaries deploy varied and evolving tactics to accomplish their goals. There is a great need to automate all aspects, and, indeed, the workflow of cyber hunting. AI offers many ways to support this. We have developed the WILEE system that automates cyber threat hunting by translating high-level threat descriptions into many possible concrete implementations. Both the (high-level) abstract and (low-level) concrete implementations are represented using a custom domain specific language (DSL). WILEE uses the implementations along with other logic, also written in the DSL, to automatically generate queries to confirm (or refute) any hypotheses tied to the potential adversarial workflows represented at various layers of abstraction.
abstract_zh: 扩大网络狩猎问题带来了几个关键的技术挑战。在大型企业网络中大规模检测和表征网络威胁非常困难，因为随着对手部署各种不断变化的策略来实现其目标，必须分析大量且复杂的数据。非常需要自动化所有方面，事实上，网络狩猎的工作流程也是如此。人工智能提供了许多方法来支持这一点。我们开发了 WILEE 系统，该系统通过将高级威胁描述转化为许多可能的具体实施来自动化网络威胁搜寻。 （高级）抽象和（低级）具体实现均使用自定义领域特定语言 (DSL) 表示。 WILEE 使用这些实现以及其他逻辑（也用 DSL 编写）来自动生成查询，以确认（或反驳）与各个抽象层表示的潜在对抗性工作流程相关的任何假设。

AI.tldr: 本文提出WILEE系统，通过将高层威胁描述转化为具体实现并生成查询，自动化大规模网络威胁狩猎。
AI.motivation: 企业网络中数据量庞大且复杂，攻击者战术多变，传统方法难以高效检测和表征威胁，亟需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 开发自定义领域特定语言（DSL）表示威胁的抽象与具体实现，结合逻辑规则自动生成功能查询以验证假设。
AI.result: WILEE系统能有效生成多层级查询，验证潜在对抗流程假设，提升威胁狩猎的自动化程度。
AI.conclusion: 该研究展示了通过NLP和DSL技术实现威胁狩猎自动化的可行性，为大规模网络防御提供新方法。

authors_text: Maged Helmy,Anastasiya Dykyy,Tuyen Trung Truong,Paulo Ferreira,Eric Jul
title: CapillaryNet: An Automated System to Quantify Skin Capillary Density and Red Blood Cell Velocity from Handheld Vital Microscopy
title_zh: CapillaryNet：一种通过手持式活体显微镜量化皮肤毛细血管密度和红细胞速度的自动化系统
comment: Improved overall English text and added few more sections
comments: Improved overall English text and added few more sections
abstract: Capillaries are the smallest vessels in the body responsible for delivering oxygen and nutrients to surrounding cells. Various life-threatening diseases are known to alter the density of healthy capillaries and the flow velocity of erythrocytes within the capillaries. In previous studies, capillary density and flow velocity were manually assessed by trained specialists. However, manual analysis of a standard 20-second microvascular video requires 20 minutes on average and necessitates extensive training. Thus, manual analysis has been reported to hinder the application of microvascular microscopy in a clinical environment. To address this problem, this paper presents a fully automated state-of-the-art system to quantify skin nutritive capillary density and red blood cell velocity captured by handheld-based microscopy videos. The proposed method combines the speed of traditional computer vision algorithms with the accuracy of convolutional neural networks to enable clinical capillary analysis. The results show that the proposed system fully automates capillary detection with an accuracy exceeding that of trained analysts and measures several novel microvascular parameters that had eluded quantification thus far, namely, capillary hematocrit and intracapillary flow velocity heterogeneity. The proposed end-to-end system, named CapillaryNet, can detect capillaries at $\sim$0.9 seconds per frame with $\sim$93\% accuracy. The system is currently being used as a clinical research product in a larger e-health application to analyse capillary data captured from patients suffering from COVID-19, pancreatitis, and acute heart diseases. CapillaryNet narrows the gap between the analysis of microcirculation images in a clinical environment and state-of-the-art systems.
summary: Capillaries are the smallest vessels in the body responsible for delivering oxygen and nutrients to surrounding cells. Various life-threatening diseases are known to alter the density of healthy capillaries and the flow velocity of erythrocytes within the capillaries. In previous studies, capillary density and flow velocity were manually assessed by trained specialists. However, manual analysis of a standard 20-second microvascular video requires 20 minutes on average and necessitates extensive training. Thus, manual analysis has been reported to hinder the application of microvascular microscopy in a clinical environment. To address this problem, this paper presents a fully automated state-of-the-art system to quantify skin nutritive capillary density and red blood cell velocity captured by handheld-based microscopy videos. The proposed method combines the speed of traditional computer vision algorithms with the accuracy of convolutional neural networks to enable clinical capillary analysis. The results show that the proposed system fully automates capillary detection with an accuracy exceeding that of trained analysts and measures several novel microvascular parameters that had eluded quantification thus far, namely, capillary hematocrit and intracapillary flow velocity heterogeneity. The proposed end-to-end system, named CapillaryNet, can detect capillaries at $\sim$0.9 seconds per frame with $\sim$93\% accuracy. The system is currently being used as a clinical research product in a larger e-health application to analyse capillary data captured from patients suffering from COVID-19, pancreatitis, and acute heart diseases. CapillaryNet narrows the gap between the analysis of microcirculation images in a clinical environment and state-of-the-art systems.
abstract_zh: 毛细血管是体内最小的血管，负责向周围细胞输送氧气和营养物质。已知各种危及生命的疾病会改变健康毛细血管的密度和毛细血管内红细胞的流速。在之前的研究中，毛细管密度和流速是由经过培训的专家手动评估的。然而，手动分析标准 20 秒微血管视频平均需要 20 分钟，并且需要大量培训。因此，据报道，手动分析阻碍了微血管显微镜在临床环境中的应用。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种全自动的最先进的系统，用于量化手持式显微镜视频捕获的皮肤营养性毛细血管密度和红细胞速度。该方法将传统计算机视觉算法的速度与卷积神经网络的准确性相结合，以实现临床毛细血管分析。结果表明，所提出的系统完全自动化毛细血管检测，其精度超过了训练有素的分析人员的精度，并测量了迄今为止无法量化的几种新颖的微血管参数，即毛细血管血细胞比容和毛细血管内流速异质性。所提出的端到端系统名为 CapillaryNet，可以每帧 $\sim$0.9 秒的速度检测毛细血管，准确度为 $\sim$93\%。该系统目前被用作大型电子医疗应用中的临床研究产品，用于分析从患有 COVID-19、胰腺炎和急性心脏病的患者身上捕获的毛细血管数据。 CapillaryNet 缩小了临床环境中微循环图像分析与最先进系统之间的差距。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CapillaryNet系统，通过手持式显微镜视频自动量化皮肤毛细血管密度和红细胞流速。
AI.motivation: 传统手动分析微循环视频耗时且需专业培训，阻碍了临床应用，需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 结合传统计算机视觉算法与卷积神经网络，实现毛细血管检测与新型微血管参数计算。
AI.result: 系统检测速度约0.9秒/帧，准确率达93%，可量化毛细血管血细胞比容等新参数。
AI.conclusion: CapillaryNet填补了临床微循环分析与前沿技术间的差距，已用于COVID-19等疾病的临床研究。

authors_text: Michael Timothy Bennett,Yoshihiro Maruyama
title: Intensional Artificial Intelligence: From Symbol Emergence to Explainable and Empathetic AI
title_zh: 内涵人工智能：从符号出现到可解释且具有同理心的人工智能
abstract: We argue that an explainable artificial intelligence must possess a rationale for its decisions, be able to infer the purpose of observed behaviour, and be able to explain its decisions in the context of what its audience understands and intends. To address these issues we present four novel contributions. Firstly, we define an arbitrary task in terms of perceptual states, and discuss two extremes of a domain of possible solutions. Secondly, we define the intensional solution. Optimal by some definitions of intelligence, it describes the purpose of a task. An agent possessed of it has a rationale for its decisions in terms of that purpose, expressed in a perceptual symbol system grounded in hardware. Thirdly, to communicate that rationale requires natural language, a means of encoding and decoding perceptual states. We propose a theory of meaning in which, to acquire language, an agent should model the world a language describes rather than the language itself. If the utterances of humans are of predictive value to the agent's goals, then the agent will imbue those utterances with meaning in terms of its own goals and perceptual states. In the context of Peircean semiotics, a community of agents must share rough approximations of signs, referents and interpretants in order to communicate. Meaning exists only in the context of intent, so to communicate with humans an agent must have comparable experiences and goals. An agent that learns intensional solutions, compelled by objective functions somewhat analogous to human motivators such as hunger and pain, may be capable of explaining its rationale not just in terms of its own intent, but in terms of what its audience understands and intends. It forms some approximation of the perceptual states of humans.
summary: We argue that an explainable artificial intelligence must possess a rationale for its decisions, be able to infer the purpose of observed behaviour, and be able to explain its decisions in the context of what its audience understands and intends. To address these issues we present four novel contributions. Firstly, we define an arbitrary task in terms of perceptual states, and discuss two extremes of a domain of possible solutions. Secondly, we define the intensional solution. Optimal by some definitions of intelligence, it describes the purpose of a task. An agent possessed of it has a rationale for its decisions in terms of that purpose, expressed in a perceptual symbol system grounded in hardware. Thirdly, to communicate that rationale requires natural language, a means of encoding and decoding perceptual states. We propose a theory of meaning in which, to acquire language, an agent should model the world a language describes rather than the language itself. If the utterances of humans are of predictive value to the agent's goals, then the agent will imbue those utterances with meaning in terms of its own goals and perceptual states. In the context of Peircean semiotics, a community of agents must share rough approximations of signs, referents and interpretants in order to communicate. Meaning exists only in the context of intent, so to communicate with humans an agent must have comparable experiences and goals. An agent that learns intensional solutions, compelled by objective functions somewhat analogous to human motivators such as hunger and pain, may be capable of explaining its rationale not just in terms of its own intent, but in terms of what its audience understands and intends. It forms some approximation of the perceptual states of humans.
abstract_zh: 我们认为，可解释的人工智能必须拥有其决策的基本原理，能够推断观察到的行为的目的，并能够根据受众的理解和意图解释其决策。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了四项新颖的贡献。首先，我们根据感知状态定义任意任务，并讨论可能解决方案域的两个极端。其次，我们定义了内涵解。根据智力的某些定义，它描述了任务的目的。拥有它的代理可以根据该目的做出决策，并以基于硬件的感知符号系统来表达。第三，要传达这一基本原理需要自然语言，这是一种编码和解码感知状态的手段。我们提出了一种意义理论，在该理论中，为了获得语言，智能体应该对语言描述的世界而不是语言本身进行建模。如果人类的话语对智能体的目标具有预测价值，那么智能体就会根据自己的目标和感知状态赋予这些话语以意义。在皮尔士符号学的背景下，主体群体必须共享符号、所指对象和解释项的粗略近似值才能进行交流。意义仅存在于意图的背景下，因此要与人类进行交流，代理必须具有可比较的经验和目标。一个学习内涵解决方案的智能体，受到类似于饥饿和疼痛等人类动机的目标函数的驱使，可能不仅能够根据自己的意图，而且能够根据其受众的理解和意图来解释其基本原理。它形成了人类感知状态的某种近似。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过引入‘内涵性人工智能’框架，实现可解释且富有共情能力的AI系统，重点解决AI决策的合理性、行为目的推断及与人类受众的沟通问题。
AI.motivation: 现有AI缺乏对自身决策的内在逻辑解释能力，难以与人类共享意图和目标，导致可解释性与共情能力不足，阻碍了人机有效协作。
AI.method: 定义基于感知状态的任务框架，提出内涵性解方案（通过硬件 grounding 的感知符号系统表达目的），构建自然语言沟通理论（以目标为导向的语言建模），并基于皮尔士符号学建立共享意义的群体代理模型。
AI.result: 提出四维贡献：任务感知状态定义、内涵性解方案框架、目标驱动的语言意义理论、符号学共享意义机制，为AI实现自我解释与人类意图对齐提供理论基础。
AI.conclusion: 内涵性AI通过目标驱动的感知符号系统与语言建模，能够以人类可理解的方式解释决策逻辑，为构建具备共情能力的可解释AI提供新路径。

It forms some approximation of the perceptual states of humans. 我们认为，可解释的人工智能必须拥有其决策的基本原理，能够推断观察到的行为的目的，并能够根据受众的理解和意图解释其决策。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了四项新颖的贡献。首先，我们根据感知状态定义任意任务，并讨论可能解决方案域的两个极端。其次，我们定义了内涵解。根据智力的某些定义，它描述了任务的目的。拥有它的代理可以根据该目的做出决策，并以基于硬件的感知符号系统来表达。第三，要传达这一基本原理需要自然语言，这是一种编码和解码感知状态的手段。我们提出了一种意义理论，在该理论中，为了获得语言，智能体应该对语言描述的世界而不是语言本身进行建模。如果人类的话语对智能体的目标具有预测价值，那么智能体就会根据自己的目标和感知状态赋予这些话语以意义。在皮尔士符号学的背景下，主体群体必须共享符号、所指对象和解释项的粗略近似值才能进行交流。意义仅存在于意图的背景下，因此要与人类进行交流，代理必须具有可比较的经验和目标。一个学习内涵解决方案的智能体，受到类似于饥饿和疼痛等人类动机的目标函数的驱使，可能不仅能够根据自己的意图，而且能够根据其受众的理解和意图来解释其基本原理。它形成了人类感知状态的某种近似。 本文提出通过引入‘内涵性人工智能’框架，实现可解释且富有共情能力的AI系统，重点解决AI决策的合理性、行为目的推断及与人类受众的沟通问题。 Michael Timothy Bennett,Yoshihiro Maruyama cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Ran Ben Izhak,Alon Lahav,Ayellet Tal
title: AttWalk: Attentive Cross-Walks for Deep Mesh Analysis
title_zh: AttWalk：用于深度网格分析的细心交叉行走
abstract: Mesh representation by random walks has been shown to benefit deep learning. Randomness is indeed a powerful concept. However, it comes with a price: some walks might wander around non-characteristic regions of the mesh, which might be harmful to shape analysis, especially when only a few walks are utilized. We propose a novel walk-attention mechanism that leverages the fact that multiple walks are used. The key idea is that the walks may provide each other with information regarding the meaningful (attentive) features of the mesh. We utilize this mutual information to extract a single descriptor of the mesh. This differs from common attention mechanisms that use attention to improve the representation of each individual descriptor. Our approach achieves SOTA results for two basic 3D shape analysis tasks: classification and retrieval. Even a handful of walks along a mesh suffice for learning.
summary: Mesh representation by random walks has been shown to benefit deep learning. Randomness is indeed a powerful concept. However, it comes with a price: some walks might wander around non-characteristic regions of the mesh, which might be harmful to shape analysis, especially when only a few walks are utilized. We propose a novel walk-attention mechanism that leverages the fact that multiple walks are used. The key idea is that the walks may provide each other with information regarding the meaningful (attentive) features of the mesh. We utilize this mutual information to extract a single descriptor of the mesh. This differs from common attention mechanisms that use attention to improve the representation of each individual descriptor. Our approach achieves SOTA results for two basic 3D shape analysis tasks: classification and retrieval. Even a handful of walks along a mesh suffice for learning.
abstract_zh: 随机游走的网格表示已被证明有利于深度学习。随机性确实是一个强大的概念。然而，它是有代价的：一些行走可能会在网格的非特征区域周围徘徊，这可能对形状分析有害，特别是当只使用少数行走时。我们提出了一种新颖的步行注意力机制，该机制利用了多次步行的事实。关键思想是，行走可以互相提供有关网格的有意义（注意力）特征的信息。我们利用这种互信息来提取网格的单个描述符。这与使用注意力来改进每个单独描述符的表示的常见注意力机制不同。我们的方法在两个基本 3D 形状分析任务（分类和检索）中实现了 SOTA 结果。即使沿着网格走几次也足以学习。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AttWalk方法，通过引入注意力机制改进基于随机游走的网格分析，以提升3D形状分类与检索性能。
AI.motivation: 传统随机游走可能因少量样本在非特征区域徘徊而影响网格分析效果，需通过注意力机制提取更有效的特征表示。
AI.method: 设计跨游走注意力机制，利用多个随机游走间的相互信息生成统一网格描述符，区别于传统单描述符优化方式。
AI.result: 在3D形状分类和检索任务中达到SOTA性能，且仅需少量随机游走即可有效学习。
AI.conclusion: AttWalk通过交叉注意力机制有效整合多游走信息，解决了传统方法在特征提取中的局限性。

authors_text: Lorin Sweeney,Graham Healy,Alan F. Smeaton
title: The Influence of Audio on Video Memorability with an Audio Gestalt Regulated Video Memorability System
title_zh: 音频格式塔调节视频记忆系统中音频对视频记忆的影响
comment: 6 pages, 3 figures, 4 tables, paper accepted in CBMI 2021 for publication and oral presentation
comments: 6 pages, 3 figures, 4 tables, paper accepted in CBMI 2021 for publication and oral presentation
abstract: Memories are the tethering threads that tie us to the world, and memorability is the measure of their tensile strength. The threads of memory are spun from fibres of many modalities, obscuring the contribution of a single fibre to a thread's overall tensile strength. Unfurling these fibres is the key to understanding the nature of their interaction, and how we can ultimately create more meaningful media content. In this paper, we examine the influence of audio on video recognition memorability, finding evidence to suggest that it can facilitate overall video recognition memorability rich in high-level (gestalt) audio features. We introduce a novel multimodal deep learning-based late-fusion system that uses audio gestalt to estimate the influence of a given video's audio on its overall short-term recognition memorability, and selectively leverages audio features to make a prediction accordingly. We benchmark our audio gestalt based system on the Memento10k short-term video memorability dataset, achieving top-2 state-of-the-art results.
summary: Memories are the tethering threads that tie us to the world, and memorability is the measure of their tensile strength. The threads of memory are spun from fibres of many modalities, obscuring the contribution of a single fibre to a thread's overall tensile strength. Unfurling these fibres is the key to understanding the nature of their interaction, and how we can ultimately create more meaningful media content. In this paper, we examine the influence of audio on video recognition memorability, finding evidence to suggest that it can facilitate overall video recognition memorability rich in high-level (gestalt) audio features. We introduce a novel multimodal deep learning-based late-fusion system that uses audio gestalt to estimate the influence of a given video's audio on its overall short-term recognition memorability, and selectively leverages audio features to make a prediction accordingly. We benchmark our audio gestalt based system on the Memento10k short-term video memorability dataset, achieving top-2 state-of-the-art results.
abstract_zh: 记忆是将我们与世界联系在一起的绳索，而记忆力则是衡量其抗拉强度的标准。记忆线是由多种形态的纤维纺成的，掩盖了单根纤维对线整体抗拉强度的贡献。展开这些纤维是理解它们相互作用的本质以及我们如何最终创建更有意义的媒体内容的关键。在本文中，我们研究了音频对视频识别记忆力的影响，找到证据表明它可以促进富含高级（格式塔）音频特征的整体视频识别记忆力。我们引入了一种新颖的基于多模态深度学习的后期融合系统，该系统使用音频格式塔来估计给定视频的音频对其整体短期识别记忆力的影响，并有选择地利用音频特征来做出相应的预测。我们在 Memento10k 短期视频记忆力数据集上对基于音频格式塔的系统进行了基准测试，取得了前 2 名的最先进结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究音频对视频记忆性的影响，提出基于音频格式塔的多模态深度学习系统以评估和提升视频短期记忆能力。
AI.motivation: 现有研究难以分离多模态记忆贡献，需理解模态交互以创造更具意义的媒体内容。
AI.method: 设计多模态深度学习晚期融合系统，利用音频格式塔特征估计音频对视频记忆的影响并选择性预测。
AI.result: 在Memento10k数据集上实现短期视频记忆性评估的top-2最先进结果。
AI.conclusion: 音频高层特征显著影响视频记忆性，所提系统有效验证了该结论并为媒体内容优化提供新途径。

authors_text: Wenliang Dai,Samuel Cahyawijaya,Yejin Bang,Pascale Fung
title: Weakly-supervised Multi-task Learning for Multimodal Affect Recognition
title_zh: 用于多模态情感识别的弱监督多任务学习
abstract: Multimodal affect recognition constitutes an important aspect for enhancing interpersonal relationships in human-computer interaction. However, relevant data is hard to come by and notably costly to annotate, which poses a challenging barrier to build robust multimodal affect recognition systems. Models trained on these relatively small datasets tend to overfit and the improvement gained by using complex state-of-the-art models is marginal compared to simple baselines. Meanwhile, there are many different multimodal affect recognition datasets, though each may be small. In this paper, we propose to leverage these datasets using weakly-supervised multi-task learning to improve the generalization performance on each of them. Specifically, we explore three multimodal affect recognition tasks: 1) emotion recognition; 2) sentiment analysis; and 3) sarcasm recognition. Our experimental results show that multi-tasking can benefit all these tasks, achieving an improvement up to 2.9% accuracy and 3.3% F1-score. Furthermore, our method also helps to improve the stability of model performance. In addition, our analysis suggests that weak supervision can provide a comparable contribution to strong supervision if the tasks are highly correlated.
summary: Multimodal affect recognition constitutes an important aspect for enhancing interpersonal relationships in human-computer interaction. However, relevant data is hard to come by and notably costly to annotate, which poses a challenging barrier to build robust multimodal affect recognition systems. Models trained on these relatively small datasets tend to overfit and the improvement gained by using complex state-of-the-art models is marginal compared to simple baselines. Meanwhile, there are many different multimodal affect recognition datasets, though each may be small. In this paper, we propose to leverage these datasets using weakly-supervised multi-task learning to improve the generalization performance on each of them. Specifically, we explore three multimodal affect recognition tasks: 1) emotion recognition; 2) sentiment analysis; and 3) sarcasm recognition. Our experimental results show that multi-tasking can benefit all these tasks, achieving an improvement up to 2.9% accuracy and 3.3% F1-score. Furthermore, our method also helps to improve the stability of model performance. In addition, our analysis suggests that weak supervision can provide a comparable contribution to strong supervision if the tasks are highly correlated.
abstract_zh: 多模态情感识别是人机交互中增强人际关系的一个重要方面。然而，相关数据很难获得，而且注释成本特别高，这给构建强大的多模态情感识别系统带来了挑战。在这些相对较小的数据集上训练的模型往往会过度拟合，并且与简单的基线相比，使用复杂的最先进模型获得的改进是微乎其微的。同时，存在许多不同的多模态情感识别数据集，尽管每个数据集可能都很小。在本文中，我们建议利用弱监督多任务学习来利用这些数据集，以提高每个数据集的泛化性能。具体来说，我们探索了三个多模态情感识别任务：1）情感识别； 2）情感分析； 3）讽刺识别。我们的实验结果表明，多任务处理可以使所有这些任务受益，准确率提高了 2.9%，F1 分数提高了 3.3%。此外，我们的方法还有助于提高模型性能的稳定性。此外，我们的分析表明，如果任务高度相关，弱监督可以提供与强监督相当的贡献。

AI.tldr: 本文提出弱监督多任务学习方法，通过整合多个多模态情感识别任务提升模型泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 多模态情感识别数据获取困难且标注成本高，导致模型易过拟合并难以发挥复杂模型优势。
AI.method: 采用弱监督多任务学习框架，同时处理情绪识别、情感分析和讽刺识别三个相关任务，利用弱监督信号提升模型性能。
AI.result: 实验显示准确率提升2.9%，F1分数提升3.3%，且模型稳定性显著增强。
AI.conclusion: 弱监督在高度相关任务中可提供接近强监督的效果，多任务学习有效提升多模态情感识别性能。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出弱监督多任务学习方法，通过整合多个多模态情感识别任务提升模型泛化能力。
ai_content.motivation: 多模态情感识别数据获取困难且标注成本高，导致模型易过拟合并难以发挥复杂模型优势。
ai_content.method: 采用弱监督多任务学习框架，同时处理情绪识别、情感分析和讽刺识别三个相关任务，利用弱监督信号提升模型性能。
ai_content.result: 实验显示准确率提升2.9%，F1分数提升3.3%，且模型稳定性显著增强。
ai_content.conclusion: 弱监督在高度相关任务中可提供接近强监督的效果，多任务学习有效提升多模态情感识别性能。
