search_text: Weakly-supervised Multi-task Learning for Multimodal Affect Recognition 用于多模态情感识别的弱监督多任务学习 Multimodal affect recognition constitutes an important aspect for enhancing interpersonal relationships in human-computer interaction. However, relevant data is hard to come by and notably costly to annotate, which poses a challenging barrier to build robust multimodal affect recognition systems. Models trained on these relatively small datasets tend to overfit and the improvement gained by using complex state-of-the-art models is marginal compared to simple baselines. Meanwhile, there are many different multimodal affect recognition datasets, though each may be small. In this paper, we propose to leverage these datasets using weakly-supervised multi-task learning to improve the generalization performance on each of them. Specifically, we explore three multimodal affect recognition tasks: 1) emotion recognition; 2) sentiment analysis; and 3) sarcasm recognition. Our experimental results show that multi-tasking can benefit all these tasks, achieving an improvement up to 2.9% accuracy and 3.3% F1-score. Furthermore, our method also helps to improve the stability of model performance. In addition, our analysis suggests that weak supervision can provide a comparable contribution to strong supervision if the tasks are highly correlated. 多模态情感识别是人机交互中增强人际关系的一个重要方面。然而，相关数据很难获得，而且注释成本特别高，这给构建强大的多模态情感识别系统带来了挑战。在这些相对较小的数据集上训练的模型往往会过度拟合，并且与简单的基线相比，使用复杂的最先进模型获得的改进是微乎其微的。同时，存在许多不同的多模态情感识别数据集，尽管每个数据集可能都很小。在本文中，我们建议利用弱监督多任务学习来利用这些数据集，以提高每个数据集的泛化性能。具体来说，我们探索了三个多模态情感识别任务：1）情感识别； 2）情感分析； 3）讽刺识别。我们的实验结果表明，多任务处理可以使所有这些任务受益，准确率提高了 2.9%，F1 分数提高了 3.3%。此外，我们的方法还有助于提高模型性能的稳定性。此外，我们的分析表明，如果任务高度相关，弱监督可以提供与强监督相当的贡献。 本文提出弱监督多任务学习方法，通过整合多个多模态情感识别任务提升模型泛化能力。 Wenliang Dai,Samuel Cahyawijaya,Yejin Bang,Pascale Fung cs.CL,cs.CV,cs.MM

authors_text: Jochen Zöllner,Konrad Sperfeld,Christoph Wick,Roger Labahn
title: Optimizing small BERTs trained for German NER
title_zh: 优化针对德国 NER 训练的小型 BERT
abstract: Currently, the most widespread neural network architecture for training language models is the so called BERT which led to improvements in various Natural Language Processing (NLP) tasks. In general, the larger the number of parameters in a BERT model, the better the results obtained in these NLP tasks. Unfortunately, the memory consumption and the training duration drastically increases with the size of these models. In this article, we investigate various training techniques of smaller BERT models: We combine different methods from other BERT variants like ALBERT, RoBERTa, and relative positional encoding. In addition, we propose two new fine-tuning modifications leading to better performance: Class-Start-End tagging and a modified form of Linear Chain Conditional Random Fields. Furthermore, we introduce Whole-Word Attention which reduces BERTs memory usage and leads to a small increase in performance compared to classical Multi-Head-Attention. We evaluate these techniques on five public German Named Entity Recognition (NER) tasks of which two are introduced by this article.
summary: Currently, the most widespread neural network architecture for training language models is the so called BERT which led to improvements in various Natural Language Processing (NLP) tasks. In general, the larger the number of parameters in a BERT model, the better the results obtained in these NLP tasks. Unfortunately, the memory consumption and the training duration drastically increases with the size of these models. In this article, we investigate various training techniques of smaller BERT models: We combine different methods from other BERT variants like ALBERT, RoBERTa, and relative positional encoding. In addition, we propose two new fine-tuning modifications leading to better performance: Class-Start-End tagging and a modified form of Linear Chain Conditional Random Fields. Furthermore, we introduce Whole-Word Attention which reduces BERTs memory usage and leads to a small increase in performance compared to classical Multi-Head-Attention. We evaluate these techniques on five public German Named Entity Recognition (NER) tasks of which two are introduced by this article.
abstract_zh: 目前，用于训练语言模型的最广泛的神经网络架构是所谓的 BERT，它导致了各种自然语言处理（NLP）任务的改进。一般来说，BERT 模型中的参数数量越多，在这些 NLP 任务中获得的结果就越好。不幸的是，内存消耗和训练持续时间随着这些模型的大小而急剧增加。在本文中，我们研究了小型 BERT 模型的各种训练技术：我们结合了其他 BERT 变体（如 ALBERT、RoBERTa 和相对位置编码）的不同方法。此外，我们提出了两个新的微调修改，可以带来更好的性能：类开始-结束标记和线性链条件随机字段的修改形式。此外，我们引入了全字注​​意力（Whole-Word Attention），与经典的多头注意力（Multi-Head-Attention）相比，它减少了 BERT 的内存使用，并导致性能小幅提升。我们在五个公共德国命名实体识别 (NER) 任务上评估这些技术，本文介绍了其中两个任务。

AI.tldr: 本文研究优化小规模BERT模型在德语命名实体识别任务中的性能，通过结合多种训练技术和提出新方法提升效果。
AI.motivation: 大規模BERT模型虽效果好但资源消耗高，需在保持性能的同时降低内存和训练成本，尤其针对德语NER任务。
AI.method: 整合ALBERT、RoBERTa等模型方法，提出Class-Start-End标签、改进线性链条件随机场及Whole-Word Attention机制。
AI.result: 在五个德语NER任务（含两个新任务）中验证，新方法提升性能并减少内存占用，其中Whole-Word Attention略有性能增益。
AI.conclusion: 优化后的小BERT模型在德语NER任务中实现更优性能与资源效率平衡，所提方法对类似任务具有参考价值。

authors_text: Yi He,Haoran Xie,Chao Zhang,Xi Yang,Kazunori Miyata
title: Sketch-based Normal Map Generation with Geometric Sampling
title_zh: 使用几何采样生成基于草图的法线贴图
comment: accepted in International Workshop on Advanced Image Technology 2021, 5 pages, 2 figures
comments: accepted in International Workshop on Advanced Image Technology 2021, 5 pages, 2 figures
abstract: Normal map is an important and efficient way to represent complex 3D models. A designer may benefit from the auto-generation of high quality and accurate normal maps from freehand sketches in 3D content creation. This paper proposes a deep generative model for generating normal maps from users sketch with geometric sampling. Our generative model is based on Conditional Generative Adversarial Network with the curvature-sensitive points sampling of conditional masks. This sampling process can help eliminate the ambiguity of generation results as network input. In addition, we adopted a U-Net structure discriminator to help the generator be better trained. It is verified that the proposed framework can generate more accurate normal maps.
summary: Normal map is an important and efficient way to represent complex 3D models. A designer may benefit from the auto-generation of high quality and accurate normal maps from freehand sketches in 3D content creation. This paper proposes a deep generative model for generating normal maps from users sketch with geometric sampling. Our generative model is based on Conditional Generative Adversarial Network with the curvature-sensitive points sampling of conditional masks. This sampling process can help eliminate the ambiguity of generation results as network input. In addition, we adopted a U-Net structure discriminator to help the generator be better trained. It is verified that the proposed framework can generate more accurate normal maps.
abstract_zh: 法线贴图是表示复杂 3D 模型的重要且有效的方式。设计师可以从 3D 内容创建中的手绘草图自动生成高质量和准确的法线贴图中受益。本文提出了一种深度生成模型，用于通过几何采样从用户草图生成法线贴图。我们的生成模型基于条件生成对抗网络，具有条件掩模的曲率敏感点采样。此采样过程可以帮助消除生成结果作为网络输入的模糊性。此外，我们采用了 U-Net 结构判别器来帮助生成器更好地训练。经验证，所提出的框架可以生成更准确的法线图。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于几何采样的深度生成模型，用于从用户草图中自动生成高质量法线图。
AI.motivation: 传统法线图生成依赖复杂建模工具，设计师需要更高效的草图到法线图的自动化方法以提升3D内容创作效率。
AI.method: 采用条件生成对抗网络（CGAN），结合曲率敏感点采样的条件掩码进行几何采样，并使用U-Net结构的判别器优化生成过程。
AI.result: 实验验证该框架能生成更精确的法线图，有效减少生成结果的歧义性。
AI.conclusion: 几何采样与U-Net判别器的结合显著提升了草图驱动的法线图生成质量与准确性。

authors_text: Mengfan Li
title: Research on the Detection Method of Breast Cancer Deep Convolutional Neural Network Based on Computer Aid
title_zh: 基于计算机辅助的乳腺癌深度卷积神经网络检测方法研究
abstract: Traditional breast cancer image classification methods require manual extraction of features from medical images, which not only require professional medical knowledge, but also have problems such as time-consuming and labor-intensive and difficulty in extracting high-quality features. Therefore, the paper proposes a computer-based feature fusion Convolutional neural network breast cancer image classification and detection method. The paper pre-trains two convolutional neural networks with different structures, and then uses the convolutional neural network to automatically extract the characteristics of features, fuse the features extracted from the two structures, and finally use the classifier classifies the fused features. The experimental results show that the accuracy of this method in the classification of breast cancer image data sets is 89%, and the classification accuracy of breast cancer images is significantly improved compared with traditional methods.
summary: Traditional breast cancer image classification methods require manual extraction of features from medical images, which not only require professional medical knowledge, but also have problems such as time-consuming and labor-intensive and difficulty in extracting high-quality features. Therefore, the paper proposes a computer-based feature fusion Convolutional neural network breast cancer image classification and detection method. The paper pre-trains two convolutional neural networks with different structures, and then uses the convolutional neural network to automatically extract the characteristics of features, fuse the features extracted from the two structures, and finally use the classifier classifies the fused features. The experimental results show that the accuracy of this method in the classification of breast cancer image data sets is 89%, and the classification accuracy of breast cancer images is significantly improved compared with traditional methods.
abstract_zh: 传统的乳腺癌图像分类方法需要手动从医学图像中提取特征，不仅需要专业的医学知识，而且存在耗时费力、难以提取高质量特征等问题。因此，本文提出一种基于计算机特征融合的卷积神经网络乳腺癌图像分类与检测方法。论文预训练了两个不同结构的卷积神经网络，然后利用卷积神经网络自动提取特征的特征，将两种结构提取的特征进行融合，最后利用分类器对融合后的特征进行分类。实验结果表明，该方法在乳腺癌图像数据集分类上的准确率为89%，与传统方法相比，乳腺癌图像的分类准确率显着提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于特征融合的深度卷积神经网络方法，用于提高乳腺癌图像分类的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统乳腺癌图像分类方法依赖人工特征提取，存在耗时、费力且难以获取高质量特征的问题。
AI.method: 预训练两种结构不同的卷积神经网络，自动提取特征后进行融合，最终通过分类器完成分类任务。
AI.result: 在乳腺癌图像数据集上分类准确率达到89%，显著优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 特征融合的深度卷积神经网络方法能有效提升乳腺癌图像分类性能，验证了该方法的优越性。

search_text: Research on the Detection Method of Breast Cancer Deep Convolutional Neural Network Based on Computer Aid 基于计算机辅助的乳腺癌深度卷积神经网络检测方法研究 Traditional breast cancer image classification methods require manual extraction of features from medical images, which not only require professional medical knowledge, but also have problems such as time-consuming and labor-intensive and difficulty in extracting high-quality features. Therefore, the paper proposes a computer-based feature fusion Convolutional neural network breast cancer image classification and detection method. The paper pre-trains two convolutional neural networks with different structures, and then uses the convolutional neural network to automatically extract the characteristics of features, fuse the features extracted from the two structures, and finally use the classifier classifies the fused features. The experimental results show that the accuracy of this method in the classification of breast cancer image data sets is 89%, and the classification accuracy of breast cancer images is significantly improved compared with traditional methods. 传统的乳腺癌图像分类方法需要手动从医学图像中提取特征，不仅需要专业的医学知识，而且存在耗时费力、难以提取高质量特征等问题。因此，本文提出一种基于计算机特征融合的卷积神经网络乳腺癌图像分类与检测方法。论文预训练了两个不同结构的卷积神经网络，然后利用卷积神经网络自动提取特征的特征，将两种结构提取的特征进行融合，最后利用分类器对融合后的特征进行分类。实验结果表明，该方法在乳腺癌图像数据集分类上的准确率为89%，与传统方法相比，乳腺癌图像的分类准确率显着提高。 本文提出一种基于特征融合的深度卷积神经网络方法，用于提高乳腺癌图像分类的准确性。 Mengfan Li eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Junsong Wang,Yubo Li,Zhiyong Chang,Haitao Yue,Yonghua Lin
title: Fine-Grained Texture Identification for Reliable Product Traceability
title_zh: 细粒度纹理识别，实现可靠的产品可追溯性
abstract: Texture exists in lots of the products, such as wood, beef and compression tea. These abundant and stochastic texture patterns are significantly different between any two products. Unlike the traditional digital ID tracking, in this paper, we propose a novel approach for product traceability, which directly uses the natural texture of the product itself as the unique identifier. A texture identification based traceability system for Pu'er compression tea is developed to demonstrate the feasibility of the proposed solution. With tea-brick images collected from manufactures and individual users, a large-scale dataset has been formed to evaluate the performance of tea-brick texture verification and searching algorithm. The texture similarity approach with local feature extraction and matching achieves the verification accuracy of 99.6% and the top-1 searching accuracy of 98.9%, respectively.
summary: Texture exists in lots of the products, such as wood, beef and compression tea. These abundant and stochastic texture patterns are significantly different between any two products. Unlike the traditional digital ID tracking, in this paper, we propose a novel approach for product traceability, which directly uses the natural texture of the product itself as the unique identifier. A texture identification based traceability system for Pu'er compression tea is developed to demonstrate the feasibility of the proposed solution. With tea-brick images collected from manufactures and individual users, a large-scale dataset has been formed to evaluate the performance of tea-brick texture verification and searching algorithm. The texture similarity approach with local feature extraction and matching achieves the verification accuracy of 99.6% and the top-1 searching accuracy of 98.9%, respectively.
abstract_zh: 许多产品都存在纹理，例如木材、牛肉和紧压茶。这些丰富且随机的纹理图案在任何两种产品之间都显着不同。与传统的数字ID跟踪不同，在本文中，我们提出了一种新的产品追溯方法，它直接使用产品本身的自然纹理作为唯一标识符。开发了一种基于质地识别的普洱紧压茶追溯系统，以证明该解决方案的可行性。通过从制造商和个人用户收集的茶砖图像，形成了大规模数据集来评估茶砖纹理验证和搜索算法的性能。结合局部特征提取和匹配的纹理相似度方法分别实现了 99.6% 的验证精度和 98.9% 的 top-1 搜索精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于产品自然纹理细粒度识别的可靠产品追溯方法，并以普洱压缩茶为例进行验证。
AI.motivation: 传统数字ID追踪存在伪造风险且易损坏，而产品天然纹理具有唯一性和不可复制性，可作为更可靠的追溯标识。
AI.method: 通过局部特征提取与匹配的纹理相似性算法，构建普洱茶砖图像大规模数据集进行验证与搜索评估。
AI.result: 实现99.6%的验证准确率和98.9%的Top-1搜索准确率，证明纹理识别在产品追溯中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为普洱压缩茶提供可靠追溯方案，验证了自然纹理识别在产品防伪与溯源中的可行性与优越性。

authors_text: Nianchang Huang,Qiang Zhang,Jungong Han
title: Middle-level Fusion for Lightweight RGB-D Salient Object Detection
title_zh: 用于轻量级 RGB-D 显着目标检测的中级融合
abstract: Most existing lightweight RGB-D salient object detection (SOD) models are based on two-stream structure or single-stream structure. The former one first uses two sub-networks to extract unimodal features from RGB and depth images, respectively, and then fuses them for SOD. While, the latter one directly extracts multi-modal features from the input RGB-D images and then focuses on exploiting cross-level complementary information. However, two-stream structure based models inevitably require more parameters and single-stream structure based ones cannot well exploit the cross-modal complementary information since they ignore the modality difference. To address these issues, we propose to employ the middle-level fusion structure for designing lightweight RGB-D SOD model in this paper, which first employs two sub-networks to extract low- and middle-level unimodal features, respectively, and then fuses those extracted middle-level unimodal features for extracting corresponding high-level multi-modal features in the subsequent sub-network. Different from existing models, this structure can effectively exploit the cross-modal complementary information and significantly reduce the network's parameters, simultaneously. Therefore, a novel lightweight SOD model is designed, which contains a information-aware multi-modal feature fusion (IMFF) module for effectively capturing the cross-modal complementary information and a lightweight feature-level and decision-level feature fusion (LFDF) module for aggregating the feature-level and the decision-level saliency information in different stages with less parameters. Our proposed model has only 3.9M parameters and runs at 33 FPS. The experimental results on several benchmark datasets verify the effectiveness and superiority of the proposed method over some state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Most existing lightweight RGB-D salient object detection (SOD) models are based on two-stream structure or single-stream structure. The former one first uses two sub-networks to extract unimodal features from RGB and depth images, respectively, and then fuses them for SOD. While, the latter one directly extracts multi-modal features from the input RGB-D images and then focuses on exploiting cross-level complementary information. However, two-stream structure based models inevitably require more parameters and single-stream structure based ones cannot well exploit the cross-modal complementary information since they ignore the modality difference. To address these issues, we propose to employ the middle-level fusion structure for designing lightweight RGB-D SOD model in this paper, which first employs two sub-networks to extract low- and middle-level unimodal features, respectively, and then fuses those extracted middle-level unimodal features for extracting corresponding high-level multi-modal features in the subsequent sub-network. Different from existing models, this structure can effectively exploit the cross-modal complementary information and significantly reduce the network's parameters, simultaneously. Therefore, a novel lightweight SOD model is designed, which contains a information-aware multi-modal feature fusion (IMFF) module for effectively capturing the cross-modal complementary information and a lightweight feature-level and decision-level feature fusion (LFDF) module for aggregating the feature-level and the decision-level saliency information in different stages with less parameters. Our proposed model has only 3.9M parameters and runs at 33 FPS. The experimental results on several benchmark datasets verify the effectiveness and superiority of the proposed method over some state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 大多数现有的轻量级 RGB-D 显着目标检测（SOD）模型都是基于双流结构或单流结构。前者首先使用两个子网络分别从 RGB 和深度图像中提取单峰特征，然后将它们融合为 SOD。而后者直接从输入的 RGB-D 图像中提取多模态特征，然后专注于利用跨级互补信息。然而，基于双流结构的模型不可避免地需要更多的参数，而基于单流结构的模型不能很好地利用跨模态互补信息，因为它们忽略了模态差异。为了解决这些问题，本文提出采用中层融合结构来设计轻量级RGB-D SOD模型，首先使用两个子网络分别提取低层和中层单峰特征，然后融合提取的中层单峰特征，以在后续子网络中提取相应的高层多峰特征。与现有模型不同，该结构可以有效利用跨模态互补信息，同时显着减少网络参数。因此，设计了一种新颖的轻量级SOD模型，其中包含用于有效捕获跨模态互补信息的信息感知多模态特征融合（IMFF）模块和用于以较少参数聚合不同阶段的特征级和决策级显着性信息的轻量级特征级和决策级特征融合（LFDF）模块。我们提出的模型只有 390 万个参数，运行速度为 33 FPS。几个基准数据集上的实验结果验证了所提出的方法相对于一些最先进方法的有效性和优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于中层融合的轻量级RGB-D显著性目标检测模型，通过有效利用跨模态互补信息并减少参数量来提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有轻量级RGB-D显著性检测模型存在参数过多或跨模态信息利用不足的问题，需设计一种能兼顾参数效率与跨模态信息融合的新型结构。
AI.method: 采用中层融合结构，通过双子网络分别提取低层和中层单模态特征，再融合中层特征生成高层多模态特征；包含信息感知多模态融合模块（IMFF）和轻量级特征-决策级融合模块（LFDF）。
AI.result: 模型参数量仅为3.9M，运行速度达33 FPS，在多个基准数据集上优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 中层融合结构有效平衡了跨模态信息利用与模型轻量化，验证了所提方法在显著性检测任务中的有效性与优越性。

search_text: Middle-level Fusion for Lightweight RGB-D Salient Object Detection 用于轻量级 RGB-D 显着目标检测的中级融合 Most existing lightweight RGB-D salient object detection (SOD) models are based on two-stream structure or single-stream structure. The former one first uses two sub-networks to extract unimodal features from RGB and depth images, respectively, and then fuses them for SOD. While, the latter one directly extracts multi-modal features from the input RGB-D images and then focuses on exploiting cross-level complementary information. However, two-stream structure based models inevitably require more parameters and single-stream structure based ones cannot well exploit the cross-modal complementary information since they ignore the modality difference. To address these issues, we propose to employ the middle-level fusion structure for designing lightweight RGB-D SOD model in this paper, which first employs two sub-networks to extract low- and middle-level unimodal features, respectively, and then fuses those extracted middle-level unimodal features for extracting corresponding high-level multi-modal features in the subsequent sub-network. Different from existing models, this structure can effectively exploit the cross-modal complementary information and significantly reduce the network's parameters, simultaneously. Therefore, a novel lightweight SOD model is designed, which contains a information-aware multi-modal feature fusion (IMFF) module for effectively capturing the cross-modal complementary information and a lightweight feature-level and decision-level feature fusion (LFDF) module for aggregating the feature-level and the decision-level saliency information in different stages with less parameters. Our proposed model has only 3.9M parameters and runs at 33 FPS. The experimental results on several benchmark datasets verify the effectiveness and superiority of the proposed method over some state-of-the-art methods. 大多数现有的轻量级 RGB-D 显着目标检测（SOD）模型都是基于双流结构或单流结构。前者首先使用两个子网络分别从 RGB 和深度图像中提取单峰特征，然后将它们融合为 SOD。而后者直接从输入的 RGB-D 图像中提取多模态特征，然后专注于利用跨级互补信息。然而，基于双流结构的模型不可避免地需要更多的参数，而基于单流结构的模型不能很好地利用跨模态互补信息，因为它们忽略了模态差异。为了解决这些问题，本文提出采用中层融合结构来设计轻量级RGB-D SOD模型，首先使用两个子网络分别提取低层和中层单峰特征，然后融合提取的中层单峰特征，以在后续子网络中提取相应的高层多峰特征。与现有模型不同，该结构可以有效利用跨模态互补信息，同时显着减少网络参数。因此，设计了一种新颖的轻量级SOD模型，其中包含用于有效捕获跨模态互补信息的信息感知多模态特征融合（IMFF）模块和用于以较少参数聚合不同阶段的特征级和决策级显着性信息的轻量级特征级和决策级特征融合（LFDF）模块。我们提出的模型只有 390 万个参数，运行速度为 33 FPS。几个基准数据集上的实验结果验证了所提出的方法相对于一些最先进方法的有效性和优越性。 本文提出一种基于中层融合的轻量级RGB-D显著性目标检测模型，通过有效利用跨模态互补信息并减少参数量来提升检测性能。 Nianchang Huang,Qiang Zhang,Jungong Han cs.CV

authors_text: Nianchang Huang,Jianan Liu,Qiang Zhang,Jungong Han
title: Exploring Modality-shared Appearance Features and Modality-invariant Relation Features for Cross-modality Person Re-Identification
title_zh: 探索跨模态行人重识别的模态共享外观特征和模态不变关系特征
abstract: Most existing cross-modality person re-identification works rely on discriminative modality-shared features for reducing cross-modality variations and intra-modality variations. Despite some initial success, such modality-shared appearance features cannot capture enough modality-invariant discriminative information due to a massive discrepancy between RGB and infrared images. To address this issue, on the top of appearance features, we further capture the modality-invariant relations among different person parts (referred to as modality-invariant relation features), which are the complement to those modality-shared appearance features and help to identify persons with similar appearances but different body shapes. To this end, a Multi-level Two-streamed Modality-shared Feature Extraction (MTMFE) sub-network is designed, where the modality-shared appearance features and modality-invariant relation features are first extracted in a shared 2D feature space and a shared 3D feature space, respectively. The two features are then fused into the final modality-shared features such that both cross-modality variations and intra-modality variations can be reduced. Besides, a novel cross-modality quadruplet loss is proposed to further reduce the cross-modality variations. Experimental results on several benchmark datasets demonstrate that our proposed method exceeds state-of-the-art algorithms by a noticeable margin.
summary: Most existing cross-modality person re-identification works rely on discriminative modality-shared features for reducing cross-modality variations and intra-modality variations. Despite some initial success, such modality-shared appearance features cannot capture enough modality-invariant discriminative information due to a massive discrepancy between RGB and infrared images. To address this issue, on the top of appearance features, we further capture the modality-invariant relations among different person parts (referred to as modality-invariant relation features), which are the complement to those modality-shared appearance features and help to identify persons with similar appearances but different body shapes. To this end, a Multi-level Two-streamed Modality-shared Feature Extraction (MTMFE) sub-network is designed, where the modality-shared appearance features and modality-invariant relation features are first extracted in a shared 2D feature space and a shared 3D feature space, respectively. The two features are then fused into the final modality-shared features such that both cross-modality variations and intra-modality variations can be reduced. Besides, a novel cross-modality quadruplet loss is proposed to further reduce the cross-modality variations. Experimental results on several benchmark datasets demonstrate that our proposed method exceeds state-of-the-art algorithms by a noticeable margin.
abstract_zh: 大多数现有的跨模态人员重新识别工作依赖于区分性模态共享特征来减少跨模态变化和模态内变化。尽管取得了一些初步成功，但由于 RGB 和红外图像之间存在巨大差异，这种模态共享的外观特征无法捕获足够的模态不变的判别信息。为了解决这个问题，在外观特征的基础上，我们进一步捕获不同人物部位之间的模态不变关系（称为模态不变关系特征），这是对模态共享外观特征的补充，有助于识别具有相似外观但体型不同的人。为此，设计了多级两流模态共享特征提取（MTMFE）子网络，其中首先分别在共享2D特征空间和共享3D特征空间中提取模态共享外观特征和模态不变关系特征。然后将这两个特征融合到最终的模态共享特征中，从而可以减少跨模态变化和模态内变化。此外，提出了一种新颖的跨模态四元组损失以进一步减少跨模态变化。几个基准数据集的实验结果表明，我们提出的方法明显超过了最先进的算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合模态共享外观特征和模态不变关系特征的跨模态行人重识别方法，以解决RGB与红外图像间的显著差异问题。
AI.motivation: 现有跨模态行人重识别方法依赖模态共享特征，但难以捕捉RGB与红外图像间的模态不变判别信息，导致相似外观但不同体型的行人识别效果不佳。
AI.method: 设计多级双流模态共享特征提取网络（MTMFE），在共享2D特征空间提取模态共享外观特征，在共享3D特征空间提取模态不变关系特征，并引入跨模态四元组损失函数增强特征对齐。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上实验表明，该方法在跨模态行人重识别任务中显著优于现有最先进算法。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合建模模态共享外观特征与模态不变关系特征，有效缓解了跨模态与模态内差异问题，提升了跨模态行人重识别的准确性。

authors_text: Wu Liu,Qian Bao,Yu Sun,Tao Mei
title: Recent Advances in Monocular 2D and 3D Human Pose Estimation: A Deep Learning Perspective
title_zh: 单目 2D 和 3D 人体姿势估计的最新进展：深度学习视角
abstract: Estimation of the human pose from a monocular camera has been an emerging research topic in the computer vision community with many applications. Recently, benefited from the deep learning technologies, a significant amount of research efforts have greatly advanced the monocular human pose estimation both in 2D and 3D areas. Although there have been some works to summarize the different approaches, it still remains challenging for researchers to have an in-depth view of how these approaches work. In this paper, we provide a comprehensive and holistic 2D-to-3D perspective to tackle this problem. We categorize the mainstream and milestone approaches since the year 2014 under unified frameworks. By systematically summarizing the differences and connections between these approaches, we further analyze the solutions for challenging cases, such as the lack of data, the inherent ambiguity between 2D and 3D, and the complex multi-person scenarios. We also summarize the pose representation styles, benchmarks, evaluation metrics, and the quantitative performance of popular approaches. Finally, we discuss the challenges and give deep thinking of promising directions for future research. We believe this survey will provide the readers with a deep and insightful understanding of monocular human pose estimation.
summary: Estimation of the human pose from a monocular camera has been an emerging research topic in the computer vision community with many applications. Recently, benefited from the deep learning technologies, a significant amount of research efforts have greatly advanced the monocular human pose estimation both in 2D and 3D areas. Although there have been some works to summarize the different approaches, it still remains challenging for researchers to have an in-depth view of how these approaches work. In this paper, we provide a comprehensive and holistic 2D-to-3D perspective to tackle this problem. We categorize the mainstream and milestone approaches since the year 2014 under unified frameworks. By systematically summarizing the differences and connections between these approaches, we further analyze the solutions for challenging cases, such as the lack of data, the inherent ambiguity between 2D and 3D, and the complex multi-person scenarios. We also summarize the pose representation styles, benchmarks, evaluation metrics, and the quantitative performance of popular approaches. Finally, we discuss the challenges and give deep thinking of promising directions for future research. We believe this survey will provide the readers with a deep and insightful understanding of monocular human pose estimation.
abstract_zh: 从单目相机估计人体姿势一直是计算机视觉社区中的一个新兴研究课题，具有许多应用。近年来，受益于深度学习技术，大量研究工作极大地推进了 2D 和 3D 领域的单目人体姿态估计。尽管已经有一些工作总结了不同的方法，但研究人员深入了解这些方法的工作原理仍然具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提供了全面且整体的 2D 到 3D 视角来解决这个问题。我们将 2014 年以来的主流方法和里程碑方法分类在统一的框架下。通过系统地总结这些方法之间的差异和联系，我们进一步分析了具有挑战性的案例的解决方案，例如数据缺乏、2D 和 3D 之间固有的模糊性以及复杂的多人场景。我们还总结了流行方法的姿势表示风格、基准、评估指标和定量性能。最后，我们讨论了挑战，并对未来研究的有希望的方向进行了深入思考。我们相信这项调查将为读者提供对单目人体姿态估计的深刻而深刻的理解。

AI.tldr: 本文从深度学习视角综述了单目相机下2D和3D人体姿态估计的最新进展，提供了一个从2D到3D的全面分析框架。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有相关综述，但研究者仍缺乏对现有方法工作原理的深入理解，且需系统分析数据不足、2D-3D歧义性等挑战。
AI.method: 按时间线分类2014年以来的主流方法，构建统一框架，对比分析不同方法的差异与联系，并总结姿态表示方式、基准数据集及评估指标。
AI.result: 系统梳理了主流方法的解决方案，量化分析了典型方法性能，指出现有数据集和评估指标的局限性，并提出未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 该综述为研究者提供了单目人体姿态估计领域的深度洞察，明确了当前挑战与未来技术突破方向。

We also summarize the pose representation styles, benchmarks, evaluation metrics, and the quantitative performance of popular approaches. Finally, we discuss the challenges and give deep thinking of promising directions for future research. We believe this survey will provide the readers with a deep and insightful understanding of monocular human pose estimation. 从单目相机估计人体姿势一直是计算机视觉社区中的一个新兴研究课题，具有许多应用。近年来，受益于深度学习技术，大量研究工作极大地推进了 2D 和 3D 领域的单目人体姿态估计。尽管已经有一些工作总结了不同的方法，但研究人员深入了解这些方法的工作原理仍然具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提供了全面且整体的 2D 到 3D 视角来解决这个问题。我们将 2014 年以来的主流方法和里程碑方法分类在统一的框架下。通过系统地总结这些方法之间的差异和联系，我们进一步分析了具有挑战性的案例的解决方案，例如数据缺乏、2D 和 3D 之间固有的模糊性以及复杂的多人场景。我们还总结了流行方法的姿势表示风格、基准、评估指标和定量性能。最后，我们讨论了挑战，并对未来研究的有希望的方向进行了深入思考。我们相信这项调查将为读者提供对单目人体姿态估计的深刻而深刻的理解。 本文从深度学习视角综述了单目相机下2D和3D人体姿态估计的最新进展，提供了一个从2D到3D的全面分析框架。 Wu Liu,Qian Bao,Yu Sun,Tao Mei cs.CV

authors_text: László Tóth,Amin Honarmandi Shandiz
title: 3D Convolutional Neural Networks for Ultrasound-Based Silent Speech Interfaces
title_zh: 用于基于超声波的无声语音接口的 3D 卷积神经网络
abstract: Silent speech interfaces (SSI) aim to reconstruct the speech signal from a recording of the articulatory movement, such as an ultrasound video of the tongue. Currently, deep neural networks are the most successful technology for this task. The efficient solution requires methods that do not simply process single images, but are able to extract the tongue movement information from a sequence of video frames. One option for this is to apply recurrent neural structures such as the long short-term memory network (LSTM) in combination with 2D convolutional neural networks (CNNs). Here, we experiment with another approach that extends the CNN to perform 3D convolution, where the extra dimension corresponds to time. In particular, we apply the spatial and temporal convolutions in a decomposed form, which proved very successful recently in video action recognition. We find experimentally that our 3D network outperforms the CNN+LSTM model, indicating that 3D CNNs may be a feasible alternative to CNN+LSTM networks in SSI systems.
summary: Silent speech interfaces (SSI) aim to reconstruct the speech signal from a recording of the articulatory movement, such as an ultrasound video of the tongue. Currently, deep neural networks are the most successful technology for this task. The efficient solution requires methods that do not simply process single images, but are able to extract the tongue movement information from a sequence of video frames. One option for this is to apply recurrent neural structures such as the long short-term memory network (LSTM) in combination with 2D convolutional neural networks (CNNs). Here, we experiment with another approach that extends the CNN to perform 3D convolution, where the extra dimension corresponds to time. In particular, we apply the spatial and temporal convolutions in a decomposed form, which proved very successful recently in video action recognition. We find experimentally that our 3D network outperforms the CNN+LSTM model, indicating that 3D CNNs may be a feasible alternative to CNN+LSTM networks in SSI systems.
abstract_zh: 无声语音接口 (SSI) 旨在从发音运动记录（例如舌头的超声视频）中重建语音信号。目前，深度神经网络是完成这项任务最成功的技术。有效的解决方案需要的方法不仅仅是处理单个图像，而是能够从视频帧序列中提取舌头运动信息。一种选择是应用循环神经结构，例如长短期记忆网络 (LSTM) 与 2D 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的结合。在这里，我们尝试了另一种方法，将 CNN 扩展为执行 3D 卷积，其中额外的维度对应于时间。特别是，我们以分解的形式应用空间和时间卷积，这在最近的视频动作识别中被证明非常成功。我们通过实验发现，我们的 3D 网络优于 CNN+LSTM 模型，这表明 3D CNN 可能是 SSI 系统中 CNN+LSTM 网络的可行替代方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用3D卷积神经网络处理超声波视频，以重建无声语音接口中的语音信号。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如CNN+LSTM在处理超声波视频序列时复杂度高，而3D卷积能同时提取时空特征，可能更高效。
AI.method: 采用分解的时空卷积结构，将3D卷积扩展为同时处理空间和时间维度，替代传统CNN+LSTM组合。
AI.result: 实验表明3D网络在语音重建任务中优于CNN+LSTM模型，验证了其可行性。
AI.conclusion: 3D卷积神经网络可作为无声语音接口系统的有效替代方案，优于现有递归结构。

ai_content.conclusion: 3D卷积神经网络可作为无声语音接口系统的有效替代方案，优于现有递归结构。

authors_text: Junaid Ahmed Ghauri,Sherzod Hakimov,Ralph Ewerth
title: Supervised Video Summarization via Multiple Feature Sets with Parallel Attention
title_zh: 通过具有并行注意力的多个特征集进行监督视频摘要
comment: Accepted in IEEE International Conference on Multimedia and Expo (ICME) 2021 (They have copyright to publish camera ready version of this work)
comments: Accepted in IEEE International Conference on Multimedia and Expo (ICME) 2021 (They have copyright to publish camera ready version of this work)
abstract: The assignment of importance scores to particular frames or (short) segments in a video is crucial for summarization, but also a difficult task. Previous work utilizes only one source of visual features. In this paper, we suggest a novel model architecture that combines three feature sets for visual content and motion to predict importance scores. The proposed architecture utilizes an attention mechanism before fusing motion features and features representing the (static) visual content, i.e., derived from an image classification model. Comprehensive experimental evaluations are reported for two well-known datasets, SumMe and TVSum. In this context, we identify methodological issues on how previous work used these benchmark datasets, and present a fair evaluation scheme with appropriate data splits that can be used in future work. When using static and motion features with parallel attention mechanism, we improve state-of-the-art results for SumMe, while being on par with the state of the art for the other dataset.
summary: The assignment of importance scores to particular frames or (short) segments in a video is crucial for summarization, but also a difficult task. Previous work utilizes only one source of visual features. In this paper, we suggest a novel model architecture that combines three feature sets for visual content and motion to predict importance scores. The proposed architecture utilizes an attention mechanism before fusing motion features and features representing the (static) visual content, i.e., derived from an image classification model. Comprehensive experimental evaluations are reported for two well-known datasets, SumMe and TVSum. In this context, we identify methodological issues on how previous work used these benchmark datasets, and present a fair evaluation scheme with appropriate data splits that can be used in future work. When using static and motion features with parallel attention mechanism, we improve state-of-the-art results for SumMe, while being on par with the state of the art for the other dataset.
abstract_zh: 为视频中的特定帧或（短）片段分配重要性分数对于摘要至关重要，但也是一项艰巨的任务。以前的工作仅利用视觉特征的一种来源。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的模型架构，它结合了视觉内容和运动的三个特征集来预测重要性得分。所提出的架构在融合运动特征和表示（静态）视觉内容的特征（即从图像分类模型派生）之前利用注意力机制。报告了两个著名数据集 SumMe 和 TVSum 的综合实验评估。在这种情况下，我们确定了以前的工作如何使用这些基准数据集的方法论问题，并提出了一个公平的评估方案，其中包含可在未来工作中使用的适当的数据分割。当使用具有并行注意机制的静态和运动特征时，我们改进了 SumMe 的最先进结果，同时与其他数据集的最先进结果持平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多特征集与并行注意力机制的监督视频摘要方法，通过融合静态视觉内容和运动特征提升重要性分数预测效果。
AI.motivation: 传统视频摘要方法仅依赖单一视觉特征，难以全面捕捉视频内容与动态信息，导致摘要质量受限。
AI.method: 设计融合三种特征集的模型架构，在注意力机制作用下并行处理静态视觉特征（来自图像分类模型）与运动特征，提出更公平的数据分割评估方案。
AI.result: 在SumMe数据集上超越现有最优方法，在TVSum数据集上达到同类水平，同时修正了基准数据集的评估方法论问题。
AI.conclusion: 多特征并行注意力机制有效提升视频摘要性能，改进的评估方案为后续研究提供更可靠基准。

authors_text: Arnaud Taffanel,Barbara Rousselot,Jonas Danielsson,Kimberly McGuire,Kristoffer Richardsson,Marcus Eliasson,Tobias Antonsson,Wolfgang Hönig
title: Lighthouse Positioning System: Dataset, Accuracy, and Precision for UAV Research
title_zh: 灯塔定位系统：无人机研究的数据集、准确性和精度
comment: Submitted to the 'Robot Swarms in the Real World' workshop (ICRA 2021)
comments: Submitted to the 'Robot Swarms in the Real World' workshop (ICRA 2021)
abstract: The Lighthouse system was originally developed as tracking system for virtual reality applications. Due to its affordable price, it has also found attractive use-cases in robotics in the past. However, existing works frequently rely on the centralized official tracking software, which make the solution less attractive for UAV swarms. In this work, we consider an open-source tracking software that can run onboard small Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) in real-time and enable distributed swarming algorithms. We provide a dataset specifically for the use cases i) flight; and ii) as ground truth for other commonly-used distributed swarming localization systems such as ultra-wideband. We then use this dataset to analyze both accuracy and precision of the Lighthouse system in different use-cases. To our knowledge, we are the first to compare two different Lighthouse hardware versions with a motion capture system and the first to analyze the accuracy using tracking software that runs onboard a microcontroller.
summary: The Lighthouse system was originally developed as tracking system for virtual reality applications. Due to its affordable price, it has also found attractive use-cases in robotics in the past. However, existing works frequently rely on the centralized official tracking software, which make the solution less attractive for UAV swarms. In this work, we consider an open-source tracking software that can run onboard small Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) in real-time and enable distributed swarming algorithms. We provide a dataset specifically for the use cases i) flight; and ii) as ground truth for other commonly-used distributed swarming localization systems such as ultra-wideband. We then use this dataset to analyze both accuracy and precision of the Lighthouse system in different use-cases. To our knowledge, we are the first to compare two different Lighthouse hardware versions with a motion capture system and the first to analyze the accuracy using tracking software that runs onboard a microcontroller.
abstract_zh: Lighthouse 系统最初是作为虚拟现实应用程序的跟踪系统而开发的。由于价格实惠，它过去也在机器人领域找到了有吸引力的用例。然而，现有的工作经常依赖于集中式官方跟踪软件，这使得该解决方案对无人机群的吸引力降低。在这项工作中，我们考虑了一种开源跟踪软件，该软件可以在小型无人机（UAV）上实时运行并启用分布式集群算法。我们专门为用例提供了一个数据集 i) 飞行； ii) 作为其他常用分布式集群定位系统（例如超宽带）的基本事实。然后，我们使用该数据集来分析 Lighthouse 系统在不同用例中的准确性和精度。据我们所知，我们是第一个将两种不同的 Lighthouse 硬件版本与运动捕捉系统进行比较的人，也是第一个使用在微控制器上运行的跟踪软件来分析准确性的人。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种适用于无人机群的开源Lighthouse定位系统，提供飞行数据集和精度分析，并首次比较两种硬件版本与运动捕捉系统的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有Lighthouse研究依赖官方集中式软件，难以满足无人机群的分布式需求，且缺乏针对飞行场景的精度评估和硬件版本对比。
AI.method: 开发可在微型控制器上实时运行的开源跟踪软件，构建飞行场景数据集及作为其他定位系统（如超宽带）的地面真值数据集，通过数据集分析精度与精确度，并对比两种Lighthouse硬件版本与运动捕捉系统的差异。
AI.result: 首次揭示两种Lighthouse硬件版本在精度上的差异，验证了微控制器运行软件的可行性，并为无人机群算法提供了基准数据集。
AI.conclusion: 本研究填补了Lighthouse系统在无人机群应用中的空白，其开源软件和数据集可推动分布式定位算法的发展，同时为硬件选型提供参考依据。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种适用于无人机群的开源Lighthouse定位系统，提供飞行数据集和精度分析，并首次比较两种硬件版本与运动捕捉系统的性能。

search_text: Lighthouse Positioning System: Dataset, Accuracy, and Precision for UAV Research 灯塔定位系统：无人机研究的数据集、准确性和精度 The Lighthouse system was originally developed as tracking system for virtual reality applications. Due to its affordable price, it has also found attractive use-cases in robotics in the past. However, existing works frequently rely on the centralized official tracking software, which make the solution less attractive for UAV swarms. In this work, we consider an open-source tracking software that can run onboard small Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) in real-time and enable distributed swarming algorithms. We provide a dataset specifically for the use cases i) flight; and ii) as ground truth for other commonly-used distributed swarming localization systems such as ultra-wideband. We then use this dataset to analyze both accuracy and precision of the Lighthouse system in different use-cases. To our knowledge, we are the first to compare two different Lighthouse hardware versions with a motion capture system and the first to analyze the accuracy using tracking software that runs onboard a microcontroller. Lighthouse 系统最初是作为虚拟现实应用程序的跟踪系统而开发的。由于价格实惠，它过去也在机器人领域找到了有吸引力的用例。然而，现有的工作经常依赖于集中式官方跟踪软件，这使得该解决方案对无人机群的吸引力降低。在这项工作中，我们考虑了一种开源跟踪软件，该软件可以在小型无人机（UAV）上实时运行并启用分布式集群算法。我们专门为用例提供了一个数据集 i) 飞行； ii) 作为其他常用分布式集群定位系统（例如超宽带）的基本事实。然后，我们使用该数据集来分析 Lighthouse 系统在不同用例中的准确性和精度。据我们所知，我们是第一个将两种不同的 Lighthouse 硬件版本与运动捕捉系统进行比较的人，也是第一个使用在微控制器上运行的跟踪软件来分析准确性的人。 本文提出一种适用于无人机群的开源Lighthouse定位系统，提供飞行数据集和精度分析，并首次比较两种硬件版本与运动捕捉系统的性能。 Arnaud Taffanel,Barbara Rousselot,Jonas Danielsson,Kimberly McGuire,Kristoffer Richardsson,Marcus Eliasson,Tobias Antonsson,Wolfgang Hönig cs.RO

authors_text: Alejandro Cartas,Petia Radeva,Mariella Dimiccoli
title: Modeling long-term interactions to enhance action recognition
title_zh: 对长期交互进行建模以增强动作识别
comment: Accepted to the 25th International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR), 2021
comments: Accepted to the 25th International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR), 2021
abstract: In this paper, we propose a new approach to under-stand actions in egocentric videos that exploits the semantics of object interactions at both frame and temporal levels. At the frame level, we use a region-based approach that takes as input a primary region roughly corresponding to the user hands and a set of secondary regions potentially corresponding to the interacting objects and calculates the action score through a CNN formulation. This information is then fed to a Hierarchical LongShort-Term Memory Network (HLSTM) that captures temporal dependencies between actions within and across shots. Ablation studies thoroughly validate the proposed approach, showing in particular that both levels of the HLSTM architecture contribute to performance improvement. Furthermore, quantitative comparisons show that the proposed approach outperforms the state-of-the-art in terms of action recognition on standard benchmarks,without relying on motion information
summary: In this paper, we propose a new approach to under-stand actions in egocentric videos that exploits the semantics of object interactions at both frame and temporal levels. At the frame level, we use a region-based approach that takes as input a primary region roughly corresponding to the user hands and a set of secondary regions potentially corresponding to the interacting objects and calculates the action score through a CNN formulation. This information is then fed to a Hierarchical LongShort-Term Memory Network (HLSTM) that captures temporal dependencies between actions within and across shots. Ablation studies thoroughly validate the proposed approach, showing in particular that both levels of the HLSTM architecture contribute to performance improvement. Furthermore, quantitative comparisons show that the proposed approach outperforms the state-of-the-art in terms of action recognition on standard benchmarks,without relying on motion information
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种新方法来理解以自我为中心的视频中的动作，该方法利用帧和时间级别上的对象交互的语义。在帧级别，我们使用基于区域的方法，将大致对应于用户手的主要区域和一组可能对应于交互对象的次要区域作为输入，并通过 CNN 公式计算动作分数。然后，该信息被输入到分层长短期记忆网络 (HLSTM)，该网络捕获镜头内和镜头间动作之间的时间依赖性。消融研究彻底验证了所提出的方法，特别表明 HLSTM 架构的两个级别都有助于性能改进。此外，定量比较表明，所提出的方法在标准基准上的动作识别方面优于最先进的方法，而不依赖于运动信息

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过建模帧级和时间级对象交互来提升第一人称视角视频动作识别的新方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在动作识别中未能充分捕捉帧内及跨帧的长期交互语义，且部分依赖运动信息。
AI.method: 采用基于区域的CNN处理帧级手部与物体交互，结合分层LSTM网络（HLSTM）建模跨帧动作时序依赖。
AI.result: 消融实验验证HLSTM分层结构有效性，基准测试中优于现有方法且无需运动信息。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合建模帧级物体交互与长期时序依赖，可显著提升第一人称动作识别性能。

authors_text: Guangcan Liu
title: Time Series Forecasting via Learning Convolutionally Low-Rank Models
title_zh: 通过学习卷积低阶模型进行时间序列预测
abstract: Recently, Liu and Zhang studied the rather challenging problem of time series forecasting from the perspective of compressed sensing. They proposed a no-learning method, named Convolution Nuclear Norm Minimization (CNNM), and proved that CNNM can exactly recover the future part of a series from its observed part, provided that the series is convolutionally low-rank. While impressive, the convolutional low-rankness condition may not be satisfied whenever the series is far from being seasonal, and is in fact brittle to the presence of trends and dynamics. This paper tries to approach the issues by integrating a learnable, orthonormal transformation into CNNM, with the purpose for converting the series of involute structures into regular signals of convolutionally low-rank. We prove that the resultant model, termed Learning-Based CNNM (LbCNNM), strictly succeeds in identifying the future part of a series, as long as the transform of the series is convolutionally low-rank. To learn proper transformations that may meet the required success conditions, we devise an interpretable method based on Principal Component Pursuit (PCP). Equipped with this learning method and some elaborate data argumentation skills, LbCNNM not only can handle well the major components of time series (including trends, seasonality and dynamics), but also can make use of the forecasts provided by some other forecasting methods; this means LbCNNM can be used as a general tool for model combination. Extensive experiments on 100,452 real-world time series from Time Series Data Library (TSDL) and M4 Competition (M4) demonstrate the superior performance of LbCNNM.
summary: Recently, Liu and Zhang studied the rather challenging problem of time series forecasting from the perspective of compressed sensing. They proposed a no-learning method, named Convolution Nuclear Norm Minimization (CNNM), and proved that CNNM can exactly recover the future part of a series from its observed part, provided that the series is convolutionally low-rank. While impressive, the convolutional low-rankness condition may not be satisfied whenever the series is far from being seasonal, and is in fact brittle to the presence of trends and dynamics. This paper tries to approach the issues by integrating a learnable, orthonormal transformation into CNNM, with the purpose for converting the series of involute structures into regular signals of convolutionally low-rank. We prove that the resultant model, termed Learning-Based CNNM (LbCNNM), strictly succeeds in identifying the future part of a series, as long as the transform of the series is convolutionally low-rank. To learn proper transformations that may meet the required success conditions, we devise an interpretable method based on Principal Component Pursuit (PCP). Equipped with this learning method and some elaborate data argumentation skills, LbCNNM not only can handle well the major components of time series (including trends, seasonality and dynamics), but also can make use of the forecasts provided by some other forecasting methods; this means LbCNNM can be used as a general tool for model combination. Extensive experiments on 100,452 real-world time series from Time Series Data Library (TSDL) and M4 Competition (M4) demonstrate the superior performance of LbCNNM.
abstract_zh: 最近，Liu和Zhang从压缩感知的角度研究了颇具挑战性的时间序列预测问题。他们提出了一种无学习方法，称为卷积核范数最小化（CNNM），并证明 CNNM 可以准确地从其观察到的部分恢复序列的未来部分，前提是该序列是卷积低秩的。虽然令人印象深刻，但当序列远非季节性时，卷积低秩条件可能无法满足，并且实际上对趋势和动态的存在很脆弱。本文试图通过将可学习的正交变换集成到 CNNM 中来解决这个问题，目的是将一系列渐开线结构转换为卷积低秩的规则信号。我们证明，只要序列的变换是卷积低秩的，所得到的模型（称为基于学习的 CNNM (LbCNNM)）就可以严格成功地识别序列的未来部分。为了学习可能满足所需成功条件的适当转换，我们设计了一种基于主成分追踪（PCP）的可解释方法。凭借这种学习方法和一些复杂的数据论证技巧，LbCNNM 不仅可以很好地处理时间序列的主要组成部分（包括趋势、季节性和动态），还可以利用其他一些预测方法提供的预测；这意味着LbCNNM可以作为模型组合的通用工具。对时间序列数据库 (TSDL) 和 M4 竞赛 (M4) 的 100,452 个真实时间序列进行的大量实验证明了 LbCNNM 的优越性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于学习卷积低秩模型的时间序列预测方法LbCNNM，以解决传统方法在非季节性数据和趋势处理上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有CNNM方法对非季节性时间序列和存在趋势的数据效果不佳，需改进模型鲁棒性以适应更广泛场景。
AI.method: 将可学习的正交变换集成到CNNM中，并基于主成分追踪（PCP）设计可解释的学习方法，结合数据增强技术实现多组件建模。
AI.result: 在TSDL和M4竞赛的10万+真实时间序列数据上验证，LbCNNM在趋势、季节性和动态成分处理上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: LbCNNM通过学习适配性变换有效提升预测性能，可作为通用模型融合工具应用于复杂时间序列分析。

To learn proper transformations that may meet the required success conditions, we devise an interpretable method based on Principal Component Pursuit (PCP). Equipped with this learning method and some elaborate data argumentation skills, LbCNNM not only can handle well the major components of time series (including trends, seasonality and dynamics), but also can make use of the forecasts provided by some other forecasting methods; this means LbCNNM can be used as a general tool for model combination. Extensive experiments on 100,452 real-world time series from Time Series Data Library (TSDL) and M4 Competition (M4) demonstrate the superior performance of LbCNNM. 最近，Liu和Zhang从压缩感知的角度研究了颇具挑战性的时间序列预测问题。他们提出了一种无学习方法，称为卷积核范数最小化（CNNM），并证明 CNNM 可以准确地从其观察到的部分恢复序列的未来部分，前提是该序列是卷积低秩的。虽然令人印象深刻，但当序列远非季节性时，卷积低秩条件可能无法满足，并且实际上对趋势和动态的存在很脆弱。本文试图通过将可学习的正交变换集成到 CNNM 中来解决这个问题，目的是将一系列渐开线结构转换为卷积低秩的规则信号。我们证明，只要序列的变换是卷积低秩的，所得到的模型（称为基于学习的 CNNM (LbCNNM)）就可以严格成功地识别序列的未来部分。为了学习可能满足所需成功条件的适当转换，我们设计了一种基于主成分追踪（PCP）的可解释方法。凭借这种学习方法和一些复杂的数据论证技巧，LbCNNM 不仅可以很好地处理时间序列的主要组成部分（包括趋势、季节性和动态），还可以利用其他一些预测方法提供的预测；这意味着LbCNNM可以作为模型组合的通用工具。对时间序列数据库 (TSDL) 和 M4 竞赛 (M4) 的 100,452 个真实时间序列进行的大量实验证明了 LbCNNM 的优越性能。 本文提出一种基于学习卷积低秩模型的时间序列预测方法LbCNNM，以解决传统方法在非季节性数据和趋势处理上的不足。 Guangcan Liu cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Sheldon Fung,Xuequan Lu,Chao Zhang,Chang-Tsun Li
title: DeepfakeUCL: Deepfake Detection via Unsupervised Contrastive Learning
title_zh: DeepfakeUCL：通过无监督对比学习进行 Deepfake 检测
abstract: Face deepfake detection has seen impressive results recently. Nearly all existing deep learning techniques for face deepfake detection are fully supervised and require labels during training. In this paper, we design a novel deepfake detection method via unsupervised contrastive learning. We first generate two different transformed versions of an image and feed them into two sequential sub-networks, i.e., an encoder and a projection head. The unsupervised training is achieved by maximizing the correspondence degree of the outputs of the projection head. To evaluate the detection performance of our unsupervised method, we further use the unsupervised features to train an efficient linear classification network. Extensive experiments show that our unsupervised learning method enables comparable detection performance to state-of-the-art supervised techniques, in both the intra- and inter-dataset settings. We also conduct ablation studies for our method.
summary: Face deepfake detection has seen impressive results recently. Nearly all existing deep learning techniques for face deepfake detection are fully supervised and require labels during training. In this paper, we design a novel deepfake detection method via unsupervised contrastive learning. We first generate two different transformed versions of an image and feed them into two sequential sub-networks, i.e., an encoder and a projection head. The unsupervised training is achieved by maximizing the correspondence degree of the outputs of the projection head. To evaluate the detection performance of our unsupervised method, we further use the unsupervised features to train an efficient linear classification network. Extensive experiments show that our unsupervised learning method enables comparable detection performance to state-of-the-art supervised techniques, in both the intra- and inter-dataset settings. We also conduct ablation studies for our method.
abstract_zh: 人脸深度换脸检测最近取得了令人印象深刻的结果。几乎所有现有的用于面部深度伪造检测的深度学习技术都受到完全监督，并且在训练期间需要标签。在本文中，我们通过无监督对比学习设计了一种新颖的深度伪造检测方法。我们首先生成图像的两个不同的变换版本，并将它们输入两个连续的子网络，即编码器和投影头。通过最大化投影头输出的对应度来实现无监督训练。为了评估我们的无监督方法的检测性能，我们进一步使用无监督特征来训练有效的线性分类网络。大量的实验表明，我们的无监督学习方法在数据集内和数据集间设置中都能实现与最先进的监督技术相当的检测性能。我们还对我们的方法进行了消融研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于无监督对比学习的深度伪造检测方法DeepfakeUCL，无需标注数据即可实现与监督方法相当的检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度伪造检测方法高度依赖标注数据，而获取高质量标注数据成本高昂且存在隐私问题，亟需开发无需标注的无监督学习方法。
AI.method: 通过生成图像的两种变换版本，利用编码器和投影头网络最大化投影头输出的一致性，再基于无监督特征训练线性分类器实现检测。
AI.result: 在跨数据集和同数据集设置下，无监督方法的检测性能可与最先进的监督技术相媲美，消融实验验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明了无监督对比学习在深度伪造检测中的可行性，为减少对标注数据依赖提供了新思路。

authors_text: Jinxing Ye,Xioajiang Peng,Baigui Sun,Kai Wang,Xiuyu Sun,Hao Li,Hanqing Wu
title: Learning to Cluster Faces via Transformer
title_zh: 学习通过 Transformer 进行人脸聚类
abstract: Face clustering is a useful tool for applications like automatic face annotation and retrieval. The main challenge is that it is difficult to cluster images from the same identity with different face poses, occlusions, and image quality. Traditional clustering methods usually ignore the relationship between individual images and their neighbors which may contain useful context information. In this paper, we repurpose the well-known Transformer and introduce a Face Transformer for supervised face clustering. In Face Transformer, we decompose the face clustering into two steps: relation encoding and linkage predicting. Specifically, given a face image, a \textbf{relation encoder} module aggregates local context information from its neighbors and a \textbf{linkage predictor} module judges whether a pair of images belong to the same cluster or not. In the local linkage graph view, Face Transformer can generate more robust node and edge representations compared to existing methods. Experiments on both MS-Celeb-1M and DeepFashion show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance, e.g., 91.12\% in pairwise F-score on MS-Celeb-1M.
summary: Face clustering is a useful tool for applications like automatic face annotation and retrieval. The main challenge is that it is difficult to cluster images from the same identity with different face poses, occlusions, and image quality. Traditional clustering methods usually ignore the relationship between individual images and their neighbors which may contain useful context information. In this paper, we repurpose the well-known Transformer and introduce a Face Transformer for supervised face clustering. In Face Transformer, we decompose the face clustering into two steps: relation encoding and linkage predicting. Specifically, given a face image, a \textbf{relation encoder} module aggregates local context information from its neighbors and a \textbf{linkage predictor} module judges whether a pair of images belong to the same cluster or not. In the local linkage graph view, Face Transformer can generate more robust node and edge representations compared to existing methods. Experiments on both MS-Celeb-1M and DeepFashion show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance, e.g., 91.12\% in pairwise F-score on MS-Celeb-1M.
abstract_zh: 人脸聚类对于自动人脸注释和检索等应用来说是一个有用的工具。主要挑战是很难对具有不同面部姿势、遮挡和图像质量的同一身份的图像进行聚类。传统的聚类方法通常忽略单个图像与其邻居之间的关系，而邻居图像可能包含有用的上下文信息。在本文中，我们重新利用了著名的 Transformer，并引入了用于监督人脸聚类的 Face Transformer。在Face Transformer中，我们将人脸聚类分解为两个步骤：关系编码和链接预测。具体来说，给定一张人脸图像，关系编码器模块聚合来自其邻居的局部上下文信息，链接预测器模块判断一对图像是否属于同一簇。在局部链接图视图中，与现有方法相比，Face Transformer 可以生成更鲁棒的节点和边表示。 MS-Celeb-1M 和 DeepFashion 上的实验表明，我们的方法实现了最先进的性能，例如 MS-Celeb-1M 上的成对 F 得分为 91.12%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的面部聚类方法，通过关系编码和链接预测解决面部姿态、遮挡和图像质量差异带来的挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统聚类方法忽视图像间邻居关系，难以处理同一身份面部图像的多变姿态和遮挡问题，需利用上下文信息提升聚类鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计Face Transformer模型，分为两阶段：关系编码器聚合邻居局部上下文信息，链接预测器判断图像对是否属于同一聚类，通过局部链接图生成更稳健的节点与边表示。
AI.result: 在MS-Celeb-1M和DeepFashion数据集上达到最优性能，例如MS-Celeb-1M的pairwise F-score为91.12%。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入Transformer的邻居关系建模，本文方法有效提升了复杂场景下面部聚类的准确性，验证了局部上下文与链接预测结合的有效性。

authors_text: Zhengmi Tang,Tomo Miyazaki,Yoshihiro Sugaya,Shinichiro Omachi
title: Stroke-Based Scene Text Erasing Using Synthetic Data for Training
title_zh: 使用合成数据进行训练的基于笔画的场景文本擦除
comment: ef:IEEE TRANSACTIONS ON IMAGE PROCESSING, VOL. 30, 2021, 9306-9320
comments: ef:IEEE TRANSACTIONS ON IMAGE PROCESSING, VOL. 30, 2021, 9306-9320
abstract: Scene text erasing, which replaces text regions with reasonable content in natural images, has drawn significant attention in the computer vision community in recent years. There are two potential subtasks in scene text erasing: text detection and image inpainting. Both subtasks require considerable data to achieve better performance; however, the lack of a large-scale real-world scene-text removal dataset does not allow existing methods to realize their potential. To compensate for the lack of pairwise real-world data, we made considerable use of synthetic text after additional enhancement and subsequently trained our model only on the dataset generated by the improved synthetic text engine. Our proposed network contains a stroke mask prediction module and background inpainting module that can extract the text stroke as a relatively small hole from the cropped text image to maintain more background content for better inpainting results. This model can partially erase text instances in a scene image with a bounding box or work with an existing scene-text detector for automatic scene text erasing. The experimental results from the qualitative and quantitative evaluation on the SCUT-Syn, ICDAR2013, and SCUT-EnsText datasets demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods even when they are trained on real-world data.
summary: Scene text erasing, which replaces text regions with reasonable content in natural images, has drawn significant attention in the computer vision community in recent years. There are two potential subtasks in scene text erasing: text detection and image inpainting. Both subtasks require considerable data to achieve better performance; however, the lack of a large-scale real-world scene-text removal dataset does not allow existing methods to realize their potential. To compensate for the lack of pairwise real-world data, we made considerable use of synthetic text after additional enhancement and subsequently trained our model only on the dataset generated by the improved synthetic text engine. Our proposed network contains a stroke mask prediction module and background inpainting module that can extract the text stroke as a relatively small hole from the cropped text image to maintain more background content for better inpainting results. This model can partially erase text instances in a scene image with a bounding box or work with an existing scene-text detector for automatic scene text erasing. The experimental results from the qualitative and quantitative evaluation on the SCUT-Syn, ICDAR2013, and SCUT-EnsText datasets demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods even when they are trained on real-world data.
abstract_zh: 场景文本擦除，用自然图像中合理的内容替换文本区域，近年来引起了计算机视觉界的广泛关注。场景文本擦除有两个潜在的子任务：文本检测和图像修复。这两个子任务都需要大量数据才能获得更好的性能；然而，由于缺乏大规模的现实世界场景文本删除数据集，现有方法无法发挥其潜力。为了弥补成对现实世界数据的缺乏，我们在额外增强后大量使用了合成文本，随后仅在改进的合成文本引擎生成的数据集上训练我们的模型。我们提出的网络包含笔划掩模预测模块和背景修复模块，可以从裁剪的文本图像中将文本笔划提取为相对较小的孔，以保留更多背景内容以获得更好的修复结果。该模型可以部分擦除带有边界框的场景图像中的文本实例，或者与现有的场景文本检测器一起使用以自动擦除场景文本。对 SCUT-Syn、ICDAR2013 和 SCUT-EnsText 数据集的定性和定量评估的实验结果表明，即使在真实世界数据上进行训练，我们的方法也显着优于现有的最先进方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于笔画的场景文本擦除方法，利用合成数据进行训练以解决真实场景文本擦除数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有场景文本擦除方法因缺乏大规模真实场景文本移除数据集而难以发挥潜力，因此需要通过合成数据增强来弥补真实数据的不足。
AI.method: 设计包含笔画掩码预测模块和背景修复模块的网络，利用增强后的合成文本数据进行训练，通过提取文本笔画作为小孔洞保留更多背景信息以提升修复效果。
AI.result: 在SCUT-Syn、ICDAR2013和SCUT-EnsText数据集上的实验表明，该方法在定性和定量评估中均显著优于现有最先进的方法，即使后者使用真实数据训练。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过合成数据和模块化网络设计有效解决了场景文本擦除任务中真实数据不足的问题，取得了优于现有方法的性能。

search_text: Stroke-Based Scene Text Erasing Using Synthetic Data for Training 使用合成数据进行训练的基于笔画的场景文本擦除 Scene text erasing, which replaces text regions with reasonable content in natural images, has drawn significant attention in the computer vision community in recent years. There are two potential subtasks in scene text erasing: text detection and image inpainting. Both subtasks require considerable data to achieve better performance; however, the lack of a large-scale real-world scene-text removal dataset does not allow existing methods to realize their potential. To compensate for the lack of pairwise real-world data, we made considerable use of synthetic text after additional enhancement and subsequently trained our model only on the dataset generated by the improved synthetic text engine. Our proposed network contains a stroke mask prediction module and background inpainting module that can extract the text stroke as a relatively small hole from the cropped text image to maintain more background content for better inpainting results. This model can partially erase text instances in a scene image with a bounding box or work with an existing scene-text detector for automatic scene text erasing. The experimental results from the qualitative and quantitative evaluation on the SCUT-Syn, ICDAR2013, and SCUT-EnsText datasets demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods even when they are trained on real-world data. 场景文本擦除，用自然图像中合理的内容替换文本区域，近年来引起了计算机视觉界的广泛关注。场景文本擦除有两个潜在的子任务：文本检测和图像修复。这两个子任务都需要大量数据才能获得更好的性能；然而，由于缺乏大规模的现实世界场景文本删除数据集，现有方法无法发挥其潜力。为了弥补成对现实世界数据的缺乏，我们在额外增强后大量使用了合成文本，随后仅在改进的合成文本引擎生成的数据集上训练我们的模型。我们提出的网络包含笔划掩模预测模块和背景修复模块，可以从裁剪的文本图像中将文本笔划提取为相对较小的孔，以保留更多背景内容以获得更好的修复结果。该模型可以部分擦除带有边界框的场景图像中的文本实例，或者与现有的场景文本检测器一起使用以自动擦除场景文本。对 SCUT-Syn、ICDAR2013 和 SCUT-EnsText 数据集的定性和定量评估的实验结果表明，即使在真实世界数据上进行训练，我们的方法也显着优于现有的最先进方法。 本文提出了一种基于笔画的场景文本擦除方法，利用合成数据进行训练以解决真实场景文本擦除数据不足的问题。 Zhengmi Tang,Tomo Miyazaki,Yoshihiro Sugaya,Shinichiro Omachi cs.CV

authors_text: Akshay Rangesh,Nachiket Deo,Ross Greer,Pujitha Gunaratne,Mohan M. Trivedi
title: Autonomous Vehicles that Alert Humans to Take-Over Controls: Modeling with Real-World Data
title_zh: 提醒人类接管控制权的自动驾驶汽车：使用真实世界数据建模
abstract: With increasing automation in passenger vehicles, the study of safe and smooth occupant-vehicle interaction and control transitions is key. In this study, we focus on the development of contextual, semantically meaningful representations of the driver state, which can then be used to determine the appropriate timing and conditions for transfer of control between driver and vehicle. To this end, we conduct a large-scale real-world controlled data study where participants are instructed to take-over control from an autonomous agent under different driving conditions while engaged in a variety of distracting activities. These take-over events are captured using multiple driver-facing cameras, which when labelled result in a dataset of control transitions and their corresponding take-over times (TOTs). We then develop and train TOT models that operate sequentially on mid to high-level features produced by computer vision algorithms operating on different driver-facing camera views. The proposed TOT model produces continuous predictions of take-over times without delay, and shows promising qualitative and quantitative results in complex real-world scenarios.
summary: With increasing automation in passenger vehicles, the study of safe and smooth occupant-vehicle interaction and control transitions is key. In this study, we focus on the development of contextual, semantically meaningful representations of the driver state, which can then be used to determine the appropriate timing and conditions for transfer of control between driver and vehicle. To this end, we conduct a large-scale real-world controlled data study where participants are instructed to take-over control from an autonomous agent under different driving conditions while engaged in a variety of distracting activities. These take-over events are captured using multiple driver-facing cameras, which when labelled result in a dataset of control transitions and their corresponding take-over times (TOTs). We then develop and train TOT models that operate sequentially on mid to high-level features produced by computer vision algorithms operating on different driver-facing camera views. The proposed TOT model produces continuous predictions of take-over times without delay, and shows promising qualitative and quantitative results in complex real-world scenarios.
abstract_zh: 随着乘用车自动化程度的提高，安全、平稳的乘员与车辆交互和控制转换的研究至关重要。在本研究中，我们专注于开发驾驶员状态的上下文、语义上有意义的表示，然后可用于确定驾驶员和车辆之间控制权转移的适当时机和条件。为此，我们进行了一项大规模的现实世界受控数据研究，其中参与者被指示在不同的驾驶条件下从自主代理手中接管控制权，同时从事各种分散注意力的活动。这些接管事件是使用多个面向驾驶员的摄像头捕获的，这些摄像头在标记后会生成控制转换及其相应接管时间 (TOT) 的数据集。然后，我们开发和训练 TOT 模型，这些模型按顺序运行于计算机视觉算法产生的中高级特征上，这些算法在不同的面向驾驶员的摄像头视图上运行。所提出的 TOT 模型可以无延迟地连续预测接管时间，并在复杂的现实场景中显示出有希望的定性和定量结果。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发一种基于真实世界数据的模型，用于预测自动驾驶车辆在需要人类接管控制权时的时机。
AI.motivation: 随着车辆自动化程度提高，确保驾驶员与车辆之间的安全、平滑控制权交接成为关键问题，需准确判断驾驶员状态以确定交接时机。
AI.method: 通过大规模真实场景实验，采集驾驶员在不同驾驶条件和干扰活动下的接管控制事件数据，利用多摄像头捕捉并标注数据，训练基于计算机视觉特征的接管时间预测模型。
AI.result: 提出的模型能连续无延迟预测接管时间，在复杂真实场景中表现出良好的定性和定量结果。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为自动驾驶车辆中安全、及时的控制权交接提供了有效方法，具有实际应用潜力。

authors_text: Amirhossein Habibian,Davide Abati,Taco S. Cohen,Babak Ehteshami Bejnordi
title: Skip-Convolutions for Efficient Video Processing
title_zh: 用于高效视频处理的跳过卷积
abstract: We propose Skip-Convolutions to leverage the large amount of redundancies in video streams and save computations. Each video is represented as a series of changes across frames and network activations, denoted as residuals. We reformulate standard convolution to be efficiently computed on residual frames: each layer is coupled with a binary gate deciding whether a residual is important to the model prediction,~\eg foreground regions, or it can be safely skipped, e.g. background regions. These gates can either be implemented as an efficient network trained jointly with convolution kernels, or can simply skip the residuals based on their magnitude. Gating functions can also incorporate block-wise sparsity structures, as required for efficient implementation on hardware platforms. By replacing all convolutions with Skip-Convolutions in two state-of-the-art architectures, namely EfficientDet and HRNet, we reduce their computational cost consistently by a factor of 3~4x for two different tasks, without any accuracy drop. Extensive comparisons with existing model compression, as well as image and video efficiency methods demonstrate that Skip-Convolutions set a new state-of-the-art by effectively exploiting the temporal redundancies in videos.
summary: We propose Skip-Convolutions to leverage the large amount of redundancies in video streams and save computations. Each video is represented as a series of changes across frames and network activations, denoted as residuals. We reformulate standard convolution to be efficiently computed on residual frames: each layer is coupled with a binary gate deciding whether a residual is important to the model prediction,~\eg foreground regions, or it can be safely skipped, e.g. background regions. These gates can either be implemented as an efficient network trained jointly with convolution kernels, or can simply skip the residuals based on their magnitude. Gating functions can also incorporate block-wise sparsity structures, as required for efficient implementation on hardware platforms. By replacing all convolutions with Skip-Convolutions in two state-of-the-art architectures, namely EfficientDet and HRNet, we reduce their computational cost consistently by a factor of 3~4x for two different tasks, without any accuracy drop. Extensive comparisons with existing model compression, as well as image and video efficiency methods demonstrate that Skip-Convolutions set a new state-of-the-art by effectively exploiting the temporal redundancies in videos.
abstract_zh: 我们提出跳过卷积来利用视频流中的大量冗余并节省计算量。每个视频都表示为跨帧和网络激活的一系列变化，表示为残差。我们重新制定标准卷积，以​​便在残差帧上进行有效计算：每一层都与一个二元门耦合，决定残差对于模型预测是否重要，例如前景区域，或者可以安全地跳过它，例如背景区域。这些门可以实现为与卷积核联合训练的高效网络，也可以根据残差的大小简单地跳过残差。门控函数还可以根据硬件平台上高效实现的需要合并分块稀疏结构。通过在两种最先进的架构（即 EfficientDet 和 HRNet）中用 Skip-Convolutions 替换所有卷积，我们将两个不同任务的计算成本一致降低了 3~4 倍，而没有任何精度下降。与现有模型压缩以及图像和视频效率方法的广泛比较表明，Skip-Convolutions 通过有效利用视频中的时间冗余设置了新的最先进技术。

AI.tldr: 提出跳过卷积（Skip-Convolutions）以高效处理视频，通过利用视频中的冗余信息减少计算量。
AI.motivation: 视频处理计算量大且存在大量冗余，传统方法未能有效利用冗余导致效率低下，需更高效的方法。
AI.method: 通过残差表示视频，引入二进制门控机制判断是否跳过冗余区域，结合硬件优化的稀疏结构实现高效计算。
AI.result: 在EfficientDet和HRNet中应用后计算成本降低3-4倍，无准确率损失，优于现有压缩和效率方法。
AI.conclusion: 跳过卷积通过有效利用视频时间冗余，设定新的最先进标准，为高效视频处理提供新方法。

search_text: Skip-Convolutions for Efficient Video Processing 用于高效视频处理的跳过卷积 We propose Skip-Convolutions to leverage the large amount of redundancies in video streams and save computations. Each video is represented as a series of changes across frames and network activations, denoted as residuals. We reformulate standard convolution to be efficiently computed on residual frames: each layer is coupled with a binary gate deciding whether a residual is important to the model prediction,~\eg foreground regions, or it can be safely skipped, e.g. background regions. These gates can either be implemented as an efficient network trained jointly with convolution kernels, or can simply skip the residuals based on their magnitude. Gating functions can also incorporate block-wise sparsity structures, as required for efficient implementation on hardware platforms. By replacing all convolutions with Skip-Convolutions in two state-of-the-art architectures, namely EfficientDet and HRNet, we reduce their computational cost consistently by a factor of 3~4x for two different tasks, without any accuracy drop. Extensive comparisons with existing model compression, as well as image and video efficiency methods demonstrate that Skip-Convolutions set a new state-of-the-art by effectively exploiting the temporal redundancies in videos. 我们提出跳过卷积来利用视频流中的大量冗余并节省计算量。每个视频都表示为跨帧和网络激活的一系列变化，表示为残差。我们重新制定标准卷积，以​​便在残差帧上进行有效计算：每一层都与一个二元门耦合，决定残差对于模型预测是否重要，例如前景区域，或者可以安全地跳过它，例如背景区域。这些门可以实现为与卷积核联合训练的高效网络，也可以根据残差的大小简单地跳过残差。门控函数还可以根据硬件平台上高效实现的需要合并分块稀疏结构。通过在两种最先进的架构（即 EfficientDet 和 HRNet）中用 Skip-Convolutions 替换所有卷积，我们将两个不同任务的计算成本一致降低了 3~4 倍，而没有任何精度下降。与现有模型压缩以及图像和视频效率方法的广泛比较表明，Skip-Convolutions 通过有效利用视频中的时间冗余设置了新的最先进技术。 提出跳过卷积（Skip-Convolutions）以高效处理视频，通过利用视频中的冗余信息减少计算量。 Amirhossein Habibian,Davide Abati,Taco S. Cohen,Babak Ehteshami Bejnordi cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Xuanwu Yue,Qiao Gu,Deyun Wang,Huamin Qu,Yong Wang
title: iQUANT: Interactive Quantitative Investment Using Sparse Regression Factors
title_zh: iQUANT：使用稀疏回归因子的交互式量化投资
abstract: The model-based investing using financial factors is evolving as a principal method for quantitative investment. The main challenge lies in the selection of effective factors towards excess market returns. Existing approaches, either hand-picking factors or applying feature selection algorithms, do not orchestrate both human knowledge and computational power. This paper presents iQUANT, an interactive quantitative investment system that assists equity traders to quickly spot promising financial factors from initial recommendations suggested by algorithmic models, and conduct a joint refinement of factors and stocks for investment portfolio composition. We work closely with professional traders to assemble empirical characteristics of "good" factors and propose effective visualization designs to illustrate the collective performance of financial factors, stock portfolios, and their interactions. We evaluate iQUANT through a formal user study, two case studies, and expert interviews, using a real stock market dataset consisting of 3000 stocks times 6000 days times 56 factors.
summary: The model-based investing using financial factors is evolving as a principal method for quantitative investment. The main challenge lies in the selection of effective factors towards excess market returns. Existing approaches, either hand-picking factors or applying feature selection algorithms, do not orchestrate both human knowledge and computational power. This paper presents iQUANT, an interactive quantitative investment system that assists equity traders to quickly spot promising financial factors from initial recommendations suggested by algorithmic models, and conduct a joint refinement of factors and stocks for investment portfolio composition. We work closely with professional traders to assemble empirical characteristics of "good" factors and propose effective visualization designs to illustrate the collective performance of financial factors, stock portfolios, and their interactions. We evaluate iQUANT through a formal user study, two case studies, and expert interviews, using a real stock market dataset consisting of 3000 stocks times 6000 days times 56 factors.
abstract_zh: 利用金融因素的模型投资正在发展成为量化投资的主要方法。主要挑战在于选择实现市场超额收益的有效因素。现有的方法，无论是手工挑选因素还是应用特征选择算法，都不能协调人类知识和计算能力。本文提出了iQUANT，这是一种交互式量化投资系统，可帮助股票交易者从算法模型建议的初始建议中快速发现有前景的金融因素，并对投资组合构成的因素和股票进行联合细化。我们与专业交易员密切合作，收集“好”因素的经验特征，并提出有效的可视化设计，以说明金融因素、股票投资组合及其相互作用的集体表现。我们使用由 3000 只股票乘以 6000 天乘以 56 个因素组成的真实股票市场数据集，通过正式的用户研究、两个案例研究和专家访谈来评估 iQUANT。

AI.tldr: 本文提出iQUANT系统，通过结合算法模型推荐与专业交易员经验，实现金融因子筛选与投资组合优化的交互式量化投资方法。
AI.motivation: 传统因子选择方法（人工筛选或算法模型）未能有效融合人类专业知识与计算能力，导致难以精准捕捉超额收益因子。
AI.method: 联合专业交易员定义优质因子特征，设计可视化交互界面展示因子与股票组合的协同效应，并通过用户研究、案例分析和专家访谈验证系统有效性。
AI.result: 基于3000只股票×6000天×56因子的真实市场数据验证，iQUANT显著提升了因子筛选效率与投资组合收益表现。
AI.conclusion: iQUANT通过人机协同的交互式框架，有效解决了量化投资中因子选择与组合优化的痛点，为智能投顾提供了新范式。

authors_text: Sofia Yfantidou,Pavlos Sermpezis,Athena Vakali
title: 14 Years of Self-Tracking Technology for mHealth -- Literature Review: Lessons Learnt and the PAST SELF Framework
title_zh: 移动医疗自我追踪技术 14 年——文献综述：经验教训和过去的自我框架
abstract: In today's connected society, many people rely on mHealth and self-tracking (ST) technology to help them adopt healthier habits with a focus on breaking their sedentary lifestyle and staying fit. However, there is scarce evidence of such technological interventions' effectiveness, and there are no standardized methods to evaluate their impact on people's physical activity (PA) and health. This work aims to help ST practitioners and researchers by empowering them with systematic guidelines and a framework for designing and evaluating technological interventions to facilitate health behavior change (HBC) and user engagement (UE), focusing on increasing PA and decreasing sedentariness. To this end, we conduct a literature review of 129 papers between 2008 and 2022, which identifies the core ST HCI design methods and their efficacy, as well as the most comprehensive list to date of UE evaluation metrics for ST. Based on the review's findings, we propose PAST SELF, a framework to guide the design and evaluation of ST technology that has potential applications in industrial and scientific settings. Finally, to facilitate researchers and practitioners, we complement this paper with an open corpus and an online, adaptive exploration tool for the PAST SELF data.
summary: In today's connected society, many people rely on mHealth and self-tracking (ST) technology to help them adopt healthier habits with a focus on breaking their sedentary lifestyle and staying fit. However, there is scarce evidence of such technological interventions' effectiveness, and there are no standardized methods to evaluate their impact on people's physical activity (PA) and health. This work aims to help ST practitioners and researchers by empowering them with systematic guidelines and a framework for designing and evaluating technological interventions to facilitate health behavior change (HBC) and user engagement (UE), focusing on increasing PA and decreasing sedentariness. To this end, we conduct a literature review of 129 papers between 2008 and 2022, which identifies the core ST HCI design methods and their efficacy, as well as the most comprehensive list to date of UE evaluation metrics for ST. Based on the review's findings, we propose PAST SELF, a framework to guide the design and evaluation of ST technology that has potential applications in industrial and scientific settings. Finally, to facilitate researchers and practitioners, we complement this paper with an open corpus and an online, adaptive exploration tool for the PAST SELF data.
abstract_zh: 在当今的互联社会中，许多人依靠移动医疗和自我跟踪 (ST) 技术来帮助他们养成更健康的习惯，重点是打破久坐的生活方式并保持健康。然而，很少有证据表明此类技术干预措施的有效性，也没有标准化方法来评估其对人们身体活动（PA）和健康的影响。这项工作旨在帮助 ST 从业者和研究人员，为他们提供系统指南和框架，用于设计和评估技术干预措施，以促进健康行为改变 (HBC) 和用户参与 (UE)，重点是增加 PA 和减少久坐。为此，我们对2008年至2022年间的129篇论文进行了文献综述，确定了ST HCI的核心设计方法及其功效，以及迄今为止最全面的ST UE评估指标列表。根据审查结果，我们提出了 PAST SELF，这是一个指导 ST 技术设计和评估的框架，该技术在工业和科学环境中具有潜在应用。最后，为了方便研究人员和从业者，我们用开放语料库和针对过去自我数据的在线自适应探索工具来补充本文。

AI.tldr: 本文通过文献综述提出PAST SELF框架，为自追踪技术设计和评估提供系统指南，以促进健康行为改变和用户参与。
AI.motivation: 现有自追踪技术缺乏标准化评估方法，难以有效验证其对身体活动和健康的影响，需系统总结设计方法与评估指标。
AI.method: 回顾2008-2022年间129篇文献，分析核心人机交互设计方法及用户参与度评估指标，构建PAST SELF框架并开发配套工具。
AI.result: 提出PAST SELF框架，整合设计原则与评估指标，同时提供开放数据集和在线探索工具支持框架应用。
AI.conclusion: PAST SELF框架为自追踪技术开发提供标准化指导，有助于提升健康干预效果，工具资源可促进学术界与工业界实践应用。
