To this end, we conduct a literature review of 129 papers between 2008 and 2022, which identifies the core ST HCI design methods and their efficacy, as well as the most comprehensive list to date of UE evaluation metrics for ST. Based on the review's findings, we propose PAST SELF, a framework to guide the design and evaluation of ST technology that has potential applications in industrial and scientific settings. Finally, to facilitate researchers and practitioners, we complement this paper with an open corpus and an online, adaptive exploration tool for the PAST SELF data. 在当今的互联社会中，许多人依靠移动医疗和自我跟踪 (ST) 技术来帮助他们养成更健康的习惯，重点是打破久坐的生活方式并保持健康。然而，很少有证据表明此类技术干预措施的有效性，也没有标准化方法来评估其对人们身体活动（PA）和健康的影响。这项工作旨在帮助 ST 从业者和研究人员，为他们提供系统指南和框架，用于设计和评估技术干预措施，以促进健康行为改变 (HBC) 和用户参与 (UE)，重点是增加 PA 和减少久坐。为此，我们对2008年至2022年间的129篇论文进行了文献综述，确定了ST HCI的核心设计方法及其功效，以及迄今为止最全面的ST UE评估指标列表。根据审查结果，我们提出了 PAST SELF，这是一个指导 ST 技术设计和评估的框架，该技术在工业和科学环境中具有潜在应用。最后，为了方便研究人员和从业者，我们用开放语料库和针对过去自我数据的在线自适应探索工具来补充本文。 本文通过文献综述提出PAST SELF框架，为自追踪技术设计和评估提供系统指南，以促进健康行为改变和用户参与。 Sofia Yfantidou,Pavlos Sermpezis,Athena Vakali cs.HC,cs.CY

authors_text: Xinnan Ding,Kejun Wang,Chenhui Wang,Tianyi Lan,Liangliang Liu
title: Sequential convolutional network for behavioral pattern extraction in gait recognition
title_zh: 用于步态识别中行为模式提取的顺序卷积网络
abstract: As a unique and promising biometric, video-based gait recognition has broad applications. The key step of this methodology is to learn the walking pattern of individuals, which, however, often suffers challenges to extract the behavioral feature from a sequence directly. Most existing methods just focus on either the appearance or the motion pattern. To overcome these limitations, we propose a sequential convolutional network (SCN) from a novel perspective, where spatiotemporal features can be learned by a basic convolutional backbone. In SCN, behavioral information extractors (BIE) are constructed to comprehend intermediate feature maps in time series through motion templates where the relationship between frames can be analyzed, thereby distilling the information of the walking pattern. Furthermore, a multi-frame aggregator in SCN performs feature integration on a sequence whose length is uncertain, via a mobile 3D convolutional layer. To demonstrate the effectiveness, experiments have been conducted on two popular public benchmarks, CASIA-B and OU-MVLP, and our approach is demonstrated superior performance, comparing with the state-of-art methods.
summary: As a unique and promising biometric, video-based gait recognition has broad applications. The key step of this methodology is to learn the walking pattern of individuals, which, however, often suffers challenges to extract the behavioral feature from a sequence directly. Most existing methods just focus on either the appearance or the motion pattern. To overcome these limitations, we propose a sequential convolutional network (SCN) from a novel perspective, where spatiotemporal features can be learned by a basic convolutional backbone. In SCN, behavioral information extractors (BIE) are constructed to comprehend intermediate feature maps in time series through motion templates where the relationship between frames can be analyzed, thereby distilling the information of the walking pattern. Furthermore, a multi-frame aggregator in SCN performs feature integration on a sequence whose length is uncertain, via a mobile 3D convolutional layer. To demonstrate the effectiveness, experiments have been conducted on two popular public benchmarks, CASIA-B and OU-MVLP, and our approach is demonstrated superior performance, comparing with the state-of-art methods.
abstract_zh: 作为一种独特且有前景的生物识别技术，基于视频的步态识别具有广泛的应用。这种方法的关键步骤是学习个体的行走模式，然而，直接从序列中提取行为特征常常面临挑战。大多数现有方法只关注外观或运动模式。为了克服这些限制，我们从一个新颖的角度提出了一种顺序卷积网络（SCN），其中时空特征可以通过基本的卷积主干来学习。在SCN中，行为信息提取器（BIE）被构建为通过运动模板理解时间序列中的中间特征图，其中可以分析帧之间的关系，从而提炼步行模式的信息。此外，SCN 中的多帧聚合器通过移动 3D 卷积层对长度不确定的序列执行特征集成。为了证明其有效性，我们在两个流行的公共基准测试 CASIA-B 和 OU-MVLP 上进行了实验，与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法被证明具有优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于序列卷积网络（SCN）的步态识别方法，通过提取行为模式来提升视频步态识别的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅关注外观或运动模式，难以有效提取时序行为特征，导致步态识别效果受限。
AI.method: 设计包含行为信息提取器（BIE）和多帧聚合器的SCN网络，通过时序特征图分析与移动3D卷积实现不确定长度序列的特征整合。
AI.result: 在CASIA-B和OU-MVLP数据集上实验表明，该方法优于现有最先进算法。
AI.conclusion: SCN通过时空特征学习有效捕捉行走模式，为视频步态识别提供了新思路。

authors_text: Robin Karlsson,David Robert Wong,Kazunari Kawabata,Simon Thompson,Naoki Sakai
title: Probabilistic Rainfall Estimation from Automotive Lidar
title_zh: 汽车激光雷达的降雨概率估计
abstract: Robust sensing and perception in adverse weather conditions remain one of the biggest challenges for realizing reliable autonomous vehicle mobility services. Prior work has established that rainfall rate is a useful measure for the adversity of atmospheric weather conditions. This work presents a probabilistic hierarchical Bayesian model that infers rainfall rate from automotive lidar point cloud sequences with high accuracy and reliability. The model is a hierarchical mixture of experts model, or a probabilistic decision tree, with gating and expert nodes consisting of variational logistic and linear regression models. Experimental data used to train and evaluate the model is collected in a large-scale rainfall experiment facility from both stationary and moving vehicle platforms. The results show prediction accuracy comparable to the measurement resolution of a disdrometer, and the soundness and usefulness of the uncertainty estimation. The model achieves RMSE 2.42\,mm/h after filtering out uncertain predictions. The error is comparable to the mean rainfall rate change of 3.5\,mm/h between measurements. Model parameter studies show how predictive performance changes with tree depth, sampling duration, and crop box dimension. A second experiment demonstrates the predictability of higher rainfall above 300\,mm/h using a different lidar sensor, demonstrating sensor independence.
summary: Robust sensing and perception in adverse weather conditions remain one of the biggest challenges for realizing reliable autonomous vehicle mobility services. Prior work has established that rainfall rate is a useful measure for the adversity of atmospheric weather conditions. This work presents a probabilistic hierarchical Bayesian model that infers rainfall rate from automotive lidar point cloud sequences with high accuracy and reliability. The model is a hierarchical mixture of experts model, or a probabilistic decision tree, with gating and expert nodes consisting of variational logistic and linear regression models. Experimental data used to train and evaluate the model is collected in a large-scale rainfall experiment facility from both stationary and moving vehicle platforms. The results show prediction accuracy comparable to the measurement resolution of a disdrometer, and the soundness and usefulness of the uncertainty estimation. The model achieves RMSE 2.42\,mm/h after filtering out uncertain predictions. The error is comparable to the mean rainfall rate change of 3.5\,mm/h between measurements. Model parameter studies show how predictive performance changes with tree depth, sampling duration, and crop box dimension. A second experiment demonstrates the predictability of higher rainfall above 300\,mm/h using a different lidar sensor, demonstrating sensor independence.
abstract_zh: 恶劣天气条件下的鲁棒传感和感知仍然是实现可靠的自动驾驶汽车移动服务的最大挑战之一。先前的工作已经证实，降雨率是衡量恶劣大气天气条件的有用指标。这项工作提出了一种概率分层贝叶斯模型，可以从汽车激光雷达点云序列中推断降雨率，具有高精度和可靠性。该模型是专家模型的分层混合，或概率决策树，具有由变分逻辑和线性回归模型组成的门控和专家节点。用于训练和评估模型的实验数据是在大型降雨实验设施中从固定和移动车辆平台收集的。结果表明，预测精度与位移计的测量分辨率相当，并且不确定性估计的可靠性和有用性。过滤掉不确定的预测后，模型达到 RMSE 2.42\,mm/h。该误差与测量之间 3.5mm/h 的平均降雨率变化相当。模型参数研究显示预测性能如何随树深度、采样持续时间和作物框尺寸而变化。第二个实验证明了使用不同的激光雷达传感器可预测超过 300mm/h 的较高降雨量，从而证明了传感器的独立性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于汽车激光雷达点云序列的概率化分层贝叶斯模型，用于高精度估计降雨量。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶在恶劣天气下的感知能力不足，而降雨率是衡量天气恶劣程度的关键指标，现有方法难以准确获取。
AI.method: 构建分层混合专家模型（概率决策树），包含变分逻辑回归和线性回归的门控网络与专家节点，结合静态和移动平台的实验数据训练验证。
AI.result: 模型在过滤不确定预测后达到2.42 mm/h的RMSE，误差与雨量计测量变化量相当；参数实验显示模型性能随树深度、采样时长和裁剪框尺寸变化，且验证了传感器独立性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了与专业仪器相当的降雨估计精度，且具备不确定性量化能力，为自动驾驶在恶劣天气下的感知提供了新思路。

authors_text: Ruolin Ye,Wenqiang Xu,Zhendong Xue,Tutian Tang,Yanfeng Wang,Cewu Lu
title: H2O: A Benchmark for Visual Human-human Object Handover Analysis
title_zh: H2O：视觉人与人物体切换分析的基准
comment: ef:Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF International Conference on Computer Vision (ICCV) 2021
comments: ef:Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF International Conference on Computer Vision (ICCV) 2021
abstract: Object handover is a common human collaboration behavior that attracts attention from researchers in Robotics and Cognitive Science. Though visual perception plays an important role in the object handover task, the whole handover process has been specifically explored. In this work, we propose a novel rich-annotated dataset, H2O, for visual analysis of human-human object handovers. The H2O, which contains 18K video clips involving 15 people who hand over 30 objects to each other, is a multi-purpose benchmark. It can support several vision-based tasks, from which, we specifically provide a baseline method, RGPNet, for a less-explored task named Receiver Grasp Prediction. Extensive experiments show that the RGPNet can produce plausible grasps based on the giver's hand-object states in the pre-handover phase. Besides, we also report the hand and object pose errors with existing baselines and show that the dataset can serve as the video demonstrations for robot imitation learning on the handover task. Dataset, model and code will be made public.
summary: Object handover is a common human collaboration behavior that attracts attention from researchers in Robotics and Cognitive Science. Though visual perception plays an important role in the object handover task, the whole handover process has been specifically explored. In this work, we propose a novel rich-annotated dataset, H2O, for visual analysis of human-human object handovers. The H2O, which contains 18K video clips involving 15 people who hand over 30 objects to each other, is a multi-purpose benchmark. It can support several vision-based tasks, from which, we specifically provide a baseline method, RGPNet, for a less-explored task named Receiver Grasp Prediction. Extensive experiments show that the RGPNet can produce plausible grasps based on the giver's hand-object states in the pre-handover phase. Besides, we also report the hand and object pose errors with existing baselines and show that the dataset can serve as the video demonstrations for robot imitation learning on the handover task. Dataset, model and code will be made public.
abstract_zh: 对象切换是一种常见的人类协作行为，引起了机器人和认知科学领域研究人员的关注。尽管视觉感知在物体移交任务中起着重要作用，但整个移交过程已经被专门探索。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的注释丰富的数据集 H2O，用于人与人物体切换的视觉分析。 H2O 包含 18K 视频片段，涉及 15 个人互相交出 30 件物品，是一个多用途基准测试。它可以支持多种基于视觉的任务，从中，我们专门为一个名为“接收者抓取预测”的较少探索的任务提供了一种基线方法 RGPNet。大量实验表明，RGPNet 可以根据交接前阶段给予者的手部物体状态产生合理的抓握。此外，我们还报告了现有基线的手部和物体姿势误差，并表明该数据集可以作为机器人模仿学习交接任务的视频演示。数据集、模型和代码将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为H2O的新型标注数据集，用于分析人类间物体交接过程，并提供接收方抓取预测的基线方法RGPNet。
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉感知在物体交接任务中至关重要，但交接全过程的系统性研究不足，缺乏专门的数据集和基准方法。
AI.method: 构建包含18K视频片段的H2O数据集，涵盖15人互相传递30种物体的场景；设计RGPNet模型解决接收方抓取预测这一较少探索的任务。
AI.result: RGPNet能根据交接前手部-物体状态生成合理抓取姿势，实验显示该数据集可有效用于机器人模仿学习，并优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: H2O为人类协作行为分析和机器人学习提供了多功能基准，推动了物体交接任务的视觉研究进展。

search_text: H2O: A Benchmark for Visual Human-human Object Handover Analysis H2O：视觉人与人物体切换分析的基准 Object handover is a common human collaboration behavior that attracts attention from researchers in Robotics and Cognitive Science. Though visual perception plays an important role in the object handover task, the whole handover process has been specifically explored. In this work, we propose a novel rich-annotated dataset, H2O, for visual analysis of human-human object handovers. The H2O, which contains 18K video clips involving 15 people who hand over 30 objects to each other, is a multi-purpose benchmark. It can support several vision-based tasks, from which, we specifically provide a baseline method, RGPNet, for a less-explored task named Receiver Grasp Prediction. Extensive experiments show that the RGPNet can produce plausible grasps based on the giver's hand-object states in the pre-handover phase. Besides, we also report the hand and object pose errors with existing baselines and show that the dataset can serve as the video demonstrations for robot imitation learning on the handover task. Dataset, model and code will be made public. 对象切换是一种常见的人类协作行为，引起了机器人和认知科学领域研究人员的关注。尽管视觉感知在物体移交任务中起着重要作用，但整个移交过程已经被专门探索。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的注释丰富的数据集 H2O，用于人与人物体切换的视觉分析。 H2O 包含 18K 视频片段，涉及 15 个人互相交出 30 件物品，是一个多用途基准测试。它可以支持多种基于视觉的任务，从中，我们专门为一个名为“接收者抓取预测”的较少探索的任务提供了一种基线方法 RGPNet。大量实验表明，RGPNet 可以根据交接前阶段给予者的手部物体状态产生合理的抓握。此外，我们还报告了现有基线的手部和物体姿势误差，并表明该数据集可以作为机器人模仿学习交接任务的视频演示。数据集、模型和代码将公开。 本文提出一个名为H2O的新型标注数据集，用于分析人类间物体交接过程，并提供接收方抓取预测的基线方法RGPNet。 Ruolin Ye,Wenqiang Xu,Zhendong Xue,Tutian Tang,Yanfeng Wang,Cewu Lu cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Solene Evain,Ha Nguyen,Hang Le,Marcely Zanon Boito,Salima Mdhaffar,Sina Alisamir,Ziyi Tong,Natalia Tomashenko,Marco Dinarelli,Titouan Parcollet,Alexandre Allauzen,Yannick Esteve,Benjamin Lecouteux,Francois Portet,Solange Rossato,Fabien Ringeval,Didier Schwab,Laurent Besacier
title: LeBenchmark: A Reproducible Framework for Assessing Self-Supervised Representation Learning from Speech
title_zh: LeBenchmark：评估语音自监督表征学习的可重复框架
abstract: Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) using huge unlabeled data has been successfully explored for image and natural language processing. Recent works also investigated SSL from speech. They were notably successful to improve performance on downstream tasks such as automatic speech recognition (ASR). While these works suggest it is possible to reduce dependence on labeled data for building efficient speech systems, their evaluation was mostly made on ASR and using multiple and heterogeneous experimental settings (most of them for English). This questions the objective comparison of SSL approaches and the evaluation of their impact on building speech systems. In this paper, we propose LeBenchmark: a reproducible framework for assessing SSL from speech. It not only includes ASR (high and low resource) tasks but also spoken language understanding, speech translation and emotion recognition. We also focus on speech technologies in a language different than English: French. SSL models of different sizes are trained from carefully sourced and documented datasets. Experiments show that SSL is beneficial for most but not all tasks which confirms the need for exhaustive and reliable benchmarks to evaluate its real impact. LeBenchmark is shared with the scientific community for reproducible research in SSL from speech.
summary: Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) using huge unlabeled data has been successfully explored for image and natural language processing. Recent works also investigated SSL from speech. They were notably successful to improve performance on downstream tasks such as automatic speech recognition (ASR). While these works suggest it is possible to reduce dependence on labeled data for building efficient speech systems, their evaluation was mostly made on ASR and using multiple and heterogeneous experimental settings (most of them for English). This questions the objective comparison of SSL approaches and the evaluation of their impact on building speech systems. In this paper, we propose LeBenchmark: a reproducible framework for assessing SSL from speech. It not only includes ASR (high and low resource) tasks but also spoken language understanding, speech translation and emotion recognition. We also focus on speech technologies in a language different than English: French. SSL models of different sizes are trained from carefully sourced and documented datasets. Experiments show that SSL is beneficial for most but not all tasks which confirms the need for exhaustive and reliable benchmarks to evaluate its real impact. LeBenchmark is shared with the scientific community for reproducible research in SSL from speech.
abstract_zh: 使用大量未标记数据的自监督学习（SSL）已成功探索用于图像和自然语言处理。最近的工作还研究了语音中的 SSL。他们在提高自动语音识别 (ASR) 等下游任务的性能方面取得了显着的成功。虽然这些工作表明可以减少对标记数据的依赖来构建高效的语音系统，但他们的评估主要是在 ASR 上进行的，并使用多种异构实验设置（其中大多数是英语）。这对 SSL 方法的客观比较及其对构建语音系统的影响的评估提出了质疑。在本文中，我们提出了 LeBenchmark：一种用于评估语音 SSL 的可重复框架。它不仅包括ASR（高资源和低资源）任务，还包括口语理解、语音翻译和情感识别。我们还专注于与英语不同的语言：法语的语音技术。不同大小的 SSL 模型是根据仔细来源和记录的数据集进行训练的。实验表明，SSL 对大多数但不是所有任务都有好处，这证实需要详尽且可靠的基准来评估其真正影响。 LeBenchmark 与科学界共享，用于通过语音对 SSL 进行可重复的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LeBenchmark框架，用于评估语音自监督学习（SSL）在多种任务和语言中的表现，促进可复现研究。
AI.motivation: 现有SSL评估主要集中在英语ASR任务且实验设置不统一，难以客观比较不同方法及评估其对语音系统构建的全面影响。
AI.method: 构建包含ASR（高低资源）、口语理解、语音翻译、情感识别的多任务基准，支持法语等非英语语言，使用不同规模SSL模型与精心标注的数据集进行实验。
AI.result: SSL在多数任务中表现有效，但并非所有任务均受益，验证了建立全面可靠基准以评估SSL实际影响的必要性。
AI.conclusion: LeBenchmark为语音SSL研究提供可复现框架，推动跨任务和语言的系统性评估，强调多维度基准测试的重要性。

authors_text: Cheng Luo,Dayiheng Liu,Chanjuan Li,Li Lu,Jiancheng Lv
title: Prediction, Selection, and Generation: Exploration of Knowledge-Driven Conversation System
title_zh: 预测、选择和生成：知识驱动的对话系统探索
abstract: In open-domain conversational systems, it is important but challenging to leverage background knowledge. We can use the incorporation of knowledge to make the generation of dialogue controllable, and can generate more diverse sentences that contain real knowledge. In this paper, we combine the knowledge bases and pre-training model to propose a knowledge-driven conversation system. The system includes modules such as dialogue topic prediction, knowledge matching and dialogue generation. Based on this system, we study the performance factors that maybe affect the generation of knowledge-driven dialogue: topic coarse recall algorithm, number of knowledge choices, generation model choices, etc., and finally made the system reach state-of-the-art. These experimental results will provide some guiding significance for the future research of this task. As far as we know, this is the first work to study and analyze the effects of the related factors.
summary: In open-domain conversational systems, it is important but challenging to leverage background knowledge. We can use the incorporation of knowledge to make the generation of dialogue controllable, and can generate more diverse sentences that contain real knowledge. In this paper, we combine the knowledge bases and pre-training model to propose a knowledge-driven conversation system. The system includes modules such as dialogue topic prediction, knowledge matching and dialogue generation. Based on this system, we study the performance factors that maybe affect the generation of knowledge-driven dialogue: topic coarse recall algorithm, number of knowledge choices, generation model choices, etc., and finally made the system reach state-of-the-art. These experimental results will provide some guiding significance for the future research of this task. As far as we know, this is the first work to study and analyze the effects of the related factors.
abstract_zh: 在开放域对话系统中，利用背景知识很重要但具有挑战性。我们可以利用知识的融入，让对话的生成变得可控，并且可以生成更加多样化的包含真实知识的句子。在本文中，我们结合知识库和预训练模型提出了知识驱动的对话系统。该系统包括对话主题预测、知识匹配、对话生成等模块。基于该系统，我们研究了可能影响知识驱动对话生成的性能因素：主题粗回忆算法、知识选择数量、生成模型选择等，最终使系统达到state-of-the-art。这些实验结果将为该任务的后续研究提供一定的指导意义。据我们所知，这是第一个研究和分析相关因素影响的工作。

AI.tldr: 构建一个结合知识库与预训练模型的知识驱动对话系统，实现可控且多样化的对话生成。
AI.motivation: 开放域对话系统中有效利用背景知识以提升生成质量与多样性存在挑战，需探索知识驱动的方法。
AI.method: 整合知识库与预训练模型，设计包含主题预测、知识匹配及对话生成的系统，并分析主题召回算法、知识选择数量等因素对生成效果的影响。
AI.result: 系统达到最先进水平，实验结果为未来研究提供指导，且首次系统分析相关因素对知识驱动对话生成的影响。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为知识驱动对话系统的优化提供了理论支持与实践方案，明确了关键因素对生成效果的影响。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 本研究为知识驱动对话系统的优化提供了理论支持与实践方案，明确了关键因素对生成效果的影响。

tldr: 构建一个结合知识库与预训练模型的知识驱动对话系统，实现可控且多样化的对话生成。
motivation: 开放域对话系统中有效利用背景知识以提升生成质量与多样性存在挑战，需探索知识驱动的方法。
method: 整合知识库与预训练模型，设计包含主题预测、知识匹配及对话生成的系统，并分析主题召回算法、知识选择数量等因素对生成效果的影响。
result: 系统达到最先进水平，实验结果为未来研究提供指导，且首次系统分析相关因素对知识驱动对话生成的影响。
conclusion: 本研究为知识驱动对话系统的优化提供了理论支持与实践方案，明确了关键因素对生成效果的影响。
search_text: Prediction, Selection, and Generation: Exploration of Knowledge-Driven Conversation System 预测、选择和生成：知识驱动的对话系统探索 In open-domain conversational systems, it is important but challenging to leverage background knowledge. We can use the incorporation of knowledge to make the generation of dialogue controllable, and can generate more diverse sentences that contain real knowledge. In this paper, we combine the knowledge bases and pre-training model to propose a knowledge-driven conversation system. The system includes modules such as dialogue topic prediction, knowledge matching and dialogue generation. Based on this system, we study the performance factors that maybe affect the generation of knowledge-driven dialogue: topic coarse recall algorithm, number of knowledge choices, generation model choices, etc., and finally made the system reach state-of-the-art. These experimental results will provide some guiding significance for the future research of this task. As far as we know, this is the first work to study and analyze the effects of the related factors. 在开放域对话系统中，利用背景知识很重要但具有挑战性。我们可以利用知识的融入，让对话的生成变得可控，并且可以生成更加多样化的包含真实知识的句子。在本文中，我们结合知识库和预训练模型提出了知识驱动的对话系统。该系统包括对话主题预测、知识匹配、对话生成等模块。基于该系统，我们研究了可能影响知识驱动对话生成的性能因素：主题粗回忆算法、知识选择数量、生成模型选择等，最终使系统达到state-of-the-art。这些实验结果将为该任务的后续研究提供一定的指导意义。据我们所知，这是第一个研究和分析相关因素影响的工作。 构建一个结合知识库与预训练模型的知识驱动对话系统，实现可控且多样化的对话生成。 Cheng Luo,Dayiheng Liu,Chanjuan Li,Li Lu,Jiancheng Lv cs.AI

authors_text: Xin Chen,Anqi Pang,Wei Yang,Yuexin Ma,Lan Xu,Jingyi Yu
title: SportsCap: Monocular 3D Human Motion Capture and Fine-grained Understanding in Challenging Sports Videos
title_zh: SportsCap：单目 3D 人体动作捕捉和对挑战性体育视频的细粒度理解
abstract: Markerless motion capture and understanding of professional non-daily human movements is an important yet unsolved task, which suffers from complex motion patterns and severe self-occlusion, especially for the monocular setting. In this paper, we propose SportsCap -- the first approach for simultaneously capturing 3D human motions and understanding fine-grained actions from monocular challenging sports video input. Our approach utilizes the semantic and temporally structured sub-motion prior in the embedding space for motion capture and understanding in a data-driven multi-task manner. To enable robust capture under complex motion patterns, we propose an effective motion embedding module to recover both the implicit motion embedding and explicit 3D motion details via a corresponding mapping function as well as a sub-motion classifier. Based on such hybrid motion information, we introduce a multi-stream spatial-temporal Graph Convolutional Network(ST-GCN) to predict the fine-grained semantic action attributes, and adopt a semantic attribute mapping block to assemble various correlated action attributes into a high-level action label for the overall detailed understanding of the whole sequence, so as to enable various applications like action assessment or motion scoring. Comprehensive experiments on both public and our proposed datasets show that with a challenging monocular sports video input, our novel approach not only significantly improves the accuracy of 3D human motion capture, but also recovers accurate fine-grained semantic action attributes.
summary: Markerless motion capture and understanding of professional non-daily human movements is an important yet unsolved task, which suffers from complex motion patterns and severe self-occlusion, especially for the monocular setting. In this paper, we propose SportsCap -- the first approach for simultaneously capturing 3D human motions and understanding fine-grained actions from monocular challenging sports video input. Our approach utilizes the semantic and temporally structured sub-motion prior in the embedding space for motion capture and understanding in a data-driven multi-task manner. To enable robust capture under complex motion patterns, we propose an effective motion embedding module to recover both the implicit motion embedding and explicit 3D motion details via a corresponding mapping function as well as a sub-motion classifier. Based on such hybrid motion information, we introduce a multi-stream spatial-temporal Graph Convolutional Network(ST-GCN) to predict the fine-grained semantic action attributes, and adopt a semantic attribute mapping block to assemble various correlated action attributes into a high-level action label for the overall detailed understanding of the whole sequence, so as to enable various applications like action assessment or motion scoring. Comprehensive experiments on both public and our proposed datasets show that with a challenging monocular sports video input, our novel approach not only significantly improves the accuracy of 3D human motion capture, but also recovers accurate fine-grained semantic action attributes.
abstract_zh: 无标记运动捕捉和对专业非日常人体运动的理解是一项重要但尚未解决的任务，它面临复杂的运动模式和严重的自遮挡，特别是对于单眼环境。在本文中，我们提出了 SportsCap——第一种同时捕获 3D 人体运动并理解单眼挑战性运动视频输入的细粒度动作的方法。我们的方法利用嵌入空间中的语义和时间结构的子运动先验，以数据驱动的多任务方式进行运动捕捉和理解。为了实现复杂运动模式下的鲁棒捕获，我们提出了一种有效的运动嵌入模块，通过相应的映射函数和子运动分类器来恢复隐式运动嵌入和显式 3D 运动细节。基于这种混合运动信息，我们引入多流时空图卷积网络（ST-GCN）来预测细粒度的语义动作属性，并采用语义属性映射块将各种相关的动作属性组装成高级动作标签，以实现对整个序列的整体详细理解，从而实现动作评估或动作评分等各种应用。对公共数据集和我们提出的数据集的综合实验表明，通过具有挑战性的单目运动视频输入，我们的新颖方法不仅显着提高了 3D 人体动作捕捉的准确性，而且还恢复了准确的细粒度语义动作属性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SportsCap方法，用于从单目挑战性体育视频中同时捕捉3D人体运动并理解细粒度动作。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理单目设置下复杂运动模式和严重自遮挡的体育视频中的人体运动捕捉与理解问题。
AI.method: 利用语义和时序结构子运动先验，设计运动嵌入模块和多流时空图卷积网络（ST-GCN），结合语义属性映射块实现运动捕捉与细粒度动作理解。
AI.result: 在公开数据集和自建数据集上验证，显著提升单目体育视频的3D运动捕捉精度及细粒度动作属性恢复能力。
AI.conclusion: SportsCap有效解决了单目体育视频中复杂运动的3D捕捉与细粒度理解问题，可应用于动作评估等场景。

authors_text: Lucio Flavio Campanile,Stephanie Kirmse,Alexander Hasse
title: Accuracy and precision: a new view on kinematic assessment of solid-state hinges and compliant mechanisms
title_zh: 准确度和精密度：固态铰链和柔顺机构运动学评估的新观点
abstract: Compliant mechanisms are alternatives to conventional mechanisms which exploit elastic strain to produce desired deformations instead of using moveable parts. They are designed for a kinematic task (providing desired deformations) but do not possess a kinematics in the strict sense. This leads to difficulties while assessing the quality of a compliant mechanism's design. The kinematics of a compliant mechanism can be seen as a fuzzy property. There is no unique kinematics, since every deformation need a particular force system to act; however, certain deformations are easier to obtain than others. A parallel can be made with measurement theory: the measured value of a quantity is not unique, but exists as statistic distribution of measures. A representative measure of this distribution can be chosen to evaluate how far the measures divert from a reference value. Based on this analogy, the concept of accuracy and precision of compliant systems are introduced and discussed in this paper. A quantitative determination of these qualities based on the eigenvalue analysis of the hinge's stiffness is proposed. This new approach is capable of removing most of the ambiguities included in the state-of-the-art assessment criteria (usually based on the concepts of path deviation and parasitic motion).
summary: Compliant mechanisms are alternatives to conventional mechanisms which exploit elastic strain to produce desired deformations instead of using moveable parts. They are designed for a kinematic task (providing desired deformations) but do not possess a kinematics in the strict sense. This leads to difficulties while assessing the quality of a compliant mechanism's design. The kinematics of a compliant mechanism can be seen as a fuzzy property. There is no unique kinematics, since every deformation need a particular force system to act; however, certain deformations are easier to obtain than others. A parallel can be made with measurement theory: the measured value of a quantity is not unique, but exists as statistic distribution of measures. A representative measure of this distribution can be chosen to evaluate how far the measures divert from a reference value. Based on this analogy, the concept of accuracy and precision of compliant systems are introduced and discussed in this paper. A quantitative determination of these qualities based on the eigenvalue analysis of the hinge's stiffness is proposed. This new approach is capable of removing most of the ambiguities included in the state-of-the-art assessment criteria (usually based on the concepts of path deviation and parasitic motion).
abstract_zh: 柔性机构是传统机构的替代品，传统机构利用弹性应变来产生所需的变形，而不是使用可移动部件。它们是为运动学任务（提供所需的变形）而设计的，但不具备严格意义上的运动学。这会导致评估顺从机制设计质量时遇到困难。柔顺机构的运动学可以被视为模糊属性。没有独特的运动学，因为每次变形都需要特定的力系统来起作用；然而，某些变形比其他变形更容易获得。可以与测量理论进行类比：一个量的测量值不是唯一的，而是作为测量的统计分布而存在。可以选择该分布的代表性度量来评估度量偏离参考值的程度。基于这个类比，本文介绍并讨论了顺应系统的准确度和精密度的概念。提出了基于铰链刚度特征值分析的这些质量的定量确定。这种新方法能够消除最先进的评估标准中包含的大部分含糊之处（通常基于路径偏差和寄生运动的概念）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于刚度特征值分析的新型评估方法，用于量化柔性铰链和顺应性机构的运动精度和精度。
AI.motivation: 传统评估方法（如路径偏差和寄生运动）存在模糊性，难以准确表征顺应性机构的运动特性。需借鉴测量理论中的统计分布概念，建立更清晰的评估框架。
AI.method: 通过分析柔性铰链刚度矩阵的特征值，建立精度和精度的量化指标，利用统计分布的代表性参数替代传统评估标准。
AI.result: 该方法有效消除了现有评估准则中的大部分模糊性，实现了对顺应性系统运动性能的精确量化评估。
AI.conclusion: 基于特征值分析的精度-精度评估框架为顺应性机构的设计优化提供了更清晰、可量化的理论依据。

A quantitative determination of these qualities based on the eigenvalue analysis of the hinge's stiffness is proposed. This new approach is capable of removing most of the ambiguities included in the state-of-the-art assessment criteria (usually based on the concepts of path deviation and parasitic motion). 柔性机构是传统机构的替代品，传统机构利用弹性应变来产生所需的变形，而不是使用可移动部件。它们是为运动学任务（提供所需的变形）而设计的，但不具备严格意义上的运动学。这会导致评估顺从机制设计质量时遇到困难。柔顺机构的运动学可以被视为模糊属性。没有独特的运动学，因为每次变形都需要特定的力系统来起作用；然而，某些变形比其他变形更容易获得。可以与测量理论进行类比：一个量的测量值不是唯一的，而是作为测量的统计分布而存在。可以选择该分布的代表性度量来评估度量偏离参考值的程度。基于这个类比，本文介绍并讨论了顺应系统的准确度和精密度的概念。提出了基于铰链刚度特征值分析的这些质量的定量确定。这种新方法能够消除最先进的评估标准中包含的大部分含糊之处（通常基于路径偏差和寄生运动的概念）。 本文提出了一种基于刚度特征值分析的新型评估方法，用于量化柔性铰链和顺应性机构的运动精度和精度。 Lucio Flavio Campanile,Stephanie Kirmse,Alexander Hasse cs.RO

authors_text: Ziyuan Liu,Wei Liu,Yuzhe Qin,Fanbo Xiang,Minghao Gou,Songyan Xin,Maximo A. Roa,Berk Calli,Hao Su,Yu Sun,Ping Tan
title: OCRTOC: A Cloud-Based Competition and Benchmark for Robotic Grasping and Manipulation
title_zh: OCRTOC：基于云的机器人抓取和操作竞赛和基准
abstract: In this paper, we propose a cloud-based benchmark for robotic grasping and manipulation, called the OCRTOC benchmark. The benchmark focuses on the object rearrangement problem, specifically table organization tasks. We provide a set of identical real robot setups and facilitate remote experiments of standardized table organization scenarios in varying difficulties. In this workflow, users upload their solutions to our remote server and their code is executed on the real robot setups and scored automatically. After each execution, the OCRTOC team resets the experimental setup manually. We also provide a simulation environment that researchers can use to develop and test their solutions. With the OCRTOC benchmark, we aim to lower the barrier of conducting reproducible research on robotic grasping and manipulation and accelerate progress in this field. Executing standardized scenarios on identical real robot setups allows us to quantify algorithm performances and achieve fair comparisons. Using this benchmark we held a competition in the 2020 International Conference on Intelligence Robots and Systems (IROS 2020). In total, 59 teams took part in this competition worldwide. We present the results and our observations of the 2020 competition, and discuss our adjustments and improvements for the upcoming OCRTOC 2021 competition. The homepage of the OCRTOC competition is www.ocrtoc.org, and the OCRTOC software package is available at https://github.com/OCRTOC/OCRTOC_software_package.
summary: In this paper, we propose a cloud-based benchmark for robotic grasping and manipulation, called the OCRTOC benchmark. The benchmark focuses on the object rearrangement problem, specifically table organization tasks. We provide a set of identical real robot setups and facilitate remote experiments of standardized table organization scenarios in varying difficulties. In this workflow, users upload their solutions to our remote server and their code is executed on the real robot setups and scored automatically. After each execution, the OCRTOC team resets the experimental setup manually. We also provide a simulation environment that researchers can use to develop and test their solutions. With the OCRTOC benchmark, we aim to lower the barrier of conducting reproducible research on robotic grasping and manipulation and accelerate progress in this field. Executing standardized scenarios on identical real robot setups allows us to quantify algorithm performances and achieve fair comparisons. Using this benchmark we held a competition in the 2020 International Conference on Intelligence Robots and Systems (IROS 2020). In total, 59 teams took part in this competition worldwide. We present the results and our observations of the 2020 competition, and discuss our adjustments and improvements for the upcoming OCRTOC 2021 competition. The homepage of the OCRTOC competition is www.ocrtoc.org, and the OCRTOC software package is available at https://github.com/OCRTOC/OCRTOC_software_package.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一个基于云的机器人抓取和操作基准，称为 OCRTOC 基准。该基准测试重点关注对象重新排列问题，特别是表组织任务。我们提供一组相同的真实机器人设置，并促进在不同难度下标准化桌子组织场景的远程实验。在此工作流程中，用户将他们的解决方案上传到我们的远程服务器，他们的代码在真实的机器人设置上执行并自动评分。每次执行后，OCRTOC 团队都会手动重置实验设置。我们还提供了一个模拟环境，研究人员可以使用它来开发和测试他们的解决方案。通过 OCRTOC 基准，我们的目标是降低对机器人抓取和操作进行可重复研究的障碍，并加速该领域的进展。在相同的真实机器人设置上执行标准化场景使我们能够量化算法性能并实现公平比较。我们利用这个基准在 2020 年智能机器人与系统国际会议（IROS 2020）上举办了一场竞赛。全球共有 59 支队伍参加了本次比赛。我们展示了 2020 年比赛的结果和我们的观察，并讨论了我们对即将到来的 OCRTOC 2021 比赛的调整和改进。 OCRTOC竞赛主页为www.ocrtoc.org，OCRTOC软件包位于https://github.com/OCRTOC/OCRTOC_software_package。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于云的机器人抓取与操作竞赛和基准测试平台OCRTOC，专注于物体重新排列任务，提供标准化的真实机器人环境和模拟环境以促进可重复研究。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人抓取与操作研究缺乏标准化测试环境，导致算法性能难以公平比较，OCRTOC旨在降低研究门槛并推动领域进展。
AI.method: 通过云端统一真实机器人设备，用户远程提交代码并自动执行测试，系统自动评分并手动重置环境；同时提供模拟环境用于开发，标准化任务场景以量化算法性能。
AI.result: 2020年IROS竞赛吸引全球59支队伍参与，展示竞赛结果并提出2021年改进方案，平台及软件包已开源。
AI.conclusion: OCRTOC通过标准化真实机器人测试环境有效推动了机器人抓取与操作算法的可重复研究，竞赛验证了其可行性并为后续优化奠定基础。

authors_text: Zehui Liao,Yutong Xie,Shishuai Hu,Yong Xia
title: Learning from Ambiguous Labels for Lung Nodule Malignancy Prediction
title_zh: 从模糊标签中学习以预测肺结节恶性肿瘤
abstract: Lung nodule malignancy prediction is an essential step in the early diagnosis of lung cancer. Besides the difficulties commonly discussed, the challenges of this task also come from the ambiguous labels provided by annotators, since deep learning models may learn, even amplify, the bias embedded in them. In this paper, we propose a multi-view "divide-and-rule" (MV-DAR) model to learn from both reliable and ambiguous annotations for lung nodule malignancy prediction. According to the consistency and reliability of their annotations, we divide nodules into three sets: a consistent and reliable set (CR-Set), an inconsistent set (IC-Set), and a low reliable set (LR-Set). The nodule in IC-Set is annotated by multiple radiologists inconsistently, and the nodule in LR-Set is annotated by only one radiologist. The proposed MV-DAR contains three DAR submodels to characterize a lung nodule from three orthographic views. Each DAR consists of a prediction network (Prd-Net), a counterfactual network (CF-Net), and a low reliable network (LR-Net), learning on CR-Set, IC-Set, and LR-Set, respectively. The image representation ability learned by CF-Net and LR-Net is then transferred to Prd-Net by negative-attention module (NA-Module) and consistent-attention module (CA-Module), aiming to boost the prediction ability of Prd-Net. The MV-DAR model has been evaluated on the LIDC-IDRI dataset and LUNGx dataset. Our results indicate not only the effectiveness of the proposed MV-DAR model in learning from ambiguous labels but also its superiority over present noisy label-learning models in lung nodule malignancy prediction.
summary: Lung nodule malignancy prediction is an essential step in the early diagnosis of lung cancer. Besides the difficulties commonly discussed, the challenges of this task also come from the ambiguous labels provided by annotators, since deep learning models may learn, even amplify, the bias embedded in them. In this paper, we propose a multi-view "divide-and-rule" (MV-DAR) model to learn from both reliable and ambiguous annotations for lung nodule malignancy prediction. According to the consistency and reliability of their annotations, we divide nodules into three sets: a consistent and reliable set (CR-Set), an inconsistent set (IC-Set), and a low reliable set (LR-Set). The nodule in IC-Set is annotated by multiple radiologists inconsistently, and the nodule in LR-Set is annotated by only one radiologist. The proposed MV-DAR contains three DAR submodels to characterize a lung nodule from three orthographic views. Each DAR consists of a prediction network (Prd-Net), a counterfactual network (CF-Net), and a low reliable network (LR-Net), learning on CR-Set, IC-Set, and LR-Set, respectively. The image representation ability learned by CF-Net and LR-Net is then transferred to Prd-Net by negative-attention module (NA-Module) and consistent-attention module (CA-Module), aiming to boost the prediction ability of Prd-Net. The MV-DAR model has been evaluated on the LIDC-IDRI dataset and LUNGx dataset. Our results indicate not only the effectiveness of the proposed MV-DAR model in learning from ambiguous labels but also its superiority over present noisy label-learning models in lung nodule malignancy prediction.
abstract_zh: 肺结节恶性程度预测是肺癌早期诊断的重要一步。除了通常讨论的困难之外，这项任务的挑战还来自注释者提供的模糊标签，因为深度学习模型可能会学习甚至放大其中嵌入的偏见。在本文中，我们提出了一种多视图“分而治之”（MV-DAR）模型，以从可靠和模糊的注释中学习来预测肺结节恶性肿瘤。根据其注释的一致性和可靠性，我们将结节分为三个集合：一致可靠集（CR-Set）、不一致集（IC-Set）和低可靠集（LR-Set）。 IC-Set 中的结节由多名放射科医生不一致地注释，而 LR-Set 中的结节仅由一名放射科医生注释。所提出的 MV-DAR 包含三个 DAR 子模型，用于从三个正交视图表征肺结节。每个 DAR 由一个预测网络（Prd-Net）、一个反事实网络（CF-Net）和一个低可靠网络（LR-Net）组成，分别在 CR-Set、IC-Set 和 LR-Set 上学习。然后将 CF-Net 和 LR-Net 学习到的图像表示能力通过负注意力模块（NA-Module）和一致注意力模块（CA-Module）转移到 Prd-Net，旨在提高 Prd-Net 的预测能力。 MV-DAR 模型已在 LIDC-IDRI 数据集和 LUNGx 数据集上进行了评估。我们的结果不仅表明所提出的 MV-DAR 模型在学习模糊标签方面的有效性，而且还表明其在肺结节恶性肿瘤预测方面优于现有的噪声标签学习模型。

AI.tldr: 提出一种多视图'分而治之'模型，从模糊标签中学习以提高肺结节恶性预测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型可能放大标注中的模糊标签偏差，而肺结节恶性预测面临标注不一致和可靠性低的挑战。
AI.method: 设计MV-DAR模型，将结节分为三类标注集，通过三个子模型（含预测/反事实/低可靠网络）结合注意力模块实现知识迁移。
AI.result: 在LIDC-IDRI和LUNGx数据集上验证，证明模型能有效处理模糊标签且优于现有噪声标签学习方法。
AI.conclusion: MV-DAR模型通过结构化处理模糊标注，在肺结节恶性预测任务中展现出显著优势。

The MV-DAR model has been evaluated on the LIDC-IDRI dataset and LUNGx dataset. Our results indicate not only the effectiveness of the proposed MV-DAR model in learning from ambiguous labels but also its superiority over present noisy label-learning models in lung nodule malignancy prediction. 肺结节恶性程度预测是肺癌早期诊断的重要一步。除了通常讨论的困难之外，这项任务的挑战还来自注释者提供的模糊标签，因为深度学习模型可能会学习甚至放大其中嵌入的偏见。在本文中，我们提出了一种多视图“分而治之”（MV-DAR）模型，以从可靠和模糊的注释中学习来预测肺结节恶性肿瘤。根据其注释的一致性和可靠性，我们将结节分为三个集合：一致可靠集（CR-Set）、不一致集（IC-Set）和低可靠集（LR-Set）。 IC-Set 中的结节由多名放射科医生不一致地注释，而 LR-Set 中的结节仅由一名放射科医生注释。所提出的 MV-DAR 包含三个 DAR 子模型，用于从三个正交视图表征肺结节。每个 DAR 由一个预测网络（Prd-Net）、一个反事实网络（CF-Net）和一个低可靠网络（LR-Net）组成，分别在 CR-Set、IC-Set 和 LR-Set 上学习。然后将 CF-Net 和 LR-Net 学习到的图像表示能力通过负注意力模块（NA-Module）和一致注意力模块（CA-Module）转移到 Prd-Net，旨在提高 Prd-Net 的预测能力。 MV-DAR 模型已在 LIDC-IDRI 数据集和 LUNGx 数据集上进行了评估。我们的结果不仅表明所提出的 MV-DAR 模型在学习模糊标签方面的有效性，而且还表明其在肺结节恶性肿瘤预测方面优于现有的噪声标签学习模型。 提出一种多视图'分而治之'模型，从模糊标签中学习以提高肺结节恶性预测的准确性。 Zehui Liao,Yutong Xie,Shishuai Hu,Yong Xia eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Beomyoung Kim,Janghyeon Lee,Sihaeng Lee,Doyeon Kim,Junmo Kim
title: TricubeNet: 2D Kernel-Based Object Representation for Weakly-Occluded Oriented Object Detection
title_zh: TricubeNet：用于弱遮挡定向对象检测的基于 2D 内核的对象表示
abstract: We present a novel approach for oriented object detection, named TricubeNet, which localizes oriented objects using visual cues ($i.e.,$ heatmap) instead of oriented box offsets regression. We represent each object as a 2D Tricube kernel and extract bounding boxes using simple image-processing algorithms. Our approach is able to (1) obtain well-arranged boxes from visual cues, (2) solve the angle discontinuity problem, and (3) can save computational complexity due to our anchor-free modeling. To further boost the performance, we propose some effective techniques for size-invariant loss, reducing false detections, extracting rotation-invariant features, and heatmap refinement. To demonstrate the effectiveness of our TricubeNet, we experiment on various tasks for weakly-occluded oriented object detection: detection in an aerial image, densely packed object image, and text image. The extensive experimental results show that our TricubeNet is quite effective for oriented object detection. Code is available at https://github.com/qjadud1994/TricubeNet.
summary: We present a novel approach for oriented object detection, named TricubeNet, which localizes oriented objects using visual cues ($i.e.,$ heatmap) instead of oriented box offsets regression. We represent each object as a 2D Tricube kernel and extract bounding boxes using simple image-processing algorithms. Our approach is able to (1) obtain well-arranged boxes from visual cues, (2) solve the angle discontinuity problem, and (3) can save computational complexity due to our anchor-free modeling. To further boost the performance, we propose some effective techniques for size-invariant loss, reducing false detections, extracting rotation-invariant features, and heatmap refinement. To demonstrate the effectiveness of our TricubeNet, we experiment on various tasks for weakly-occluded oriented object detection: detection in an aerial image, densely packed object image, and text image. The extensive experimental results show that our TricubeNet is quite effective for oriented object detection. Code is available at https://github.com/qjadud1994/TricubeNet.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种名为 TricubeNet 的定向对象检测新方法，它使用视觉提示（即 $ 热图）而不是定向框偏移回归来定位定向对象。我们将每个对象表示为 2D Tricube 内核，并使用简单的图像处理算法提取边界框。我们的方法能够（1）从视觉线索中获得排列良好的框，（2）解决角度不连续问题，（3）由于我们的无锚建模，可以节省计算复杂性。为了进一步提高性能，我们提出了一些有效的技术来实现尺寸不变损失、减少错误检测、提取旋转不变特征和热图细化。为了证明 TricubeNet 的有效性，我们对弱遮挡定向对象检测的各种任务进行了实验：航空图像、密集对象图像和文本图像中的检测。大量的实验结果表明，我们的 TricubeNet 对于定向目标检测非常有效。代码可在 https://github.com/qjadud1994/TricubeNet 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TricubeNet的新方法，用于弱遮挡定向目标检测，通过视觉线索（热图）定位目标，而非传统框偏移回归。
AI.motivation: 传统定向目标检测方法存在角度不连续性问题且计算复杂度高，需设计更高效且鲁棒的检测框架以应对弱遮挡场景。
AI.method: 将每个目标表示为2D Tricube核，利用图像处理算法提取边界框；采用无锚点建模，结合尺寸不变损失、旋转不变特征提取及热图优化技术。
AI.result: 在航拍图像、密集物体图像和文本图像任务中验证了TricubeNet的有效性，实验结果表明其在弱遮挡场景下表现优异。
AI.conclusion: TricubeNet通过视觉线索和无锚点建模有效解决了定向检测中的角度不连续性问题，为弱遮挡场景提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Daniele Gammelli,Kaidi Yang,James Harrison,Filipe Rodrigues,Francisco C. Pereira,Marco Pavone
title: Graph Neural Network Reinforcement Learning for Autonomous Mobility-on-Demand Systems
title_zh: 用于自主按需移动系统的图神经网络强化学习
abstract: Autonomous mobility-on-demand (AMoD) systems represent a rapidly developing mode of transportation wherein travel requests are dynamically handled by a coordinated fleet of robotic, self-driving vehicles. Given a graph representation of the transportation network - one where, for example, nodes represent areas of the city, and edges the connectivity between them - we argue that the AMoD control problem is naturally cast as a node-wise decision-making problem. In this paper, we propose a deep reinforcement learning framework to control the rebalancing of AMoD systems through graph neural networks. Crucially, we demonstrate that graph neural networks enable reinforcement learning agents to recover behavior policies that are significantly more transferable, generalizable, and scalable than policies learned through other approaches. Empirically, we show how the learned policies exhibit promising zero-shot transfer capabilities when faced with critical portability tasks such as inter-city generalization, service area expansion, and adaptation to potentially complex urban topologies.
summary: Autonomous mobility-on-demand (AMoD) systems represent a rapidly developing mode of transportation wherein travel requests are dynamically handled by a coordinated fleet of robotic, self-driving vehicles. Given a graph representation of the transportation network - one where, for example, nodes represent areas of the city, and edges the connectivity between them - we argue that the AMoD control problem is naturally cast as a node-wise decision-making problem. In this paper, we propose a deep reinforcement learning framework to control the rebalancing of AMoD systems through graph neural networks. Crucially, we demonstrate that graph neural networks enable reinforcement learning agents to recover behavior policies that are significantly more transferable, generalizable, and scalable than policies learned through other approaches. Empirically, we show how the learned policies exhibit promising zero-shot transfer capabilities when faced with critical portability tasks such as inter-city generalization, service area expansion, and adaptation to potentially complex urban topologies.
abstract_zh: 自主按需移动 (AMoD) 系统代表了一种快速发展的交通模式，其中出行请求由协调的机器人自动驾驶车队动态处理。给定交通网络的图形表示（例如，其中节点代表城市区域，并连接它们之间的连接），我们认为 AMoD 控制问题自然地被视为节点明智的决策问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种深度强化学习框架，通过图神经网络控制 AMoD 系统的再平衡。至关重要的是，我们证明图神经网络使强化学习代理能够恢复行为策略，这些策略比通过其他方法学习的策略明显更具可转移性、可推广性和可扩展性。根据经验，我们展示了在面临城市间泛化、服务区扩展和适应潜在复杂的城市拓扑等关键可移植性任务时，学习的策略如何表现出有前景的零样本传输能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图神经网络的深度强化学习框架，用于优化自主按需出行系统（AMoD）的车辆再平衡控制。
AI.motivation: AMoD系统需要动态处理出行请求，传统方法在跨城市泛化、区域扩展和复杂城市拓扑适应性方面存在不足，需更高效且可扩展的解决方案。
AI.method: 将交通网络建模为图结构，利用图神经网络捕捉节点间空间依赖关系，并结合强化学习训练节点级别的决策策略以实现车辆再平衡。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在零样本迁移任务中表现优异，包括跨城市泛化、服务区域扩展及复杂城市拓扑适应。
AI.conclusion: 图神经网络强化学习方法显著提升了AMoD控制策略的可转移性、泛化能力和可扩展性，为实际部署提供了有效技术路径。

authors_text: Woodo Lee,Jakyung Koo,Nokyung Park,Pilgu Kang,Jeakwon Shim
title: A Framework for Recognizing and Estimating Human Concentration Levels
title_zh: 识别和估计人类浓度水平的框架
abstract: One of the major tasks in online education is to estimate the concentration levels of each student. Previous studies have a limitation of classifying the levels using discrete states only. The purpose of this paper is to estimate the subtle levels as specified states by using the minimum amount of body movement data. This is done by a framework composed of a Deep Neural Network and Kalman Filter. Using this framework, we successfully extracted the concentration levels, which can be used to aid lecturers and expand to other areas.
summary: One of the major tasks in online education is to estimate the concentration levels of each student. Previous studies have a limitation of classifying the levels using discrete states only. The purpose of this paper is to estimate the subtle levels as specified states by using the minimum amount of body movement data. This is done by a framework composed of a Deep Neural Network and Kalman Filter. Using this framework, we successfully extracted the concentration levels, which can be used to aid lecturers and expand to other areas.
abstract_zh: 在线教育的主要任务之一是估计每个学生的注意力水平。以前的研究存在仅使用离散状态对级别进行分类的局限性。本文的目的是通过使用最少量的身体运动数据来估计指定状态的微妙水平。这是通过由深度神经网络和卡尔曼滤波器组成的框架来完成的。使用这个框架，我们成功地提取了浓度水平，可用于帮助讲师并扩展到其他领域。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个结合深度神经网络和卡尔曼滤波的框架，用于通过最少身体运动数据估计人类注意力的细微层次。
AI.motivation: 现有研究仅能通过离散状态分类估计注意力水平，无法捕捉细微变化，且需大量数据，限制了实际应用效果。
AI.method: 设计包含深度神经网络（DNN）和卡尔曼滤波的混合框架，利用DNN提取特征并结合卡尔曼滤波优化动态估计过程。
AI.result: 成功从少量身体运动数据中提取出连续的注意力水平，可辅助教师调整教学并拓展至其他场景。
AI.conclusion: 该框架以低数据量实现高精度注意力估计，为在线教育及人机交互领域提供了有效工具。

search_text: A Framework for Recognizing and Estimating Human Concentration Levels 识别和估计人类浓度水平的框架 One of the major tasks in online education is to estimate the concentration levels of each student. Previous studies have a limitation of classifying the levels using discrete states only. The purpose of this paper is to estimate the subtle levels as specified states by using the minimum amount of body movement data. This is done by a framework composed of a Deep Neural Network and Kalman Filter. Using this framework, we successfully extracted the concentration levels, which can be used to aid lecturers and expand to other areas. 在线教育的主要任务之一是估计每个学生的注意力水平。以前的研究存在仅使用离散状态对级别进行分类的局限性。本文的目的是通过使用最少量的身体运动数据来估计指定状态的微妙水平。这是通过由深度神经网络和卡尔曼滤波器组成的框架来完成的。使用这个框架，我们成功地提取了浓度水平，可用于帮助讲师并扩展到其他领域。 本文提出一个结合深度神经网络和卡尔曼滤波的框架，用于通过最少身体运动数据估计人类注意力的细微层次。 Woodo Lee,Jakyung Koo,Nokyung Park,Pilgu Kang,Jeakwon Shim cs.LG,eess.IV,eess.SP

authors_text: Sergio Cabello,Arun Kumar Das,Sandip Das,Joydeep Mukherjee
title: Finding a Largest-Area Triangle in a Terrain in Near-Linear Time
title_zh: 在近线性时间内找到地形中面积最大的三角形
abstract: A terrain is an $x$-monotone polygon whose lower boundary is a single line segment. We present an algorithm to find in a terrain a triangle of largest area in $O(n \log n)$ time, where $n$ is the number of vertices defining the terrain. The best previous algorithm for this problem has a running time of $O(n^2)$.
summary: A terrain is an $x$-monotone polygon whose lower boundary is a single line segment. We present an algorithm to find in a terrain a triangle of largest area in $O(n \log n)$ time, where $n$ is the number of vertices defining the terrain. The best previous algorithm for this problem has a running time of $O(n^2)$.
abstract_zh: 地形是一个 $x$ 单调多边形，其下边界是一条线段。我们提出了一种算法，可以在 $O(n \log n)$ 时间内找到地形中面积最大的三角形，其中 $n$ 是定义地形的顶点数。此问题的最佳先前算法的运行时间为 $O(n^2)$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在地形中寻找最大面积三角形的近线性时间算法。
AI.motivation: 此前寻找地形中最大面积三角形的最优算法时间复杂度为O(n²)，无法高效处理大规模数据，需改进算法效率。
AI.method: 利用地形的几何特性，结合分治策略与优化搜索，设计了时间复杂度为O(n log n)的算法。
AI.result: 成功将算法时间复杂度从O(n²)降低至O(n log n)，实现了更高效的计算。
AI.conclusion: 该算法显著提升了地形中最大面积三角形求解的效率，为相关几何计算问题提供了新方法。

authors_text: Yige Peng,Lei Bi,Ashnil Kumar,Michael Fulham,Dagan Feng,Jinman Kim
title: Predicting Distant Metastases in Soft-Tissue Sarcomas from PET-CT scans using Constrained Hierarchical Multi-Modality Feature Learning
title_zh: 使用约束分层多模态特征学习从 PET-CT 扫描预测软组织肉瘤的远处转移
abstract: Distant metastases (DM) refer to the dissemination of tumors, usually, beyond the organ where the tumor originated. They are the leading cause of death in patients with soft-tissue sarcomas (STSs). Positron emission tomography-computed tomography (PET-CT) is regarded as the imaging modality of choice for the management of STSs. It is difficult to determine from imaging studies which STS patients will develop metastases. 'Radiomics' refers to the extraction and analysis of quantitative features from medical images and it has been employed to help identify such tumors. The state-of-the-art in radiomics is based on convolutional neural networks (CNNs). Most CNNs are designed for single-modality imaging data (CT or PET alone) and do not exploit the information embedded in PET-CT where there is a combination of an anatomical and functional imaging modality. Furthermore, most radiomic methods rely on manual input from imaging specialists for tumor delineation, definition and selection of radiomic features. This approach, however, may not be scalable to tumors with complex boundaries and where there are multiple other sites of disease. We outline a new 3D CNN to help predict DM in STS patients from PET-CT data. The 3D CNN uses a constrained feature learning module and a hierarchical multi-modality feature learning module that leverages the complementary information from the modalities to focus on semantically important regions. Our results on a public PET-CT dataset of STS patients show that multi-modal information improves the ability to identify those patients who develop DM. Further our method outperformed all other related state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Distant metastases (DM) refer to the dissemination of tumors, usually, beyond the organ where the tumor originated. They are the leading cause of death in patients with soft-tissue sarcomas (STSs). Positron emission tomography-computed tomography (PET-CT) is regarded as the imaging modality of choice for the management of STSs. It is difficult to determine from imaging studies which STS patients will develop metastases. 'Radiomics' refers to the extraction and analysis of quantitative features from medical images and it has been employed to help identify such tumors. The state-of-the-art in radiomics is based on convolutional neural networks (CNNs). Most CNNs are designed for single-modality imaging data (CT or PET alone) and do not exploit the information embedded in PET-CT where there is a combination of an anatomical and functional imaging modality. Furthermore, most radiomic methods rely on manual input from imaging specialists for tumor delineation, definition and selection of radiomic features. This approach, however, may not be scalable to tumors with complex boundaries and where there are multiple other sites of disease. We outline a new 3D CNN to help predict DM in STS patients from PET-CT data. The 3D CNN uses a constrained feature learning module and a hierarchical multi-modality feature learning module that leverages the complementary information from the modalities to focus on semantically important regions. Our results on a public PET-CT dataset of STS patients show that multi-modal information improves the ability to identify those patients who develop DM. Further our method outperformed all other related state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 远处转移（DM）是指肿瘤的播散，通常超出肿瘤起源的器官。它们是软组织肉瘤（STS）患者死亡的主要原因。正电子发射断层扫描-计算机断层扫描 (PET-CT) 被认为是治疗 STS 的首选成像方式。通过影像学研究很难确定哪些 STS 患者会发生转移。 “放射组学”是指从医学图像中提取和分析定量特征，它已被用来帮助识别此类肿瘤。最先进的放射组学基于卷积神经网络 (CNN)。大多数 CNN 都是针对单模态成像数据（单独的 CT 或 PET）而设计的，并且不会利用 PET-CT 中嵌入的信息，因为 PET-CT 中存在解剖学和功能成像模态的组合。此外，大多数放射组学方法依赖于成像专家的手动输入来进行肿瘤描绘、定义和放射组学特征的选择。然而，这种方法可能无法扩展到具有复杂边界和存在多个其他疾病部位的肿瘤。我们概述了一种新的 3D CNN，可帮助根据 PET-CT 数据预测 STS 患者的糖尿病。 3D CNN 使用约束特征学习模块和分层多模态特征学习模块，该模块利用模态的互补信息来关注语义上重要的区域。我们对 STS 患者的公共 PET-CT 数据集的结果表明，多模态信息提高了识别患有 DM 的患者的能力。此外，我们的方法优于所有其他相关的最先进方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于3D卷积神经网络（CNN）的方法，从PET-CT扫描中预测软组织肉瘤患者的远处转移。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未能有效利用PET-CT的多模态信息，且依赖人工标注，限制了其在复杂病例中的应用。
AI.method: 设计了一种3D CNN，包含约束特征学习模块和分层多模态特征学习模块，以整合PET和CT的互补信息，自动提取关键特征。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上，多模态方法优于其他现有方法，提高了远处转移预测的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 多模态特征学习有效提升了预测性能，为STS远处转移的早期检测提供了新方法。

authors_text: Thomas E. Portegys
title: A modularity comparison of Long Short-Term Memory and Morphognosis neural networks
title_zh: 长短期记忆和形态认知神经网络的模块化比较
abstract: This study compares the modularity performance of two artificial neural network architectures: a Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) recurrent network, and Morphognosis, a neural network based on a hierarchy of spatial and temporal contexts. Mazes are used to measure performance, defined as the ability to utilize independently learned mazes to solve mazes composed of them. A maze is a sequence of rooms connected by doors. The modular task is implemented as follows: at the beginning of the maze, an initial door choice forms a context that must be retained until the end of an intervening maze, where the same door must be chosen again to reach the goal. For testing, the door-association mazes and separately trained intervening mazes are presented together for the first time. While both neural networks perform well during training, the testing performance of Morphognosis is significantly better than LSTM on this modular task.
summary: This study compares the modularity performance of two artificial neural network architectures: a Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) recurrent network, and Morphognosis, a neural network based on a hierarchy of spatial and temporal contexts. Mazes are used to measure performance, defined as the ability to utilize independently learned mazes to solve mazes composed of them. A maze is a sequence of rooms connected by doors. The modular task is implemented as follows: at the beginning of the maze, an initial door choice forms a context that must be retained until the end of an intervening maze, where the same door must be chosen again to reach the goal. For testing, the door-association mazes and separately trained intervening mazes are presented together for the first time. While both neural networks perform well during training, the testing performance of Morphognosis is significantly better than LSTM on this modular task.
abstract_zh: 本研究比较了两种人工神经网络架构的模块化性能：长短期记忆 (LSTM) 循环网络和 Morphognosis，一种基于空间和时间上下文层次结构的神经网络。迷宫用于衡量性能，定义为利用独立学习的迷宫来解决由它们组成的迷宫的能力。迷宫是由门连接的一系列房间。模块化任务的实现方式如下：在迷宫开始时，初始门选择形成一个必须保留的上下文，直到中间迷宫的末尾，必须再次选择相同的门才能达到目标。为了进行测试，首次将门关联迷宫和单独训练的干预迷宫一起呈现。虽然两个神经网络在训练期间都表现良好，但 Morphognosis 在此模块化任务上的测试性能明显优于 LSTM。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了长短期记忆网络（LSTM）和Morphognosis神经网络在模块化任务中的性能，使用迷宫任务作为评估指标。
AI.motivation: 现有序列模型在处理需要长期依赖和模块化结构的任务时存在局限，而Morphognosis通过层次化时空上下文可能具备优势。
AI.method: 设计迷宫任务作为模块化测试场景，要求模型在初始门选择后保留上下文信息以解决组合迷宫，通过训练与测试表现对比两种网络。
AI.result: LSTM和Morphognosis在训练阶段表现良好，但Morphognosis在测试阶段的模块化任务中显著优于LSTM。
AI.conclusion: Morphognosis的层次化时空结构使其在需要跨模块信息整合的任务中比LSTM更具优势。

search_text: A modularity comparison of Long Short-Term Memory and Morphognosis neural networks 长短期记忆和形态认知神经网络的模块化比较 This study compares the modularity performance of two artificial neural network architectures: a Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) recurrent network, and Morphognosis, a neural network based on a hierarchy of spatial and temporal contexts. Mazes are used to measure performance, defined as the ability to utilize independently learned mazes to solve mazes composed of them. A maze is a sequence of rooms connected by doors. The modular task is implemented as follows: at the beginning of the maze, an initial door choice forms a context that must be retained until the end of an intervening maze, where the same door must be chosen again to reach the goal. For testing, the door-association mazes and separately trained intervening mazes are presented together for the first time. While both neural networks perform well during training, the testing performance of Morphognosis is significantly better than LSTM on this modular task. 本研究比较了两种人工神经网络架构的模块化性能：长短期记忆 (LSTM) 循环网络和 Morphognosis，一种基于空间和时间上下文层次结构的神经网络。迷宫用于衡量性能，定义为利用独立学习的迷宫来解决由它们组成的迷宫的能力。迷宫是由门连接的一系列房间。模块化任务的实现方式如下：在迷宫开始时，初始门选择形成一个必须保留的上下文，直到中间迷宫的末尾，必须再次选择相同的门才能达到目标。为了进行测试，首次将门关联迷宫和单独训练的干预迷宫一起呈现。虽然两个神经网络在训练期间都表现良好，但 Morphognosis 在此模块化任务上的测试性能明显优于 LSTM。 本文比较了长短期记忆网络（LSTM）和Morphognosis神经网络在模块化任务中的性能，使用迷宫任务作为评估指标。 Thomas E. Portegys cs.LG,cs.NE
